metadata.description: 中华人民共和国国家标准 GB/T 2260 行政区划代码

summary.zh: 该项目提供中华人民共和国国家标准 GB/T 2260 的县及县级以上行政区划代码数据，支持多语言实现（Python、JavaScript、Ruby、Java、Go 等），便于开发者集成到各类应用中构建地理信息系统或数据库。
summary.en: This repository provides the official GB/T 2260 standard for county-level and above administrative division codes in China, with implementations in multiple programming languages (Python, JavaScript, Ruby, Java, Go, etc.), enabling developers to integrate authoritative geographic data into their applications.

metadata.name: electronic-wechat
metadata.description: :speech_balloon: A better WeChat on macOS and Linux. Built with Electron by Zhongyi Tong.

summary.zh: Electronic WeChat 是一款基于 Electron 开发的 macOS 和 Linux 平台第三方微信客户端，旨在提供比官方版本更优的体验。支持防消息撤回、原生应用行为优化、直接访问被屏蔽链接等功能。项目已不再维护，但可作为学习 Electron 和逆向工程的参考。
summary.en: Electronic WeChat is a third-party WeChat client for macOS and Linux built with Electron, offering enhanced features like blocking message recalls, native app behavior, and bypassing URL redirects. Though no longer maintained, it serves as a valuable reference for Electron development and reverse engineering.

metadata.name: frp
metadata.description: A fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the internet.

summary.zh: frp 是一款快速反向代理工具，用于将位于 NAT 或防火墙后的本地服务器暴露到公网。支持 TCP、UDP、HTTP 和 HTTPS 协议转发，提供 P2P 直连模式，适用于内网穿透、远程访问和私有服务暴露，配置灵活且性能优异。
summary.en: frp is a fast reverse proxy that enables exposing local servers behind NAT or firewalls to the internet. It supports TCP, UDP, HTTP, and HTTPS forwarding, offers a P2P connection mode, and is ideal for remote access, internal service exposure, and secure tunneling with high performance and flexible configuration.

metadata.name: react-native-sudoku
metadata.description: a sudoku game written in React Native

summary.zh: 一个基于 React Native 开发的数独游戏，支持动画效果、编辑模式、游戏恢复和在线排行榜功能。目前仅提供高难度关卡，作者记录为 3 分 43 秒。使用 LeanCloud 存储成绩，适合移动端数独爱好者挑战。
summary.en: A Sudoku game built with React Native featuring animations, editing mode, game resume, and online leaderboards. Currently offers only a master-level puzzle, with the creator's record at 03:43. Uses LeanCloud for score storage, ideal for mobile Sudoku enthusiasts.

metadata.name: lumen
metadata.description: Magic auto brightness based on screen contents 💡

summary.zh: Lumen 是一款 macOS 菜单栏应用，能根据屏幕内容自动调节亮度。它通过分析当前显示内容（如暗色终端或亮色网页）智能调整屏幕亮度，提升夜间使用体验。用户只需正常使用亮度键，Lumen 即可学习偏好并自动优化。
summary.en: Lumen is a macOS menu bar app that intelligently adjusts screen brightness based on displayed content. It brightens the screen for dark windows (e.g., terminals) and dims it for bright ones (e.g., browsers), learning user preferences through normal brightness key usage for a better viewing experience, especially at night.

metadata.name: 30-days-of-react-native
metadata.description: 30 days of React Native demos

summary.zh: 这是一个为期30天的React Native实战项目，涵盖从基础组件到复杂交互的完整学习路径。包含秒表、天气应用、地图定位、手势操作、动画效果、Touch ID解锁等丰富示例，适合React Native初学者系统掌握移动端开发技能。
summary.en: A 30-day React Native hands-on project covering a complete learning path from basic components to complex interactions. Includes rich examples like stopwatch, weather app, map geolocation, gesture handling, animations, Touch ID unlock, ideal for beginners to master mobile development systematically.

metadata.name: react-native-guide
metadata.description: React Native指南汇集了各类react-native学习资源、开源App和组件

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个全面的React Native学习资源聚合指南，涵盖官方文档、中文教程、开源项目、组件库、开发工具及实战案例，特别提供从入门到进阶的系统化学习路径，并整合ES6、Redux等关键技术内容，助力开发者快速掌握跨平台移动应用开发。
summary.en: This repository aggregates comprehensive React Native learning resources, including official docs, tutorials, open-source apps, UI components, and tools. It offers structured learning paths from beginner to advanced levels, with integrated coverage of ES6, Redux, and native module development for efficient cross-platform mobile development.

metadata.name: serpy
metadata.description: ridiculously fast object serialization

summary.zh: serpy 是一个专注于极致速度的 Python 对象序列化框架，支持将 Django 模型、自定义类等复杂数据类型高效转换为字典、列表等原生类型，便于 JSON 输出。相比 marshmallow 和 Django REST Framework，其性能高出至少一个数量级，适用于高性能 API 场景。
summary.en: serpy is a high-performance Python object serialization library designed for speed, converting complex types like Django models and custom classes into native Python types (dicts, lists, etc.) for easy JSON conversion. It outperforms marshmallow and Django REST Framework serializers by an order of magnitude, ideal for high-throughput APIs.

metadata.name: html-json-forms
metadata.description: Python implementation of the (inactive) HTML JSON Forms spec.

summary.zh: html-json-forms 是一个实现未正式定稿的 HTML JSON Forms 规范的 Python 库，专为 Django REST Framework 设计。它通过数组式命名规则（如 items[0][name]）将传统 HTML 表单数据解析为嵌套 JSON 结构，支持前后端兼容处理，适用于需要结构化表单提交的场景。
summary.en: html-json-forms is a Python library implementing the (unfinalized) HTML JSON Forms spec, designed for Django REST Framework. It parses traditional HTML form fields with array-style names (e.g., items[0][name]) into nested JSON objects, enabling structured data submission while maintaining backward compatibility with legacy clients.

metadata.name: react-native-tab-navigator
metadata.description: A tab bar that switches between scenes, written in JS for cross-platform support

summary.zh: 一个基于 JavaScript 实现的跨平台 React Native 标签栏导航组件，支持 iOS 和 Android。提供灵活的图标、徽章、样式自定义能力，不依赖其他导航库，API 简洁易用，适合需要轻量级标签切换场景的应用。
summary.en: A cross-platform tab bar navigator for React Native, built in pure JavaScript with support for iOS and Android. Offers customizable icons, badges, and styles, operates independently without external navigation dependencies, ideal for lightweight tab-based navigation.

metadata.name: ZeroNet
metadata.description: ZeroNet - Decentralized websites using Bitcoin crypto and BitTorrent network

summary.zh: ZeroNet 是一个基于比特币加密和 BitTorrent 网络的去中心化网站平台，支持实时更新、离线访问和 Tor 匿名网络。用户无需服务器即可托管网站，内容通过 P2P 网络分发，具备抗审查、无单点故障和零托管成本等特性，同时集成 SQL 数据库与 BIP32 无密码认证。
summary.en: ZeroNet is a decentralized web platform leveraging Bitcoin cryptography and the BitTorrent network to host censorship-resistant websites. It enables real-time updates, offline access, and Tor anonymity, with no hosting costs or single points of failure. Features include P2P content distribution, built-in SQL sync, and password-less BIP32 authentication.

metadata.name: file_sync
metadata.description: Detect file modification in background and push it to git automatically.

summary.zh: file_sync 是一个基于 Python 的自动化文件同步工具，利用 watchdog 监控指定文件的修改，并自动提交到 Git 仓库。适用于配置文件、开发环境设置等需要版本追踪的场景，支持跨平台后台运行与开机自启。
summary.en: file_sync is a Python-based tool that monitors file changes using watchdog and automatically commits them to a Git repository. Ideal for versioning config files or development settings, it supports background execution and auto-start on boot across platforms.

metadata.name: v2ex-gae
metadata.description: Legacy code of V2EX running on Google App Engine

summary.zh: Project Babel 2 是一个基于 Python 和 Google App Engine 构建的开源社区平台，驱动了 V2EX 社区。支持节点分类、多主题适配、WebDAV 头像托管、Atom 订阅、OAuth 推特集成、MapReduce 数据优化及 Gravatar 等功能，具备高可扩展性与现代浏览器优化，适合构建高性能兴趣社区。
summary.en: Project Babel 2 is an open-source community platform built with Python on Google App Engine, powering V2EX. It features node-based organization, dual themes for desktop and mobile, WebDAV avatar hosting, Atom feeds, OAuth Twitter integration, MapReduce data optimization, and Gravatar support, designed for scalable, high-performance online communities.

metadata.name: codelf
metadata.description: A search tool helps dev to solve the naming things problem.

summary.zh: Codelf 是一款帮助开发者解决变量命名难题的搜索工具，通过聚合 GitHub、GitLab、Bitbucket 等平台的真实项目代码，提供高相关性的命名建议。同时集成算法练习本与 GitHub 仓库标签管理功能，支持 VS Code、Atom、Sublime 等编辑器插件，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Codelf is a search tool that helps developers solve the 'naming things' problem by analyzing real-world variable usage across GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, and other code repositories. It also features a daily algorithm copybook and GitHub repository tagging, with plugins for VS Code, Atom, and Sublime Text.

metadata.name: ReactNativeTestApp
metadata.description: 利用reactnative技术，开发，生成app

summary.zh: 该项目是基于 React Native 开发的移动端应用示例，参考淘宝界面设计，实现了包含首页、微淘、社区、购物车和个人中心的多标签页结构。项目展示了 RN 的组件化开发、TabBar 导航、图标与徽章管理等功能，并提及已上线支持热更新的 iOS 应用，适合学习 RN 跨平台开发与原生交互。
summary.en: This project is a React Native-based mobile app demo inspired by Taobao's UI, featuring a multi-tab structure including Home, Weitao, Community, Cart, and Profile. It demonstrates component-based development, TabBar navigation, icon and badge management, and mentions a published iOS app with hot update support, ideal for learning cross-platform development and native integration.

metadata.name: React-Dou
metadata.description: Douban Search App Based on React Native

summary.zh: React-Dou 是一款基于 React Native 开发的豆瓣搜索应用，集成豆瓣开放 API，支持图书、音乐和电影的搜索、列表展示及详情查看功能，界面简洁流畅，适合移动端跨平台开发学习与实践。
summary.en: React-Dou is a Douban search app built with React Native, leveraging the Douban Open API to enable searching, listing, and viewing details of books, music, and movies, offering a clean UI and cross-platform mobile experience.

metadata.name: React-Native-App
metadata.description: RN 开源之初，写几个Mini-App

summary.zh: 该项目是React Native早期实战案例集合，包含通讯录管理、LBS附近服务、豆瓣搜索及小游戏等Mini-App。通讯录App集成Node.js文件服务后端，支持联系人管理、公告展示与WebView嵌入；附近App基于地理位置实现美食、银行等POI搜索与地图展示，适合学习RN与原生模块交互。
summary.en: This repo contains early React Native practice projects, including a contact management app with Node.js file-based backend, an LBS-based 'Nearby' app for finding restaurants, banks, etc., a Douban search app using open API, and a simple social game. Ideal for learning RN integration with native features and backend services.

metadata.name: django-jquery-file-upload
metadata.description: A minimal django project containing a minimal app with a working jquery file upload form based on the work by Sebastian Tschan: http://aquantum-demo.appspot.com/file-upload

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Django 的最小化项目，集成了 Sebastian Tschan 的 jQuery File Upload 插件，提供拖拽上传、多文件选择、取消上传及删除文件等功能，无需 Flash 插件，适用于 Django 环境下的文件上传场景。
summary.en: A minimal Django project integrating Sebastian Tschan's jQuery File Upload plugin, supporting drag-and-drop, multiple file selection, upload cancellation, and file deletion, with no Flash dependency, ideal for file uploads in Django applications.

metadata.name: django-basic-apps
metadata.description: Simple prebuilt applications.

summary.zh: Django Basic Apps 是一组为 Django 项目预构建的简单应用，包含博客、内联内容插入等功能。支持 Markdown 渲染、标签系统和评论集成，依赖 Django Comments、Tagging、BeautifulSoup 等库，适合快速搭建基础功能模块。
summary.en: Django Basic Apps provides prebuilt, simple applications for Django projects, including a blog and inline content insertion via template filters. It supports Markdown, tagging, and comments, relying on libraries like BeautifulSoup and Django Tagging for rapid feature integration.

metadata.name: react-native-lesson
metadata.description: React Native入门指南

summary.zh: 这是一个系统的 React Native 入门教程项目，涵盖从环境搭建、代码结构到布局、UI 组件、JSX 应用及原生集成的完整学习路径，适合初学者循序渐进掌握跨平台移动开发技能。
summary.en: A comprehensive React Native beginner tutorial covering environment setup, code structure, layout, UI components, JSX usage, and native integration, ideal for learning cross-platform mobile development step by step.

metadata.name: react-native-hiapp
metadata.description: HiApp written in react-native.

summary.zh: 该项目是基于 React Native 开发的 HiApp 移动端应用，支持 iOS 和 Android 双平台。使用 React Native 0.61.1 版本构建，提供完整的开发环境配置指南，包括依赖安装、调试工具和运行命令。项目采用 MIT 开源协议，适合学习和二次开发。
summary.en: This project is a mobile app called HiApp built with React Native, supporting both iOS and Android platforms. It uses React Native 0.61.1 and includes setup instructions for dependencies, debugging, and running on devices. Released under the MIT license, it's suitable for learning and further development.

metadata.name: elasticsearch-definitive-guide
metadata.description: elasticsearch 权威指南

summary.zh: 本项目是《Elasticsearch权威指南》的中文翻译版本，由Gavin Foo基于官方文档整理并持续更新。内容涵盖Elasticsearch的核心概念、搜索技术、数据建模、集群配置与性能优化等，适用于需要实时搜索与分析能力的开发者与运维人员，填补了中文资料的空白。
summary.en: This project is the Chinese translation of 'Elasticsearch: The Definitive Guide', maintained by Gavin Foo. It covers core concepts, search techniques, data modeling, cluster configuration, and performance optimization, serving as a comprehensive resource for developers and operators working with real-time search and analytics.

metadata.name: elasticsearch-definitive-guide-cn
metadata.description: Elasticsearch权威指南中文版

summary.zh: 《Elasticsearch权威指南》中文版是由Looly及多位贡献者共同翻译的Elasticsearch官方权威教程中文版本，旨在帮助中文开发者系统掌握Elasticsearch的核心概念、架构设计与实战应用。内容涵盖索引、搜索、聚合、分析器等关键技术，是学习Elasticsearch的优质中文资源。
summary.en: The Chinese translation of 'Elasticsearch: The Definitive Guide' by Looly and contributors provides a comprehensive, localized resource for mastering Elasticsearch. It covers core concepts like indexing, searching, aggregations, and analyzers, serving as an essential guide for Chinese-speaking developers to deeply understand and apply Elasticsearch in real-world scenarios.

metadata.name: imouto
metadata.description: 快速、明确、极简

summary.zh: 妹v2 是一款基于 PHP 和 MySQL 的极简博客程序，采用 iTorr.JS 框架与 Q.JS 实现前后端分离单页路由。支持 Markdown 写作、代码高亮、多用户、分类、原生/多说评论、拖拽上传及微博提醒，专为 SAE 和 Hostker 优化，配置简单，强调快速、明确、极简的内容呈现。
summary.en: Imouto v2 is a minimalist blog system built on PHP and MySQL, powered by the iTorr.JS framework and Q.JS for SPA routing. It supports Markdown, syntax highlighting, multi-user, categories, native/Duoshuo comments, drag-and-drop image upload, and Weibo notifications, optimized for SAE and Hostker with simple configuration.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-yilia
metadata.description: 一个简洁优雅的hexo主题  A simple and elegant theme for hexo.

summary.zh: Yilia 是一款为 Hexo 博客框架设计的简洁优雅主题，强调简约设计与极致性能，支持移动端适配、目录导航、打赏、搜索等功能。采用 Webpack 构建优化加载速度，提供丰富的自定义配置，适合注重内容呈现与用户体验的博主使用。
summary.en: Yilia is a simple and elegant theme for Hexo, focusing on minimalist design and high performance. It supports mobile responsiveness, TOC, rewards, search, and more. Built with Webpack for optimized loading, it offers extensive customization options for bloggers prioritizing content and user experience.

metadata.name: gfw_whitelist
metadata.description: gfw_whitelist

summary.zh: 该项目提供基于白名单机制的 PAC 文件，用于科学上网。通过仅允许国内常用网站直连、其余流量走代理的方式，降低维护成本并提升稳定性。支持域名与 IP 白名单，结合黑名单生成高效 proxy.pac，适配 Chrome、Firefox 等浏览器，兼容 SOCKS5/HTTPS 代理，适合追求免维护的用户。
summary.en: This project provides PAC files based on a whitelist approach for bypassing internet censorship. It allows direct access to common domestic sites while routing all other traffic through a proxy, reducing maintenance needs and improving reliability. It supports domain and IP whitelists, combines with blacklists for optimized proxy.pac generation, and works with Chrome, Firefox, and various proxy types like SOCKS5/HTTPS.

metadata.name: django-wpadmin
metadata.description: WordPress look and feel for Django administration panel

summary.zh: Django WP Admin 为 Django 管理后台提供 WordPress 风格的界面，支持响应式设计、可配置菜单、Font Awesome 图标、多主题切换及多 AdminSite 支持，提升管理界面美观度与用户体验。
summary.en: Django WP Admin gives the Django admin panel a WordPress-inspired look and feel, featuring responsive design, customizable menus, Font Awesome icons, multiple color themes, and support for multiple AdminSites, enhancing both aesthetics and usability.

metadata.name: docopt
metadata.description: Create *beautiful* command-line interfaces with Python

summary.zh: docopt 是一个基于文档字符串自动生成命令行接口的 Python 库，通过编写美观的帮助信息即可定义命令、选项和参数，无需重复编写解析逻辑。支持默认值、选项重复、参数验证等特性，显著提升 CLI 开发效率与可维护性。
summary.en: docopt is a Python library that generates command-line interfaces from beautifully written docstrings. It parses usage patterns and option descriptions to automatically handle arguments, options, and commands, eliminating the need for manual parser code and improving CLI clarity and maintainability.

metadata.name: RimeFiles
metadata.description: Rime 词库及配置

summary.zh: 该项目提供 Rime 输入法的个性化配置与扩展词库，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 多平台。包含自定义输入方案、外观样式、快捷键设置及词库扩展文件，适用于提升中文输入效率与体验。
summary.en: This repository offers personalized configurations and extended dictionaries for Rime input method across Windows, macOS, and Linux. It includes custom input schemas, UI themes, key bindings, and dictionary expansions to enhance Chinese typing efficiency and user experience.

metadata.name: MyPlatform
metadata.description: 文科生也会配的微信个人号后台，Content based wechat massive platform framework, what you need to do is only adding your articles in :)

summary.zh: MyPlatform 是一个面向非技术用户的微信个人号后台框架，支持基于内容的自动化公众号管理。用户只需添加文章即可快速搭建个性化微信平台，配置简单、完全免费，适合文科生或初学者在20分钟内完成部署，无需编程基础。
summary.en: MyPlatform is a content-based WeChat personal account backend framework designed for non-technical users. It allows anyone to set up a customized WeChat public platform in about 20 minutes by simply adding articles, with free deployment and no coding required.

metadata.name: ItChat
metadata.description: A complete and graceful API for Wechat. 微信个人号接口、微信机器人及命令行微信，三十行即可自定义个人号机器人。

summary.zh: itchat 是一个开源的微信个人号 API，支持 Python 调用，实现消息收发、自动回复、文件传输、群聊处理等功能。三十行代码即可搭建自定义机器人，支持命令行二维码登录、热重载、多实例运行，适用于微信自动化与个人助手开发。
summary.en: itchat is an open-source WeChat personal account API for Python, enabling message handling, auto-reply, file transfer, and group chat interaction. With just thirty lines of code, users can build custom bots. It supports CLI QR login, hot reload, and multi-instance operation for automation and personal assistant development.

metadata.name: django-request
metadata.description: django-request is a statistics module for django. It stores requests in a database for admins to see, it can also be used to get statistics on who is online etc.

summary.zh: django-request 是一个 Django 应用模块，用于记录和存储 HTTP 请求数据到数据库，支持在 Django 管理后台查看访问统计信息，如在线用户、流量趋势和来源分析。提供 active_users 查询方法，可实时追踪指定时间窗口内的活跃用户，适用于网站访问监控与用户行为分析。
summary.en: django-request is a Django app that logs HTTP requests into a database, enabling admins to view traffic statistics via the Django admin interface. It supports real-time tracking of active users with the active_users manager method and provides insights into visitor behavior, referrers, and site usage patterns.

metadata.name: AndroidGuide
metadata.description: AndroidCat安卓书签导航集合

summary.zh: AndroidCat 是一个专为 Android 开发者打造的网址导航集合，涵盖官方文档、技术社区、开源项目、教程博客、开发框架等八大类资源，旨在帮助开发者高效获取优质学习与实践资料，提升开发效率。
summary.en: AndroidCat is a curated collection of Android development resources, including official docs, tech communities, tutorials, open-source projects, and frameworks. It serves as a one-stop navigation hub for developers to discover high-quality learning and development tools.

metadata.name: one-python
metadata.description: We don't need a lot of libraries. We just need the best ones. | Unofficial recommended first choice.

summary.zh: 该项目精选Python生态中最优质、高效的库与框架，覆盖机器学习、深度学习、OCR、网络爬虫、自然语言处理等关键领域，强调‘少而精’的理念，为开发者提供权威推荐的一流工具集合。
summary.en: This project curates the best Python libraries and frameworks across key domains like machine learning, deep learning, OCR, web scraping, and NLP, advocating a 'less but better' philosophy with unofficial top-tier recommendations for developers.

metadata.name: celery-task-tigger
metadata.description: A controllable timing task widgets with Celery

summary.zh: celery-task-tigger 是一个基于 Celery 的可控定时任务组件，支持设置任务执行次数（max_times）和执行间隔（countdown），适用于需要精确控制任务频率的场景。它兼容 Celery 3/4，通过装饰器简化周期性任务的开发，无需依赖 celery beat。
summary.en: celery-task-tigger is a controllable timing task widget built on Celery, supporting configurable execution frequency via max_times and countdown. It enables precise control over task scheduling without relying on celery beat, fully compatible with Celery 3/4, and simplifies periodic task development through a decorator-based API.

metadata.name: district
metadata.description: 中国省/自治区/直辖市、市/自治州、区/县/旗数据，包含名称、拼音、拼音首字母、行政代码、区号

summary.zh: 该项目提供中国完整的省、市、区三级行政区划数据，涵盖名称、拼音、首字母、行政代码及区号等关键字段，支持SQL与CSV格式导出，适用于地址系统、数据分析、GIS应用等场景，数据来源权威且持续更新。
summary.en: This repository provides comprehensive administrative division data for China, including provinces, cities, and counties, with fields like name, pinyin, initials, administrative codes, and area codes. Available in SQL and CSV formats, it's ideal for address systems, data analysis, and GIS applications, with authoritative and regularly updated sources.

metadata.name: ohmyzsh
metadata.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

summary.zh: Oh My Zsh 是一个由社区驱动的开源框架，用于简化 zsh 配置管理。它提供 300 多个插件（如 git、docker、node 等）和 140 多种主题，支持自动更新，显著提升终端使用体验与效率，适用于开发者日常命令行操作。
summary.en: Oh My Zsh is a community-driven open-source framework for managing zsh configurations. It offers 300+ plugins (e.g., git, docker, node) and 140+ themes, with auto-update functionality, greatly enhancing terminal usability and developer productivity.

metadata.name: awesome-python
metadata.description: An opinionated list of awesome Python frameworks, libraries, software and resources.

summary.zh: 这是一个精选的 Python 框架、库、软件和资源的集合，涵盖从 Web 开发、数据科学到机器学习、自动化等广泛领域。内容按功能分类，包括异步编程、数据库、测试工具等，是 Python 开发者查找高质量工具的权威指南。
summary.en: A curated list of high-quality Python frameworks, libraries, and resources across diverse domains like web development, data science, machine learning, and automation. Organized by functionality, it serves as a go-to reference for Python developers seeking reliable tools.

metadata.name: PinchImageView
metadata.description: 体验极佳的Android图片手势控件。An Android image gesture control with excellent user experience.

summary.zh: PinchImageView 是一款轻量级 Android 图片手势控件，继承自 ImageView，支持双指缩放、单指滑动、双击缩放及惯性滑动等丰富交互，具备边界回弹、大图分段加载和分辨率切换能力，无外部依赖，集成简单，适用于图片浏览、长图查看等场景。
summary.en: PinchImageView is a lightweight Android image gesture control extending ImageView, supporting pinch-to-zoom, single-finger swipe, double-tap zoom, and inertial scrolling. It features boundary rebound, segmented loading for large images, resolution switching, and has no external dependencies, making it ideal for image viewing and long-image browsing.

metadata.name: interview_python
metadata.description: 关于Python的面试题

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个全面的Python面试题库，涵盖Python语言特性、操作系统、数据库、网络、数据结构与算法等核心知识点，包含大量经典面试题与详细解答，如GIL、装饰器、生成器、MVCC、TCP三次握手等，适合求职者系统复习与查漏补缺。
summary.en: This repository is a comprehensive collection of Python interview questions, covering key topics such as Python language features, operating systems, databases, networking, data structures, and algorithms. It includes in-depth explanations of concepts like GIL, decorators, generators, MVCC, and TCP handshakes, ideal for interview preparation.

metadata.name: pyPdf
metadata.description: Pure-Python PDF Library; this repository is no longer maintained, please see https://github.com/knowah/PyPDF2/ insead.

summary.zh: pyPdf 是一个纯 Python 编写的 PDF 处理库，支持读取、合并、旋转、裁剪和添加水印等操作。尽管该项目已不再维护，但其功能为后续项目如 PyPDF2 奠定了基础，适用于需要轻量级 PDF 操作的场景。
summary.en: pyPdf is a pure-Python library for PDF manipulation, supporting operations like merging, rotating, cropping, and watermarking. Though no longer maintained, it laid the groundwork for successors like PyPDF2 and suits lightweight PDF processing needs.

metadata.name: pdfminer
metadata.description: Python PDF Parser (Not actively maintained). Check out pdfminer.six.

summary.zh: PDFMiner 是一个用于 PDF 文档文本提取的 Python 工具，支持 PDF-1.7 标准，可获取文本位置、字体、布局等信息，支持自动布局分析、转换为 HTML/XML、提取目录和标签内容，兼容 CJK 语言和垂直书写，支持基础加密。该项目已停止维护，推荐使用其活跃分支 pdfminer.six。
summary.en: PDFMiner is a Python-based tool for extracting text from PDF documents, supporting PDF-1.7, layout analysis, font and positioning data, conversion to HTML/XML, outline and tagged content extraction, CJK languages, vertical scripts, and basic encryption. The project is no longer actively maintained; users are advised to switch to its active fork, pdfminer.six.

metadata.name: pdf2htmlEX
metadata.description: Convert PDF to HTML without losing text or format.

summary.zh: pdf2htmlEX 是一款将 PDF 文件精准转换为 HTML 的开源工具，保留原始文本、字体、排版与布局，支持数学公式、复杂图表及中日韩文字。采用现代 Web 技术实现高质量渲染，适用于学术出版、在线文档展示等场景，输出文件体积小且支持交互功能。
summary.en: pdf2htmlEX is an open-source tool that converts PDF files to HTML while preserving original text, fonts, layout, and formatting. It supports complex elements like math formulas, figures, and CJK characters, using modern web technologies for high-fidelity rendering. Ideal for academic publishing and online document display, it produces compact, interactive HTML outputs.

metadata.name: django-notifications
metadata.description: GitHub notifications alike app for Django

summary.zh: django-notifications 是一个仿 GitHub 通知系统的 Django 应用，用于构建用户通知功能。它基于 Activity Streams 规范，支持通过 actor、verb、action_object 和 target 四要素描述事件，适用于 Django 4.2+ 和 Python 3.9+，提供信号机制生成通知，支持通用外键关联任意模型。
summary.en: django-notifications is a Django app mimicking GitHub's notification system, designed for user-centric event alerts. Built on the Activity Streams spec, it models actions via actor, verb, action_object, and target, supports Django 4.2+ and Python 3.9+, and uses signals to generate notifications with generic foreign keys for flexible model integration.

metadata.name: react-native-macos
metadata.description: [deprecated in favor of https://microsoft.github.io/react-native-windows/] React Native for macOS is an experimental fork for writing desktop apps using Cocoa

summary.zh: React Native macOS 是一个已废弃的实验性项目，旨在通过 Cocoa 框架使用 React Native 构建 macOS 桌面应用。该项目已被微软的 React Native Windows 取代，建议迁移至官方支持的跨平台方案。
summary.en: React Native macOS was an experimental fork enabling desktop app development for macOS using React Native and Cocoa. It is now deprecated in favor of Microsoft's actively maintained React Native for Windows, which supports cross-platform desktop development.

metadata.name: Wox
metadata.description: A cross-platform launcher that simply works

summary.zh: Wox 是一款跨平台开源启动器，支持快速搜索应用、文件、文件夹，集成 AI 聊天与 MCP 支持，提供插件与主题扩展，无需安装即可运行，支持 JavaScript 和 Python 插件开发，是 Alfred 和 Raycast 的轻量替代方案。
summary.en: Wox is a cross-platform open-source launcher enabling fast search for apps, files, and folders, with AI chat via MCP support, extensible through plugins and themes, runs as a single executable, and allows plugin development in JavaScript and Python, serving as a lightweight alternative to Alfred and Raycast.

metadata.name: django-newcache
metadata.description: Improved memcached cache backend for Django

summary.zh: django-newcache 是一个增强版的 Django memcached 缓存后端，支持 pylibmc、无限超时、键名哈希/版本化/环境标记，并有效缓解惊群效应。通过自动处理键名限制与缓存隔离，提升缓存安全性与稳定性，适用于多环境部署与高并发场景。
summary.en: django-newcache is an enhanced memcached backend for Django that supports pylibmc, infinite timeouts, key hashing/versioning/flavoring, and mitigates the thundering herd problem. It improves cache safety and stability across environments and high-concurrency workloads.

metadata.name: django-ft-cache
metadata.description: A fault-tolerant pylibmc cache backend for Django

summary.zh: django-ft-cache 是一个为 Django 框架设计的容错型 pylibmc 缓存后端。它在缓存操作失败时不会抛出异常，而是记录错误并模拟缓存未命中，避免应用因缓存故障返回 500 错误，提升系统稳定性。适用于对高可用性要求较高的生产环境。
summary.en: django-ft-cache is a fault-tolerant pylibmc cache backend for Django that prevents cache failures from raising exceptions. Instead, it logs errors and treats failed cache gets as misses, ensuring application stability and avoiding 500 errors in production environments.

metadata.name: django-devserver
metadata.description: A drop-in replacement for Django's runserver.

summary.zh: django-devserver 是 Django 内置 runserver 命令的可插拔替代方案，支持实时日志、Werkzeug 交互式调试器、多进程/线程服务器，并提供 SQL 查询追踪、内存使用分析、性能剖析等扩展模块，显著提升开发调试效率。
summary.en: django-devserver is a drop-in replacement for Django's runserver, offering real-time logging, Werkzeug debugger integration, multi-process/threaded servers, and extensible modules for SQL profiling, memory tracking, and performance analysis to enhance development debugging.

metadata.name: django-debug-panel
metadata.description: django-debug-toolbar in WebKit DevTools. Works fine with background Ajax requests and non-HTML responses.

summary.zh: Django Debug Panel 是一个将 Django Debug Toolbar 集成到 WebKit 开发者工具中的插件，专为单页应用和 AJAX 密集型应用设计。它支持后台 AJAX 请求和非 HTML 响应的调试，通过 Chrome 扩展在 DevTools 中直接展示调试信息，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Django Debug Panel integrates Django Debug Toolbar into WebKit DevTools, ideal for single-page and AJAX-heavy applications. It supports debugging background AJAX requests and non-HTML responses via a Chrome extension, displaying debug data directly in DevTools for enhanced development workflow.

metadata.name: django-filer
metadata.description: File and Image Management Application for django

summary.zh: Django Filer 是一个专为 Django 框架设计的文件与图片管理应用，简化了媒体资源的上传、组织、检索与集成流程。支持与 django CMS 深度集成，提供直观的管理界面和文件选择器，适用于内容管理系统中的多媒体资产管理。
summary.en: Django Filer is a file and image management application for Django that simplifies handling media assets. It offers an intuitive admin interface, file picker, and seamless integration with django CMS, ideal for managing multimedia in content-driven web applications.

metadata.name: django-rest-framework-docs
metadata.description: Document Web APIs made with Django Rest Framework

summary.zh: DRF Docs 是一个为 Django REST Framework 构建的 Web API 自动生成文档的工具，支持 Python 2.7+ 和 3.x 及 DRF 3+，提供可定制的文档界面、实时 API 端点预览和访问控制。项目包含演示应用，便于开发和测试，适用于需要规范化 API 文档的 Django 项目。
summary.en: DRF Docs is a documentation generator for Web APIs built with Django REST Framework, supporting Python 2.7+ and 3.x, and DRF 3+. It offers customizable UI, live API endpoint previews, and access control. Includes a demo app for development and testing, ideal for Django projects requiring structured API documentation.

metadata.name: django-rest-framework-docs
metadata.description: Document Web APIs made with Django Rest Framework

summary.zh: DRF Docs 是一个用于自动生成 Django REST Framework Web API 文档的工具，支持 Python 2.7/3.x 和 DRF 3+，提供实时 API 端点展示、可定制模板和简洁配置，帮助开发者快速构建专业级 API 文档。
summary.en: DRF Docs is a tool for auto-generating documentation for Web APIs built with Django REST Framework. It supports Python 2.7/3.x and DRF 3+, offering live API endpoint previews, customizable templates, and simple configuration to streamline professional API documentation.

metadata.name: cxSelect
metadata.description: cxSelect 是基于 jQuery 的多级联动菜单插件，适用于省市、商品分类等联动菜单。

summary.zh: cxSelect 是一款基于 jQuery/Zepto 的多级联动下拉菜单插件，支持省市、商品分类等场景。通过 AJAX 加载 JSON 数据，支持自定义数据源与独立接口配置，兼容移动端，提供丰富的参数与 API 控制选项状态。
summary.en: cxSelect is a jQuery/Zepto-based multi-level cascading dropdown plugin for scenarios like provinces-cities or product categories. It loads data via AJAX in JSON format, supports custom data sources and independent endpoints, and offers extensive configuration and API controls with mobile compatibility.

metadata.name: zh_mysite
metadata.description: django最佳实践 项目目录结构布局

summary.zh: 该项目展示了基于Django的最佳实践目录结构，参考Quora与开源项目经验，推荐使用模块化布局（如/apps、/configs、/settings等），并提倡使用Gunicorn、Celery+Redis、South迁移、TastyPie构建API及nose测试框架，提升开发效率与部署可维护性。
summary.en: This repo presents a Django best-practice project structure inspired by Quora and open-source projects. It advocates modular directories (e.g., /apps, /configs, /settings), and recommends Gunicorn, Celery+Redis, South migrations, TastyPie for APIs, and nose for testing to enhance development and deployment.

metadata.name: django-layout
metadata.description: Django project template layout

summary.zh: django-layout 是一个基于 Django 的最佳实践项目模板，提供现代化开发环境配置，包括 uv 依赖管理、ruff 与 prettier 代码格式化、goodconf 环境变量管理、tailwindcss 样式支持、pytest 测试框架、mypy 类型检查及生产级部署设置，帮助开发者快速启动规范且高效的 Django 项目。
summary.en: django-layout is a Django project template offering modern, production-ready defaults based on best practices. It includes uv for dependency management, ruff and prettier for linting/formatting, goodconf for environment configuration, tailwindcss, pytest with coverage and parallel testing, mypy for type checking, and hardened production settings for rapid, standardized Django development.

metadata.name: django-import-export
metadata.description: Django application and library for importing and exporting data with admin integration.

summary.zh: django-import-export 是一个用于在 Django 应用中导入和导出数据的库，支持 CSV、Excel、JSON 等多种格式。它提供与 Django Admin 的无缝集成，支持数据预览、批量操作、外键处理、数据验证及自定义转换，适用于需要高效数据管理的后台系统。
summary.en: django-import-export is a Django library for importing and exporting data in various formats like CSV, Excel, and JSON. It offers seamless Django Admin integration, supports data preview, bulk operations, foreign key handling, validation, and custom transformations, ideal for data-intensive backend systems.

metadata.name: pace
metadata.description: Automatically add a progress bar to your site.

summary.zh: Pace 是一个自动为网页添加进度条的轻量级 JavaScript 库，无需配置即可监控 AJAX 请求、文档加载状态、事件循环延迟及页面元素渲染进度，支持多种主题和自定义选项，适用于提升用户体验和页面加载感知。
summary.en: Pace is a lightweight JavaScript library that automatically adds a progress bar to web pages. It monitors AJAX requests, document readiness, event loop lag, and element rendering without requiring configuration, offering multiple themes and customization options to enhance perceived loading performance.

metadata.name: django-debug-toolbar
metadata.description: A configurable set of panels that display various debug information about the current request/response.

summary.zh: Django Debug Toolbar 是一个可配置的调试工具集，通过在页面侧边栏展示请求/响应相关的调试信息面板（如 SQL 查询、缓存、模板渲染等），帮助开发者快速定位性能瓶颈与代码问题，支持 Django 4.2+ 及异步视图实验性功能。
summary.en: The Django Debug Toolbar is a configurable set of panels that displays detailed debug information—such as SQL queries, cache usage, and template rendering—about the current request/response directly in the browser, aiding developers in diagnosing performance issues and debugging Django applications, with experimental async view support.

metadata.name: weui-sketch
metadata.description: weui sketch by ZTfer

summary.zh: 该项目是微信官方UI框架WeUI的Sketch和PSD设计源文件，由设计师ZTfer制作，严格遵循WeUI样式规范，包含按钮、弹窗、表单等完整组件，支持750x1334设计稿尺寸，适用于移动端UI设计与前端开发协作，提升设计还原效率。
summary.en: This project provides Sketch and PSD source files for WeChat's official UI framework WeUI, created by designer ZTfer. It includes fully standardized components like buttons, dialogs, and forms, strictly following WeUI design specs, and supports 750x1334 mobile design dimensions to improve UI consistency and development efficiency.

metadata.name: vue-weui
metadata.description: (Deprecated) WeUI Components with love of vue.js

summary.zh: 该项目是用 Vue.js 封装的 WeUI 组件库，专为微信 Web 服务设计，支持按需引入组件，样式与 WeUI 解耦，便于自定义。由于 Vue 和 WeUI 更新频繁，项目已停止维护，建议寻找替代方案。
summary.en: This project is a Vue.js-wrapped component library for WeUI, tailored for WeChat web services. It supports on-demand component imports and decouples styles from WeUI for easy customization. However, it is deprecated due to frequent updates in Vue and WeUI, and no longer maintained.

metadata.name: vue-weui
metadata.description: 针对 Vue 框架移植的 We UI 框架的适配，让 mobile开发过程成为一种享受。 Demo:

summary.zh: vue-weui 是基于 Vue 框架对 WeUI 的适配移植，结合 vue-router、ES6 和 Webpack，为移动端开发提供简洁高效的 UI 解决方案，提升开发体验。
summary.en: vue-weui is a Vue-adapted version of WeUI, integrating vue-router, ES6, and Webpack to deliver a streamlined and enjoyable mobile development experience with native-like UI components.

metadata.name: react-weui
metadata.description: weui for react

summary.zh: React-WeUI 是基于微信 WeUI 设计规范的 React 组件库，提供与微信原生界面一致的高质量 UI 组件。支持 npm 和 CDN 引入，包含按钮、表单、导航等常用组件，适用于移动端 Web 应用开发，文档完善并附带在线示例。
summary.en: React-WeUI is a React component library based on WeChat's WeUI design system, offering high-quality UI components that match WeChat's native interface. It supports npm and CDN usage, includes common components like buttons and forms, and is ideal for mobile web development with comprehensive documentation and live examples.

metadata.name: weui
metadata.description: A UI library by WeChat official design team, includes the most useful widgets/modules in mobile web applications.

summary.zh: WeUI 是由微信官方设计团队打造的移动端 UI 框架，专为微信网页开发量身定制，提供按钮、弹窗、进度条等常用组件，确保用户体验一致性与标准化，适用于微信小程序及移动 Web 应用。
summary.en: WeUI is a mobile-first UI framework officially developed by the WeChat Design Team, specifically tailored for WeChat web services. It offers essential components like buttons, dialogs, and toasts to ensure consistent and standardized user experiences in mobile web and mini-program applications.

metadata.name: react-demos
metadata.description: a collection of simple demos of React.js

summary.zh: 这是一个简洁清晰的 React.js 示例集合，涵盖 JSX 渲染、组件定义、状态管理、生命周期、表单处理、Ajax 请求及服务端渲染等核心概念。每个示例均以独立 HTML 文件实现，配合 Babel 实现浏览器端 JSX 转换，适合初学者快速上手 React 基础。
summary.en: A collection of simple and clear React.js demos covering core concepts like JSX rendering, component definition, state management, lifecycle, forms, Ajax, and server-side rendering. Each demo is self-contained in an HTML file with browser-based Babel transformation, ideal for beginners learning React fundamentals.

metadata.name: django-rest-framework-jwt
metadata.description: JSON Web Token Authentication support for Django REST Framework

summary.zh: 该项目为Django REST Framework提供JSON Web Token（JWT）身份验证支持，适用于构建安全的API认证系统。尽管项目已停止维护，但曾广泛用于实现无状态、可扩展的令牌认证机制，支持Python 2.7至3.6及Django 1.8-1.11版本。
summary.en: This project provides JSON Web Token (JWT) authentication support for Django REST Framework, enabling secure, stateless API authentication. Although now unmaintained, it was widely used for scalable token-based auth across Python 2.7–3.6 and Django 1.8–1.11.

metadata.name: django-audit-log
metadata.description: Audit log for your Django models

summary.zh: django-audit-log 是一个用于 Django 模型的审计日志工具，支持自动记录模型实例的创建和修改用户及会话信息。提供 AuthStampedModel 抽象类和 AuditLog 管理器，可追踪字段级变更历史，兼容 Django 1.6+ 及 Python 2/3，适用于需要操作留痕的应用场景。
summary.en: django-audit-log is a Django app that tracks changes to model instances, recording who created or modified them and with which session. It offers AuthStampedModel for basic user stamping and AuditLog manager for full change history, supporting Django 1.6+, South/Django migrations, and both Python 2 and 3.

metadata.name: django-extensions
metadata.description: This is a repository for collecting global custom management extensions for the Django Framework.

summary.zh: Django Extensions 是一个为 Django 框架提供多种实用扩展工具的集合，包含如 shell_plus、runserver_plus、graph_models 等增强型管理命令，帮助开发者提升开发效率、调试和项目可视化能力，适用于 Django 4.2 及以上版本。
summary.en: Django Extensions is a collection of powerful utility tools and enhanced management commands for the Django framework, including shell_plus, runserver_plus, and graph_models, designed to boost developer productivity, debugging, and project visualization for Django 4.2+.

summary.zh: 本项目演示如何使用 Docker Compose 搭建 Django 开发环境，集成 MySQL 和 Redis 服务。通过容器化部署实现环境一致性，支持快速构建、运行和数据库初始化，适用于本地开发与测试场景，提升开发效率与部署可靠性。
summary.en: This project demonstrates how to set up a Django development environment using Docker Compose, integrating MySQL and Redis services. It enables consistent environments through containerization, supports fast building, running, and database initialization, ideal for local development and testing to improve efficiency and deployment reliability.

metadata.name: django-threadedcomments
metadata.description: django-threadedcomments is a simple yet flexible threaded commenting system for Django.

summary.zh: django-threadedcomments 是一个基于 Django 的灵活嵌套评论系统，支持多级回复。它构建于 django_comments 之上，提供模板标签和自定义视图，便于集成到博客或文章页面，支持树形结构渲染与 JavaScript 动态回复表单。
summary.en: django-threadedcomments is a flexible threaded commenting system for Django, enabling nested replies on content. Built atop django_comments, it offers template tags, tree rendering, and JavaScript-enhanced reply forms for seamless integration into blogs or articles.

metadata.name: Django-Design-Patterns-and-Best-Practices
metadata.description: 《Django设计模式与最佳实践》2015年03月-基于Django 1.7

summary.zh: 本书《Django设计模式与最佳实践》基于Django 1.7，系统讲解如何构建可维护的Django应用。重点涵盖模型设计原则、结构模式（如规范化）、行为模式及迁移策略，强调‘M大于V与C’的理念。通过SuperBook项目案例，展示类图建模、模型拆分与依赖管理，帮助开发者避免常见反模式，提升代码质量与可扩展性。
summary.en: This book, 'Django Design Patterns and Best Practices' (2015, Django 1.7), teaches how to build maintainable Django applications. It focuses on model design principles, structural patterns (e.g., normalization), behavioral patterns, and migrations. Using the SuperBook project, it demonstrates class diagram modeling, model modularization, and dependency management to avoid anti-patterns and improve code quality.

metadata.name: django-qiniu-storage
metadata.description: Django storage for 七牛云存储

summary.zh: Django Qiniu Storage 是一个为 Django 框架设计的七牛云存储后端，支持将静态文件和用户上传文件无缝托管至七牛云。通过简单配置即可实现文件存储的云端化，兼容 Python 2/3 和 Django 多版本，适用于需要 CDN 加速和高可用存储的应用场景。
summary.en: Django Qiniu Storage is a backend for Django that enables seamless integration with Qiniu Cloud Storage. It supports hosting both static assets and user-uploaded files on Qiniu, offering CDN acceleration and high availability. Compatible with Python 2/3 and multiple Django versions, it simplifies cloud-based file management.

metadata.name: django-qiniu
metadata.description: Qiniu(http://www.qiniu.com) is a cloud storage service, this package interages it with django framework.

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个已废弃的 Django 与七牛云存储集成包，通过自定义模型字段 QiniuFileField 和 QiniuImageField 实现文件与图片上传至七牛云，并支持图片缩略图生成。需配合七牛 Python SDK 使用，现建议迁移至更现代的 django-qiniu-storage。
summary.en: This deprecated package integrates Qiniu cloud storage with Django via custom model fields QiniuFileField and QiniuImageField, enabling file/image uploads and thumbnail generation. Requires Qiniu Python SDK. Maintainers recommend migrating to django-qiniu-storage for better architecture.

metadata.name: django-filter
metadata.description: A generic system for filtering Django QuerySets based on user selections

summary.zh: Django-filter 是一个可复用的 Django 应用，支持基于用户输入动态过滤 QuerySet，通过声明式方式从 URL 参数生成过滤条件。它提供类似 ModelForm 的 API，兼容 Django 和 Django REST Framework，适用于构建类 admin 列表过滤界面，具备成熟稳定的版本策略和长期支持。
summary.en: Django-filter is a reusable Django application that enables dynamic QuerySet filtering based on user selections via URL parameters. It offers a declarative API similar to ModelForm, integrates seamlessly with Django and Django REST Framework, and is ideal for building admin-like filtering interfaces with strong stability and long-term support.

metadata.name: django-crontab
metadata.description: dead simple crontab powered job scheduling for django.

summary.zh: django-crontab 是一个为 Django 应用提供简单 cron 任务调度的轻量工具，支持通过配置文件定义定时任务，自动管理 crontab 条目。它兼容 Django 1.8-2.0，支持自定义参数、日志重定向及任务锁机制，简化了后台周期性任务的部署与维护。
summary.en: django-crontab is a lightweight tool for scheduling cron jobs in Django applications. It allows defining periodic tasks via settings, automatically manages crontab entries, supports custom arguments, output redirection, and job locking to prevent overlaps, simplifying deployment of background tasks.

metadata.name: iOSInterviewQuestions
metadata.description: iOS interview questions;iOS面试题集锦（附答案）

summary.zh: 该仓库整理了高质量的iOS面试题及详细答案，涵盖Objective-C与Swift两大语言版本，内容涉及语言基础、内存管理、多线程、设计模式等核心知识点，源自知名博主原创题目，适合iOS开发者系统性复习与面试准备。
summary.en: This repository compiles high-quality iOS interview questions with detailed answers in both Objective-C and Swift, covering core topics like memory management, multithreading, and design patterns. Ideal for iOS developers preparing for technical interviews.

metadata.name: wechat-deleted-friends
metadata.description: 查看被删的微信好友

summary.zh: 该项目通过微信网页版接口检测被删除的好友，原理是尝试将好友拉入临时群组，若失败则可能被删除。但因微信接口限制和机制变更（如仍可拉黑好友入群），现已失效。项目依赖requests库，支持多语言实现，适合技术研究参考。
summary.en: This project detects deleted WeChat friends by attempting to add them to a new group via the web API—failure suggests removal. However, it's now obsolete due to API rate limits and changes allowing adding deleted users to groups. Built with Python and requests, it inspired Go, Node.js, and Chrome extensions.

metadata.name: bootstrap
metadata.description: PLEASE READ THE PROJECT STATUS BELOW.  Native AngularJS (Angular) directives for Bootstrap. Smaller footprint (20kB gzipped), no 3rd party JS dependencies (jQuery, bootstrap JS) required. Please read the README.md file before submitting an issue!

summary.zh: 该项目为 AngularJS 提供的 Bootstrap 原生指令库，无需依赖 jQuery 或 Bootstrap JS，打包后仅 20kB，轻量高效。目前已停止维护，功能完整，推荐迁移至 ng-bootstrap。适用于 AngularJS 项目快速集成 Bootstrap 组件。
summary.en: This project provides native AngularJS directives for Bootstrap, eliminating the need for jQuery or Bootstrap JS, with a minimal footprint of 20kB gzipped. It is now feature-complete and no longer maintained, with users encouraged to migrate to ng-bootstrap. Ideal for AngularJS apps needing lightweight Bootstrap integration.

metadata.name: django-photologue
metadata.description: A customizable plug-in photo gallery management application for the Django web framework.

summary.zh: Django-photologue 是一个专为 Django 框架设计的强大图片管理与相册应用插件，支持照片上传、分组为相册、添加水印等效果。提供灵活的定制能力，适用于构建图片展示网站，支持 Amazon S3 存储，并配有详细文档和演示站点。
summary.en: Django-photologue is a powerful, customizable photo gallery management plugin for the Django web framework. It enables photo uploads, gallery organization, and image effects like watermarks. Supports Amazon S3, includes comprehensive documentation and a live demo, ideal for image-centric websites.

metadata.name: githug
metadata.description: Git your game on!

summary.zh: Githug 是一款基于命令行的 Git 学习游戏，通过一系列关卡引导用户实践 Git 命令操作。每个关卡要求使用真实 Git 命令完成任务，涵盖从基础到进阶的操作。项目使用 Ruby 开发，支持多平台运行，并提供关卡 DSL 便于社区贡献新题目，是掌握 Git 技能的高效互动工具。
summary.en: Githug is a command-line game designed to teach Git through interactive levels. Each level requires users to execute real Git commands to solve challenges, covering basics to advanced topics. Built with Ruby and cross-platform compatible, it features a DSL for creating custom levels, enabling community contributions and hands-on Git mastery.

metadata.name: markdown
metadata.description: A Python implementation of John Gruber’s Markdown with Extension support.

summary.zh: 这是一个 Python 实现的 John Gruber 的 Markdown 语法解析器，高度兼容原始规范，支持通过扩展机制增强功能。提供简单易用的 API，可将 Markdown 文本快速转换为 HTML，适用于内容管理系统、文档生成等场景。
summary.en: A Python implementation of John Gruber's Markdown, nearly fully compliant with the reference spec. It supports extensible features via plugins and offers a simple API to convert Markdown text into HTML, ideal for CMS and documentation tools.

metadata.name: django-markdown-deux
metadata.description: A django app that provides Markdown-related template tags using the python-markdown2 library.

summary.zh: django-markdown-deux 是一个轻量级 Django 应用，基于 python-markdown2 库提供 Markdown 模板标签支持。它允许在模板中使用 `markdown` 过滤器和块标签，并支持通过命名样式（style）统一配置渲染选项，适合需要一致 Markdown 处理逻辑的项目。
summary.en: django-markdown-deux is a lightweight Django app that provides Markdown template tags using the python-markdown2 library. It supports both filter and block usage in templates with configurable rendering styles, ideal for projects requiring consistent Markdown processing.

metadata.name: django-suit
metadata.description: Modern theme for Django admin interface

summary.zh: Django Suit 是一个现代化的 Django 管理后台主题，提供美观、响应式的界面设计，支持 Django 1.9+ 和 Python 2.7-3.4。它通过自定义样式和布局增强原生 admin 体验，包含详细文档与在线演示，适用于需要提升后台管理界面视觉与交互的项目。
summary.en: Django Suit is a modern, responsive theme for the Django admin interface, enhancing its appearance and usability with clean design and improved layout. Compatible with Django 1.9+ and Python 2.7–3.4, it offers live demos, comprehensive documentation, and is ideal for projects seeking a professional admin UI upgrade.

metadata.name: nprogress
metadata.description: For slim progress bars like on YouTube, Medium, etc

summary.zh: NProgress 是一个轻量级的进度条库，灵感来自 Google、YouTube 和 Medium，专为 Ajax 驱动的单页应用设计。支持通过 start()、done()、set() 和 inc() 控制进度，可配置动画、模板和触发条件，兼容 Turbolinks 和 Pjax，提供流畅的用户加载体验。
summary.en: NProgress is a minimalist progress bar library inspired by Google, YouTube, and Medium, designed for Ajax-heavy applications. It offers simple controls like start(), done(), set(), and inc(), with customizable templates, animations, and integration support for Turbolinks and Pjax to enhance perceived performance.

metadata.name: atom
metadata.description: :atom: The hackable text editor

summary.zh: Atom 是一款基于 Electron 构建的可定制化文本编辑器，旨在为 21 世纪开发者提供高度灵活且易用的编程环境。它支持深度插件扩展，默认配置友好，适用于多种操作系统。该项目已于2022年12月15日归档停止维护。
summary.en: Atom is a hackable, highly customizable text editor built on Electron, designed for the 21st century. It offers deep extensibility through packages while remaining user-friendly out of the box. The project was archived on December 15, 2022, and is no longer actively maintained.

metadata.name: blog
metadata.description: My hexo blog source code

summary.zh: 该仓库是个人基于 Hexo 框架搭建的博客源码，包含博客的静态生成配置、主题设置、文章 Markdown 文件及部署脚本，适用于快速搭建和自定义个人技术博客。
summary.en: This repository contains the source code of a personal blog built with the Hexo framework, including static site generation config, theme settings, Markdown posts, and deployment scripts, ideal for quickly setting up a customizable tech blog.

metadata.name: python-social-auth
metadata.description: Social auth made simple

summary.zh: Python Social Auth 是一个简化社交登录与注册的开源库，支持多种框架和第三方认证提供商。基于 django-social-auth 开发，提供统一接口扩展新认证方式。该项目已于2016年12月3日弃用，代码迁移至 python-social-auth 组织下继续维护。
summary.en: Python Social Auth is an open-source library that simplifies social authentication and registration, supporting multiple frameworks and third-party providers. Built on django-social-auth, it offers a unified interface for extending authentication methods. The project was deprecated on Dec 3, 2016, with code migrated to the python-social-auth organization for continued development.

metadata.name: django-social-auth
metadata.description: Django social authentication made simple

summary.zh: Django Social Auth 是一个简化 Django 项目第三方社交登录的库，支持 Google、Facebook、Twitter、GitHub 等数十种 OAuth 和 OpenID 认证方式。它提供用户注册、登录、多账户关联及自定义用户模型功能，并采用可扩展的认证管道机制。该项目已弃用，推荐迁移至 python-social-auth。
summary.en: Django Social Auth simplifies third-party social authentication in Django apps, supporting OAuth and OpenID providers like Google, Facebook, Twitter, and GitHub. It enables user registration, login, multi-account linking, custom user models, and extensible authentication pipelines. Note: This library is deprecated in favor of python-social-auth.

metadata.name: django-rest-swagger
metadata.description: Swagger Documentation Generator for Django REST Framework: deprecated

summary.zh: 该项目是一个用于 Django REST Framework 的 Swagger 文档生成器，支持自动生成 OpenAPI 规范与 Swagger UI 界面。现已弃用，推荐使用 drf-yasg 作为替代方案。
summary.en: A Swagger documentation generator for Django REST Framework that produces OpenAPI specs and Swagger UI. Now deprecated, with drf-yasg recommended as its actively maintained successor.

metadata.name: PyZh
metadata.description: :books: 一起写Python文章，一起看Python文章 - 利用readthedocs的Python技术文章的收集和翻译。

summary.zh: PyZh 是一个基于 ReadTheDocs 的 Python 技术文章翻译与收集项目，支持多人协作编写。项目使用 reStructuredText（RST）格式撰写文档，提供 RSS 订阅和在线浏览功能，并通过 Git 子模块和虚拟环境简化协作流程，适合 Python 爱好者共同维护技术内容。
summary.en: PyZh is a collaborative project for translating and curating Python technical articles using ReadTheDocs. It supports multi-author contributions with RST formatting, offers RSS feeds and online reading, and streamlines collaboration via Git submodules and virtual environments, ideal for Python enthusiasts.

metadata.name: scrapy-djangoitem
metadata.description: Scrapy extension to write scraped items using Django models

summary.zh: scrapy-djangoitem 是一个 Scrapy 扩展，允许开发者通过 Django 模型定义爬虫抓取项（Item），实现数据抓取与 Django ORM 的无缝集成。它提供 DjangoItem 类，自动映射模型字段，并支持调用 save() 方法直接保存到数据库，适用于需将爬取数据持久化至 Django 应用的场景。
summary.en: scrapy-djangoitem is a Scrapy extension that enables defining scraped items using Django models, bridging web scraping and Django ORM. It introduces the DjangoItem class to auto-map model fields and supports saving data directly via the save() method, ideal for persisting scraped data into Django applications.

metadata.name: quick-cocos2d-x
metadata.description: quick-cocos2d-x is a quick framework, based on cocos2d-x. Make mobile games in Lua.

summary.zh: quick-cocos2d-x 是基于 Cocos2d-x 的 Lua 游戏开发框架，由触控科技推出。它集成 Lua 脚本支持与高级框架，显著提升手游开发效率，降低人力与时间成本。提供 UI 库、代码加密、自动更新等功能，兼顾快速开发与用户体验优化，广泛用于成熟商业手游项目。
summary.en: quick-cocos2d-x is a Lua-based game development framework built on Cocos2d-x, developed by Chukong Inc. It enhances development efficiency by enabling Lua scripting, reducing costs and accelerating production. Features include UI libraries, code encryption, and auto-update, making it ideal for high-quality mobile game development.

metadata.name: LocationReportEnabler
metadata.description: A simple android app to enable Google Location Report, Google Now and related functions in China mainland or somewhere like.

summary.zh: 一款需 Root 的安卓工具，通过修改系统属性（如运营商代码和地区）绕过中国大陆对 Google 位置报告、Google Now 等服务的限制。提供通用版和 Xposed 版，后者更稳定。适用于希望在国内使用谷歌位置相关功能的用户。
summary.en: An Android app requiring root access that enables Google Location Report, Google Now, and related services in China by modifying system properties like SIM operator codes. Offers both general and Xposed variants, with the latter being more stable and recommended for rooted users.

metadata.name: scrapy
metadata.description: Scrapy, a fast high-level web crawling & scraping framework for Python.

summary.zh: Scrapy 是一个用于 Python 的快速、高层次的网页抓取和爬虫框架，支持跨平台运行，需 Python 3.10+。由 Zyte 维护，广泛用于从网站提取结构化数据，具备高可扩展性与异步处理能力。
summary.en: Scrapy is a fast, high-level web crawling and scraping framework for Python, supporting cross-platform execution and requiring Python 3.10+. Maintained by Zyte, it enables efficient extraction of structured data from websites with asynchronous processing and high extensibility.

metadata.name: django-pjax
metadata.description: This is a Django helper for @defunkt's jquery-pjax.

summary.zh: django-pjax 是一个用于 Django 框架的 jQuery-PJAX 辅助工具，支持通过装饰器或 Mixin 实现局部页面加载，提升用户体验。它自动将模板替换为带 '-pjax' 后缀的版本（如 template.html → template-pjax.html），支持多容器模板、重定向处理，兼容 Python 2.6+ 和 Django 1.3+。
summary.en: django-pjax is a Django helper for jQuery-PJAX that enables partial page loading via decorators or mixins, improving performance while preserving URL navigation. It auto-swaps templates (e.g., template.html → template-pjax.html), supports multiple containers, redirect handling, and works with Python 2.6+ and Django 1.3+.

metadata.name: pygments-css
metadata.description: css files created from pygment's built-in styles

summary.zh: 该项目提供由 Pygments 内置样式自动生成的 CSS 文件，免去用户手动通过命令行生成代码高亮样式的繁琐步骤。支持自定义顶层类名，便于集成到静态网站或文档系统中，提升代码展示的美观性与一致性。
summary.en: This repository offers pre-generated CSS files from Pygments' built-in syntax highlighting styles, eliminating the need to manually run pygmentize commands. It allows customization of the top-level class and simplifies integration into static sites or documentation systems for consistent code styling.

metadata.name: misaka
metadata.description: A Python binding for Hoedown.

summary.zh: Misaka 是一个已停止维护的 Python 绑定库，用于 Hoedown Markdown 解析器。该项目现已迁移至 Source Hut，建议用户转向 mistletoe 或 Mistune 等活跃项目。
summary.en: Misaka is a discontinued Python binding for the Hoedown Markdown parser. The project has moved to Source Hut and is no longer maintained, with users advised to switch to active alternatives like mistletoe or Mistune.

metadata.name: python-markdown2
metadata.description: markdown2: A fast and complete implementation of Markdown in Python

summary.zh: markdown2 是一个用 Python 实现的高性能、功能完整的 Markdown 解析器，旨在与原始 Perl 版本行为一致。它支持多种扩展（如语法高亮、表格、脚注等），兼容 Python 3.5+ 及 PyPy、Jython，提供模块和命令行两种使用方式，适合需要快速、准确转换 Markdown 到 HTML 的场景。
summary.en: markdown2 is a fast and complete Python implementation of Markdown, designed to closely match the behavior of the original Perl version. It supports numerous extensions like syntax highlighting, tables, and footnotes, works with Python 3.5+, PyPy, and Jython, and offers both module and CLI interfaces for converting Markdown to HTML efficiently.

metadata.name: django_markdown
metadata.description: Django markdown support and wysiwig

summary.zh: Django-Markdown 是一个为 Django 框架提供 Markdown 支持及所见即所得编辑功能的扩展应用。它支持在 flatpages、管理后台表单及其他自定义表单中集成 Markdown 编辑器，提供字段、Widget、Admin 集成和模板标签，便于快速构建富文本内容管理系统。
summary.en: Django-Markdown is a Django application that enables Markdown support with WYSIWYG editing in flatpages, admin forms, and custom forms. It offers MarkdownField, MarkdownWidget, admin integration, and template tags for seamless rich-text content management.

metadata.name: django-uuslug
metadata.description: Generates Unique (& Unicode) slugs in Django Edit Add topics

summary.zh: Django Uuslug 是一个用于生成唯一且支持 Unicode 字符的 URL 友好型 slug 的 Django 应用。它扩展了 Django 内置的 slugify 功能，支持多语言文本（如中文、俄文等）转换，并提供去重、长度限制、停用词过滤等高级功能，适用于需要 SEO 友好且无重复 URL 的场景。
summary.en: Django Uuslug is a Django application that generates unique and Unicode-compatible slugs for URLs. It enhances Django's built-in slugify by supporting multilingual text (e.g., Chinese, Russian), offering deduplication, length control, stopword filtering, and customizable separators—ideal for SEO-friendly, collision-free URL generation.

metadata.name: cmder
metadata.description: Lovely console emulator package for Windows

summary.zh: Cmder 是一款基于 ConEmu 的 Windows 控制台模拟器，专为解决原生终端体验差而设计。它集成了 Monokai 配色、clink 增强命令行编辑与自动补全功能，并支持便携化部署，可随身携带配置与工具链，适用于开发、运维及日常命令行操作。
summary.en: Cmder is a Windows console emulator built on ConEmu, designed to overcome the limitations of the default terminal. It features a Monokai color scheme, enhanced command-line editing via clink, auto-completion support, and portable deployment—ideal for developers and sysadmins needing a consistent CLI environment across machines.

metadata.name: Clamp.js
metadata.description: Clamps an HTML element by adding ellipsis to it if the content inside is too long.

summary.zh: Clamp.js 是一个轻量级 JavaScript 库，用于在 HTML 元素内容过长时自动截断并添加省略号。支持单行、多行、基于高度或自动适配的截断方式，提供灵活的配置选项如自定义截断字符、HTML 后缀及性能优化的分词策略，兼容原生 WebKit 实现。
summary.en: Clamp.js is a lightweight JavaScript library that truncates HTML content with ellipsis when it exceeds available space. It supports single-line, multi-line, height-based, and auto-clamping modes, with customizable options like truncation characters, HTML suffixes, and optimized text-splitting for performance, while leveraging native WebKit support when possible.

metadata.name: django-chunks
metadata.description: Think of it as flatpages for small bits of reusable content you might want to insert into your templates and manage from the admin interface.

summary.zh: django-chunks 是一个轻量级 Django 应用，用于在模板中插入可重用的内容块，并通过 Django 管理后台进行编辑。它提供简单的模型和模板标签，支持通过唯一键名调用内容，适用于多区域内容管理场景，是 flatpages 的灵活替代方案。
summary.en: django-chunks is a lightweight Django app for inserting reusable content blocks into templates, editable via the Django admin. It offers a simple model and template tag to manage content by unique keys, ideal for multi-area content management as a flexible alternative to flatpages.

metadata.name: Telegram-cn-l10n-bot
metadata.description: 一个发布 Telegram 翻译的 Bot

summary.zh: 这是一个用于发布 Telegram 多语言翻译文件的机器人，支持将 Android、iOS 和桌面端的语言包通过 Bot 分发。用户可上传语言文件获取 file_id，并通过指令绑定到对应平台，实现高效本地化资源管理。
summary.en: A Telegram bot designed to distribute localized language files for Telegram clients. It allows uploading translation files, retrieving file IDs, and assigning them to Android, iOS, or Desktop platforms via simple commands, streamlining the localization workflow.

metadata.name: django-persistent-messages
metadata.description: A Django app for unified and persistent user messages/notifications, built on top of Django's messages framework

summary.zh: Django Persistent Messages 是一个基于 Django 消息框架的扩展应用，支持持久化用户消息与通知。认证用户的消息可存储于数据库，实现跨会话的“粘性”提醒，直至用户主动标记为已读；匿名用户仍使用默认会话机制。提供统一 API，支持屏幕展示与邮件通知，增强消息触达率。
summary.en: Django Persistent Messages extends Django's messaging framework to support persistent, cross-session user notifications. Authenticated users' messages are stored in the database and remain visible until marked as read, while anonymous users rely on session-based storage. It offers a unified API for both user types and supports on-screen display and email notifications.

metadata.name: django-persistent-messages
metadata.description: My independent fork of django-persistent-messages. A Django app for unified and persistent user messages/notifications, built on top of Django's messages framework

summary.zh: Django Persistent Messages 是一个基于 Django 消息框架的扩展应用，支持持久化用户消息与通知。它允许认证用户的消息存储于数据库，实现跨会话保留，并提供标记已读、删除等交互功能。匿名用户仍使用会话存储。该应用提供统一 API，兼容 Django 原生消息系统，便于集成。
summary.en: Django Persistent Messages is a Django app extending the built-in messages framework to support persistent user notifications. It stores messages in the database for authenticated users, enabling cross-session persistence with features like marking as read or deletion. Anonymous users use session-based storage. Offers a unified API compatible with Django's native messaging system.

metadata.name: django-monitio
metadata.description: Unified, persistent user messages with live notifications via SSE for Django.

summary.zh: django-monitio 是一个为 Django 提供持久化用户消息与实时通知的扩展，基于 Redis 和 SSE 实现消息的存储与推送。支持认证用户的数据库持久化消息、匿名用户的会话消息，并集成邮件通知功能。项目依赖 django-sse、django-redis 等组件，适用于需要跨会话消息管理的 Web 应用。
summary.en: django-monitio is a Django extension for persistent user messages and live notifications via Server-Sent Events (SSE), backed by Redis. It supports database-stored messages for authenticated users and session-based messages for anonymous users, with optional email delivery. Built on django-sse and django-redis, it enables cross-session message management in web applications.

metadata.name: wallop
metadata.description: :no_entry: currently unmaintained :no_entry: A minimal JS library for showing & hiding things

summary.zh: Wallop 是一个轻量级（4KB）、无依赖的 JavaScript 库，用于控制元素的显示与隐藏，适用于轮播图、幻灯片等交互场景。它通过添加语义化 CSS 类名实现状态管理，动画完全由 CSS 控制，支持移动端优先、渐进增强和自定义事件，提供灵活的 API 与多种内置动画效果。
summary.en: Wallop is a minimal (4KB), dependency-free JavaScript library for showing and hiding elements, ideal for sliders and carousels. It manages state by adding semantic CSS classes, with animations handled entirely in CSS. It supports mobile-first design, progressive enhancement, custom events, and offers flexible APIs with built-in animation modifiers.

metadata.name: PureSlider
metadata.description: A lightweight, no-dependency image slider library

summary.zh: PureSlider 是一个轻量级、无依赖的轮播图库，支持淡入淡出效果，适用于现代前端项目。无需 jQuery，通过简单配置即可实现图片切换，适合追求简洁与性能的网页开发场景。
summary.en: PureSlider is a lightweight, dependency-free image slider library supporting fade transitions. Ideal for modern web projects, it offers simple setup without jQuery, ensuring clean and performant image carousels.

metadata.name: ShadowsocksRDroid
metadata.description: A ShadowsocksR client for Android4.0+.Compatible Shadowsocks protocol and support some ShadowsocksR function.

summary.zh: ShadowsocksRDroid 是一款基于 Kotlin 和 Java 开发的 Android 4.0+ 系统 ShadowsocksR 客户端，兼容 Shadowsocks 协议并支持部分 ShadowsocksR 功能。项目使用 NDK 进行底层网络处理，集成 tun2socks、redsocks 等开源组件，致力于优化性能与降低资源消耗。
summary.en: ShadowsocksRDroid is an Android 4.0+ ShadowsocksR client written in Kotlin and Java, compatible with the Shadowsocks protocol and supporting some ShadowsocksR features. It leverages the Android NDK for low-level networking, integrating components like tun2socks and redsocks, with ongoing efforts to improve performance and reduce memory/battery usage.

metadata.name: Parallel-Programming-with-Python
metadata.description: Parallel Programming with Python简体中文版

summary.zh: 本项目是《Parallel Programming with Python》的简体中文翻译版，系统讲解Python并行编程的核心概念与技术实践。内容涵盖并行、并发与分布式编程的对比，并行算法设计模式（如分治、数据分解、管道），以及Python中多线程、多进程、GIL限制等关键问题，适合希望提升程序性能的开发者学习。
summary.en: This repository is the Simplified Chinese translation of 'Parallel Programming with Python', offering a comprehensive guide to parallel computing in Python. It covers core concepts like concurrency vs parallelism, parallel algorithm design (divide-and-conquer, data decomposition, pipelines), and Python-specific challenges such as the GIL, targeting developers aiming to optimize performance.

metadata.name: winauth
metadata.description: Authenticator on Windows for Battle.net / Steam / Guild Wars 2 / Glyph / Runescape / SWTOR / Bitcoin and digital currency exchanges

summary.zh: WinAuth 是一款适用于 Windows 的开源双因素认证工具，支持 Battle.net、Steam、Guild Wars 2、RuneScape、SWTOR 及多个比特币交易平台。它兼容 RFC 6238 时间型与 HOTP 计数器型认证器，提供密码保护、便携模式、热键操作及多账户同时显示等功能，现已停止维护。
summary.en: WinAuth is an open-source two-factor authenticator for Windows, supporting platforms like Battle.net, Steam, Guild Wars 2, RuneScape, SWTOR, and Bitcoin exchanges. It implements RFC 6238 TOTP and HOTP standards, offers password protection, portable mode, hotkeys, and multi-account display, but is now deprecated.

metadata.name: zh-google-styleguide
metadata.description: Google 开源项目风格指南 (中文版)

summary.zh: 本项目是 Google 开源项目风格指南的中文翻译版本，涵盖 C++、Python、Java、JavaScript、TypeScript、Shell、HTML/CSS 等八种语言的编码规范。采用 reStructuredText 编写，通过 Sphinx 生成多格式文档，旨在帮助中文开发者统一代码风格，提升大型项目协作效率。
summary.en: This project provides the Chinese translation of Google's open-source coding style guides, covering eight programming languages including C++, Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Shell, and HTML/CSS. Built with reStructuredText and Sphinx, it helps Chinese developers maintain consistent code style and improve collaboration in large-scale projects.

metadata.name: PhotoClip.js
metadata.description: 一款手势驱动的裁图插件 / A gesture to drive image cropping plug-in

summary.zh: PhotoClip.js 是一款专注于移动端的手势驱动图片裁剪插件，支持双指缩放、旋转及PC端滚轮与双击操作。基于 iscroll-zoom、hammer.js 和 lrz 实现高性能图像处理，提供灵活的输出尺寸、格式与质量配置，适用于移动端照片编辑场景。
summary.en: PhotoClip.js is a gesture-driven image cropping plugin optimized for mobile devices, supporting pinch-to-zoom, rotation, and mouse wheel/double-click controls on PC. Built on iscroll-zoom, hammer.js, and lrz, it enables high-performance image processing with customizable output size, format, and quality for mobile photo editing.

summary.zh: Shadowsocks 是一款轻量级隧道代理工具，旨在帮助用户绕过网络防火墙。支持 TCP 与 UDP 协议，提供用户管理 API、TCP Fast Open、多进程工作模式及目标 IP 黑名单等功能。适用于 Debian、CentOS、Windows 等平台，可通过命令行或配置文件部署服务端与客户端。
summary.en: Shadowsocks is a lightweight tunnel proxy designed to bypass firewalls. It supports TCP and UDP, offers user management API, TCP Fast Open, multi-worker processes, and destination IP blacklisting. Compatible with Debian, CentOS, Windows, and more, it can be deployed via CLI or config files on both server and client sides.

metadata.name: material
metadata.description: Material design for AngularJS

summary.zh: AngularJS Material 是为 AngularJS (v1.x) 框架实现的 Google Material Design 规范 UI 组件库，提供轻量、可复用、无障碍的组件，适用于单页应用。该项目已于2022年1月正式停止维护，推荐迁移至基于 Angular (v2+) 的 Angular Material。
summary.en: AngularJS Material is a UI component library implementing Google's Material Design specification for AngularJS (v1.x) applications. It offers lightweight, reusable, and accessible components for SPAs. Official support ended in January 2022, with users encouraged to migrate to Angular Material for modern Angular versions.

metadata.name: AngularjsTutorial_cn
metadata.description: AngularJS入门教程——AngularJS中文社区提供

summary.zh: 本仓库为AngularJS中文社区提供的官方入门教程，涵盖从环境搭建到双向绑定、路由、REST服务等核心内容，由社区核心成员协作翻译与校对，适合初学者系统学习AngularJS前端框架。
summary.en: This repository hosts the official beginner tutorial for AngularJS, provided by the AngularJS Chinese community. It covers essential topics from setup to two-way binding, routing, and REST services, collaboratively translated and reviewed by core community members, ideal for newcomers.

metadata.name: webuploader
metadata.description: It's a new file uploader solution!

summary.zh: WebUploader 是一个基于 HTML5 与 Flash 双内核的现代文件上传组件，支持大文件分片并发上传、图片预览压缩、拖拽粘贴添加文件及 MD5 秒传功能，兼容 IE6+ 及主流移动端浏览器，采用模块化设计便于扩展。
summary.en: WebUploader is a modern file uploader leveraging HTML5 with Flash fallback, supporting chunked concurrent uploads, image preview/compression, drag-and-drop, clipboard paste, and MD5-based instant upload. It's modular, AMD-based, and compatible with IE6+ and mobile browsers.

metadata.name: avalon
metadata.description: an elegant efficient express mvvm framework

summary.zh: Avalon2 是一款优雅高效的 MVVM 前端框架，专注于高性能数据绑定与组件化开发。支持 ES6 模块化引入、服务端渲染及 IE6-8 兼容，适用于构建复杂单页应用。其核心优势在于超平滑的列表渲染性能，避免页面卡顿，并提供丰富的指令系统与组件生态。
summary.en: Avalon2 is an elegant and efficient MVVM frontend framework focused on high-performance data binding and component-based development. It supports ES6 modules, server-side rendering, and IE6-8 compatibility, ideal for complex SPAs. Its key strength lies in smooth rendering of large lists without UI freezing, along with a rich directive system and component ecosystem.

metadata.name: avalon.oniui
metadata.description: 基于avalon的组件库

summary.zh: avalon.oniui 是由去哪儿网前端架构组开发的基于 avalon 框架的组件库，包含丰富的 UI 组件（如分页、表格、弹窗、日期选择器等）和功能组件（如拖拽、定位、本地存储等），支持 ms-widget 调用，适用于企业级前端应用开发。
summary.en: avalon.oniui is a component library built on the avalon framework by Qunar's frontend architecture team, offering a rich set of UI components (e.g., pager, grid, dialog, datepicker) and utility components (e.g., draggable, position, store), designed for enterprise-level frontend applications using ms-widget.

metadata.name: javascript-in-one-pic
metadata.description: Learn javascript in one picture.

summary.zh: 该项目通过一张思维导图全面总结 JavaScript 语法与核心概念，涵盖函数、对象、作用域、闭包等关键知识点，适合快速查阅与教学使用。支持多语言，提供在线版本，并计划扩展至 Python 和 Go。
summary.en: This project summarizes JavaScript syntax and core concepts in a single mind map, covering functions, objects, scope, closures, and more. Ideal for quick reference and teaching, it offers an online version and plans to expand to Python and Go.

metadata.name: python3-in-one-pic
metadata.description: Learn python3 in one picture.

summary.zh: 该项目通过一张信息图全面展示 Python3 的核心语法与特性，涵盖基础数据类型、流程控制、函数、类、模块等关键内容，并提供在线版本与 Jupyter Notebook 交互形式，适合初学者快速掌握 Python3 核心知识。
summary.en: This project presents a comprehensive visual guide to Python 3 in a single infographic, covering essential syntax, data types, control flow, functions, OOP, and modules. It offers an online version and interactive Jupyter Notebook, ideal for beginners to grasp core Python 3 concepts quickly.

metadata.name: ua-parser-js
metadata.description: UAParser.js - The Essential Web Development Tool for User-Agent Detection. Detect Browsers, OS, Devices, Bots, Apps, AI Crawlers, and more. Run in Browser (client-side) or Node.js (server-side).

summary.zh: UAParser.js 是一款轻量、全面且持续更新的 JavaScript 库，用于解析用户代理字符串，精准识别浏览器、操作系统、CPU、设备型号以及机器人、AI 爬虫等。支持浏览器端与 Node.js 环境，提供开源（MIT/AGPL）与商业版本，适用于 Web 开发中的设备检测与访问分析。
summary.en: UAParser.js is a lightweight, comprehensive, and up-to-date JavaScript library for parsing user-agent strings to detect browsers, OS, CPU, device models, bots, AI crawlers, and more. It runs in both browser and Node.js environments, offering open-source (MIT/AGPL) and commercial editions for accurate device and access analytics.

metadata.name: django-pjax-middleware
metadata.description: Middleware that sets a base template name on the context

summary.zh: 该仓库为 Django 提供 PJAX 支持，通过中间件自动根据请求类型切换基础模板（base.html 或 pjax_base.html），实现局部页面刷新，提升用户体验。支持自定义模板名称与版本控制，确保布局更新时触发完整重载。
summary.en: This Django middleware enables PJAX support by dynamically setting the base template (base.html or pjax_base.html) based on request type, allowing partial page reloads for faster navigation. It supports custom templates and versioning to trigger full reloads when layout changes.

summary.zh: django-pjaxr 是一个用于加速 Django 项目页面加载的扩展库，通过集成 jquery-pjaxr 实现局部页面刷新，减少重复内容传输。它提供模板标签和上下文处理器，简化 PJAX 配置，适用于需要提升用户体验的动态网站。
summary.en: django-pjaxr is a Django extension that accelerates page loading by integrating jquery-pjaxr for partial page updates, reducing redundant content transfer. It offers template tags and context processors to simplify PJAX setup, ideal for dynamic websites seeking improved user experience.

metadata.name: django-easy-pjax
metadata.description: Easy PJAX for Django

summary.zh: django-easy-pjax 是一个简化 Django 项目中集成 jquery-pjax 的工具包，通过 pushState 和 Ajax 实现页面局部刷新，提升用户体验。支持自动切换模板、保留浏览器历史与后退功能，无需修改视图或 URL 配置，兼容 Django 1.5+，并提供中间件和模板过滤器处理 PJAX 请求与 URL 清理。
summary.en: django-easy-pjax simplifies integrating jquery-pjax into Django projects, enabling partial page loads via pushState and Ajax for smoother navigation. It auto-selects templates based on request type, maintains browser history and back button functionality, requires no view or URL changes, and includes middleware and template filters for PJAX handling and query string cleanup.

metadata.name: Carbon-Forum
metadata.description: A high performance open-source forum software written in PHP. Discussions Tags based with Quora/StackOverflow style.

summary.zh: Carbon-Forum 是一款基于 PHP 编写的高性能开源论坛系统，采用 Quora/StackOverflow 风格的标签化讨论模式。支持移动端适配、实时通知、异步加载、SEO 优化及草稿自动保存，具备现代通知中心与 @ 回复功能，适用于构建知识社区与问答平台。
summary.en: Carbon-Forum is a high-performance open-source forum software written in PHP, featuring Quora/StackOverflow-style tag-based discussions. It supports mobile adaptation, real-time notifications, asynchronous design, SEO optimization, draft saving, and a modern notification center with @ replies, ideal for building knowledge-sharing communities.

metadata.name: Carbon-Forum-API-Documentation
metadata.description: Carbon Forum HTTP API Documentation.

summary.zh: Carbon Forum HTTP API 文档提供了完整的接口说明，涵盖用户认证、发帖、回复、通知等核心功能。支持通过独立 API 域名配置，适用于第三方应用集成论坛服务，提升开发效率与系统扩展性。
summary.en: The Carbon Forum HTTP API Documentation offers comprehensive interface specifications, including user authentication, topic creation, replies, and notifications. It supports custom API domain setup, enabling seamless integration of forum services into third-party applications.

metadata.name: Android-Carbon-Forum
metadata.description: Android Client for Carbon Forum with Material Design.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Material Design 的 Android 客户端，专为 Carbon Forum 论坛设计，提供流畅的移动端浏览与交互体验。支持主题浏览、发帖、登录、通知推送及侧边栏导航等功能，代码结构清晰，便于二次开发与自定义配置。
summary.en: An Android client for Carbon Forum built with Material Design, offering a smooth mobile experience. It supports topic browsing, posting, login, push notifications, and navigation drawer. The codebase is well-structured and easy to customize.

metadata.name: django-admin-bootstrapped
metadata.description: A Django admin theme using Twitter Bootstrap. It doesn't need any kind of modification on your side, just add it to the installed apps.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Twitter Bootstrap 的 Django 管理后台主题，无需修改现有代码，只需添加到已安装应用中即可使用。支持 Bootstrap 3 样式、消息标签美化、自定义表单 HTML 注入、内联拖拽排序及 XHTML 兼容等功能，显著提升 Django admin 的界面美观度与交互体验。
summary.en: A Bootstrap-based theme for Django's admin interface that requires no code changes—just add it to INSTALLED_APPS. It enhances the admin UI with Bootstrap 3 styling, improved message tags, custom form HTML injection, sortable inlines, and XHTML compatibility for a modern, responsive experience.

metadata.name: WGestures
metadata.description: Modern mouse gestures for Windows. (C#)

summary.zh: WGestures 是一款基于 C# 开发的现代 Windows 全局鼠标手势工具，支持 Win7/8/10 系统，提供直观流畅的鼠标操作体验。项目采用 .NET 3.5 构建，集成 Wix 安装包与数字签名机制，确保安全性与兼容性。
summary.en: WGestures is a modern, lightweight mouse gesture tool for Windows (7/8/10), built in C# with .NET 3.5. It enables intuitive global mouse navigation, featuring secure code signing via test certificates and WiX-based installer integration for reliable deployment.

metadata.name: material-framework
metadata.description: [Unmaintained] An easy to use material design based framework.

summary.zh: Material Framework 是一个仅基于 CSS 的 Material Design 框架，提供简洁易用的样式库，支持快速集成到网页或 Web 应用中。包含预定义颜色、图标字体及响应式组件，适合快速构建符合 Material Design 规范的界面。项目已停止维护，但仍可作为轻量级设计参考。
summary.en: Material Framework is a CSS-only framework based on Material Design, offering easy integration into web pages or apps. It includes predefined colors, icon fonts, and responsive components for building UIs that follow Material Design guidelines. Though unmaintained, it remains a lightweight reference for design implementation.

metadata.name: django-mysqlpool
metadata.description: Django database backend for MySQL that provides pooling ala SQLAlchemy.

summary.zh: django-mysqlpool 是一个基于 SQLAlchemy 实现的 Django MySQL 数据库连接池后端，通过猴子补丁方式增强原生 Django MySQL 后端，支持进程级连接复用与限制。提供可配置的连接池实现（如 QueuePool）及自动连接关闭装饰器，有效解决多线程环境下连接泄漏问题，提升数据库资源利用率。
summary.en: django-mysqlpool is a Django MySQL database backend that implements connection pooling via SQLAlchemy, using monkey-patching to extend Django's native MySQL backend. It supports configurable pool types (e.g., QueuePool) and includes an auto-close decorator to manage connections in threaded environments, preventing leaks and optimizing resource usage.

metadata.name: XX-Net
metadata.description: A proxy tool to bypass GFW.

summary.zh: XX-Net 是一款开源的翻墙代理工具，采用流量混淆技术模拟 Chrome 浏览器行为，实现高度隐蔽的网络访问。支持多平台运行，内置 ChatGPT 功能，并持续更新以应对网络封锁，已稳定运行九年。
summary.en: XX-Net is an open-source proxy tool designed to bypass internet censorship using traffic obfuscation that mimics Chrome browser behavior. It supports multiple platforms, includes built-in ChatGPT access, and has maintained stable operation for nine years with regular updates.

metadata.name: Django-ERP
metadata.description: Django-ERP是一款基于Django开发的ERP管理软件，包含常用的销售管理、采购管理、库存管理、组织管理等，支持按项目归集费用，支持工作流审批，支持采购单、报价单的批量导入。

summary.zh: Django-ERP 是一款基于 Django 框架开发的轻量级企业资源规划系统，涵盖销售、采购、库存及组织管理模块，支持项目费用归集、工作流审批及采购单/报价单批量导入，适用于中小企业数字化管理，具备良好的可扩展性与数据库兼容性。
summary.en: Django-ERP is a lightweight enterprise resource planning system built on Django, featuring sales, procurement, inventory, and organizational management modules. It supports project-based cost tracking, workflow approvals, and bulk import of purchase/quotation orders, ideal for SMEs seeking digital transformation with high extensibility and database compatibility.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-next
metadata.description: Elegant theme for Hexo.

summary.zh: NexT 是一款优雅高质量的 Hexo 主题，专为博客设计，提供 Muse、Mist、Pisces 和 Gemini 四种布局方案，支持响应式与多语言。该项目已不再维护，社区维护版本已迁移至 theme-next 组织。
summary.en: NexT is a high-quality, elegant theme for Hexo, offering four layout schemes—Muse, Mist, Pisces, and Gemini—with responsive design and multilingual support. This repository is deprecated; the community-maintained version is now under the theme-next organization.

metadata.name: material_design_zh_2
metadata.description: Material Design 中文版 ( 2015 年 8 月更新)

summary.zh: 该项目是 Google Material Design 官方文档的中文翻译版本，于2015年8月更新，新增20余章节。由1sters团队及众译网协作完成，托管于极客学院Wiki平台，提供完整、权威的中文设计指南，涵盖UI/UX规范、组件说明与交互原则，助力开发者实现一致且美观的Android应用界面。
summary.en: This repo hosts the Chinese translation of Google's Material Design guidelines, updated in August 2015 with 20+ new chapters. Translated and proofread by the 1sters team and Zhongyi.in, it provides a comprehensive, authoritative Chinese reference for UI/UX design principles, components, and interaction patterns, hosted on Jikexueyuan Wiki for easy access.

metadata.name: material_design_zh
metadata.description: Material Design 中文协同翻译 - design.1sters.com

summary.zh: 该项目是 Google Material Design 官方设计规范的中文协同翻译项目，旨在将英文原版设计指南完整、准确地翻译为中文，便于国内设计师与开发者理解和应用。采用 GitHub 协作模式，支持多人认领章节、翻译与校对，最终生成网页与 PDF 发布。
summary.en: This project is a collaborative Chinese translation of Google's official Material Design guidelines, aiming to make the design system accessible to Chinese-speaking designers and developers. It uses GitHub for open collaboration, allowing contributors to claim, translate, and proofread sections, with final outputs published as web pages and PDFs.

metadata.name: Awesome-MaterialDesign
metadata.description: Collection of material design libs and res.
