summary.en: Open-AutoGLM is an open-source phone agent framework by ZhipuAI, leveraging vision-language models for multimodal screen understanding. It controls Android/HarmonyOS devices via ADB/HDB, executing natural language commands to automate tasks like app opening and content search, with remote debugging and sensitive operation confirmation for automation, UI testing, and accessibility.

metadata.name: pdfcraft
metadata.description: PDFCraft is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With 90+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.

summary.zh: PDFCraft是一款基于浏览器的隐私保护型PDF工具箱，提供90+专业功能，支持PDF编辑、转换、合并、分割、压缩、加密等操作。采用WebAssembly技术实现全客户端处理，文件无需上传服务器，确保数据绝对安全。同时提供可视化工作流编辑器，支持拖拽式批量自动化处理管线。
summary.en: PDFCraft is a privacy-first browser-based PDF toolkit offering 90+ professional tools for editing, converting, merging, splitting, compressing, and securing documents. Powered by WebAssembly, all processing happens client-side with zero server uploads, ensuring complete data security. Features a visual workflow editor for drag-and-drop automated processing pipelines.

metadata.name: AutoGLM-GUI
metadata.description: AutoGLM 的现代化 Web 图形界面 - 让 AI 自动化操作 Android 设备变得简单 已进化为你的专属自动化生产力工具

summary.zh: AutoGLM-GUI 是一款 AI 驱动的 Android 自动化工具，提供现代化 Web 图形界面。通过 ADB 和 scrcpy 实现实时屏幕预览与设备控制，支持定时任务和 Docker 部署实现 7x24 小时自动化运行。采用分层代理架构（决策模型+视觉模型），具备多设备管理、MCP 协议支持、模拟器零配置连接等能力。
summary.en: AutoGLM-GUI is an AI-powered Android automation tool with a modern web GUI for device control via ADB and scrcpy. It supports scheduled tasks and Docker deployment for 24/7 automation, featuring a layered agent architecture combining decision and vision models. Supports multi-device management, MCP protocol integration, and zero-config emulator connectivity.

metadata.name: AutoGLM-For-Android
metadata.description: 纯 Android 端 Open-AutoGLM 实现，无需电脑

summary.zh: 基于Open-AutoGLM开发的Android原生应用，将传统电脑端手机自动化方案转变为独立运行的App。通过Shizuku获取系统权限，支持自然语言描述任务后AI自动规划与执行，包含屏幕截图视觉分析、操作指令输出、悬浮窗实时显示进度等功能。提供原生Material Design界面，兼容任意OpenAI格式的视觉模型API。
summary.en: Android native implementation of Open-AutoGLM that transforms PC-based phone automation into a standalone mobile app. Uses Shizuku for system permissions, enabling AI-powered task planning and execution through natural language input. Features screen capture visual analysis, operation command output, and real-time progress display via floating window. Offers native Material Design UI with OpenAI-compatible vision model API support.

metadata.name: openskills
metadata.description: Universal skills loader for AI coding agents - npm i -g openskills

summary.zh: OpenSkills 是通用技能加载器，将 Anthropic Claude Code 的技能系统迁移至所有 AI 编码代理。通过生成完全兼容的 `<available_skills>` XML 格式，实现 Cursor、Windsurf、Aider、Codex 等主流代理的跨平台支持。支持从 Anthropic 市场、GitHub 仓库或本地路径安装技能，采用渐进式披露机制按需加载，保持上下文简洁。
summary.en: OpenSkills universalizes Claude Code's skill system for every AI coding agent by generating compatible `<available_skills>` XML. It enables cross-platform support for Cursor, Windsurf, Aider, Codex and other agents, with skills installable from Anthropic marketplace, GitHub repos, or local paths. Progressive disclosure loads skills on-demand to maintain clean context.

metadata.name: one-mcp
metadata.description: A centralized reverse-proxy platform for MCP servers — manage, group, and export as Skills from a single endpoint.

summary.zh: One MCP 是一个专为 Model Context Protocol 打造的集中式反向代理平台。支持安装、配置和监控 MCP 服务（stdio/SSE/streamable HTTP），可将多个服务分组并导出为 Anthropic Skills 用于 Claude Code。提供实时分析、OAuth 登录（GitHub/Google）和 RBAC 访问控制，采用 Go + React 构建，支持 Docker 部署。
summary.en: One MCP is a centralized reverse-proxy platform for Model Context Protocol services. It enables installing, configuring, and monitoring MCP servers (stdio/SSE/streamable HTTP), grouping multiple services, and exporting as Anthropic Skills for Claude Code. Features real-time analytics, OAuth login (GitHub/Google), RBAC, built with Go + React, Docker-ready.

metadata.name: lsp-skill
metadata.description: IntelliSense Designed for Coding Agent

summary.zh: 为AI编程代理设计的IntelliSense技能包，基于Language Server Agent Protocol (LSAP)实现。赋予AI代理编译器级别的代码理解能力，支持语义导航、跨文件依赖分析、类型推断等高级功能。目前原生支持Python和Rust语言，可替代传统文本搜索，提供精确的代码结构感知与上下文理解。
summary.en: An IntelliSense skill package for AI coding agents built on the Language Server Agent Protocol (LSAP). It provides compiler-accurate code comprehension including semantic navigation, cross-file dependency analysis, and type inference. Native support for Python and Rust enables precise code structure awareness and context understanding, replacing traditional text-based search.

summary.zh: 通过命令行界面(CLI)和MCP服务器程序化访问Google NotebookLM的工具。支持笔记本管理、来源添加(URL/文本/Drive/文件)、AI问答、音频/视频内容生成等核心功能，可无缝集成Claude、Cursor等AI助手实现自然语言自动化工作流。
summary.en: Programmatic access to Google NotebookLM via CLI and MCP server. Supports notebook management, source addition, AI querying, and audio/video generation. Seamlessly integrates with AI assistants like Claude and Cursor for natural language workflow automation.

metadata.name: goose
metadata.description: A database migration tool. Supports SQL migrations and Go functions.

summary.zh: Goose是Go语言开发的数据库迁移工具，同时提供CLI和库两种使用方式。支持SQL脚本和Go函数两种迁移方式，兼容Postgres、MySQL、SQLite、ClickHouse等十余种数据库。具备嵌入式迁移、乱序执行迁移、环境变量替换等高级功能，支持数据种子注入。
summary.en: Goose is a database migration tool written in Go, available as both CLI and library. It supports SQL and Go function migrations across 10+ databases including Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, and ClickHouse. Features include embedded migrations, out-of-order execution, environment variable substitution, and data seeding capabilities.

metadata.name: jib
metadata.description: 🏗 Build container images for your Java applications.

summary.zh: Jib 是 Google 推出的 Java 容器镜像构建工具，无需 Docker 守护进程即可构建优化的 Docker 和 OCI 镜像。通过 Maven 或 Gradle 插件实现，将应用依赖与代码分层，支持可重现构建，显著加速部署流程。
summary.en: Jib is Google's Java container image builder that creates optimized Docker and OCI images without a Docker daemon. Available as Maven/Gradle plugins, it separates dependencies from application code, enabling reproducible builds and significantly faster deployment.

metadata.name: pg-aiguide
metadata.description: MCP server and Claude plugin for Postgres skills and documentation. Helps AI coding tools generate better PostgreSQL code.

summary.zh: pg-aiguide是面向AI编程工具的PostgreSQL专业知识服务。作为MCP服务器和Claude插件，它提供PostgreSQL官方手册的语义搜索（版本感知）、AI优化的最佳实践技能库，以及TimescaleDB等扩展文档。显著提升AI生成的数据库Schema质量：约束增加4倍、索引增加55%，并采用PG17现代特性，生成更健壮、高性能的代码。
summary.en: pg-aiguide is an AI-optimized PostgreSQL expertise service for coding assistants. As an MCP server and Claude plugin, it provides semantic search across the official PostgreSQL manual with version awareness, AI-optimized best practices skills, and extension ecosystem docs like TimescaleDB. It dramatically improves AI-generated database schemas: 4× more constraints, 55% more indexes, and modern PG17 features for robust, performant code.

metadata.name: WayLog
metadata.description: WayLog - Save & Export AI Chat History. A local-first extension that turns your fleeting AI conversations into a permanent, git-friendly knowledge base.

summary.zh: WayLog是一款VS Code本地优先扩展，专注保存AI聊天历史。它自动聚合Cursor、Claude Code、Copilot、通义灵码等主流AI助手的对话记录，存储为Git友好的本地文件。提供后台自动保存和手动选择性保存功能，确保开发者永不丢失AI交互上下文。
summary.en: WayLog is a local-first VS Code extension that preserves AI chat history across multiple assistants including Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, and Lingma. It aggregates conversations into Git-friendly local storage with background auto-save and selective saving, ensuring developers never lose AI interaction context.

metadata.name: puter
metadata.description: 🌐 The Internet Computer! Free, Open-Source, and Self-Hostable.

summary.zh: Puter是一个功能丰富、高度可扩展的开源互联网操作系统。可作为隐私优先的个人云，集成文件管理、应用商店和游戏平台；也可替代Google Drive、Dropbox等云存储服务；支持自托管和Docker部署，提供远程桌面环境。适合构建Web应用、托管网站及学习分布式系统。
summary.en: Puter is a feature-rich, highly extensible open-source Internet OS serving as a privacy-first personal cloud with integrated file management, app store, and gaming platform. It functions as a self-hostable alternative to Dropbox and Google Drive, supporting Docker deployment and offering remote desktop capabilities for building and publishing web applications.

metadata.name: zedis
metadata.description: Zedis: A blazing-fast, native Redis GUI built with Rust and GPUI.

summary.zh: Zedis是一款基于Rust和GPUI开发的高性能Redis GUI客户端，采用GPU加速渲染实现原生60FPS流畅体验。内置虚拟滚动支持百万级键值浏览，智能数据解析器自动处理JSON、Protobuf、MessagePack及图片预览。提供命名空间树形分组、SSH隧道、TLS加密、只读模式保护企业数据安全，集成CLI与命令自动补全提升开发效率。
summary.en: Zedis is a blazing-fast Redis GUI client built with Rust and GPUI, delivering native 60 FPS experience with minimal memory footprint. It features GPU-accelerated rendering, virtual scrolling for 100k+ keys, and smart data viewers supporting JSON/Protobuf/MessagePack deserialization and image preview. Enterprise features include namespace tree grouping, SSH tunneling, TLS encryption, and read-only mode for production safety.

metadata.name: InvestAI
metadata.description: Say goodbye to emotional speculation and use AI to stay rational in your investing. InvestAI monitors trends, rule triggers, and risk signals, helping you focus on executing your strategy—while all decisions always remain in your hands. It doesn’t predict prices or place trades. It’s simply a calm, explainable investment monitoring assistant.

summary.zh: InvestAI是一款AI驱动的投资监控助手，基于预设交易规则（如海龟交易法则）持续分析用户关注的股票，识别买入信号、风险触发条件和趋势结构变化。它不预测价格、不执行交易，仅将规则分析结果以可解释的方式呈现，帮助投资者在情绪波动时回归理性决策，实现纪律性投资。
summary.en: InvestAI is an AI-powered investment monitoring assistant that continuously analyzes stocks based on predefined trading rules (e.g., Turtle Trading Rules), identifying buy signals, risk triggers, and trend structure changes. It doesn't predict prices or execute trades—instead, it presents explainable rule-based analysis to help investors stay rational and maintain disciplined decision-making.

metadata.name: MrRSS
metadata.description: A modern, cross-platform, and free AI RSS reader. 一个现代化、跨平台且免费的 AI RSS 阅读器.

summary.zh: MrRSS 是一款基于 Wails + Vue + Go 构建的跨平台 AI 增强型 RSS 阅读器，支持自动翻译文章内容、生成智能摘要、内置插件系统可对接 Obsidian/Notion/FreshRSS 等主流工具，提供 XPath 订阅、脚本自动化等高级功能。
summary.en: MrRSS is a cross-platform AI-enhanced RSS reader built with Wails, Vue.js, and Go. It features automatic translation, AI-powered summarization, a plugin ecosystem integrating with Obsidian/Notion/FreshRSS, and supports XPath subscriptions with script-based automation workflows.

metadata.name: wails
metadata.description: Create beautiful applications using Go

summary.zh: Wails是一个使用Go和Web技术构建桌面应用的框架。它能将Go代码与前端界面打包成单一可执行文件，采用原生渲染引擎而非嵌入式浏览器。支持Go与JavaScript互调、TypeScript类型自动生成、原生对话框与菜单、暗黑模式及毛玻璃效果，提供强大的CLI工具快速生成和构建项目。
summary.en: Wails is a framework for building desktop applications using Go and web technologies. It packages Go code with frontend into a single executable, using native rendering engines instead of embedded browsers. Supports Go-JavaScript interop, auto-generated TypeScript definitions, native dialogs/menus, dark mode, and frosted glass effects, with a powerful CLI for rapid project generation and building.

metadata.name: unregistry
metadata.description: Push docker images directly to remote servers without an external registry

summary.zh: Unregistry是一个轻量级容器镜像仓库工具，通过SSH直接在本地与远程Docker守护进程之间传输镜像。其核心`docker pussh`命令仅传输缺失的镜像层，无需外部registry、中介存储或暴露端口。类似Docker镜像的rsync，实现从A到B的轻量高效迁移，适用于开发和部署场景。
summary.en: Unregistry is a lightweight container registry that transfers Docker images directly between local and remote Docker daemons via SSH. Its `docker pussh` command transfers only missing image layers without external registries or exposed ports. Like rsync for Docker images, it enables efficient A-to-B image migration for development and deployment workflows.

metadata.name: dart_simple_live
metadata.description: 简简单单的看直播

summary.zh: 基于Flutter开发的跨平台直播聚合应用，支持虎牙、斗鱼、B站、抖音四大主流直播平台，提供直播源获取与实时弹幕功能。项目采用模块化架构，包含核心库、控制台程序、APP客户端及TV客户端，支持Android、iOS、Windows、MacOS、Linux及Android TV多平台运行。
summary.en: A cross-platform live streaming aggregator built with Flutter, supporting Huya, Douyu, Bilibili, and Douyin. It provides stream URL fetching and real-time danmaku (bullet comments). The project features a modular architecture with core library, console program, app client, and TV client, supporting Android, iOS, Windows, MacOS, Linux, and Android TV.

metadata.name: codexmcp
metadata.description: Enable seamless collaboration between Claude Code and Codex, transforming from a single agent to multiple agents for significantly enhanced productivity!

summary.zh: CodexMCP是基于MCP协议的AI编程助手协作框架，通过连接Claude Code与Codex实现架构设计与代码生成的协同。支持会话持久化、并行任务和推理追踪等企业级特性，相比官方版本增加多轮对话与错误处理能力，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: CodexMCP is an MCP-based collaboration framework linking Claude Code with Codex for unified architecture design and code generation. It offers enterprise features including session persistence, parallel execution, and reasoning tracking, adding multi-turn dialogue and error handling over the official version to dramatically improve development efficiency.

metadata.name: EasyGBD
metadata.description: GB28181设备端实现库，支持GB28181 2016和2022版本所有功能，支持实时视频、云台控制、位置订阅与通知、图像抓拍、语音广播/对讲、历史音视频回放等能力。

summary.zh: EasyGBD是专业级GB28181国标设备端实现库，全面支持2016/2022版本协议标准。提供H.264/H.265视频编码、PS流封装、SIP信令交互、云台控制、语音对讲、历史回放等完整能力，支持Windows/Linux/Android/iOS/ARM全平台，适配NVR、IPC、视频监控网关等多种安防场景。
summary.en: EasyGBD is a professional GB28181 device-side implementation library fully supporting 2016/2022 protocol standards. It provides H.264/H.265 encoding, PS stream encapsulation, SIP signaling, PTZ control, voice intercom, and playback capabilities across Windows/Linux/Android/iOS/ARM platforms, ideal for NVR, IPC, and video surveillance gateways.

metadata.name: todo-for-ai
metadata.description: 🤖 A comprehensive task management system specifically designed for AI assistants. Supports project management, task tracking, team collaboration, and seamless AI integration through MCP (Model Context Protocol). Built with modern tech stack including React, Flask, and Docker. Try it now at https://todo4ai.org/

summary.zh: 专为AI助手打造的任务管理系统，通过MCP协议实现与Claude、GPT等主流AI的无缝集成。支持项目管理、任务跟踪、团队协作，具备智能自动化和AI驱动的项目分析功能。前端采用React，后端使用Flask，容器化部署提供一键启动体验。
summary.en: A purpose-built task management system for AI assistants, featuring native MCP protocol integration with Claude, GPT, and other AI agents. Enables intelligent project management, automated task tracking, and real-time collaboration with AI-powered analytics. Built with React, Flask, and Docker.

metadata.name: spring-boot-data-source-decorator
metadata.description: Spring Boot integration with p6spy, datasource-proxy, flexy-pool and spring-cloud-sleuth

summary.zh: Spring Boot数据源装饰器自动配置库，集成P6Spy（SQL日志拦截）、Datasource Proxy（查询拦截）、FlexyPool（连接池度量监控）。通过@ConfigurationProperties统一配置，支持灵活组合装饰器链，提供开箱即用的数据源增强能力，适用于需要SQL监控、查询分析和连接池性能优化的Spring Boot应用。
summary.en: Spring Boot auto-configuration library that decorates DataSource with P6Spy for SQL logging, Datasource Proxy for query interception, and FlexyPool for connection pool metrics. Provides unified configuration via @ConfigurationProperties, supports flexible proxy chains, and enables out-of-the-box data source enhancement for applications requiring SQL monitoring and connection pool optimization.

metadata.name: tio
metadata.description: a tiny iothub, simple and useful.  轻量的 iothub，用经典的物模型简化 iot 应用开发

summary.zh: tio 是一个轻量级的 IoT Hub 核心实现，采用 Go 语言开发。支持私有化部署，核心功能包括设备管理（Thing）、设备影子（Shadow）、设备直接方法（Direct Method）和任务调度（Job）。内置 MQTT Broker 并支持 EMQX 集成，参考 AWS IoT、Azure IoT Hub 等主流云厂商的物模型抽象设计，可在生产环境中使用。
summary.en: tio is a lightweight IoT Hub implementation in Go, designed for private deployment. Core features include Thing management, Device Shadow, Direct Method, and Job scheduling. Built-in MQTT Broker with EMQX support, following cloud-native IoT patterns from AWS IoT and Azure IoT Hub. Production-ready.

metadata.name: AFFiNE
metadata.description: There can be more than Notion and Miro. AFFiNE(pronounced [ə‘fain]) is a next-gen knowledge base that brings planning, sorting and creating all together. Privacy first, open-source, customizable and ready to use.

summary.zh: AFFiNE 是一款开源下一代知识管理平台，深度融合文档、白板与数据库功能。首创「块」式编辑器与无边画布，支持将富文本、便签、网页、数据库等多种内容块自由放置于画布上。采用本地优先架构确保数据自主可控，集成多模态 AI 辅助创作，支持实时协作与自托管部署，是 Notion 和 Miro 的隐私优先开源替代方案。
summary.en: AFFiNE is an open-source next-gen knowledge management platform that deeply integrates docs, whiteboard, and database into one workspace. It pioneered block-based editor with an edgeless canvas, allowing free placement of rich text, sticky notes, web pages, and databases. Featuring local-first architecture for data ownership, multimodal AI assistance, real-time collaboration, and self-hosting - a privacy-first open-source alternative to Notion and Miro.

metadata.name: pages-cms
metadata.description: The No-Hassle CMS for Static Sites Generators

summary.zh: 开源 GitHub 内容管理系统，专为静态网站生成器设计。提供可视化界面直接编辑 Jekyll、Next.js、VuePress、Hugo 等项目内容，支持自托管或 Vercel 部署，内置 GitHub OAuth 认证与 Webhook 同步。
summary.en: Open-source GitHub-integrated CMS designed for static site generators. Provides visual interface to edit content for Jekyll, Next.js, VuePress, Hugo projects directly on GitHub, supports self-hosting or Vercel deployment with OAuth and Webhook sync.

metadata.name: server
metadata.description: The fully compliant, embeddable high-performance Go MQTT v5 server for IoT, smarthome, and pubsub

summary.zh: Mochi-MQTT 是 Go 语言实现的完全符合 MQTT v5 规范的嵌入式高性能消息代理服务器。支持 MQTT v3.1.1 兼容，提供 TCP/WebSocket 及 SSL/TLS 传输、内置 Redis/Badger/Pebble/Bolt 持久化、灵活的 Hook 扩展系统及规则引擎认证 ACL。完整支持 QoS0/1/2、共享订阅、主题别名、消息过期等特性，适用于 IoT、智能家居和发布订阅场景。
summary.en: Mochi-MQTT is a fully compliant, embeddable high-performance Go MQTT v5 broker with v3.1.1 compatibility. Features TCP/WebSocket with SSL/TLS, built-in Redis/Badger/Pebble/Bolt persistence, flexible Hook extension system, and rule-based auth ACL. Supports QoS0/1/2, shared subscriptions, topic aliases, and message expiry. Ideal for IoT, smart home and pub/sub applications.

metadata.name: agent
metadata.description: A unified Model Context Protocol server implementation that aggregates multiple MCP servers into one.

summary.zh: 1MCP是一个统一的Model Context Protocol服务器实现，通过单一端点聚合多个MCP服务器。支持OAuth 2.1认证、stdio传输隔离、输入清理和审计日志，提供高性能请求转发和热重载配置。适用于Claude Desktop、Cursor、VSCode等多种AI客户端，提供内置健康检查和监控功能。
summary.en: 1MCP is a unified Model Context Protocol server that aggregates multiple MCP servers into a single endpoint. It features OAuth 2.1 authentication, stdio transport isolation, input sanitization, and audit logging. With high-performance request forwarding and hot-reload configuration, it simplifies integration with AI clients like Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VSCode through built-in health monitoring.

metadata.name: garage
metadata.description: (Mirror) S3-compatible object store for small self-hosted geo-distributed deployments. Main repo: https://git.deuxfleurs.fr/Deuxfleurs/garage

summary.zh: Garage 是一个 S3 兼容的分布式对象存储服务，专为中小规模自托管场景设计。支持地理分布式部署，可跨多个物理位置复制数据，确保部分服务器不可达时仍保持高可用。核心优势在于轻量级架构、易于运维AGPLv3 免费开源。
summary.en: Garage is an S3-compatible distributed object storage service designed for small-to-medium scale self-hosting. It supports geo-distributed deployments across multiple physical locations, ensuring high availability even when some servers are unreachable. Key advantages include lightweight architecture, easy operation, and AGPLv3 open-source licensing.

metadata.name: mcp-router
metadata.description: A Unified MCP Server Management App (MCP Manager).

summary.zh: MCP Router 是一个桌面应用程序，用于统一管理 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 服务器。支持连接任何 MCP 服务器（本地/远程），通过 DXT/JSON/Manual 方式接入。可将服务器分组到项目和工作区，按需单独开关每个服务器的工具。数据完全本地存储，隐私安全。跨平台支持 Windows 和 macOS，提供 CLI 工具快速连接 Claude、Cline、Cursor 等 AI 客户端。
summary.en: MCP Router is a desktop application for unified management of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. It connects to any MCP server (local/remote) via DXT/JSON/Manual methods, organizing servers into Projects and Workspaces with per-server tool toggling. All data stored locally for privacy. Cross-platform support for Windows and macOS, with CLI tools for quick integration with AI clients like Claude, Cline, and Cursor.

metadata.name: tab-hive
metadata.description: Tab Hive, 网页蜂巢化

summary.zh: 一个纯前端的网页聚合工具，支持在网格布局中同时查看多个网站。支持创建多个布局场景（如工作、学习、娱乐），可配置行列数。支持CSS选择器全屏显示特定元素（如视频播放器、文章正文），并提供布局分享和搜索功能。提供Chrome插件和Electron桌面客户端两种使用方式。
summary.en: A frontend web tool displaying multiple websites in a configurable grid layout. Supports multiple layout scenarios (work, study, entertainment) with customizable rows/columns. Features CSS selector-based fullscreen mode to isolate specific elements like video players or article content. Offers Chrome extension and Electron desktop client with layout sharing and discovery capabilities.

metadata.name: term.everything
metadata.description: Run any GUI app in the terminal❗

summary.zh: term.everything是一个Linux命令行工具，能在终端中运行任何GUI应用程序。它是一个从零构建的Wayland compositor，将图形窗口输出到终端而非显示器。支持X11和Wayland主机系统，可通过SSH远程传输图形界面，甚至能在终端中运行Firefox、游戏或整个桌面环境。
summary.en: term.everything is a Linux CLI tool that runs any GUI application in the terminal. It's a from-scratch Wayland compositor that outputs graphical windows to the terminal instead of the display. Supports X11 and Wayland host systems, enables remote GUI transmission over SSH, and can run Firefox, games, or even entire desktop environments in a terminal.

metadata.name: opentelemetry-java-instrumentation
metadata.description: OpenTelemetry auto-instrumentation and instrumentation libraries for Java

summary.zh: OpenTelemetry Java Instrumentation 是为 Java 8+ 应用提供的自动插桩工具，通过 Java Agent 技术动态注入字节码，无需修改源代码即可自动捕获流行库和框架的遥测数据（ traces、metrics、logs）。支持多种导出格式和灵活配置，是构建应用可观测性的标准解决方案。
summary.en: OpenTelemetry Java Instrumentation provides auto-instrumentation for Java 8+ applications via Java Agent technology that dynamically injects bytecode to capture telemetry data (traces, metrics, logs) from popular libraries and frameworks without code changes. Supports multiple export formats and flexible configuration for observability.

metadata.name: garage-webui
metadata.description: WebUI for Garage Object Storage Service

summary.zh: 为Garage分布式对象存储服务设计的Web管理界面，提供健康状态监控、集群布局管理、Bucket创建编辑、对象浏览器及访问密钥管理等核心功能，支持Docker部署和S3协议兼容。
summary.en: Web admin interface for Garage, a self-hosted S3-compatible distributed object storage service. Provides health monitoring, cluster management, bucket operations, object browsing, and access key administration with Docker support.

metadata.name: BeidouGridCodec
metadata.description: 北斗网格码的编解码，包含二维和三维的编解码

summary.zh: 基于《GB/T 39409-2020》国家标准实现的Java北斗网格码编解码工具库，支持二维和三维坐标编码解码及高度信息。提供空间范围查询功能，可对多边形、线段、点进行相交网格码检索，适用于地理围栏、空间索引、GIS集成等场景。
summary.en: Java implementation of BeiDou Grid Code encoder/decoder based on GB/T 39409-2020 national standard. Supports 2D/3D coordinate encoding/decoding with altitude info, and spatial query for intersecting grid codes with polygons, lines, and points. Ideal for geofencing and GIS applications.

metadata.name: what-to-eat
metadata.description: 一饭封神：一个基于 AI 的智能菜谱生成平台，支持中华八大菜系 + 国际料理，提供营养分析、酒水推荐、菜谱效果图生成等全方位烹饪指导。

summary.zh: 一饭封神是一款基于AI的智能菜谱生成平台，支持中华八大菜系及国际料理。核心功能包括智能菜谱生成、营养分析、AI菜品效果图、酒水搭配推荐及酱汁设计。采用Vue 3+TypeScript+Tailwind CSS开发，支持动态配置多模型AI服务，一键部署至Vercel/Netlify。
summary.en: Yi Fan Shen Shen is an AI-powered smart recipe generation platform supporting Chinese eight major cuisines and international dishes. Features include intelligent recipe generation, nutrition analysis, AI dish visualization, wine pairing, and sauce design. Built with Vue 3 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS, supporting dynamic multi-model AI configuration and one-click deployment.

summary.zh: 一款无需 Docker 或 Python 即可运行的镜像拉取工具，支持从国内镜像源下载 Docker 镜像并导出为 .tar 文件，方便内网离线环境导入。支持 amd64/arm64 多架构，兼容 Docker Hub API，提供交互式和命令行两种使用模式。
summary.en: A standalone tool to pull Docker images without installing Docker or Python, supporting domestic mirror sources and exporting images as .tar files for offline intranet environments. Supports amd64/arm64 architectures with Docker Hub API compatibility, available in interactive and CLI modes.

metadata.name: genai-toolbox
metadata.description: MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open source MCP server for databases.

summary.zh: Google开源的MCP服务器，专为数据库场景设计。提供连接池管理、身份认证、可观测性等企业级功能，支持自然语言查询和自动生成SQL代码，开发者可在10行代码内将AI代理与数据库集成，加速构建智能数据库助手。
summary.en: Google's open-source MCP server designed specifically for database scenarios. Provides enterprise-grade features including connection pooling, authentication, and observability. Supports natural language queries and automated SQL generation, enabling developers to integrate AI agents with databases in under 10 lines of code.

metadata.name: poi-tl
metadata.description: Generate awesome word(docx) with template

summary.zh: poi-tl是一个基于Apache POI的Java Word模板引擎，通过Word模板和数据动态生成.docx文档。它能完美保留模板中的样式，支持文本、图片、表格、图表、代码高亮、Markdown转换等丰富功能，提供循环、条件判断、模板嵌套等强大能力，让文档生成如HTML模板般简单高效。
summary.en: poi-tl is a Java Word template engine built on Apache POI that generates .docx documents dynamically from Word templates and data. It perfectly preserves template styles and supports rich features including text, images, tables, charts, code highlighting, and Markdown conversion, with powerful capabilities like loops, conditionals, and template nesting.

metadata.name: cap-server
metadata.description: capjs的java后端实现

summary.zh: CAPTCHA人机验证系统的Java后端实现，提供挑战创建、验证和Token兑换功能。支持自定义存储实现、可配置挑战参数（数量/长度/难度）及Token过期时间，适用于Web应用的人机验证防护场景。
summary.en: Java backend implementation of CAPTCHA human verification system, providing challenge creation, validation and token redemption. Supports custom storage implementation, configurable challenge parameters (count/size/difficulty) and token expiration, suitable for web application bot protection.

metadata.name: iPlay
metadata.description: Enjoy Media Everywhere, On Every Platform 👀

summary.zh: iPlay 是一款支持 Android、iOS、Windows、macOS、Xbox 的现代跨平台视频播放器，支持 Emby、Jellyfin 等主流媒体服务器，提供多站点切换、音频播放及自定义字体等功能，采用 mpv、VLC、ExoPlayer 作为核心解码引擎，实现全平台一致的媒体播放体验。
summary.en: iPlay is a modern cross-platform video player supporting Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Xbox. It integrates with Emby and Jellyfin media servers, offering multi-site switching, audio playback, and custom fonts. Built on mpv, VLC, and ExoPlayer codecs, it delivers consistent media experiences across all platforms.

metadata.name: everything-ai-chat
metadata.description: 一个现代化的 Everything 搜索客户端，将 AI 智能与极速本地搜索完美结合。

summary.zh: 基于Everything极速搜索引擎的桌面客户端，通过OpenAI GPT实现自然语言转搜索语法，提供一键连接、多策略进程管理、玻璃态UI、多维度排序等功能，支持10种语言国际化，适用于Windows系统的高效文件检索场景。
summary.en: A desktop client built on Everything's ultra-fast search engine, using OpenAI GPT to convert natural language queries into precise search syntax. Features one-click connection, multi-strategy process management, glassmorphism UI, multi-dimensional sorting, and supports 10 languages for efficient file retrieval on Windows.

metadata.name: tinystruct
metadata.description: A lightweight, modular Java application framework for web and CLI development,         designed for AI integration and plugin-based architecture.         Enabling developers to create robust solutions with ease for building efficient and scalable applications.

summary.zh: tinystruct是一个轻量级模块化Java框架，支持Web和CLI双模式开发。其核心采用插件式架构，通过@Action注解驱动快速定义HTTP接口或CLI命令，自动处理请求路由。专为AI集成设计，支持微服务、RESTful API及命令行工具构建，代码简洁高效，版本1.7.18。
summary.en: tinystruct is a lightweight, modular Java framework supporting both Web and CLI development. Its plugin-based architecture uses @Action annotations to define HTTP endpoints or CLI commands with automatic routing. Designed for AI integration, it enables building microservices, RESTful APIs, and CLI tools with clean, efficient code. Version 1.7.18.

metadata.name: postgres-mcp
metadata.description: Postgres MCP Pro provides configurable read/write access and performance analysis for you and your AI agents.

summary.zh: Postgres MCP Pro是一个开源的Model Context Protocol服务器，为AI代理提供全面的PostgreSQL数据库支持。核心功能包括数据库健康分析、智能索引调优、EXPLAIN查询计划解读、模式感知SQL生成，以及可配置的读写权限控制。支持stdio和SSE传输协议，涵盖从编码到生产调优的完整开发流程。
summary.en: Postgres MCP Pro is an open-source Model Context Protocol server providing comprehensive PostgreSQL support for AI agents. It offers database health analysis, intelligent index tuning, EXPLAIN plan interpretation, schema-aware SQL generation, and configurable read/write access control. Supports stdio and SSE transports, covering the entire development lifecycle from coding to production tuning.

metadata.name: playwright-mcp
metadata.description: Playwright MCP server

summary.zh: 微软开发的Model Context Protocol服务器，提供基于Playwright的浏览器自动化能力。通过结构化可访问性树而非截图实现LLM与网页交互，无需视觉模型，支持VS Code、Claude Desktop、Cursor等多种MCP客户端，适用于探索式自动化和自愈测试等场景。
summary.en: Microsoft's MCP server enabling browser automation via Playwright. Interacts with web pages through structured accessibility snapshots instead of screenshots, eliminating vision model requirements. Supports VS Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP clients for exploratory automation and self-healing tests.

metadata.name: cap
metadata.description: The privacy-first, self-hosted CAPTCHA for the modern web.

summary.zh: Cap是一款轻量级、开源的现代CAPTCHA替代方案，采用SHA-256工作量证明机制保护网站。相比传统视觉验证码，它体积微小（约20KB）、无外部依赖、完全零追踪，支持Docker自托管和CSS深度定制，完美替代reCAPTCHA和hCaptcha。
summary.en: Cap is a lightweight, open-source CAPTCHA alternative using SHA-256 proof-of-work challenges. At ~20KB with zero dependencies, it offers privacy-first protection without visual puzzles or tracking. Fully self-hostable via Docker with deep CSS customization, serving as a modern replacement for reCAPTCHA and hCaptcha.

metadata.name: Ghosten-Player
metadata.description: 一个视频播放器，支持网盘直连、元数据刮削、IPTV、文件管理等 /   A video player that supports direct connection to network disk, metadata scraping, IPTV, file management, etc.

summary.zh: Ghosten Player 是一款 Android 平台的视频播放器，同时支持手机和电视端。核心功能包括阿里云盘、夸克网盘直连播放，Emby/Jellyfin 媒体服务器集成，自动从 TMDB 刮削影视元数据，IPTV 直播支持，以及本地文件管理。纯本地运行无需后端，采用原生 Android 开发，体积仅约 15MB。
summary.en: Ghosten Player is an Android video player supporting both phone and TV terminals. Core features include direct playback from Aliyun Drive and Quark Drive, Emby/Jellyfin integration, automatic metadata scraping from TMDB, IPTV streaming, and local file management. Runs purely locally without backend services, built with native Android development, weighing only ~15MB.

metadata.name: obsidian-smart-connections
metadata.description: Chat with your notes & see links to related content with AI embeddings. Use local models or 100+ via APIs like Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT & Llama 3

summary.zh: Obsidian智能笔记插件，通过AI语义嵌入技术自动发现相关内容，告别手动链接和标签整理。支持本地模型或100+ API（Claude、Gemini、ChatGPT、Llama 3），零配置开箱即用，隐私优先可离线运行，移动端全适配。
summary.en: An Obsidian plugin using AI semantic embeddings to automatically discover related notes, eliminating manual linking and tagging. Supports local models or 100+ APIs (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, Llama 3), zero-config setup, privacy-first offline capability, and full mobile support.

metadata.name: gitingest
metadata.description: Replace 'hub' with 'ingest' in any GitHub URL to get a prompt-friendly extract of a codebase

summary.zh: 将任意Git仓库转换为LLM友好的文本格式，支持URL目录和本地代码。用户可通过替换GitHub链接中「hub」为「ingest」快速获取代码摘要，包含文件结构、大小统计和token计数，兼容CLI命令和Python包调用，支持私有仓库认证。
summary.en: Transforms any Git repository into LLM-friendly text format for AI prompting. Users can replace 'hub' with 'ingest' in GitHub URLs or use CLI/Python API to generate code digests with file structure, statistics, and token counts. Supports private repositories via PAT.

metadata.name: LearnOpenGL-CN
metadata.description: http://learnopengl.com 系列教程的简体中文翻译

summary.zh: 将知名OpenGL教程网站learnopengl.com的内容翻译为中文的开放项目，采用MkDocs构建静态文档站点。内容涵盖OpenGL基础、高级光照、阴影、PBR等核心图形编程技术，配有完整代码示例。项目持续更新校对中，支持社区志愿者参与翻译贡献。
summary.en: A Chinese translation project of the learnopengl.com tutorial series, built with MkDocs static site generator. Covers essential graphics programming topics including OpenGL fundamentals, advanced lighting, shadows, and PBR rendering with complete code examples. Continuously updated with community contributions.

metadata.name: read-frog
metadata.description: 🐸 Read Frog - Open Source Immersive Translate | 🐸 陪读蛙 - 开源沉浸式翻译

summary.zh: 陪读蛙(Read Frog)是一款开源AI驱动浏览器扩展，主打沉浸式翻译与语言学习。支持20+AI模型，提供双语对照、上下文感知翻译、选词翻译、字幕翻译及TTS语音朗读功能，帮助用户在真实网页浏览场景中提升语言能力。
summary.en: Read Frog is an open-source AI-powered browser extension for immersive language learning. Supporting 20+ AI models, it offers bilingual translation, context-aware translation, selection translation, subtitle translation, and TTS voice reading to enhance language skills during web browsing.

metadata.name: astro
metadata.description: The web framework for content-driven websites. ⭐️ Star to support our work!

summary.zh: Astro是现代化内容驱动网站构建框架，采用Island Architecture实现「Zero JS by Default」理念。通过静态站点生成(SSG)和服务器端渲染(SSR)两种模式，兼顾首屏加载性能和动态交互能力。支持React、Vue、Svelte、Preact、Solid等主流UI框架无缝集成，提供卓越开发者体验和极致性能输出。
summary.en: Astro is a modern web framework for content-driven websites, featuring Island Architecture to achieve "Zero JS by Default". It delivers exceptional performance through Static Site Generation (SSG) and Server-Side Rendering (SSR), while supporting seamless integration with React, Vue, Svelte, Preact, Solid and other popular UI frameworks.

metadata.name: systeminformer
metadata.description: A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @ http://www.windows-internals.com

summary.zh: System Informer是一款免费开源的Windows系统监控与调试工具，提供进程管理、网络连接监控、磁盘I/O追踪、内核级堆栈分析等功能。它能识别资源消耗异常的程序，检测潜在恶意软件，并支持创建、编辑Windows服务。无需安装，便携易用，是系统管理员和安全研究人员的得力助手。
summary.en: System Informer is a free and open-source Windows system monitoring and debugging tool offering process management, network connection monitoring, disk I/O tracking, and kernel-level stack analysis. It identifies resource-consuming programs, detects potential malware, and supports creating/editing Windows services. Portable and installation-free, it's an essential assistant for system administrators and security researchers.

metadata.name: prompty
metadata.description: Prompty makes it easy to create, manage, debug, and evaluate LLM prompts for your AI applications.  Prompty is an asset class and format for LLM prompts designed to enhance observability, understandability, and portability for developers.

summary.zh: Prompty是微软推出的LLM提示词资产格式和工具链，通过标准化提示词结构增强可观察性、可理解性和可移植性。该项目提供VS Code扩展，支持提示词的创建、预览、快速运行和多模型配置管理。支持Azure AD和OpenAI认证，可与Prompt flow、LangChain、Semantic Kernel等主流编排框架无缝集成，加速提示工程开发流程。
summary.en: Prompty is Microsoft's LLM prompt asset format and tooling designed to enhance observability, understandability, and portability. It provides a VS Code extension for prompt creation, preview, execution, and multi-model configuration management. Supports Azure AD and OpenAI authentication, with seamless integrations into orchestration frameworks including Prompt flow, LangChain, and Semantic Kernel.

metadata.name: vsgCs
metadata.description: Cesium client for VSG

summary.zh: vsgCs是Vulkan Scene Graph的Cesium客户端，支持3D Tiles和Cesium ion地理空间资产的流式加载与渲染。基于Cesium Native引擎构建，支持glTF模型、OSM建筑、全球地形等多源数据可视化，具备多tileset场景管理、图像叠加层及分页式地形流送能力，适用于智慧城市、数字孪生及地理信息系统开发。
summary.en: vsgCs is a Cesium client for Vulkan Scene Graph enabling streaming and rendering of 3D Tiles and Cesium ion geospatial assets. Built on Cesium Native, it supports glTF models, OSM buildings, and global terrain with multi-tileset management and image overlays, ideal for smart city, digital twin, and GIS applications.

metadata.name: massCode
metadata.description: A free, open-source developer workspace. Snippets, notes, calculations, and dev tools in one local-first app

summary.zh: massCode 是一款面向开发者的免费开源代码片段管理工具，基于 Electron、Vue 和 Codemirror 构建。支持创建、组织和快速检索代码片段，提供 VS Code 和 Raycast 扩展，灵感来源于 SnippetsLab 和 Quiver。
summary.en: massCode is a free, open-source code snippet manager for developers, built with Electron, Vue, and Codemirror. It enables creating, organizing, and instantly accessing personal snippet libraries with VS Code and Raycast extensions, inspired by SnippetsLab and Quiver.

metadata.name: cap-worker
metadata.description: Cap backend server build on Cloudflare worker, modern open-source CAPTCHA alternative using SHA-256 proof-of-work.

summary.zh: 基于Cloudflare Workers构建的下一代验证码服务，采用SHA-256工作量证明(PoW)算法实现机器人防护。依托250+边缘节点全球分布式部署，响应延迟低于100ms。通过Durable Objects实现状态一致性管理，提供RESTful API接口，支持5分钟快速集成，严格保护用户隐私，不收集任何追踪数据。
summary.en: A next-generation CAPTCHA service built on Cloudflare Workers, utilizing SHA-256 Proof of Work algorithm for robust bot protection. Deployed across 250+ edge locations globally with sub-100ms response times. Implements Durable Objects for state consistency, provides RESTful API, supports 5-minute integration, and prioritizes user privacy with zero tracking or data collection.

metadata.name: Pake
metadata.description: 🤱🏻 Turn any webpage into a desktop app with one command.

summary.zh: Pake是一款基于Rust Tauri开发的命令行工具，可将任意网页一键转换为跨平台桌面应用。包体仅约5MB，体积比Electron小近20倍，运行速度快、内存占用低。支持快捷键、沉浸式窗口、拖拽、样式定制及广告移除等特性，兼顾轻量与功能，适合快速将Web应用桌面化的开发者和普通用户。
summary.en: Pake is a Rust Tauri-based CLI tool that converts any webpage into a cross-platform desktop app with one command. At only ~5MB, it's nearly 20x smaller than Electron, offering faster performance and lower memory usage. Features include shortcuts, immersive windows, drag & drop, style customization, and ad removal—ideal for quickly desktopifying web applications.

metadata.name: context-engineering-intro
metadata.description: Context engineering is the new vibe coding - it's the way to actually make AI coding assistants work. Claude Code is the best for this so that's what this repo is centered around, but you can apply this strategy with any AI coding assistant!

summary.zh: Context Engineering是一种为AI编程助手构建完整上下文系统的工程方法论，通过CLAUDE.md项目规则、INITIAL.md功能需求文档、PRP产品需求提示和代码示例，让AI能够端到端完成复杂任务。该模板提供标准化工作流程，显著提升AI代码生成的质量和一致性，声称比提示词工程高效10倍，比vibe coding高效100倍。
summary.en: Context Engineering is a systematic methodology for providing comprehensive context to AI coding assistants through CLAUDE.md project rules, INITIAL.md feature requests, PRP (Product Requirements Prompts), and code examples. This template offers a standardized workflow that dramatically enhances AI code generation quality and consistency, enabling end-to-end complex task execution.

metadata.name: rustfs
metadata.description: 🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

summary.zh: RustFS是使用Rust开发的高性能分布式对象存储系统，完全兼容S3协议。4KB对象负载性能比MinIO快2.3倍，支持与MinIO、Ceph等S3兼容平台的数据迁移和共存。采用Apache 2.0开源许可证，针对数据湖、AI和大数据工作负载优化，具备可扩展和容错架构。
summary.en: RustFS is a high-performance, distributed object storage system built in Rust with full S3 compatibility. It delivers 2.3x faster performance than MinIO for 4KB object payloads and supports seamless migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms like MinIO and Ceph. Licensed under Apache 2.0, it's optimized for data lakes, AI, and big data workloads with scalable and fault-tolerant architecture.

metadata.name: nocodb
metadata.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 A Free & Self-hostable Airtable Alternative

summary.zh: NocoDB是一款免费可自托管的在线数据库构建工具，号称Airtable替代品。提供无代码/低代码界面，支持通过Docker快速部署，可选择SQLite或PostgreSQL作为数据后端。具备表格视图、API生成、团队协作等功能，适用于快速构建内部工具和数据管理应用。
summary.en: NocoDB is a free, self-hostable online database builder positioned as an Airtable alternative. It offers a no-code/low-code interface with Docker deployment support, supporting both SQLite and PostgreSQL backends. Features include spreadsheet-like views, API generation, and team collaboration—ideal for building internal tools and data management applications.

metadata.name: bytes-radar
metadata.description: Hyper-fast code cloc tool for remote repositories. Serverless optimized.

summary.zh: 高性能远程仓库代码行数统计工具，采用Rust异步流式处理和内存解压缩技术，运行时内存占用低于12MB。支持GitHub、GitLab、Bitbucket等7+平台，识别150+编程语言，提供实时进度显示和多格式输出（JSON/CSV/XML等），支持部署至Cloudflare Workers无服务器环境。
summary.en: Hyper-fast Rust-based CLOC tool for remote repositories featuring async streaming and in-memory decompression with <12MB memory footprint. Supports 7+ platforms including GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket, detects 150+ languages, offers real-time progress tracking and multi-format output (JSON/CSV/XML/YAML/TOML), deployable to Cloudflare Workers.

metadata.name: trae-agent
metadata.description: Trae Agent is an LLM-based agent for general purpose software engineering tasks.

summary.zh: 字节跳动开源的LLM智能体，专为通用软件工程任务设计。提供功能强大的CLI接口，支持OpenAI、Anthropic、Claude、Google Gemini等多模型接入。其透明模块化架构专为研究设计，便于扩展、分析和进行消融实验，是研究AI智能体架构的理想平台。
summary.en: ByteDance's LLM-based agent for general-purpose software engineering tasks. Features a powerful CLI interface with multi-model support including OpenAI, Anthropic, Claude and Google Gemini. Its transparent modular architecture is research-friendly, enabling easy extension, analysis and ablation studies for AI agent research.

metadata.name: Unla
metadata.description: 🧩 MCP Gateway - A lightweight gateway service that instantly transforms existing MCP Servers and APIs into MCP servers with zero code changes. Features Docker deployment and management UI, requiring no infrastructure modifications.

summary.zh: Unla是Go语言编写的轻量级MCP网关服务，无需代码修改即可将现有MCP服务器和API零成本转换为MCP协议兼容端点。支持Docker一键部署，提供可视化Web管理界面，采用YAML配置驱动实现API到MCP的自动转化，兼容裸金属、VM、Kubernetes等多种部署环境。
summary.en: Unla is a lightweight MCP gateway written in Go that transforms existing MCP servers and APIs into MCP protocol-compliant endpoints through configuration without any code changes. It supports one-click Docker deployment with a built-in web management UI, enabling automatic API-to-MCP conversion via YAML configuration across diverse infrastructure including bare metal, VMs, and Kubernetes.

metadata.name: sniffnet
metadata.description: Comfortably monitor your Internet traffic 🕵️‍♂️

summary.zh: Sniffnet是一款跨平台的网络流量监控应用，采用Rust开发，提供直观的图形界面实时显示网络流量统计、协议分布及连接详情。支持流量告警、自定义主题及多语言界面，完全免费开源。
summary.en: Sniffnet is a cross-platform network traffic monitoring application built with Rust, featuring an intuitive GUI for real-time display of traffic statistics, protocol distribution, and connection details. Supports traffic alerts, custom themes, and multilingual interface. Fully free and open-source.

metadata.name: higress
metadata.description: 🤖 AI Gateway | AI Native API Gateway

summary.zh: Higress 是阿里巴巴开源的云原生 API 网关，基于 Istio 和 Envoy 构建。通过 Wasm 插件实现灵活扩展，支持 Go/Rust/JS 多语言。作为 AI Gateway，它统一管理 LLM API 与 MCP API，对接国内外主流大模型提供商，并提供 MCP 服务器托管能力。已在阿里云及阿里巴巴内部核心 AI 服务中大规模部署。
summary.en: Higress is a cloud-native API gateway developed by Alibaba, built on Istio and Envoy with flexible Wasm plugin extensibility supporting Go, Rust, and JavaScript. As an AI Gateway, it provides unified management for LLM and MCP APIs, connecting to mainstream domestic and international LLM providers while offering MCP server hosting. Deployed at scale in Alibaba Cloud and Alibaba's core AI services.

metadata.name: langfuse
metadata.description: 🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

summary.zh: 开源LLM工程平台，提供LLM可观测性、指标追踪、评估、提示词管理、playground和数据集管理功能。支持与OpenTelemetry、Langchain、OpenAI SDK、LiteLLM等主流框架集成，提供自托管和云端部署选项，Y Combinator W23孵化项目。
summary.en: Open-source LLM engineering platform offering observability, metrics tracking, evals, prompt management, playground, and dataset management. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, and LiteLLM. Supports self-hosted and cloud deployment. Y Combinator W23 batch.

metadata.name: 1Panel-Appstore
metadata.description: 1Panel-第三方应用商店(运维监控、免费大模型API、Nas工具、容器管理)

summary.zh: 面向1Panel的第三方精选应用商店，聚焦免费大模型逆向API与运维工具。提供DeepSeek、Kimi、Qwen、GLM、Minimax等主流大模型的免费API接口，支持Docker一键部署及1Panel计划任务自动更新。仓库经过供应链安全审查后重建，精选优质应用不追求大而全。
summary.en: A third-party app store for 1Panel focusing on free LLM reverse APIs and DevOps tools. Offers one-click Docker deployment for APIs including DeepSeek, Kimi, Qwen, GLM, and Minimax, with 1Panel automation support. Rebuilt after security review, featuring curated quality apps over quantity.

metadata.name: lal
metadata.description: 🔥 Golang audio/video live streaming lib/client/server. support RTMP, RTSP(RTP/RTCP), HLS, HTTP[S]/WebSocket-FLV/TS, GB28181, H264/H265/AAC/G711/OPUS, relay, cluster, record, HTTP Notify/API/UI. 直播

summary.zh: LAL是Go语言开发的音视频直播服务器，支持RTMP、RTSP(RTP/RTCP)、HLS、HTTP[S]/WebSocket-FLV/TS、GB28181等协议，以及H264/H265/AAC/G711/OPUS等音视频编码。提供转发、集群、录制、HTTP API/Notify/WebUI等企业级功能，依赖精简，部署灵活。
summary.en: LAL is a Go-based audio/video live streaming server supporting RTMP, RTSP, HLS, HTTP[S]/WebSocket-FLV/TS, GB28181 protocols and H264/H265/AAC/G711/OPUS codecs. Features relay, cluster, recording, HTTP API/Notify/WebUI with minimal dependencies and flexible deployment.

metadata.name: OpenList
metadata.description: A new AList Fork to Anti Trust Crisis

summary.zh: OpenList是AList的社区治理分支项目，旨在抵御开源信任危机。支持阿里云盘、OneDrive、GoogleDrive、S3等20+种存储服务，提供文件浏览、预览、下载等功能。采用Go语言开发，遵循AGPL-3.0开源协议，强调代码透明和长期维护。
summary.en: OpenList is a community-governed fork of AList designed to defend open source against trust-based attacks. It supports 20+ storage services including AliyunDrive, OneDrive, GoogleDrive, and S3, offering file browsing, preview, and download capabilities. Built with Go under AGPL-3.0 license, emphasizing code transparency and long-term maintenance.

metadata.name: donutbrowser
metadata.description: Simple Yet Powerful Anti-Detect Browser 🍩

summary.zh: 基于Camoufox内核开发的反检测浏览器，可创建完全隔离的本地浏览器配置文件。支持无限数量的独立账户管理、代理服务器配置（含基本认证）、从现有浏览器导入配置及自动更新。提供自建同步服务器实现跨设备配置、代理和分组同步，满足多账号管理和隐私保护需求。
summary.en: An anti-detect browser built on the Camoufox engine that creates completely isolated local browser profiles. Supports unlimited isolated accounts, proxy with basic authentication, profile import from existing browsers, and automatic updates. Features self-hosted sync server for cross-device profile, proxy, and group synchronization.

metadata.name: hajimi
metadata.description: 这是一个基于 FastAPI 构建的 Gemini API 代理

summary.zh: 基于FastAPI构建的Gemini API代理服务，支持OpenAI API格式兼容，实现API密钥轮询、假流式传输解决断连问题、并发缓存提升稳定性、伪装请求及联网搜索等特色功能，提供网页前端配置和多种部署方式。
summary.en: FastAPI-based Gemini API proxy with OpenAI API format compatibility, featuring API key rotation, fake streaming to prevent disconnections, concurrent caching, request obfuscation, and web search mode, with web UI configuration and flexible deployment options.

metadata.name: webvm
metadata.description: Virtual Machine for the Web

summary.zh: WebVM是一个完全在浏览器客户端运行的Linux虚拟机，基于CheerpX虚拟化引擎实现。无需服务器支持，通过WebAssembly技术将x86二进制程序JIT编译后运行，支持未修改的Debian发行版和原生开发工具链。具备虚拟块文件系统和Linux syscall模拟器，并可通过Tailscale实现网络访问。
summary.en: WebVM is a Linux virtual machine running entirely client-side in the browser, powered by the CheerpX virtualization engine. Server-less and WebAssembly-based, it executes unmodified x86 binaries via JIT compilation, supporting Debian distributions with native development toolchains. Features virtual block storage and Linux syscall emulation, with networking via Tailscale integration.

metadata.name: quartz
metadata.description: 🌱 a fast, batteries-included static-site generator that transforms Markdown content into fully functional websites

summary.zh: Quartz 是一个快速的静态网站生成器,专为发布数字花园和个人笔记设计。它将 Markdown 内容转换为功能完整的网站,内置双向链接、标签系统、全文搜索等功能,可一键部署到 GitHub Pages。
summary.en: Quartz is a fast static-site generator designed for publishing digital gardens and personal notes. It transforms Markdown content into fully functional websites with built-in bi-directional links, tag system, and full-text search, deployable to GitHub Pages.

metadata.name: top-rss-list
metadata.description: 订阅人数最多的rss源，中文优质rss源

summary.zh: 收集并整理中文互联网订阅人数最多的优质RSS源列表，涵盖科技媒体、博客、新闻、社区等内容类别。列表按订阅量排序，提供直接访问链接与在线预览服务，帮助用户快速发现和订阅高质量中文内容。
summary.en: A curated collection of the most subscribed Chinese RSS feeds, covering tech blogs, news sites, and community content. Sorted by subscription count with direct links and online preview, enabling users to discover high-quality Chinese content efficiently.

metadata.name: streamer-card
metadata.description: 流光卡片API

summary.zh: 基于 Node.js + Express + Puppeteer 的流光卡片生成 API，通过无头浏览器自动化渲染卡片模板，支持自定义标题、内容、二维码等参数，生成精美营销图片。提供 Docker 部署、重试机制与并发管理，适用于批量生成营销物料场景。
summary.en: A Node.js + Express + Puppeteer-based API for generating streamer light cards via headless browser automation. Accepts parameters like title, content, and QR codes to produce marketing images. Supports Docker deployment with retry mechanisms and concurrency management, ideal for batch marketing material generation.

metadata.name: NoneOS
metadata.description: An operating system based on the browser.

summary.zh: NoneOS 是一款基于浏览器的轻量级虚拟操作系统，采用纯静态文件架构无需后端服务器。提供文件管理、书签同步、笔记同步（类Notion）、文件传输（类LocalSend）等应用，旨在实现设备间无缝连接与协作。开发者可通过ofa.js框架快速构建Web微应用。
summary.en: NoneOS is a lightweight browser-based virtual operating system with pure static file architecture requiring no backend server. It offers file management, bookmark sync, note sync (Notion-like), and file transfer (LocalSend-like) applications, enabling seamless device collaboration. Developers can build web micro-apps using the ofa.js framework.

metadata.name: hono
metadata.description: Web framework built on Web Standards

summary.zh: 基于Web标准构建的轻量级高性能Web框架，支持Cloudflare Workers、Deno、Bun、Node.js等多运行时环境。内置RegExpRouter极速路由，零依赖，hono/tiny包仅12KB，提供完善的中间件生态和一流TypeScript支持。
summary.en: A lightweight, high-performance web framework built on Web Standards, supporting Cloudflare Workers, Deno, Bun, Node.js and more. Features RegExpRouter for ultrafast routing, zero dependencies, with hono/tiny package under 12KB, built-in middleware, and first-class TypeScript support.

metadata.name: note-gen
metadata.description: A cross-platform Markdown AI note-taking software.

summary.zh: NoteGen是一款跨平台的Markdown AI笔记应用，专注用AI桥接记录与写作，将碎片化知识整理成可读笔记。支持RAG检索增强和MCP协议扩展，提供智能代理自动处理笔记，轻量无广告，跨Windows/macOS/Linux/Android/iOS全平台运行。
summary.en: NoteGen is a cross-platform Markdown AI note-taking app that bridges recording and writing using AI, organizing fragmented knowledge into readable notes. It supports RAG retrieval-augmented generation and MCP protocol extension, featuring intelligent agents for automated note processing, lightweight 25MB size with no ads, running across Windows/macOS/Linux/Android/iOS.

metadata.name: opik
metadata.description: Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

summary.zh: Opik 是由 Comet 构建的开源 AI 可观测性平台，专注于 LLM 应用的全生命周期管理。通过全面的分布式追踪、自动评估和生产级仪表板，帮助开发者优化 RAG 系统、代码助手和代理工作流。支持提示词优化和 LLM 作为评判者等高级功能。
summary.en: Opik is an open-source AI observability platform by Comet for managing the complete LLM application lifecycle. It provides comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards to improve RAG systems, code assistants, and agentic workflows. Supports prompt optimization and LLM-as-a-judge capabilities.

metadata.name: FreshRSS
metadata.description: A free, self-hostable news aggregator…

summary.zh: FreshRSS 是一款开源自托管的 RSS/Atom/JSON Feed 聚合器，支持多用户、匿名访问、自定义标签、XPath 网页抓取、WebSub 推送通知，提供 REST API 与 CLI 客户端，采用 PHP 8.1+ 开发，遵循 AGPL v3 协议，适配树莓派等轻量服务器环境。
summary.en: FreshRSS is an open-source, self-hosted RSS/Atom/JSON feed aggregator supporting multi-user accounts, anonymous reading, custom tags, XPath-based web scraping, and WebSub push notifications. Built with PHP 8.1+, licensed under AGPL v3, optimized for lightweight servers including Raspberry Pi.

metadata.name: hadolint
metadata.description: Dockerfile linter, validate inline bash, written in Haskell

summary.zh: 一款用Haskell编写的智能Dockerfile静态分析工具，通过将Dockerfile解析为抽象语法树(AST)并执行规则检查来验证Dockerfile质量。该工具集成ShellCheck对RUN指令中的Bash代码进行lint，帮助开发者构建符合最佳实践的Docker镜像。支持CLI、Docker容器等多种运行方式，提供丰富的规则配置和集成选项。
summary.en: A smart Dockerfile linter written in Haskell that parses Dockerfiles into an AST and performs rule-based validation. It leverages ShellCheck to lint Bash code within RUN instructions, helping developers build best-practice Docker images. Supports CLI, Docker containers, and provides extensive rule configuration with CI/CD integrations.

metadata.name: reposilite
metadata.description: Lightweight and easy-to-use repository management software dedicated for the Maven-based artifacts in the JVM ecosystem 📦

summary.zh: Reposilite是一个专为JVM生态设计的轻量级Maven仓库管理工具。作为Nexus、Archiva和Artifactory的开源替代方案，它仅需约20MB内存即可运行，支持Docker部署，采用Kotlin编写，提供简单、可扩展的自托管解决方案来管理Maven构件。
summary.en: Reposilite is a lightweight Maven repository manager designed for the JVM ecosystem. As an open-source alternative to Nexus, Archiva, and Artifactory, it runs on approximately 20MB of RAM, supports Docker deployment, is written in Kotlin, and provides a simple, extensible self-hosted solution for managing Maven-based artifacts.

metadata.name: aya
metadata.description: Android ADB desktop app

summary.zh: AYA是一款开源的Android设备控制桌面应用，可视为ADB的图形化界面工具。支持屏幕镜像、文件管理、应用管理、进程监控、布局检查、性能监控、Logcat查看和交互式Shell等核心功能，跨平台支持Windows、macOS和Linux系统。
summary.en: AYA is an open-source desktop application for controlling Android devices, functioning as a GUI wrapper for ADB. It offers screen mirroring, file explorer, app manager, process monitor, layout inspector, CPU/memory/FPS monitoring, logcat viewer, and interactive shell. Supports Windows, macOS, and Linux.

metadata.name: certimate
metadata.description: An open-source and free self-hosted SSL certificates ACME tool, automates the full-cycle of issuance, deployment, renewal, and monitoring visually. 完全开源免费的自托管 SSL 证书 ACME 工具，申请、部署、续期、监控全流程自动化可视化，支持各大主流云厂商。

summary.zh: 开源免费的自托管 SSL 证书管理工具，基于 ACME 协议实现证书申请、部署、续期、监控全流程自动化可视化。支持 DNS-01 和 HTTP-01 挑战，兼容 60+ DNS 提供商和 110+ 部署目标，零依赖、~16MB 低内存占用，单文件即开即用。
summary.en: An open-source self-hosted SSL certificate management tool using ACME protocol, providing visual automation for the entire certificate lifecycle including issuance, deployment, renewal, and monitoring. Supports DNS-01/HTTP-01 challenges with 60+ DNS providers and 110+ deployment targets, featuring zero dependencies and ~16MB minimal memory footprint.

metadata.name: xiaozhi-esp32
metadata.description: An MCP-based chatbot | 一个基于MCP的聊天机器人

summary.zh: 基于MCP协议的智能语音聊天机器人，支持Qwen/DeepSeek等大模型。采用流式ASR+LLM+TTS架构实现语音交互，集成ESP-SR离线语音唤醒和3D Speaker声纹识别。支持ESP32-C3/S3/P4多平台，通过MCP协议扩展设备控制与云端能力（智能家居、PC操作、知识搜索等），具备OLED显示、电池管理、多语言支持。
summary.en: An intelligent voice chatbot based on MCP protocol, powered by large models like Qwen/DeepSeek. Features streaming ASR+LLM+TTS voice interaction architecture with ESP-SR offline wake-up and 3D Speaker voiceprint recognition. Supports ESP32-C3/S3/P4 platforms, extends capabilities via MCP for device control and cloud services including smart home, PC operation, and knowledge search, with OLED display, battery management, and multi-language support.

metadata.name: Abracadabra
metadata.description: Abracadabra 魔曰，古文风文本加密工具

summary.zh: 将AES256加密与文言文语法融合的文本加密工具。通过复杂的组句和语法匹配机制，将密文转化为高仿真文言文，参考《古文观止》等古代典籍。支持WASM加速，提供Web端和浏览器插件两种使用方式，兼具安全性与古典文化美学。
summary.en: A text encryption tool that fuses AES256 cryptography with Classical Chinese grammar. Using complex sentence construction and syntax matching, it transforms ciphertext into highly realistic Ancient Chinese prose, referencing classics like Guwen Guanzhi. Supports WASM acceleration with both web and browser extension interfaces, combining security with classical cultural aesthetics.

metadata.name: jessibuca
metadata.description: Jessibuca是一款开源的纯H5直播流播放器

summary.zh: Jessibuca是一款纯H5直播流播放器，通过WebAssembly技术将音视频解码库编译为wasm运行于浏览器，支持H.264/H.265视频及AAC音频解码，兼容PC、手机、微信端，无需插件即可实现低延迟直播播放。
summary.en: Jessibuca is a pure H5 live streaming player that runs audio/video decoding libraries as WebAssembly in browsers. It supports H.264/H.265 video and AAC audio decoding, works seamlessly across PC, mobile, and WeChat without plugins, enabling low-latency live streaming playback.

metadata.name: monibuca
metadata.description: 🧩 Monibuca is a Modularized, Extensible framework for building Streaming Server

summary.zh: Monibuca 是纯 Go 开发的高性能流媒体服务器框架，采用无锁设计与手动内存管理实现高并发。支持 RTMP、RTSP、HLS、WebRTC、GB28181、SRT 等多种协议，提供插件化架构、实时转码、录像回放、时移播放、AI 推理等能力，适用于直播、监控、视频会议等场景。
summary.en: Monibuca is a high-performance streaming server framework written entirely in Go, featuring lock-free design and manual memory management for high concurrency. It supports RTMP, RTSP, HLS, WebRTC, GB28181, SRT protocols with a plugin-based architecture, enabling real-time transcoding, recording, playback, time-shifting, and AI inference for live streaming, surveillance, and video conferencing scenarios.

metadata.name: uptime-kuma
metadata.description: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool

summary.zh: 一款优雅的开源自托管监控工具，支持HTTP、TCP、Ping、DNS、WebSocket、Docker容器等多种监控类型，提供90+种通知渠道，具备响应式UI、多状态页面、2FA认证等特性，最小监控间隔达20秒。
summary.en: An elegant open-source self-hosted monitoring tool supporting HTTP, TCP, Ping, DNS, WebSocket, Docker containers and more, with 90+ notification channels, reactive UI, multiple status pages, and 2FA, achieving 20-second monitoring intervals.

metadata.name: EasyDarwin
metadata.description: open source、high performance、industrial rtsp streaming server,a lot of optimization on streaming relay,KeyFrame cache,RESTful,and web management,also EasyDarwin support distributed load balancing,a simple streaming media cloud platform architecture.

summary.zh: 开源高性能工业级RTSP流媒体服务器，基于Go语言开发，支持RTMP/RTSP/HLS/HLS/WebRTC等多协议推拉流分发。具备关键帧缓存、分布式负载均衡、RESTful API和Web管理界面，支持X86/ARM/RISC-V等多种硬件架构，广泛应用于视频监控、直播推流、物联网视频传输等场景。
summary.en: An open-source, high-performance industrial-grade RTSP streaming server developed in Go, supporting multi-protocol push/pull streaming including RTMP/RTSP/HLS/HTTP-FLV/WebRTC. Features keyframe caching, distributed load balancing, RESTful API, and web management interface, supporting X86/ARM/RISC-V architectures for video surveillance, live streaming, and IoT video transmission.

metadata.name: nature
metadata.description: The Nature Programming Language

summary.zh: Nature是一门自研通用系统编程语言，采用纯C实现编译器和运行时，无需LLVM即可直接编译到目标平台机器码。支持跨平台交叉编译（x64/arm64/riscv64），内置强类型系统、并发原语（go/channel/select）、高性能GC、共享栈协程及tcmalloc风格内存分配器，提供vec/map等内置数据结构与集中式包管理，定位为高性能安全可靠的下一代系统编程语言。
summary.en: Nature is a self-developed general-purpose system programming language implemented in pure C, compiling directly to native machine code without LLVM. It supports cross-platform compilation (x64/arm64/riscv64) with strong typing, built-in concurrency primitives (go/channel/select), high-performance GC, shared-stack coroutines, and tcmalloc-style allocator, featuring built-in data structures and centralized package management for safe, reliable, high-performance software development.

metadata.name: obsidian-remote
metadata.description: Run Obsidian.md in a browser via a docker container.

summary.zh: 通过 Docker 容器在浏览器中远程运行 Obsidian.md 的开源项目。提供 Web 界面访问本地笔记库，支持卷挂载配置存储、Git 插件集成、字体自定义及 Nginx 反向代理部署。适用于服务器远程办公、跨设备同步笔记等场景，基于 NoVNC 技术实现浏览器内完整桌面体验。
summary.en: An open-source project enabling remote Obsidian.md access via Docker containers through a web browser. Features vault mounting, Git plugin support, custom fonts, and Nginx reverse proxy deployment. Ideal for remote work and cross-device note synchronization, delivering a full desktop experience in browsers using NoVNC technology.

metadata.name: coolmonitor
metadata.description: 一个高颜值的监控工具，支持网站监控/接口监控/HTTPS证书监控等

summary.zh: 酷监控是一款高颜值的开源监控工具，支持HTTP/HTTPS网站监控、API接口监控、HTTPS证书过期监控、TCP端口监控、MySQL/Redis数据库监控等多种类型。采用Next.js + SQLite技术栈，支持Docker一键部署，提供深色/浅色主题切换和邮件/Webhook/微信等通知方式。
summary.en: CoolMonitor is an open-source monitoring tool with a modern UI, supporting HTTP/HTTPS website, API, HTTPS certificate expiration, TCP port, MySQL/Redis database monitoring and more. Built with Next.js and SQLite, it supports Docker one-click deployment with dark/light theme switching and multi-channel notifications.

metadata.name: ClashMetaForAndroid
metadata.description: A rule-based tunnel for Android.

summary.zh: 基于 Clash.Meta 内核的 Android 图形客户端，提供规则驱动的网络代理隧道功能。支持多协议代理、自动规则匹配与系统级流量转发，适用于科学上网和网络调试。兼容 Android 5.0+ 及主流 CPU 架构，提供 Intent 控制和 URL Scheme 配置导入。
summary.en: A rule-based network tunnel client for Android powered by Clash.Meta kernel, featuring a graphical interface for proxy management. Supports multi-protocol proxies, automatic rule matching, and system-wide traffic forwarding, ideal for network debugging and bypass. Compatible with Android 5.0+ and major CPU architectures.

metadata.name: minimind-v
metadata.description: 🚀 「大模型」2小时从0训练65M参数的视觉多模态VLM！🌏 Train a 65M-parameter VLM from scratch in just 2 hours!

summary.zh: 一个超小参数视觉语言模型训练项目，可在1小时内用约1.3元成本训练26M参数的VLM。包含完整的数据清洗、预训练和监督微调流程，基于CLIP视觉编码器和MiniMind语言模型构建，支持个人GPU快速推理，适合作为视觉语言模型入门教程。
summary.en: An ultra-compact Vision Language Model project that trains a 26M-parameter VLM in just 1 hour at ~$0.18 cost. Features complete pipeline of data cleaning, pretraining, and SFT, built on CLIP vision encoder and MiniMind language model, supporting personal GPU inference and ideal for VLM learning.

metadata.name: EGM96
metadata.description: Java standalone EGM96 offset calculation

summary.zh: Java实现的EGM96大地水准面高程计算库，解决GPS设备返回的WGS84椭球高与平均海平面高之间的转换问题。通过读取EGM96网格数据文件并进行双线性插值，计算任意经纬度点的geoid offset，将WGS84椭球高转换为真实海拔高。主要应用于Android定位服务，将椭球高转换为用户友好的海拔高度。
summary.en: Java library computing EGM96 geoid offsets to convert WGS84 ellipsoidal altitudes to mean sea level (MSL) altitudes. Addresses the common GPS issue where receivers return ellipsoidal heights instead of orthometric heights useful for end users. Reads pre-computed EGM96 grid data and uses bilinear interpolation for offset calculation at any latitude/longitude. Primarily designed for Android Location API integration.

metadata.name: echo-url
metadata.description: 边缘计算实现在线 Mock 小工具.

summary.zh: echo-url 是基于边缘计算的 Serverless 应用，提供开箱即用的 HTTP 请求回显服务。通过 /edit 路由可在线编辑响应内容，/echo 路由返回配置数据。适用于 API 开发调试、Webhook 测试、前端 Mock 等场景，无需部署即可快速构建接口模拟工具。
summary.en: echo-url is an edge computing-based Serverless application providing out-of-the-box HTTP request echo service. Users can edit response content via /edit route and retrieve configured data through /echo. Ideal for API development debugging, webhook testing, and frontend mock scenarios without deployment.

metadata.name: spring-boot-init-template
metadata.description: 基于 Java Web 项目的 SpringBoot 框架初始化模板，适配最新版本Spring AI，该模板整合了常用的框架（Mybatis-Plus、ShardingSphere、Redis、RabbitMQ、Elasticsearch、SaToken、OSS、Caffeine以及MongoDB等），广泛支持JDK11和JDK17，部分版本兼容JDK8，同时该模板适用于前后端分离项目启动开发，保证大家在此基础上能够快速开发自己的项目，同时也适合入门学习，本项目会由作者持续更新。

summary.zh: SpringBoot企业级开发初始化模板，整合Mybatis-Plus、ShardingSphere、Redis、RabbitMQ、Elasticsearch、SaToken等主流框架，最新支持Spring AI 1.1.0，支持JDK11/17，适配前后端分离架构，为快速构建现代化Web应用提供完善的基础框架。
summary.en: Enterprise-grade SpringBoot initialization template integrating Mybatis-Plus, ShardingSphere, Redis, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, and SaToken. Latest version supports Spring AI 1.1.0 with JDK11/17 compatibility, designed for modern web application development with front-end/back-end separation architecture.

metadata.name: glance
metadata.description: A self-hosted dashboard that puts all your feeds in one place

summary.zh: Glance 是一款开源自托管仪表盘工具，以单个轻量级二进制文件运行，支持 RSS、Reddit、Hacker News、YouTube、Twitch、天气、股票等丰富小组件。采用 YAML 配置，支持多页面布局、自定义 CSS 和主题切换，内存占用低，加载速度快，是个人信息中心的上佳选择。
summary.en: Glance is a lightweight, self-hosted dashboard written in Go that aggregates RSS feeds, Reddit, Hacker News, YouTube, Twitch, weather, stocks, and more. Configured via YAML with multi-page layouts, custom CSS, and theme support, it runs as a sub-20MB binary with minimal memory usage and fast loading.

metadata.name: newsnow
metadata.description: Elegant reading of real-time and hottest news

summary.zh: 一款优雅的新闻阅读应用，实时聚合热门中文资讯。支持GitHub OAuth登录实现数据同步，采用自适应爬取策略（最低2分钟间隔）优化资源并防止IP封禁。内置30分钟缓存机制，登录用户可强制刷新。UI设计简洁美观，支持MCP服务器扩展，可部署至Vercel、Cloudflare Pages或Docker。
summary.en: An elegant news aggregation app delivering real-time trending Chinese news. Features GitHub OAuth login for data sync, adaptive scraping (minimum 2-minute intervals) to prevent IP bans, and 30-minute caching with force refresh for logged-in users. Clean UI design with MCP server support, deployable via Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, or Docker.

metadata.name: clash-for-linux-install
metadata.description: 😼 优雅地使用基于 clash/mihomo 的代理环境

summary.zh: 面向 Linux 的一键式 Clash/mihomo 代理安装工具，支持自动检测系统架构、端口冲突处理、内核升级及 Tun 模式，提供 clashctl 命令行管理界面和 Web 控制台，兼容主流发行版及容器化环境。
summary.en: One-click Clash/mihomo proxy installer for Linux with automatic system architecture detection, port conflict resolution, kernel upgrades, and Tun mode support. Features clashctl CLI and Web UI, compatible with major distributions and containerized environments.

metadata.name: shell_gpt
metadata.description: A command-line productivity tool powered by AI large language models like GPT-5, will help you accomplish your tasks faster and more efficiently.

summary.zh: 一个由AI大语言模型驱动的命令行生产力工具，支持生成shell命令、代码片段和文档。跨平台支持Linux、macOS、Windows及PowerShell、CMD、Bash、Zsh等主流Shell。具备OS感知能力，能根据不同操作系统生成对应命令，支持管道和重定向输入，适用于日志分析、git操作等技术场景。
summary.en: An AI LLM-powered command-line productivity tool for generating shell commands, code snippets, and documentation. Cross-platform support for Linux, macOS, Windows with shells like PowerShell, CMD, Bash, and Zsh. Features OS-aware command generation and supports pipe/redirection input, ideal for log analysis and git workflows.

summary.zh: DJI无人机云API完整演示项目，由Spantree维护的Docker优化版本。前端采用Vue.js，后端基于Spring Boot，通过EMQX MQTT broker实现无人机与云平台实时通信。支持DJI Pilot 2连接，提供Web界面远程控制无人机、查看实时数据。项目中集成了MySQL和Redis，开箱即用的容器化部署大幅简化了开发者的集成测试流程。
summary.en: A comprehensive DJI drone Cloud API demo project with Docker-optimized deployment, maintained by Spantree. Built with Vue.js frontend and Spring Boot backend, it leverages EMQX MQTT broker for real-time drone-to-cloud communication. Supports DJI Pilot 2 integration with a web interface for remote drone control and live data monitoring. Pre-configured MySQL and Redis containers streamline the integration testing workflow.

metadata.name: Mobile-SDK-Android-V5
metadata.description: MSDK V5 Sample

summary.zh: DJI官方Android移动SDK V5示例项目，提供完整的无人机软硬件控制API接口。支持Mavic 3、Matrice 300/350 RTK、Mini系列等多款机型。包含场景化示例(uxsdk)和完整应用示例(sample)，帮助开发者快速集成航拍控制、实时图传、航线规划等核心功能，显著提升无人机应用开发效率。
summary.en: Official DJI Mobile SDK V5 sample project for Android, providing comprehensive APIs to control drone software and hardware interfaces. Supports multiple aircraft models including Mavic 3, Matrice 300/350 RTK, Mini series. Includes scenographic examples (uxsdk) and complete sample applications to help developers integrate aerial photography control, live video streaming, and waypoint missions efficiently.

metadata.name: hat-trie
metadata.description: C++ implementation of a fast and memory efficient HAT-trie

summary.zh: 基于2007年论文实现的C++高性能HAT-trie数据结构库，提供htrie_map和htrie_set两种容器。通过将公共前缀压缩存储在数组哈希节点中，实现低内存占用和高效查找。支持前缀搜索、前缀删除、最长前缀匹配及序列化等功能，适合大规模字符串存储和自动补全等场景。Header-only设计便于集成。
summary.en: A C++ implementation of the HAT-trie data structure based on the 2007 paper, providing htrie_map and htrie_set containers. It achieves low memory usage and efficient lookups by compressing common prefixes into array hash nodes. Supports prefix search, prefix erasure, longest prefix matching, and serialization. Ideal for large-scale string storage and autocomplete scenarios. Header-only library.

metadata.name: go-stock
metadata.description: 🦄🦄🦄AI赋能股票分析：AI加持的股票分析/选股工具。股票行情获取，AI热点资讯分析，AI资金/财务分析，涨跌报警推送。支持A股，港股，美股。支持市场整体/个股情绪分析，AI辅助选股等。数据全部保留在本地。支持DeepSeek，OpenAI， Ollama，LMStudio，AnythingLLM，硅基流动，火山方舟，阿里云百炼等平台或模型。

summary.zh: 基于Wails和NaiveUI开发的AI驱动股票分析工具，整合大语言模型实现智能选股、情绪分析、财务资金分析和技术指标分析。支持A股、港股、美股市场，提供涨跌报警和本地数据存储，兼容DeepSeek、OpenAI、Ollama等多种模型接口。
summary.en: An AI-powered stock analysis tool built with Wails and NaiveUI, leveraging large language models for intelligent stock screening, sentiment analysis, financial analysis, and technical indicator calculations. Supports A-shares, Hong Kong and US stock markets with price alerts and local data storage, compatible with DeepSeek, OpenAI, Ollama and other LLM APIs.

summary.zh: 大疆创新官方提供的Cloud API示例项目，用于辅助开发者理解无人机云端API调用逻辑，支持Docker快速部署。项目已于2025年4月10日终止维护并发出安全警告，不建议在生产环境中使用。最新版本为Cloud API 1.10.0，采用MIT许可证。
summary.en: DJI's official Cloud API sample project for demonstrating drone cloud API integration. This reference implementation helps developers understand API calling logic with Docker deployment support. The project was officially deprecated on April 10, 2025 with security warnings. Latest version is Cloud API 1.10.0, MIT licensed.

metadata.name: GLM-4
metadata.description: GLM-4 series: Open Multilingual Multimodal Chat LMs | 开源多语言多模态对话模型

summary.zh: GLM-4-0414系列是智谱AI开源的多语言多模态对话模型，包含32B参数的Base、推理(Z1)和深度思考(Rumination)变体。模型基于15T高质量数据预训练，采用强化学习后训练技术，在代码生成、函数调用、指令遵循等任务上达到GPT-4o级别性能，支持本地部署。
summary.en: GLM-4-0414 series is an open-source multilingual multimodal chat model from Zhipu AI, featuring 32B parameter variants including Base, reasoning (Z1), and rumination models. Pretrained on 15T high-quality data with RL post-training, it achieves GPT-4o-level performance in code generation, function calling, and instruction following while supporting local deployment.

metadata.name: snail-job
metadata.description: 🔥🔥🔥 灵活，可靠和快速的分布式任务重试和分布式任务调度平台

summary.zh: SnailJob是一款灵活、可靠、高效的分布式任务重试和任务调度平台。采用分区模式架构，具备高可伸缩性和容错性。支持秒级调度、可中断执行和任务编排，提供完善的权限管理和告警监控功能。支持Java、Python、Go多语言客户端接入。
summary.en: SnailJob is a flexible, reliable, and efficient distributed task retry and scheduling platform. Built with a partition-based architecture, it offers high scalability and fault tolerance. Supports second-level scheduling, interruptible execution, and task orchestration with comprehensive permission management and alerting. Provides multi-language clients including Java, Python, and Go.

metadata.name: DetSql
metadata.description: Burp插件，快速探测可能存在SQL注入的请求并标记，提高测试效率

summary.zh: DetSql是一款基于BurpSuite Montoya API开发的SQL注入自动探测插件，通过错误回显、响应相似度算法（Levenshtein/Jaccard）、布尔盲注等多维度判断机制，自动从HTTP流量中筛选并标记可能存在SQL注入的请求参数，显著提升渗透测试效率。
summary.en: DetSql is an automated SQL injection detection plugin for BurpSuite built on the Montoya API. It automatically identifies and marks potential SQL injection parameters from HTTP traffic using multiple detection methods including error-based, response similarity algorithms (Levenshtein/Jaccard), and boolean-based blind injection, significantly improving penetration testing efficiency.

metadata.name: khoj
metadata.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

summary.zh: Khoj是一款开源自托管的AI个人助理，支持本地和云端多种大语言模型（GPT、Claude、Gemini、Llama、Qwen、Mistral等）。可从文档和网络获取答案，创建自定义Agent，自动化研究任务，提供语义搜索，支持多平台访问（浏览器、Obsidian、Emacs等）。
summary.en: Khoj is an open-source, self-hostable AI personal assistant supporting multiple local and cloud LLMs (GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Qwen, Mistral). It retrieves answers from docs and the web, enables custom agent creation, automates research, provides semantic search, and supports cross-platform access.

metadata.name: mapstruct-plus
metadata.description: MapStruct Plus is an enhancement to the MapStruct framework. It can automatically generate the transformation operation between two classes through an annotation, omitting the operation of defining the interface of MapStruct, makes Java type conversion easy and elegant.

summary.zh: MapStruct Plus 是对 MapStruct 框架的增强工具，通过 @AutoMapper 注解自动生成 Java Bean 之间的转换代码，省略了手动定义转换接口的繁琐步骤，使 DTO、Entity、VO 等对象映射更加简洁高效。目标成为最简单、最强大的 Java 类型转换工具。
summary.en: MapStruct Plus is an enhancement to MapStruct framework that automatically generates transformation code between Java Beans through @AutoMapper annotation, eliminating the manual definition of conversion interfaces and making object mapping for DTO, Entity, and VO more elegant and efficient. Goal: to be the simplest and most powerful Java type conversion tool.

metadata.name: Mybatis-PageHelper
metadata.description: Mybatis通用分页插件

summary.zh: PageHelper 是 MyBatis 最方便的通用分页插件，支持物理分页，自动识别 20+ 种主流数据库（MySQL、Oracle、PostgreSQL、SQL Server 等）。通过简单的 startPage() 调用即可实现高效分页，完美兼容复杂的单表及多表查询场景。
summary.en: PageHelper is the most convenient MyBatis pagination plugin, supporting physical pagination with auto-recognition of 20+ mainstream databases (MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, etc.). It enables efficient pagination through simple startPage() calls, perfectly compatible with complex single-table and multi-table query scenarios.

metadata.name: vanblog
metadata.description: 一款简洁实用优雅的个人博客系统

summary.zh: VanBlog是一款简洁优雅的个人博客系统，采用静态网页生成技术，支持全自动HTTPS证书按需申请。内置图床、流量统计和评论系统，提供强大的Markdown编辑器（支持图表、数学公式、Emoji）。具备黑暗模式、SEO友好、增量渲染和CDN友好特性，支持Docker一键脚本部署及ARM平台。
summary.en: VanBlog is a concise, elegant personal blogging system featuring static site generation (SSG) with automatic on-demand HTTPS certificate provisioning. It includes built-in image hosting, analytics, and comment system. The powerful Markdown editor supports charts, math formulas, and emoji. Offers dark mode, SEO optimization, incremental rendering, CDN-friendly architecture, with one-click Docker deployment and ARM support.

metadata.name: ChatGLM3
metadata.description: ChatGLM3 series: Open Bilingual Chat LLMs | 开源双语对话语言模型

summary.zh: ChatGLM3是智谱AI与清华大学KEG实验室联合发布的开源双语对话大语言模型系列。ChatGLM3-6B采用全新Prompt格式，原生支持工具调用、代码执行和Agent任务，在语义、数学、推理、代码、知识等维度测评中表现优异，被誉为10B以下最强基础模型。同时开源Base版、长文本32K及128K版本，学术研究完全开放，商业使用需登记。
summary.en: ChatGLM3 is an open-source bilingual dialogue LLM series developed by Zhipu AI and Tsinghua University KEG Lab. ChatGLM3-6B features a newly designed Prompt format with native support for function calling, code execution, and agent tasks. It demonstrates exceptional performance across semantic, mathematical, reasoning, code, and knowledge benchmarks, recognized as the strongest base model under 10B parameters. The series includes Base, 32K, and 128K long-context variants, fully open for academic research and commercial use with registration.

metadata.name: monolith
metadata.description: ⬛️ CLI tool and library for saving complete web pages as a single HTML file

summary.zh: Monolith是一款Rust编写的CLI工具，可将任意网页完整保存为单个HTML文件。它自动将CSS、图片、JavaScript等所有资源嵌入为data URL，生成独立可离线的HTML5文档。相比wget等工具，它能完美还原原始页面视觉效果，适合数据归档、离线存储和网页备份。
summary.en: Monolith is a Rust-powered CLI tool that saves complete web pages as single HTML files. It embeds all CSS, images, and JavaScript as data URLs, producing standalone offline-ready HTML5 documents. Unlike wget, it preserves exact visual rendering for web archiving and offline storage.

metadata.name: metabase
metadata.description: The easy-to-use open source Business Intelligence and Embedded Analytics tool that lets everyone work with data :bar_chart:

summary.zh: Metabase是一款开源商业智能与嵌入式分析工具,让非技术人员无需SQL即可通过可视化界面提问并获取数据洞察。它支持多种数据库连接,可创建交互式仪表板、数据模型和自定义指标,并提供React嵌入式分析SDK,允许将可视化组件无缝集成到第三方应用中。
summary.en: Metabase is an open-source Business Intelligence and Embedded Analytics tool that enables non-technical users to query data and gain insights through a visual interface without knowing SQL. It supports multiple databases, creates interactive dashboards, data models, and custom metrics, with a React SDK for embedding analytics components into third-party applications.

metadata.name: VideoCaptioner
metadata.description: 🎬 卡卡字幕助手 | VideoCaptioner - 基于 LLM 的智能字幕助手 - 视频字幕生成、断句、校正、字幕翻译全流程处理！- A powered tool for easy and efficient video subtitling.

summary.zh: 卡卡字幕助手是一款基于大语言模型的视频字幕处理工具，集成语音识别、智能断句、字幕校正与翻译功能。支持本地Whisper离线识别和API调用，利用LLM语义理解实现自然流畅的字幕重组，提供词级时间戳、VAD检测、批量处理及直观编辑界面，一键完成字幕视频全流程。
summary.en: VideoCaptioner is an LLM-powered video subtitle processing tool featuring ASR, intelligent sentence segmentation, correction, and translation. It supports local Whisper offline recognition and API calls, leveraging LLM semantic understanding for natural subtitle restructuring with word-level timestamps, VAD detection, batch processing, and an intuitive editing interface.

metadata.name: kong
metadata.description: 🦍 The API and AI Gateway

summary.zh: Kong Gateway 是云原生 API/LLM/MCP 网关，以高性能和插件扩展性著称。提供代理、路由、负载均衡、健康检查、认证等核心功能，并支持多 LLM 调用、语义安全、MCP 流量安全与分析等 AI 能力。原生支持 Kubernetes Ingress Controller，适用于微服务流量管理和 AI 应用场景。
summary.en: Kong Gateway is a cloud-native API/LLM/MCP gateway renowned for high performance and plugin extensibility. It provides proxying, routing, load balancing, health checking, authentication and more, with multi-LLM support, semantic security, and MCP traffic analytics. Native Kubernetes Ingress Controller support makes it ideal for microservices and AI traffic management.

metadata.name: pagehelper-spring-boot
metadata.description: pagehelper-spring-boot

summary.zh: PageHelper-Spring-Boot-Starter 是 PageHelper 分页插件的 Spring Boot 集成启动器，通过 Maven 依赖即可快速为 Spring Boot 项目启用 MyBatis 分页功能。支持 PageHelper 6.x，提供异步计数、数据库方言自动识别、自定义 SQL 解析器扩展等高级特性，兼容 Spring Boot 3.x 和 JDK17+。
summary.en: PageHelper-Spring-Boot-Starter integrates the PageHelper pagination plugin into Spring Boot, enabling MyBatis paging capabilities via Maven dependency. Supports PageHelper 6.x with advanced features including async count, automatic dialect detection, and extensible SQL parsers, compatible with Spring Boot 3.x and JDK17+.

metadata.name: gunrock
metadata.description: Programmable CUDA/C++ GPU Graph Analytics

summary.zh: Gunrock是高性能GPU图分析库，支持NVIDIA CUDA和AMD ROCm/HIP双平台。采用前沿中心的数据中心抽象和细粒度负载均衡技术，在高性能与可编程性之间达到平衡。开发者可快速开发新图原语，支持单GPU到多GPU扩展，适用于社交网络分析、路径规划等大规模图计算场景。
summary.en: Gunrock is a high-performance GPU graph analytics library supporting both NVIDIA CUDA and AMD ROCm/HIP platforms. It employs a frontier-centric, data-centric abstraction with fine-grained load balancing, achieving optimal balance between performance and programmability. Developers can rapidly develop new graph primitives with support for scaling from single to multi-GPU, ideal for large-scale graph computing like social network analysis and route planning.

metadata.name: automation
metadata.description: 一些青龙自用自动打卡功能：wps、OPPO、贝锐

summary.zh: 基于青龙面板开发的多平台自动签到工具，支持WPS云空间/VIP签到、OPPO商城/一加论坛签到、贝锐阳光小店签到等自动化任务。采用Python开发，集成YOLOv8深度学习模型进行验证码识别（准确率98%），支持Docker部署识别服务，提供Cookie配置方式实现长期自动化运行。
summary.en: A multi-platform auto check-in tool based on QingLong panel, supporting automated tasks like WPS cloud space/VIP sign-in, OPPO Mall/OnePlus forum sign-in, and Oray Sunshine Shop sign-in. Built with Python, integrated with YOLOv8 deep learning model for captcha recognition (98% accuracy), supports Docker deployment for recognition service, using Cookie configuration for long-term automation.

metadata.name: windows
metadata.description: Windows inside a Docker container.

summary.zh: 一款在Docker容器中运行完整Windows系统的开源项目，支持Windows 11/10/8.1/7及Server 2025/2022等版本。通过KVM硬件虚拟化加速，提供Web浏览器远程访问（端口8006）和RDP连接，实现自动化ISO下载与安装，适合开发测试、桌面虚拟化及CI/CD场景。
summary.en: An open-source project enabling Windows to run inside Docker containers, supporting Windows 11/10/8.1/7 and Server versions.
