Features KVM hardware virtualization acceleration, web-based remote access via browser, and automated ISO downloading. Ideal for development testing, desktop virtualization, and CI/CD pipelines.

metadata.name: pgrx
metadata.description: Build Postgres Extensions with Rust!

summary.zh: pgrx 是用 Rust 开发 PostgreSQL 扩展的框架，支持 Postgres 13-18。通过 cargo-pgrx 提供完整开发工具链（创建、测试、打包），支持 #[pg_extern] 派生宏自动生成 SQL schema，自定义类型支持 CBOR/JSON/二进制协议，内存安全地将 Rust panic 转换为 Postgres 事务错误。
summary.en: pgrx is a framework for building PostgreSQL extensions in Rust, supporting Postgres 13-18. It provides cargo-pgrx for the full development lifecycle, #[pg_extern] macros for automatic SQL schema generation, custom types with CBOR/JSON/binary protocol support, and memory-safe panic-to-error translation.

metadata.name: cugraph
metadata.description: cuGraph - RAPIDS Graph Analytics Library

summary.zh: cuGraph是RAPIDS生态中的GPU加速图分析库，支持大规模图算法的高效运行。它提供Python、C/C++多层API，无缝集成cuDF和cuML，支持Pandas和NetworkX数据格式，让图计算任务可在GPU上实现数十倍性能提升。
summary.en: cuGraph is a GPU-accelerated graph analytics library within the RAPIDS ecosystem, enabling high-performance execution of scalable graph algorithms. It offers multi-layer Python, C/C++ APIs with seamless cuDF and cuML integration, supporting Pandas and NetworkX data formats for significant GPU-accelerated performance gains.

metadata.name: pgrouting
metadata.description: Repository contains pgRouting library. Development branch is "develop", stable branch is "master"

summary.zh: pgRouting是PostGIS/PostgreSQL地理空间数据库的路由扩展库，提供最短路径、A*搜索、双向Dijkstra、Yen's K-最短路径、驾驶距离计算和旅行商问题等网络分析功能。基于Boost Graph Library构建，支持自定义成本函数，适用于导航、物流配送及地理信息系统路径规划应用。
summary.en: pgRouting extends PostGIS/PostgreSQL geospatial databases with routing capabilities, providing network analysis functions including shortest path, A* search, bidirectional Dijkstra, Yen's K-shortest paths, driving distance, and traveling salesman problem. Built on Boost Graph Library with customizable cost functions for navigation, logistics, and GIS applications.

metadata.name: A-star-CUDA
metadata.description: A* implementation for NVIDIA GPU

summary.zh: 基于CUDA的GPU加速A*路径搜索算法实现，源自学术论文的Massively Parallel A*方法。提供通用A*框架及滑块谜题、2D网格路径规划两个示例应用。充分利用GPU大规模并行计算能力优化搜索效率，适用于需要高性能路径规划的GPU计算场景。
summary.en: A CUDA-based GPU-accelerated implementation of the A* pathfinding algorithm, based on the Massively Parallel A* Search paper. Provides a generic A* framework with example applications for sliding puzzle and 2D grid pathfinding. Leverages massive parallel computing capabilities of GPUs for optimized search performance.

metadata.name: macos
metadata.description: MacOS inside a Docker container.

summary.zh: 在 Docker 容器中运行 macOS 的开源项目，通过 KVM 硬件虚拟化加速实现高性能运行。支持 macOS 11-15 版本自动下载，提供基于浏览器的远程访问界面（noVNC），可配置 CPU、RAM 和磁盘大小。适用于开发测试、CI/CD 及服务器环境部署。
summary.en: Run macOS inside Docker containers with KVM hardware virtualization acceleration. Supports automatic download of macOS 11-15 versions, features a web-based remote viewer (noVNC), and allows configurable CPU, RAM, and disk size. Ideal for development, testing, CI/CD pipelines, and server deployment.

metadata.name: FreeControl
metadata.description: 在PC上控制Android设备

summary.zh: FreeControl是一款基于scrcpy的Windows桌面应用，使用C#开发，提供简洁的GUI界面实现PC对Android设备的无线/USB远程控制。支持自定义Scrcpy路径、关闭窗口自动锁屏、UHID键盘优化中文输入等特性，适合需要在电脑上操作Android设备的开发者和普通用户。
summary.en: FreeControl is a Windows desktop application built on scrcpy using C#, providing a simple GUI for wireless/USB remote control of Android devices from PC. It supports custom Scrcpy path, auto-lock on close, and UHID keyboard for optimized Chinese input, ideal for developers and users needing to control Android devices from computers.

metadata.name: tvbox
metadata.description: 自用tvbox源分享，影视仓多仓源分享，tvbox相关资源记录，iptv直播

summary.zh: 该仓库分享自用TVBox影视仓多仓源接口及IPTV直播源。影视仓是基于TVBox代码修改的安卓应用，支持多仓源切换、视频聚合及IPTV直播功能。仓库提供多个多仓源JSON接口，并收录GitHub上优质IPTV源，方便用户一站式获取影视直播资源。
summary.en: This repository shares self-used TVBox and影视仓 multi-source APIs along with IPTV live streaming sources. 影视仓 is an Android app based on TVBox code modification, supporting multi-warehouse source switching, video aggregation, and IPTV live streaming. The repo provides multiple JSON source interfaces and curates quality IPTV sources from GitHub.

metadata.name: Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
metadata.description: Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

summary.zh: Bulk Crap Uninstaller是一款免费开源的Windows批量程序卸载工具。它能批量卸载大量不需要的应用程序，清理残留文件，检测孤立程序。支持Windows应用商店应用、Steam游戏及多种安装程序系统（NSIS、InnoSetup、Msiexec等）。虽专为IT专业人员设计，但普通用户也能轻松使用。
summary.en: Bulk Crap Uninstaller is a free open-source Windows batch uninstaller. It excels at removing large amounts of unwanted applications with minimal user input, cleaning leftovers, and detecting orphaned programs. Fully supports Windows Store apps, Steam games, and various installer systems including NSIS, InnoSetup, and Msiexec. Designed for IT professionals yet accessible to regular users.

metadata.name: decode-js
metadata.description: JS混淆代码的AST分析工具 AST analysis tool for obfuscated JS code

summary.zh: 基于Babel的JavaScript混淆代码AST分析工具，支持stringArray还原、死代码清除、控制流扁平化逆变换、局部代码还原及自保护代码处理。可处理jjencode、sojson、obfuscator等多种混淆器的混淆代码，适用于安全研究、代码审计及恶意代码分析场景。
summary.en: A Babel-based AST analyzer for obfuscated JavaScript code, supporting stringArray restoration, dead code elimination, control flow flattening reversal, local code transformation, and self-defending code handling. Capable of processing obfuscated code from jjencode, sojson, obfuscator and similar tools, ideal for security research and code analysis.

metadata.name: beanshell
metadata.description: Beanshell scripting language

summary.zh: BeanShell是一个轻量级、可嵌入的Java源码解释器，用Java编写并动态执行标准Java语法。它扩展了Java的脚本化特性，支持松散类型、命令和方法闭包，可用于Java实验调试、应用程序扩展、规则引擎、快速原型开发及动态部署等场景。即将发布3.0版本。
summary.en: BeanShell is a lightweight, embeddable Java source interpreter written in Java that dynamically executes standard Java syntax. It extends Java with scripting features like loose types, commands, and method closures, suitable for Java experimentation, application extensibility, rules engines, rapid prototyping, and dynamic deployment. Version 3.0 is upcoming.

metadata.name: toBeBetterJavaer
metadata.description: 一份通俗易懂、风趣幽默的Java学习指南，内容涵盖Java基础、Java并发编程、Java虚拟机、Java企业级开发、Java面试等核心知识点。学Java，就认准二哥的Java进阶之路😄

summary.zh: 一份面向Java初学者的全面学习指南，以通俗易懂、风趣幽默的写作风格著称。内容涵盖Java基础语法、并发编程、JVM虚拟机、企业级开发、数据库等核心技术，并提供完整的求职面试指南和学习路线，适合零基础入门到中级进阶的程序员。
summary.en: A comprehensive Java learning guide featuring witty and accessible explanations for developers at all levels. Covers core Java fundamentals, concurrent programming, JVM internals, enterprise development, databases, and includes practical interview preparation with structured learning paths.

metadata.name: chartdb
metadata.description: Database diagrams editor that allows you to visualize and design your DB with a single query.

summary.zh: ChartDB是一款强大的Web端数据库图表编辑器，通过单条SQL查询即可即时可视化数据库结构。支持PostgreSQL、MySQL、SQL Server等8种主流数据库，提供AI驱动的跨数据库DDL脚本导出功能，无需账号即可使用，适合数据库文档编写、团队协作及跨数据库迁移场景。
summary.en: ChartDB is a powerful web-based database diagramming editor that instantly visualizes schema through a single SQL query. Supporting 8 major databases including PostgreSQL and MySQL, it offers AI-powered cross-database DDL export and interactive editing—no account required. Ideal for documentation, team collaboration, and migration tasks.

metadata.name: CF-Workers-docker.io
metadata.description: 这个项目是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 Docker 镜像代理工具。它能够中转对 Docker 官方镜像仓库的请求，解决一些访问限制和加速访问的问题。

summary.zh: 基于Cloudflare Workers的Docker镜像代理工具，通过无服务器函数中转Docker官方仓库请求，解决访问限制和加速镜像拉取。支持Workers和Pages两种部署方式，可配置主页伪装、302跳转和UA伪装等高级功能，同时提供第三方DockerHub镜像服务列表。
summary.en: A Docker registry proxy tool built on Cloudflare Workers that forwards requests to Docker Hub via serverless functions, solving access restrictions and accelerating image pulls. Supports both Workers and Pages deployment with configurable homepage masquerading, 302 redirects, and UA spoofing features, plus a curated list of third-party DockerHub mirror services.

metadata.name: oha
metadata.description: Ohayou(おはよう), HTTP load generator, inspired by rakyll/hey with tui animation.

summary.zh: oha是一款用Rust开发的高性能HTTP负载生成器，灵感来自rakyll/hey。内置实时TUI可视化界面，可监控请求延迟、QPS、错误率等关键指标。基于tokio异步运行时实现高并发，支持HTTP/1.1、HTTP/2及实验性HTTP/3，提供多平台安装方式。
summary.en: oha is a high-performance HTTP load generator written in Rust, inspired by rakyll/hey. It features a real-time TUI dashboard displaying latency, QPS, and error rate metrics. Built on tokio async runtime for high concurrency, it supports HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, and experimental HTTP/3 with cross-platform deployment.

metadata.name: SpringBootVul-GUI
metadata.description: 一个半自动化springboot打点工具，内置目前springboot所有漏洞

summary.zh: 一款面向SpringBoot应用的半自动化安全检测与漏洞利用工具，集成密码脱敏、多种RCE漏洞利用（Eureka反序列化、H2数据库、SpEL注入、Groovy RCE等）、内存马注入、heapdump文件获取等核心功能，提供图形化界面支持单点或批量漏洞检测，适用于授权的安全研究与渗透测试场景。
summary.en: A semi-automated security testing tool for SpringBoot applications featuring password desensitization, multiple RCE exploits (Eureka deserialization, H2 database, SpEL injection, Groovy RCE), memory shell injection, and heapdump acquisition with GUI support for single or batch vulnerability detection in authorized security research scenarios.

metadata.name: yazi
metadata.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

summary.zh: Yazi是由Rust编写的终端文件管理器，采用非阻塞异步I/O架构实现极致性能。内置代码高亮、图像预览和并发插件系统，支持Lua扩展、虚拟文件系统和远程文件管理。通过客户端-服务器模式实现跨实例通信和状态持久化，提供包管理器支持插件与主题的便捷安装与更新。
summary.en: Yazi is a blazing-fast terminal file manager written in Rust, utilizing non-blocking async I/O for exceptional performance. It features built-in code highlighting, image preview, and a concurrent Lua-based plugin system. The client-server architecture enables cross-instance communication and state persistence, while a built-in package manager simplifies plugin and theme installation.

metadata.name: Android-DataBackup
metadata.description: DataBackup for Android 7.0+

summary.zh: 面向Android 7.0+的开源数据备份应用，基于speed-backup脚本开发。提供Root权限下的完整数据备份与恢复，支持Magisk、KernelSU、APatch等主流Root方案，兼顾多用户环境与云端备份，100%保证数据完整性。
summary.en: An open-source data backup app for Android 7.0+, developed from speed-backup script. Provides complete data backup and restore with Root privileges, supporting mainstream Root solutions like Magisk, KernelSU, and APatch, while handling multi-user environments and cloud backup with 100% data integrity.

metadata.name: BinaryEye
metadata.description: Yet another barcode scanner for Android

summary.zh: 一款免费、开源、无广告的Android条形码扫描应用。支持竖横屏切换、反向条码识别和条形码生成，采用Material Design设计。基于ZXing-C++库开发，支持AZTEC、CODE 128、QR CODE、PDF417等多种格式，提供深度链接调用能力。
summary.en: A free, open-source, ad-free Android barcode scanner supporting portrait/landscape orientations and inverted code reading. Features Material Design UI and barcode generation capability. Built on ZXing-C++ library, supporting formats like AZTEC, CODE 128, QR CODE, PDF417, with deep link integration.

metadata.name: Bili.Copilot
metadata.description: B站第三方 Windows 桌面客户端，使用 Windows App SDK 构建的原生应用

summary.zh: 哔哩助理是B站第三方Windows桌面客户端，基于Windows App SDK构建原生应用。支持视频播放（MPV/外部播放器）、AI助手（20+模型）、视频下载功能，并抽离出bili-kernel、agent-kernel等可复用组件。
summary.en: Bili.Copilot is a third-party Bilibili desktop client for Windows, built with Windows App SDK as a native WinUI3 application. Features video playback (MPV/external), AI assistant (20+ models), video downloading, with reusable components like bili-kernel and agent-kernel.

metadata.name: spring-startup-analyzer
metadata.description: spring-startup-analyzer generates an interactive spring application startup report that lets you understand what contributes to the application startup time and helps to optimize it.🚀

summary.zh: Spring启动分析器通过收集应用启动时的Bean初始化、方法调用、线程执行等数据，生成交互式可视化报告，包括Bean初始化详情、时间线、火焰图等，帮助开发者定位启动性能瓶颈。同时提供Bean异步初始化组件，可将耗时的init和@PostConstruct方法异步执行，显著提升应用启动速度。
summary.en: Spring Startup Analyzer collects application startup data including Bean initialization, method invocations, and thread execution to generate interactive visualization reports with Bean details, timeline, and flame graphs, helping developers identify performance bottlenecks. It also provides async Bean initialization components that execute init and @PostConstruct methods asynchronously to significantly improve startup speed.

metadata.name: deobfuscator
metadata.description: The real deal

summary.zh: Java Deobfuscator是一款强大的Java字节码反混淆工具，支持Zelix Klassmaster、Allatori、DashO、DexGuard等主流商业混淆器。通过自动检测混淆类型并应用对应的Transformer进行解混淆，可恢复被混淆的代码控制流和字符串。该项目为开源逆向工程社区提供了重要的技术支撑。
summary.en: Java Deobfuscator is a powerful tool for deobfuscating Java bytecode, supporting major commercial obfuscators like Zelix Klassmaster, Allatori, DashO, and DexGuard. It automatically detects obfuscation types and applies corresponding Transformers to restore obfuscated code control flow and strings, providing essential support for the open-source reverse engineering community.

metadata.name: lnav
metadata.description: Log file navigator

summary.zh: lnav是终端日志文件导航器，支持自动解压、格式检测、时间合并、文件跟踪。提供错误索引跳转、正则搜索、文本高亮、消息过滤功能，内置时间直方图和SQLite日志分析，比tail/grep/less更智能地处理各类日志文件。
summary.en: lnav is a terminal-based log file navigator with automatic decompression, format detection, timestamp merging, and file monitoring. Features error index navigation, regex search, text highlighting, filtering, time histogram visualization, and SQLite log analysis—smarter than traditional tail/grep/less for log processing.

metadata.name: xyflow
metadata.description: React Flow | Svelte Flow - Powerful open source libraries for building node-based UIs with React (https://reactflow.dev) or Svelte (https://svelteflow.dev). Ready out-of-the-box and infinitely customizable.

summary.zh: xyflow是强大的开源节点编辑器库，同时支持React（React Flow）和Svelte（Svelte Flow）。提供开箱即用的节点、边、控件、小地图等功能，可无缝构建工作流编辑器、流程图、聊天机器人等可视化应用，支持高度定制和扩展。
summary.en: xyflow is a powerful open-source node-based UI library supporting both React (React Flow) and Svelte (Svelte Flow). It offers out-of-the-box nodes, edges, controls, and mini-maps for building workflow editors, flowcharts, and chatbot interfaces with seamless customization and extensibility.

metadata.name: jCat
metadata.description: java development Console

summary.zh: 一款Java开发者运行时控制台工具，通过JavaAgent无侵入式注入目标JVM进程，启动内置Web管理后台后可直接执行Groovy脚本进行动态代码调试、运行时变量查看和业务逻辑验证，无需修改目标应用源码即可实现运行时监控与调试。
summary.en: A runtime console tool for Java developers that injects into target JVM processes via JavaAgent without code modification. It provides a built-in Web management interface for executing Groovy scripts to perform dynamic code debugging, runtime variable inspection, and business logic verification.

metadata.name: delta
metadata.description: A syntax-highlighting pager for git, diff, grep, rg --json, and blame output

summary.zh: Delta是一个用Rust编写的语法高亮分页器,专为git diff、grep和blame输出设计。它提供词级差异高亮(基于Levenshtein编辑推断算法)、侧边对比视图、代码行号导航、合并冲突优化显示,并支持终端超链接和20+种可定制样式主题。与bat共享语法高亮主题,兼容diff-highlight和diff-so-fancy模式,并自动检测终端明暗主题。
summary.en: Delta is a Rust-based syntax-highlighting pager for git diff, grep, and blame output. It provides word-level diff highlighting using Levenshtein edit inference, side-by-side view with line numbering, enhanced merge conflict display, and terminal hyperlinks. Features 20+ customizable styles using bat's syntax themes, supports diff-highlight/diff-so-fancy emulation, and auto-detects terminal color schemes.

metadata.name: AreaCity-JsSpider-StatsGov
metadata.description: 省市区县乡镇三级或四级城市数据，带拼音标注、坐标、行政区域边界范围；2026年04月03日最新采集，提供csv格式文件，支持在线转成多级联动js代码、通用json格式，提供软件转成shp、geojson、sql、导入数据库；带浏览器里面运行的js采集源码，综合了中华人民共和国民政部、中国•国家地名信息库、统计局、高德地图、腾讯地图行政区划数据

summary.zh: 中国省市区县乡镇三级/四级行政区划数据采集项目，整合民政部、国家统计局、高德地图、腾讯地图数据，提供带拼音标注、坐标、行政边界范围的CSV文件，支持在线转换为JSON/多级联动JS代码，转换工具可输出shp、geojson、sql等格式，适用于地图可视化、地理查询、数据分析等场景。
summary.en: A comprehensive China administrative division data collection project providing province/city/district/township-level data from multiple sources including NBS, Ministry of Civil Affairs, Amap and Tencent Maps. Features CSV files with pinyin annotations, coordinates and boundary ranges, supporting conversion to JSON/multi-level JS, with tools exporting to shp, geojson, sql formats for map visualization and geolocation applications.

metadata.name: awesome-fenix
metadata.description: 讨论如何构建一套可靠的大型分布式系统

summary.zh: 《凤凰架构》是一部以构建可靠分布式大型软件系统为主线的开源技术文档，涵盖微服务、服务网格、无服务器架构等现代架构模式，并提供配套的演示代码工程。文档系统整理了企业级分布式系统的设计原则、架构模式与实践方法，是开发人员梳理技术知识体系的技能地图。
summary.en: Phoenix Architecture is an open-source technical documentation focusing on building reliable distributed software systems, covering modern architectural patterns including microservices, service mesh, and serverless. It provides companion demo projects and systematically organizes design principles and practices for enterprise-level distributed systems.

metadata.name: ChirmyRam-OneDrive-Repository
metadata.description: ChirmyRam OneDrive Repository

summary.zh: 七米蓝的 OneDrive 资源仓库，存储约170TB影视、动画、电子书、4K视频等资源。采用 alist 程序（Golang）部署，支持 WebDAV 协议挂载到本地播放器播放，提供多盘负载均衡。当前因访问量过大经常触发 API 限流，仅供学习交流使用。
summary.en: ChirmyRam's OneDrive repository hosting ~170TB of movies, anime, e-books, and 4K content. Built with alist (Golang), supports WebDAV protocol for local player mounting with multi-account load balancing. Currently experiencing frequent API throttling due to high traffic, intended for learning exchange only.

metadata.name: cryptomator
metadata.description: Cryptomator for Windows, macOS, and Linux: Secure client-side encryption for your cloud storage, ensuring privacy and control over your data.

summary.zh: Cryptomator是一款开源的跨平台客户端加密工具，支持Windows、macOS和Linux系统。通过虚拟加密文件系统透明处理云存储数据，采用AES-256位加密和Scrypt密钥派生保护文件内容和文件名，适用于Dropbox、Google Drive、OneDrive等主流云服务，实现端到端隐私保护。
summary.en: Cryptomator is an open-source cross-platform client-side encryption tool for Windows, macOS, and Linux. It provides transparent encryption for cloud storage through a virtual encrypted filesystem using AES-256 encryption with Scrypt key derivation, protecting file content and names while supporting major cloud services like Dropbox, Google Drive, and OneDrive.

metadata.name: CasaOS
metadata.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

summary.zh: CasaOS是一款开源的个人云系统，通过简洁优雅的Web界面帮助用户在家庭服务器或单板电脑上快速搭建私有云服务。支持文件管理、应用商店、Docker容器部署等功能，降低对商业SaaS的依赖，实现数据自主可控。
summary.en: CasaOS is an open-source personal cloud system that enables users to quickly deploy private cloud services on home servers or single-board computers through a simple, elegant web interface. It supports file management, app store, Docker container deployment, reducing reliance on commercial SaaS and achieving data autonomy.

metadata.name: helium
metadata.description: Lighter web automation with Python

summary.zh: Helium是一个基于Selenium的Python浏览器自动化库，通过允许用户使用可见文本标签（如按钮名称）替代HTML IDs、XPaths等复杂选择器来定位元素，使脚本更简洁易读。相比纯Selenium，代码量减少30-50%，并内置iFrame处理、智能窗口管理和隐式等待等高级功能。
summary.en: Helium is a Python browser automation library built on Selenium that lets users locate elements using visible text labels (like button names) instead of HTML IDs or XPaths, making scripts shorter and more readable. Compared to pure Selenium, code is reduced by 30-50%, with built-in iFrame handling, smart window management, and implicit waiting.

metadata.name: local-path-provisioner
metadata.description: Dynamically provisioning persistent local storage with Kubernetes

summary.zh: Local Path Provisioner是Rancher开发的Kubernetes动态存储 provisioner，支持在节点上自动创建hostPath或local类型的持久卷。它简化了Kubernetes原生的Local Persistent Volume功能，提供更易用的本地存储解决方案，适用于需要高性能或低成本存储的云原生应用场景。
summary.en: Local Path Provisioner is a Kubernetes dynamic storage provisioner developed by Rancher that automatically creates hostPath or local persistent volumes on nodes. It simplifies Kubernetes' native Local Persistent Volume feature, providing an easier local storage solution for cloud-native applications requiring high performance or cost-effective storage.

metadata.name: gdu
metadata.description: Fast disk usage analyzer with console interface written in Go

summary.zh: Gdu是一款用Go语言编写的快速磁盘使用分析器，专为SSD优化以充分利用并行处理能力，同时支持HDD。提供交互式控制台界面，支持排除目录、符号链接跟随、跨文件系统扫描、数据库存储分析结果等功能，适用于服务器和桌面环境的磁盘空间管理。
summary.en: Gdu is a fast disk usage analyzer written in Go, optimized for SSDs to leverage parallel processing, while also supporting HDDs. It features an interactive console interface with capabilities including directory exclusion, symlink following, cross-filesystem scanning, and database storage for analysis results, ideal for disk space management in servers and desktops.

metadata.name: diff-pdf
metadata.description: A simple tool for visually comparing two PDF files

summary.zh: 一款可视化对比PDF文件的命令行工具，支持生成带差异高亮标记的PDF输出或通过交互式GUI查看器逐页对比。可使用Ctrl+方向键平移页面以识别仅存在翻译差异的区域，通过退出码0/1表示是否存在差异。依赖wxWidgets、Cairo和Poppler库构建，跨平台支持Windows、macOS及主流Linux发行版。
summary.en: A visual PDF comparison tool that highlights differences between two PDF files by generating a diff PDF or displaying an interactive GUI viewer for side-by-side comparison. Supports page shifting with Ctrl+arrows to identify translation-only changes. Returns exit code 0/1 to indicate differences. Built with wxWidgets, Cairo and Poppler, cross-platform on Windows, macOS and Linux.

metadata.name: xl-lighthouse
metadata.description: 新一代全景式实时业务监控系统，承载1000万个监控项，每天可高效处理5000亿条消息。XL-LightHouse是一套支持超大数据量、支持超高并发的实时业务指标监控系统【同时支持单机版】。常见的应用场景包括：PV、UV统计；电商销售额、下单用户数统计；日志量统计；接口调用量、异常量、耗时情况统计；服务器运维监控等功能，系统支持多维度统计，支持各种复杂的条件筛选和逻辑判断，一键部署，一行代码接入，轻松实现业务全链路数据监控，帮助企业快速搭建数据指标监控体系。

summary.zh: XL-LightHouse是超大数据量实时业务监控系统，支持千万级监控指标和日均5000亿消息处理。提供count、sum、avg、distinct、topN等流式统计，支持多维度分析、分钟/小时/天多粒度计算，内置表达式解析与复杂条件筛选，一键部署即插即用，兼容单机与集群模式。
summary.en: XL-LightHouse is a real-time business monitoring system for ultra-large-scale data processing, capable of handling 10 million metrics and 500 billion daily messages. It provides stream processing operations including count, sum, avg, distinct, and topN/lastN, with multi-dimensional analysis across minute, hour, and day time granularities. Features one-click deployment, standalone/cluster modes, and API integration.

metadata.name: docker-qbittorrent
metadata.description: Containerized qBittorrent NOX (i.e., headless)

summary.zh: 基于Docker容器化的qBittorrent NOX（无头版）镜像，支持Web界面远程管理BT下载。支持多版本标签（3.x/4.x），latest基于Alpine构建实现极致轻量化，采用非root用户运行和dumb-init加固安全，适合部署私有下载服务器或家庭媒体中心。
summary.en: Dockerized qBittorrent NOX (headless) with remote Web UI for BitTorrent downloads. Supports multiple version tags (3.x/4.x), Alpine-based latest image for minimal size, runs as non-root user with dumb-init for security hardening. Ideal for private download servers or home media centers.

metadata.name: oceanbase
metadata.description: The Fastest Distributed Database for Transactional, Analytical, and  AI Workloads.

summary.zh: 蚂蚁集团自研的分布式关系型数据库，基于Paxos协议实现高可用与线性扩展。支持向量检索和HTAP混合负载，单集群可扩展至1500节点，存储成本降低70-90%，适用于金融、AI及大规模数据分析场景。
summary.en: OceanBase is a distributed relational database developed by Ant Group, featuring Paxos-based high availability and linear scalability. It supports vector search for AI applications and HTAP workloads, achieving 707M TPC-C and 15.26M TPC-H with 70-90% storage cost reduction.

metadata.name: KubePi
metadata.description: 🚀 A modern, open-source K8s panel developed by the official 1Panel team.

summary.zh: KubePi 是由 1Panel 官方团队开发的现代化 K8s 可视化面板，支持多集群导入与管理，提供基于 RBAC 的细粒度权限控制，可将不同 cluster 和 namespace 的访问权限分配给指定用户，帮助开发人员高效管理 Kubernetes 集群中的应用并进行故障排查。采用 Docker 一键部署，提供友好的 Web UI 体验。
summary.en: KubePi is a modern Kubernetes dashboard developed by the 1Panel team, supporting multi-cluster import and management with RBAC-based permission control. It allows administrators to assign specific cluster/namespace access to users, helping developers efficiently manage applications and troubleshoot issues across Kubernetes clusters. Features one-click Docker deployment and intuitive Web UI.

metadata.name: alist
metadata.description: 🗂️A file list/WebDAV program that supports multiple storages, powered by Gin and Solidjs. / 一个支持多存储的文件列表/WebDAV程序，使用 Gin 和 Solidjs。

summary.zh: 一款支持40+种存储后端的文件列表与WebDAV服务程序，采用Go语言Gin框架开发后端，Solidjs构建前端界面。可将本地存储及各类云盘（阿里云盘、OneDrive、Google Drive、百度网盘、S3等）统一管理并提供Web访问与WebDAV协议支持，支持Docker部署。
summary.en: A file list and WebDAV program supporting 40+ storage backends, built with Go/Gin for backend and Solidjs for frontend. It aggregates local storage and cloud drives (Aliyun Drive, OneDrive, Google Drive, Baidu Netdisk, S3, etc.) into a unified file management interface with WebDAV access, deployable via Docker.

metadata.name: buildg
metadata.description: Interactive debugger for Dockerfile, with support for IDEs (VS Code, Emacs, Neovim, etc.)

summary.zh: buildg 是基于 BuildKit 的 Dockerfile 交互式调试工具，支持断点设置、逐行执行和源码检查。开发者可在构建过程中暂停并进入交互式 shell，使用自定义调试工具排查构建问题。通过 DAP 协议集成 VS Code、Emacs、Neovim 等主流 IDE，实现可视化调试。
summary.en: buildg is an interactive Dockerfile debugger built on BuildKit, enabling source-level inspection, breakpoints, and step-by-step execution. Developers can pause during build and access interactive shell with custom debugging tools. Supports VS Code, Emacs, and Neovim via DAP protocol for visual debugging.

metadata.name: vector-tile-js
metadata.description: Parses vector tiles with JavaScript

summary.zh: mapbox/vector-tile-js 是 Mapbox 官方推出的 JavaScript 库,用于解析 Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT) 矢量瓦片数据。通过 Protobuf (pbf) 解码,提供对瓦片图层、要素及几何信息的访问,支持加载几何、计算边界框、转换为 GeoJSON。是 Web 地图和 GIS 应用的核心解析工具。
summary.en: mapbox/vector-tile-js is an official JavaScript library for parsing Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT). It decodes protobuf-encoded vector tile data, providing access to layers, features, and geometry with methods like loadGeometry(), bbox(), and toGeoJSON(). Essential for web mapping and GIS applications.

metadata.name: BBLL
metadata.description: 一个第三方哔哩哔哩客户端，A third-party bilibili client。

summary.zh: BBLL是一款面向Android平台的第三方哔哩哔哩客户端，基于B站官方API封装开发，仅供学习交流使用。应用提供视频播放、直播观看等核心功能，采用硬件解码方案，支持多种快进快退操作方式。无任何破解行为，所有数据均源自B站官方接口。
summary.en: BBLL is a third-party Bilibili client for Android, developed for learning and communication purposes. The app encapsulates Bilibili's official APIs to provide core video streaming functionalities including playback and live streaming. It uses hardware decoding and supports multiple navigation methods. Without any cracking behavior, all data is sourced directly from Bilibili's official interfaces.

metadata.name: istio
metadata.description: Connect, secure, control, and observe services.

summary.zh: Istio是开源服务网格框架，通过Envoy边车代理和Ztunnel无代理模式透明注入微服务间通信层，实现零代码修改的流量管理、安全连接、服务认证、可观测性收集与策略 enforcement。其控制平面Istiod统一管理服务发现、配置和证书，是云原生微服务架构的核心基础设施。
summary.en: Istio is an open-source service mesh that transparently layers onto distributed applications, enabling traffic management, secure service connectivity, mTLS authentication, and observability via Envoy sidecar proxies or Ztunnel's sidecar-less mode. Istiod provides unified service discovery, configuration, and certificate management as the control plane for cloud-native microservices.

metadata.name: btop
metadata.description: A monitor of resources

summary.zh: btop++ 是一款用 C++23 编写的现代化系统资源监控工具，支持 Linux、macOS、FreeBSD、NetBSD 和 OpenBSD 系统。它提供直观的终端界面，可实时监控 CPU、内存、磁盘、网络及 Intel GPU 使用情况，支持主题定制和多种视图布局，是传统 top/htop 的功能增强替代品。
summary.en: btop++ is a modern system resource monitor written in C++23, supporting Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, NetBSD, and OpenBSD. It provides an intuitive terminal interface for real-time monitoring of CPU, memory, disk, network, and Intel GPU usage, featuring customizable themes and multiple view layouts as a powerful alternative to traditional top/htop.

metadata.name: zadig
metadata.description: Zadig: An AI-powered, cloud-native, distributed DevOps platform designed for developers

summary.zh: Zadig是由KodeRover开发的云原生DevOps平台，基于Kubernetes构建。它提供灵活的流水线编排、多策略发布和AI驱动的环境检测与性能诊断能力，支持高并发构建测试部署，帮助企业实现研发数字化转型，千级服务一键治理。
summary.en: Zadig is an AI-powered cloud-native DevOps platform developed by KodeRover, built on Kubernetes. It provides flexible workflow orchestration, multi-strategy releases, and AI-driven environment inspection with performance diagnostics. Supporting high-concurrency build-test-deploy, it helps enterprises achieve R&D digital transformation with one-click management of thousands of services.

metadata.name: hurl
metadata.description: Hurl, run and test HTTP requests with plain text.

summary.zh: Hurl是由Orange-OpenSource开发的命令行HTTP工具，使用纯文本格式定义和执行HTTP请求。它支持链式请求、变量捕获、XPath/JSONPath查询及多种断言，可测试REST、SOAP、GraphQL等接口，并提供性能测试和CI/CD集成报告功能。
summary.en: Hurl is a command-line HTTP tool that executes requests defined in plain text format. It supports chained requests, variable capture, XPath/JSONPath queries and various assertions for testing REST, SOAP, GraphQL APIs, with performance testing and CI/CD integration reports.

metadata.name: searxng
metadata.description: SearXNG is a free internet metasearch engine which aggregates results from various search services and databases. Users are neither tracked nor profiled.

summary.zh: SearXNG 是一个免费开源的互联网元搜索引擎，聚合多个搜索服务与数据库的结果，支持同时查询多源内容。用户搜索行为不被追踪、不被画像，完整保护隐私。采用 AGPL-3.0 开源许可证，提供完整的安装配置文档。
summary.en: SearXNG is a free and open-source internet metasearch engine that aggregates results from various search services and databases. It queries multiple sources simultaneously while ensuring user privacy—no tracking or profiling. Licensed under AGPL-3.0 with comprehensive documentation.

metadata.name: sealos
metadata.description: Sealos is an AI-native Cloud Operating System built on Kubernetes that unifies the entire application lifecycle, from development in cloud IDEs to production deployment and management. It is perfect for building and scaling modern AI applications, managed databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB) and complex microservice architectures.

summary.zh: Sealos是基于Kubernetes构建的AI原生云操作系统，统 一管理应用从云端IDE开发到生产部署的完整生命周期。支持一键创建开发环境、托管数据库(MySQL/PostgreSQL/Redis/MongoDB)及微服务架构部署。
summary.en: Sealos is an AI-native Cloud OS built on Kubernetes that unifies the full application lifecycle from cloud IDE development to production deployment. Supports one-click dev environments, managed databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL/Redis/MongoDB), and microservice architectures.

metadata.name: nats-server
metadata.description: High-Performance server for NATS.io, the cloud and edge native messaging system.

summary.zh: NATS Server 是 CNCF 托管的高性能消息中间件，为云原生与边缘计算场景提供轻量级发布/订阅和请求/响应通信模式。支持超过 40 种语言客户端，具备低延迟、高吞吐、集群与流控能力，广泛应用于微服务通信、物联网数据传递和分布式系统解耦。
summary.en: NATS Server is a CNCF-hosted high-performance messaging middleware providing lightweight pub/sub and request/reply communication for cloud-native and edge computing. With 40+ language clients, it offers low latency, high throughput, clustering and flow control, widely used in microservices, IoT and distributed system decoupling.

metadata.name: hertzbeat
metadata.description: An AI-powered next-generation open source real-time observability system.

summary.zh: Apache HertzBeat是一款AI驱动的下一代开源实时可观测性平台，支持指标和日志统一采集、告警分发、智能分析。无需Agent即可实现高性能集群监控，提供强大的自定义监控和状态页构建能力。
summary.en: Apache HertzBeat is an AI-powered next-generation open-source real-time observability platform featuring unified metrics and logs collection, alerting distribution, and intelligent analysis. It enables high-performance cluster monitoring without agents and provides powerful custom monitoring and status page building capabilities.

metadata.name: docker_image_pusher
metadata.description: 使用Github Action将国外的Docker镜像转存到阿里云私有仓库，供国内服务器使用，免费易用

summary.zh: 利用GitHub Actions将DockerHub、gcr.io、k8s.io等国外镜像转存至阿里云容器仓库，解决国内服务器拉取海外镜像速度慢或失败的问题。支持最大40GB大型镜像、多架构指定及自动处理镜像重名，配置简单且完全免费。
summary.en: A GitHub Actions-based tool that syncs Docker images from foreign registries (DockerHub, gcr.io, k8s.io, ghcr.io) to Aliyun Container Registry, solving slow or failed image pulls in China. Supports 40GB large images, multi-architecture, and automatic handling of name conflicts.

metadata.name: Aria2-Pro-Docker
metadata.description: Aria2 Pro | A perfect Aria2 Docker image | 更好用的 Aria2 Docker 容器镜像

summary.zh: 一款功能完善的 Aria2 下载器 Docker 镜像，支持多架构部署（amd64/arm64等）。开箱即用，提供无限服务器连接数、低速自动重试、自动获取 BT tracker、下载完成后自动清理 .aria2 和 .torrent 文件等特性，确保任务进度不丢失、无重复下载。
summary.en: A production-ready Aria2 Docker image with multi-architecture support (amd64/arm64/etc.). Out-of-the-box solution featuring unlimited server connections, automatic low-speed retry, BT tracker fetching, auto-cleanup of .aria2/.torrent files, and reliable task progress management to prevent data loss or duplicate downloads.

metadata.name: clash-and-dashboard
metadata.description: clash-dashboard的修改版，与clash一起打包成docker镜像

summary.zh: 将Clash代理核心与Web管理面板打包为单一Docker镜像的项目。通过修改后台接口代码，实现容器内直连9090端口，简化部署流程，去除了跨容器通信的配置需求。适用于需要快速部署代理服务的用户。
summary.en: A Docker image project bundling Clash proxy core with a web management dashboard in a single container. Modified backend connects directly to port 9090 within the container, eliminating cross-container configuration. Ideal for users needing quick proxy service deployment.

metadata.name: china_area
metadata.description: 2024年中国全国5级行政区划（省、市、县、镇、村）

summary.zh: 该项目提供2024年中国完整五级行政区划数据，包含省、市、县、镇、村共665552条记录，数据源自国家统计局。涵盖2010-2024年行政区划数量变化及城乡分类统计，支持CSV和SQL格式下载，适用于地理信息系统、地址选择器及区域统计分析等应用场景。
summary.en: This repository provides complete 2024 China's five-level administrative division data with 665,552 records spanning provinces, cities, counties, towns, and villages, sourced from the National Bureau of Statistics. Includes 2010-2024 administrative changes and urban-rural classification statistics, available in CSV and SQL formats for GIS, address pickers, and regional analysis applications.

metadata.name: nginx-proxy-manager
metadata.description: Docker container for managing Nginx proxy hosts with a simple, powerful interface

summary.zh: Nginx Proxy Manager 是一个基于 Docker 的反向代理管理工具，提供可视化 Web 界面简化 Nginx 配置。支持 Let's Encrypt 免费 SSL 证书自动申请与续期，可轻松配置域名转发、重定向、访问控制和用户权限管理。适用于家庭网络服务暴露到公网的场景，无需深入了解 Nginx 即可完成反向代理部署。
summary.en: Nginx Proxy Manager is a Docker-based reverse proxy management tool with a visual Web UI to simplify Nginx configuration. It supports free Let's Encrypt SSL certificate auto-renewal, domain forwarding, redirection, access control and user management. Ideal for exposing home network services to the internet without deep Nginx knowledge.

metadata.name: proxy-tools
metadata.description: 自动同步 mihomo 内核、sing-box 内核、sing-box reF1nd 版内核和 Android 安装包、Dashboard 面板和 AdGuard Home 最新版

summary.zh: 自动同步并构建代理工具内核的自动化工具，每日凌晨更新mihomo（Meta/Alpha版）、sing-box（Release/Dev/reF1nd版）、Dashboard面板及AdGuard Home。采用UPX压缩技术，支持多架构，为代理工具ShellCrash等提供便捷的内核升级方案。
summary.en: An automated tool for synchronizing and building proxy tool kernels, updating daily at midnight: mihomo (Meta/Alpha), sing-box (Release/Dev/reF1nd), Dashboard panels, and AdGuard Home. Uses UPX compression and supports multiple architectures, providing convenient kernel upgrade solutions for proxy tools like ShellCrash.

metadata.name: carbonyl
metadata.description: Chromium running inside your terminal

summary.zh: Carbonyl 是基于 Chromium 修改的终端浏览器，原生运行于终端环境。凭借 Rust 编写的渲染核心，它实现了亚秒级启动、60 FPS 流畅运行、零闲置 CPU 占用的卓越性能。无需窗口服务器，支持 WebGL、WebGPU、音视频播放等现代 Web API，可通过 SSH 远程访问或安全模式控制台运行。
summary.en: Carbonyl is a Chromium-based browser designed to run natively in terminals. Built with a Rust rendering core, it achieves sub-second startup, 60 FPS performance, and 0% idle CPU usage. Requires no window server, supports modern Web APIs including WebGL and WebGPU, and works through SSH or in safe-mode console environments.

metadata.name: docs-linux-kernel-labs-zh-cn
metadata.description: Linux 内核实验（Linux kernel labs）中文翻译

summary.zh: Linux内核实验教程的中文翻译项目，源自布加勒斯特理工大学计算机学院。通过动手实践设备驱动编写，帮助学习者深入理解Linux内核架构与实现。实验部分详细且由浅入深，无需先修课程即可学习，使用QEMU虚拟机进行实践操作。适合作为操作系统课程教材或内核开发者入门资料。
summary.en: Chinese translation of Linux Kernel Labs from Politehnica University of Bucharest. The course provides hands-on device driver development practice to help learners understand Linux kernel architecture and implementation. Experiments are detailed and progressive, requiring no prerequisite courses, using QEMU virtual machines for practical exercises. Ideal for OS courses or kernel developer onboarding.

metadata.name: papermark
metadata.description: Papermark is the open-source DocSend alternative with built-in analytics and custom domains.

summary.zh: Papermark是一个开源文档分享平台，可作为DocSend的替代方案。支持生成安全分享链接、自定义域名和品牌Logo，提供内置的文档追踪和阅读分析功能。允许用户自托管部署，采用Next.js + TypeScript + PostgreSQL全栈架构构建。
summary.en: Papermark is an open-source document sharing platform serving as a DocSend alternative. It enables secure document sharing via custom links, custom domains, and branding, with built-in document tracking and analytics. Supports self-hosted deployment, built with Next.js + TypeScript + PostgreSQL.

metadata.name: remotely-save
metadata.description: Sync notes between local and cloud with smart conflict: S3 (Amazon S3/Cloudflare R2/Backblaze B2/...), Dropbox, webdav (NextCloud/InfiniCLOUD/Synology/...), OneDrive, Google Drive (GDrive), Box, pCloud, Yandex Disk, Koofr, Azure Blob Storage.

summary.zh: 一款Obsidian笔记应用的第三方同步插件，支持S3系列(Docker/R2/MinIO)、Dropbox、WebDAV、OneDrive、Google Drive等12+种云存储服务。提供端到端加密、移动端同步、定时自动同步、跳过文件/路径配置及智能冲突处理功能。
summary.en: An unofficial sync plugin for Obsidian notes app, supporting 12+ cloud storage services including S3-compatible (Cloudflare R2/Backblaze B2), Dropbox, WebDAV, OneDrive, Google Drive. Features end-to-end encryption, mobile sync, scheduled auto-sync, file skip rules, and smart conflict handling.

metadata.name: blossom
metadata.description: A markdown editor that you can deploy on your own servers to achieve cloud storage and device synchronization（支持私有部署的云端存储双链笔记软件）

summary.zh: Blossom是一款支持私有部署的云端双链笔记软件，基于Markdown编辑器，支持Windows、Mac及网页端多设备同步。内置图床管理、计划安排、待办事项、番茄钟等实用功能，同时提供动态博客系统，适合个人知识管理与团队协作场景。
summary.en: Blossom is a self-hostable cloud-based bi-directional note-taking application with Markdown support, enabling multi-device sync across Windows, Mac and web clients. Features built-in image management, calendar planning, todos, Pomodoro timer, and dynamic blogging—ideal for personal knowledge management and team collaboration.

metadata.name: plane
metadata.description: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

summary.zh: Plane 是一个开源的项目管理平台，可作为 Jira、Linear、Monday、ClickUp 的替代方案。支持任务管理、Sprint 冲刺、文档协作、模块化项目和实时分析。采用 Django + React 技术构建，提供 Docker 和 Kubernetes 部署方案，支持自托管。
summary.en: Plane is an open-source project management platform serving as an alternative to Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp. It supports task management, sprint cycles, documentation, modules, and real-time analytics. Built with Django and React, offering Docker and Kubernetes deployment for self-hosting.

metadata.name: obsidian-excalidraw-plugin
metadata.description: A plugin to edit and view Excalidraw drawings in Obsidian

summary.zh: Obsidian 笔记软件的 Excalidraw 手绘绘图插件，支持在 vault 中存储编辑 Excalidraw 文件，可将绘图嵌入 Markdown 文档，支持双向链接到其他文档或绘图。提供丰富的模板库、stencil 库和脚本扩展功能，是视觉化思考与知识管理的强大工具。
summary.en: An Obsidian plugin integrating Excalidraw sketching tool, enabling storage and editing of drawings directly in your vault. Supports embedding drawings into Markdown documents with bidirectional linking to other notes. Features stencil library, templates, and scripting for visual thinking and knowledge management.

metadata.name: fscan
metadata.description: 一款内网综合扫描工具，方便一键自动化、全方位漏扫扫描。(An intranet comprehensive scanning tool, enabling one-click automated, all-round vulnerability scanning)

summary.zh: Fscan是一款Go语言开发的内网综合扫描工具，支持自动化主机存活探测、端口扫描、密码暴力破解、漏洞检测（如MS17-010）、Web指纹识别及漏洞扫描（兼容XRay POC）。内置Redis/SSH漏洞利用模块，可一键完成内网信息收集与安全评估，适用于企业内网渗透测试与安全审计。
summary.en: Fscan is a Go-based comprehensive intranet scanning tool featuring automated host discovery, port scanning, password brute-forcing, vulnerability detection (MS17-010), Web fingerprinting, and XRay POC-compatible scanning. Includes Redis/SSH exploitation modules for one-click intranet reconnaissance and security assessment, ideal for enterprise penetration testing.

metadata.name: UE-DDNS
metadata.description: Universal Embedded DDNS Shell Script

summary.zh: UE-DDNS是一款通用嵌入式DDNS Shell脚本，采用模块化最小依赖设计。支持IPv4/IPv6双栈，可从URL或网络接口获取动态IP。兼容多数Unix平台及仅含busybox的嵌入式设备。提供交互式向导，用户仅需提供API Token即可生成定制脚本。支持Cloudflare、Dnspod、Godaddy等主流DNS服务商，具备严格IP比较机制避免重复请求。
summary.en: UE-DDNS is a universal embedded DDNS shell script with modular minimalist dependency design. Supports IPv4/IPv6 dual-stack and obtains dynamic IPs from URLs or network interfaces. Compatible with most Unix platforms including busybox-only embedded devices. Features an interactive wizard where users only need to provide API tokens to generate custom scripts. Supports major DNS providers like Cloudflare, Dnspod, and Godaddy with strict IP comparison to avoid duplicate requests.

metadata.name: nifi-minifi
metadata.description: Apache MiNiFi (a subproject of Apache NiFi)

summary.zh: Apache MiNiFi是Apache NiFi的子项目，专注于边缘计算场景的轻量级数据采集代理。它可在传感器、系统或服务器附近即时运行，具有小巧的运行占用空间、中央管理能力及完整的数据溯源功能，并与NiFi无缝集成实现数据流的端到端管理。
summary.en: Apache MiNiFi is a subproject of Apache NiFi designed as a lightweight edge agent for data collection at the source. It operates immediately adjacent to sensors, systems, or servers with a small footprint, central management capabilities, and full data provenance tracking, seamlessly integrating with NiFi for end-to-end dataflow management.

metadata.name: only_for_happly
metadata.description: manus自动写脚本 注册链接 https://manus.im/invitation/V9OIRPDYST3RAF8  1元机场 http://b.u9v.cn/dVMss 百度贴吧签到★小米运动刷步数★恩山签到★雨云签到白嫖服务器★小茅预约★天翼云盘签到★阿里云盘签到★富贵论坛签到★一点万向签到打卡★品赞代理签到★星空代理签到★什么值得买签到★值得买每日抽奖★小米社区签到★ddnsto自动续费七天★爱奇艺签到刷时长★双色球预测（娱乐）

summary.zh: 基于青龙面板的Python自动化签到脚本集合，支持百度贴吧、小米运动、阿里云盘、天翼云盘、爱奇艺等数十个平台的每日签到自动任务。提供依赖管理和Cookie配置功能，适合用于自动化薅羊毛和定时签到场景。
summary.en: A Python-based automation script collection for QingLong panel, supporting daily check-in tasks across dozens of platforms including Baidu Tieba, Xiaomi Sports, Aliyun Drive, Tianyi Cloud, and iQIYI. Features dependency management and cookie configuration for automated羊毛 (benefits grabbing) and scheduled check-ins.

metadata.name: 1Panel
metadata.description: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

summary.zh: 1Panel 是一款现代化开源 VPS 控制面板，通过 Web 界面提供一键部署 OpenClaw AI 代理、本地 LLM 托管、站点管理和应用商店等功能。支持容器化部署、SSL 证书自动配置及系统资源监控，适合开发者和小微企业进行服务器运维管理。
summary.en: 1Panel is a modern open-source VPS control panel featuring a clean web interface for one-click OpenClaw AI agent deployment, local LLM hosting via Ollama, and automated website management with SSL provisioning. It offers a curated app marketplace, container orchestration, and real-time server monitoring, ideal for developers and small businesses.

metadata.name: nvm
metadata.description: Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

summary.zh: nvm（Node Version Manager）是一个 POSIX 兼容的 bash 脚本，用于在命令行中管理多个活跃的 Node.js 版本。支持通过 .nvmrc 文件自动切换版本，提供 bash/zsh/fish 等 shell 集成，兼容 Linux、macOS、WSL 及 Alpine Linux 等多平台，通过 CII 最佳实践认证，是 Node.js 多版本管理的行业标准工具。
summary.en: nvm (Node Version Manager) is a POSIX-compliant bash script for managing multiple active Node.js versions via command line. It supports automatic version switching via .nvmrc files, provides shell integration for bash/zsh/fish, and is compatible with Linux, macOS, WSL, and Alpine Linux. CII Best Practices certified, it's the de facto standard tool for Node.js version management.

metadata.name: thingsboard-gateway
metadata.description: Open-source IoT Gateway - integrates devices connected to legacy and third-party systems with ThingsBoard IoT Platform using Modbus, CAN bus, BACnet, BLE, OPC-UA, MQTT, ODBC and REST protocols.

summary.zh: ThingsBoard IoT Gateway是开源Python网关项目，实现legacy设备和第三方系统与ThingsBoard物联网平台的集成。支持Modbus、OPC-UA、CAN、BACnet、MQTT、BLE等15+种工业物联网协议，实现数据采集、格式转换和统一上报，适用于智能工厂、智慧建筑、能源管理等场景。
summary.en: ThingsBoard IoT Gateway is an open-source Python-based application that seamlessly integrates legacy devices and third-party systems with the ThingsBoard IoT platform. Supporting 15+ protocols including Modbus, OPC-UA, CAN, BACnet, MQTT, and BLE, it enables unified data collection, transformation, and reporting for smart factory, building automation, and energy management applications.

metadata.name: modbus4j
metadata.description: A high-performance and ease-of-use implementation of the Modbus protocol written in Java. Supports ASCII, RTU, TCP, and UDP transports as slave or master, automatic request partitioning and response data type parsing.

summary.zh: modbus4j是由Infinite Automation Systems开发的Java语言实现的高性能Modbus协议库。支持ASCII、RTU、TCP、UDP四种传输模式，可作为主站或从站运行，并提供自动请求分区和响应数据类型解析功能。适用于工业自动化、SCADA系统、物联网设备监控等场景。
summary.en: modbus4j is a high-performance Modbus protocol library implemented in Java by Infinite Automation Systems. It supports ASCII, RTU, TCP, and UDP transport modes, operating as master or slave, with automatic request partitioning and response data type parsing. Ideal for industrial automation, SCADA systems, and IoT device monitoring.

metadata.name: tabby
metadata.description: A terminal for a more modern age

summary.zh: Tabby是一款高度可配置的跨平台终端模拟器、SSH和串口客户端，支持Windows、macOS和Linux。内置SSH/Telnet连接管理器、串口终端、分屏面板、主题定制、快捷键配置等丰富功能，支持PowerShell、WSL、Git-Bash等多种shell，提供加密存储SSH密钥和配置的容器，另有Web版可自托管。
summary.en: Tabby is a highly configurable cross-platform terminal emulator, SSH and serial client for Windows, macOS and Linux. It features an integrated SSH/Telnet connection manager, serial terminal, split panes, theming, customizable shortcuts, and supports PowerShell, WSL, Git-Bash and more. Includes encrypted storage for SSH credentials and a self-hostable web app.

metadata.name: nifi-minifi-cpp
metadata.description: Apache NiFi - MiNiFi C++

summary.zh: Apache NiFi MiNiFi C++是Apache NiFi的轻量级C++实现，专注于在数据源端进行采集。作为边缘计算数据流管理框架，它具有小巧的资源占用空间，支持集中式代理管理、数据溯源生成，并与NiFi无缝集成实现完整的数据监管链，适用于物联网和边缘计算场景。
summary.en: Apache NiFi MiNiFi C++ is a lightweight C++ implementation of Apache NiFi, focused on data collection at the source. As an edge computing dataflow management framework, it features a small footprint with centralized agent management, data provenance generation, and seamless NiFi integration for complete data chain of custody, ideal for IoT and edge computing scenarios.

metadata.name: nifi
metadata.description: Apache NiFi

summary.zh: Apache NiFi 是 Apache 顶级数据流处理项目，提供可视化 Web 界面实现数据的自动化获取、路由、转换与分发。支持数据血缘追踪、流控策略、加密压缩等功能，适用于 ETL 管道、IoT 数据采集、企业系统集成等场景。
summary.en: Apache NiFi is an Apache top-level project for automated data flow orchestration, featuring a visual browser-based UI for data ingestion, routing, transformation, and distribution. It supports data lineage tracking, flow control policies, and encryption, ideal for ETL pipelines, IoT data collection, and enterprise integration.

metadata.name: grex
metadata.description: A command-line tool and Rust library with Python bindings for generating regular expressions from user-provided test cases

summary.zh: grex是Rust编写的正则表达式自动生成工具，同时提供命令行界面和Python绑定。用户输入测试用例后，工具自动推断并生成精确匹配的正则表达式。作为regexgen的Rust移植版本，它支持跨平台部署，可生成最精确或更通用的正则表达式模式。
summary.en: grex is a Rust-based tool that automatically generates regular expressions from user-provided test cases. It provides both a CLI and Python bindings. As a Rust port of regexgen, it supports cross-platform deployment and can generate either the most specific or more generalized regex patterns.

metadata.name: sl651-2014
metadata.description: sl651-2014水文通讯协议netty服务端实现

summary.zh: 基于Netty实现的SL651-2014水文通讯协议服务端，支持M1/M2/M4三种通讯方式，集成2F链路维持和32定时上报功能码，支持TCP/UDP模式及CRC校验，提供包分割解决粘包问题，可扩展自定义业务处理逻辑，适用于水文监测数据传输场景。
summary.en: A Netty-based implementation of SL651-2014 hydrology communication protocol server, supporting M1/M2/M4 communication modes with built-in 2F link maintenance and 32 periodic reporting function codes. Features TCP/UDP modes, CRC verification, and packet segmentation to handle粘包分包 issues. Extensible business logic for hydrology monitoring data transmission.

metadata.name: breezy-weather
metadata.description: A feature-rich weather app with good visualizations and more than 50 sources.

summary.zh: Breezy Weather是一款功能丰富的开源天气应用，采用Kotlin和Jetpack Compose开发，基于Material 3设计语言。应用支持50+天气数据源，提供天气预报、实时观测、即时预报、空气质量、花粉及气象警报等功能，并配备精美的可视化界面。兼容Android 5.0及以上系统。
summary.en: Breezy Weather is a feature-rich open source weather application built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, featuring Material 3 design. It supports over 50 weather data sources, providing forecasts, real-time observations, nowcasting, air quality, pollen data, and weather alerts with sophisticated visualizations. Compatible with Android 5.0+.

metadata.name: IoT-Technical-Guide
metadata.description: :honeybee: IoT Technical Guide --- 从零搭建高性能物联网平台及物联网解决方案和Thingsboard源码分析 :sparkles: :sparkles: :sparkles: (IoT Platform, SaaS, MQTT, CoAP, HTTP, Modbus, OPC, WebSocket, 物模型，Protobuf, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Spring Security, OAuth2, RuleEngine, Kafka, Docker)

summary.zh: 系统全面的物联网技术教程，涵盖从基础学习到高性能平台搭建的全流程。详细讲解MQTT、CoAP等核心物联网协议，提供Thingsboard开源平台源码分析，并包含消息队列、数据库选型、安全认证、规则引擎等关键技术实现，是物联网开发者不可多得的实战指南。
summary.en: A comprehensive IoT technical tutorial covering the entire journey from foundational learning to high-performance platform construction. It provides in-depth explanations of core IoT protocols like MQTT and CoAP, offers Thingsboard open-source platform source code analysis, and includes key technical implementations such as message queuing, database selection, security authentication, and rule engines. An invaluable practical guide for IoT developers.

metadata.name: source-code-hunter
metadata.description: 😱 从源码层面，剖析挖掘互联网行业主流技术的底层实现原理，为广大开发者 “提升技术深度” 提供便利。目前开放 Spring 全家桶，Mybatis、Netty、Dubbo 框架，及 Redis、Tomcat 中间件等

summary.zh: 这是一个专注于互联网主流技术源码分析的深度学习项目，系统剖析 Spring 全家桶、MyBatis、Netty、Dubbo、Redis、Tomcat 等框架和中间件的底层实现原理，通过详尽的源码解读帮助开发者深入理解技术内核，提升技术深度与竞争力。
summary.en: This project provides in-depth source code analysis of mainstream internet technologies, systematically dissecting the underlying implementation principles of frameworks like Spring ecosystem, MyBatis, Netty, Dubbo, Redis, and Tomcat. It helps developers gain deeper technical insights and enhance their expertise through detailed source code interpretation.

metadata.name: thingsboard
metadata.description: Open-source IoT Platform - Device management, data collection, processing and visualization.

summary.zh: ThingsBoard 是一个企业级开源物联网平台，提供设备管理、数据采集、处理和可视化的一站式解决方案。支持设备配置、实时数据监控、SCADA 仪表板、告警规则引擎和多渠道通知机制。可部署于本地或云端，广泛应用于智慧城市、工业物联网等场景。
summary.en: ThingsBoard is an enterprise-grade open-source IoT platform offering comprehensive device management, data collection, processing, and visualization. It supports device provisioning, real-time monitoring, SCADA dashboards, alarm rule engines, and multi-channel notifications. Deployable on-premises or in the cloud, it serves smart city and industrial IoT applications.

metadata.name: genact
metadata.description: 🌀 A nonsense activity generator

summary.zh: 一款用 Rust 编写的终端活动模拟器，通过显示伪造的编译、挖矿、部署等高负载操作画面，帮助用户在需要时合理「摸鱼」或营造忙碌假象。支持 Linux、macOS、Windows 及 WebAssembly，配备多种模拟场景如内核编译、Docker 构建、加密货币挖矿等。
summary.en: A Rust-based terminal activity simulator that displays fake high-load operations like kernel compilation, Docker builds, and crypto mining to help users appear busy. Supports Linux, macOS, Windows, and WebAssembly with multiple simulated scenarios for legitimate 'productivity theater'.

metadata.name: MyIP
metadata.description: The best IP Toolbox. Easy to check what's your IPs, IP geolocation, check for DNS leaks, examine WebRTC connections, speed test, ping test, MTR test, check website availability, whois search and more!

summary.zh: 一款功能全面的在线 IP 工具箱，提供 IP 检测与地理位置查询、DNS 泄露测试、WebRTC 连接检查、网络速度测试、Ping/MTR 延迟检测、网站可用性监控、Whois 查询及浏览器指纹分析等 15+ 项网络诊断功能。支持 Docker 部署、PWA 桌面应用、多语言界面和键盘快捷操作。
summary.en: A comprehensive online IP toolbox offering 15+ network diagnostic tools including IP detection with geolocation, DNS leak test, WebRTC connection check, speed test, Ping/MTR latency detection, website availability monitoring, Whois lookup, and browser fingerprint analysis. Supports Docker deployment, PWA, multilingual UI, and keyboard shortcuts.

metadata.name: taipy
metadata.description: Turns Data and AI algorithms into production-ready web applications in no time.

summary.zh: Taipy是一个Python低代码框架，专为数据科学家和机器学习工程师设计，可将数据和AI算法快速转换为生产级Web应用。提供可视化UI生成、数据管道编排、What-if分析与场景管理、用户认证等端到端功能，无需前端开发经验，纯Python即可构建完整的数据应用。
summary.en: Taipy is a Python low-code framework designed for data scientists and ML engineers to rapidly convert data and AI algorithms into production-ready web applications. It provides end-to-end features including UI generation, pipeline orchestration, what-if analysis, scenario management, and user authentication without requiring frontend development expertise.

metadata.name: marker
metadata.description: Convert PDF to markdown + JSON quickly with high accuracy

summary.zh: Marker是一款高精度文档转换工具，支持PDF、图片、Office文档、HTML、EPUB等格式转换为Markdown、JSON、HTML。具备表格提取、数学公式识别、代码块格式化、图像抽取、页眉页脚移除等功能，支持GPU/CPU/MPS运行，可选LLM增强提升准确率。
summary.en: Marker converts PDFs, images, and documents to markdown, JSON, and HTML with high accuracy. It handles tables, equations, code blocks, and images, supports GPU/CPU/MPS, and offers optional LLM enhancement for improved precision.

metadata.name: SSR-V2ray-Trojan
metadata.description: 机场推荐与机场评测

summary.zh: 这是一个科学上网机场推荐与评测仓库，汇总了十余家值得推荐的翻墙机场服务。内容涵盖机场套餐对比、线路质量分析、多平台客户端配置教程及选机注意事项。推荐包括BoostNet、悠兔、贝贝云等IEPL专线与中转机场，帮助用户选择稳定高速的代理服务。
summary.en: This repository offers comprehensive VPN/proxy service recommendations and reviews for internet freedom in China. It features detailed comparisons of 10+ airport providers, including plan pricing, line quality analysis, and multi-platform client configuration guides. Recommended providers cover IEPL dedicated lines and transit airports like BoostNet and Youtu.

metadata.name: teleport
metadata.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

summary.zh: Teleport是Gravitational开发的基础设施访问与安全平台，提供SSO、短期证书认证、RBAC/ABAC访问控制、会话审计等功能。支持SSH、Kubernetes、数据库、RDP、Web应用及MCP服务器等多种协议，通过零信任架构实现无VPN的安全隧道访问和最小权限原则。
summary.en: Teleport is an infrastructure access and security platform providing SSO, short-lived certificate authentication, RBAC/ABAC access controls, and session auditing. It supports SSH, Kubernetes, databases, RDP, web apps, and MCP servers, enabling zero-trust architecture with secure tunnel access without VPNs and least privilege enforcement.

metadata.name: focalboard
metadata.description: Focalboard is an open source, self-hosted alternative to Trello, Notion, and Asana.

summary.zh: Focalboard是Mattermost社区开源的项目管理工具，提供看板式任务管理。它是Trello、Notion和Asana的开源替代方案，支持多语言、跨平台（Windows/Mac/Linux），可自托管部署。桌面版内置SQLite数据库，服务器版支持多用户协作，适用于个人任务和团队项目管理。
summary.en: Focalboard is an open source project management tool by the Mattermost community, featuring Kanban-style task organization. As an open source alternative to Trello, Notion, and Asana, it supports multilingual interfaces and cross-platform deployment (Windows/Mac/Linux) with self-hosting capability. The desktop edition uses embedded SQLite, while the server edition enables multi-user collaboration for personal and team project management.

metadata.name: redis
metadata.description: Native port of Redis for Windows. Redis is an in-memory database that persists on disk. The data model is key-value, but many different kind of values are supported: Strings, Lists, Sets, Sorted Sets, Hashes, Streams, HyperLogLogs. This repository contains unofficial port of Redis to Windows.

summary.zh: Redis数据库的Windows原生非官方移植版本，支持4.0.14和5.0.14版本。基于MS Open Tech早期移植工作重构，使用Visual Studio 2019编译，集成了自定义jemalloc内存分配器以实现Windows平台fork机制下的RDB/AOF持久化。适用于需要在Windows环境部署Redis的企业级应用场景。
summary.en: An unofficial native port of Redis (versions 4.0.14 and 5.0.14) for Windows x64. Built upon the MS Open Tech fork, compiled with Visual Studio 2019, featuring customized jemalloc allocator to enable fork-based RDB/AOF persistence on Windows. Ideal for enterprise applications requiring Redis on Windows infrastructure.

metadata.name: cosmopolitan
metadata.description: build-once run-anywhere c library

summary.zh: Cosmopolitan Libc 让 C/C++ 实现「一次编译，到处运行」。它重新配置 GCC/Clang 生成 APE（实际可移植可执行文件），无需解释器或虚拟机即可在 Linux、macOS、Windows、FreeBSD、OpenBSD、NetBSD 及 BIOS 上原生运行。性能优异，二进制可小至 12KB，内置 strace/ftrace 调试功能。
summary.en: Cosmopolitan Libc makes C/C++ a build-once run-anywhere language like Java, without an interpreter or VM. It repurposes GCC/Clang to produce POSIX-compliant APE (Actually Portable Executable) polyglots that run natively on Linux, macOS, Windows, FreeBSD, OpenBSD, NetBSD and BIOS with excellent performance and tiny binaries (as small as 12KB), featuring built-in strace/ftrace debugging.

metadata.name: Java-Interview-Tutorial
metadata.description: 请star，勿fork，因为爱force push！涵盖国际大厂Java/数据库/DDD/设计模式/微服务/中间件/AI大模型应用/区块链开发最佳实践。关注公众号【JavaEdge】，一起交流学习！

summary.zh: Java技术面试与开发实践教程，涵盖Java并发编程、数据库优化、DDD领域驱动设计、设计模式、微服务架构、中间件应用，以及AI大模型与区块链开发最佳实践。采用Vuepress构建文档站点，提供系统化学习路径，适合Java开发者面试准备与技术进阶。
summary.en: A comprehensive Java technical interview and development practice tutorial covering concurrent programming, database optimization, DDD, design patterns, microservices, middleware, AI large model applications, and blockchain best practices. Built with Vuepress, it offers structured learning paths for Java developers preparing for interviews and technical advancement.

metadata.name: system-design-101
metadata.description: Explain complex systems using visuals and simple terms. Help you prepare for system design interviews.

summary.zh: ByteByteGo 出品的系统设计入门教程，通过可视化图表和通俗语言讲解复杂技术概念。涵盖 API 设计、负载均衡、网络协议、GraphQL 等核心主题，是准备系统设计面试的权威学习资源。
summary.en: A visual system design tutorial from ByteByteGo, explaining complex technical concepts through diagrams and simple language. Covers API design, load balancing, network protocols, and GraphQL - an essential resource for system design interview preparation.

metadata.name: weixin4j
metadata.description: (微信开发工具包)weixin sdk for Java

summary.zh: weixin4j是Java编写的微信开发工具包，支持公众平台、企业号、小程序及微信支付API，基于Netty构建消息服务器，提供HTTP客户端封装和Spring集成能力。
summary.en: weixin4j is a Java SDK for WeChat development supporting Public Platform, Enterprise Account, Mini Programs and WeChat Payment APIs. Built on Netty for message handling with HTTP client encapsulation and Spring integration.

metadata.name: openwrt
metadata.description: This repository is a mirror of https://git.openwrt.org/openwrt/openwrt.git It is for reference only and is not active for check-ins.  We will continue to accept Pull Requests here. They will be merged via staging trees then into openwrt.git.

summary.zh: OpenWrt是面向嵌入式设备的开源Linux操作系统固件项目。与传统路由器固件不同，它提供完全可写的文件系统和支持opkg包管理，允许用户通过安装扩展包自定义设备功能。开发者可利用其交叉编译工具链为多种硬件架构构建定制固件，广泛应用于路由器、IoT网关等嵌入式场景。
summary.en: OpenWrt is an open-source Linux OS firmware project targeting embedded devices. Unlike traditional router firmware, it provides a fully writable filesystem with opkg package management, enabling users to customize devices via packages. Developers can use its cross-compilation toolchain to build custom firmware for multiple hardware architectures, widely used in routers and IoT gateways.

metadata.name: wsl2-distro-manager
metadata.description: A GUI to quickly manage your WSL2 instances

summary.zh: WSL Distro Manager是一款免费开源的Flutter桌面应用，为Windows Subsystem for Linux提供图形化管理界面。支持安装、卸载、更新、备份和恢复WSL发行版，还可直接导入Docker镜像和LXC容器作为WSL实例，并提供快速操作脚本和跨机器共享等高级功能。
summary.en: WSL Distro Manager is a free, open-source Flutter desktop app providing a GUI for managing Windows Subsystem for Linux. It supports installing, uninstalling, updating, backing up and restoring WSL distros, importing Docker images and LXC containers as WSL instances, with quick actions and cross-machine sharing capabilities.

metadata.name: jsoneditor
metadata.description: A web-based tool to view, edit, format, and validate JSON

summary.zh: Web端JSON编辑器组件，提供树形、代码、文本、预览四种编辑模式。支持JSON Schema验证（基于ajv）、JMESPath查询、大文件处理（最大500MiB）。集成Ace编辑器实现语法高亮、格式化和修复功能，可作为组件嵌入Web应用，支持CommonJS、AMD等多种模块加载方式。
summary.en: A web-based JSON editor component with tree, code, text, and preview modes. Features JSON Schema validation via ajv, JMESPath querying, and large file support up to 500MiB. Integrates Ace editor for syntax highlighting, formatting, and JSON repair. Embeddable as a component supporting CommonJS, AMD, and regular JS loading.

metadata.name: grok-1
metadata.description: Grok open release

summary.zh: xAI开源的314B参数混合专家大语言模型，采用8专家MoE架构，每token激活2个专家。模型基于JAX实现，支持RoPE旋转嵌入、激活分片和8位量化，上下文长度达8192token。通过HuggingFace或BitTorrent分发权重，代码采用Apache 2.0许可。
summary.en: xAI's open-source 314B parameter Mixture-of-Experts LLM with 8 experts, activating 2 per token. Built with JAX, supporting RoPE embeddings, activation sharding, and 8-bit quantization. Context length up to 8,192 tokens. Weights available via HuggingFace or BitTorrent under Apache 2.0 license.

metadata.name: keepassxc
metadata.description: KeePassXC is a cross-platform community-driven port of the Windows application “KeePass Password Safe”.

summary.zh: KeePassXC是一款开源跨平台密码管理器，支持Windows、macOS和Linux系统。它采用KDBX格式离线存储加密数据，提供密码生成器、TOTP令牌、浏览器集成、SSH代理及YubiKey硬件密钥认证等企业级安全功能，满足高安全要求的个人敏感信息管理需求。
summary.en: KeePassXC is an open-source cross-platform password manager for Windows, macOS, and Linux. It stores encrypted data in KDBX format offline, offering enterprise-grade security features including password generator, TOTP tokens, browser integration, SSH agent, and YubiKey hardware key authentication for secure personal data management.

metadata.name: o2oa
metadata.description: 开源OA系统 - 码云GVP|Java开源oa|企业OA办公平台|企业OA|协同办公OA|流程平台OA|O2OA|OA，支持国产麒麟操作系统和国产数据库（达梦、人大金仓），政务OA，军工信息化OA

summary.zh: O2OA（翱途）是100%开源的企业协同办公平台，基于JavaEE分布式架构开发。提供流程引擎、表单定制、页面定制等低代码开发能力，支持跨平台移动办公。已通过国产信创认证，支持麒麟操作系统、达梦数据库、人大金仓等国产软硬件，适用于政务OA、军工信息化等场景。
summary.en: O2OA is a 100% open-source enterprise collaboration platform built on JavaEE distributed architecture. It offers low-code development capabilities including workflow engine, form customization, and page customization with cross-platform mobile office support. Certified for China's trusted IT ecosystem, it supports domestic operating systems like Kylin and databases such as Dameng and Kingbase, ideal for government OA and military information systems.

metadata.name: WindTerm
metadata.description: A professional cross-platform SSH/Sftp/Shell/Telnet/Tmux/Serial terminal.

summary.zh: WindTerm 是一款专业跨平台终端工具，支持 SSH/SFTP/Telnet/Serial/Shell/Tmux 协议。提供端口转发、X11转发、代理跳转、SSH ControlMaster 等高级功能，集成 SFTP/SCP 文件传输和本地文件管理器。具备多语言界面、自动补全、分屏视图等特性，完全免费开源。
summary.en: WindTerm is a professional cross-platform terminal supporting SSH/SFTP/Telnet/Serial/Shell/Tmux protocols. Features include port forwarding, X11 forwarding, proxy jump, SSH ControlMaster, integrated SFTP/SCP, multilingual UI, auto-completion, and split views. Completely free and open-source.

metadata.name: zhparser
metadata.description: zhparser is a PostgreSQL extension for full-text search of Chinese language

summary.zh: zhparser 是 PostgreSQL 的中文全文搜索扩展，基于 SCWS 词典分词实现中文语言解析器。支持自定义词典、多种分词模式（二元复合、单字复合等），可创建文本搜索配置实现中文文本的向量化与查询。适用于 PostgreSQL 9.2 及以上版本。
summary.en: zhparser is a PostgreSQL extension for Chinese full-text search, implementing a Chinese language parser based on SCWS (Simple Chinese Word Segmentation). It supports custom dictionaries and multiple segmentation modes, enabling vectorization and querying of Chinese text. Compatible with PostgreSQL 9.2 and above.

metadata.name: excalidraw
metadata.description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams

summary.zh: Excalidraw是一款开源手绘风格虚拟白板，支持实时协作与端到端加密。作为可嵌入的React组件，它提供无限画布、多样绘图工具、PNG/SVG导出及PWA离线能力，适用于团队协作绘图、流程设计、远程会议白板等场景。
summary.en: Excalidraw is an open-source virtual whiteboard featuring hand-drawn aesthetics with real-time collaboration and end-to-end encryption. As an embeddable React component, it offers infinite canvas, diverse drawing tools, PNG/SVG export, and PWA offline capability, ideal for team collaboration, flowchart design, and remote meeting whiteboards.

metadata.name: eSearch
metadata.description: 截屏 离线OCR 搜索翻译 以图搜图 贴图 录屏 万向滚动截屏 屏幕翻译   Screenshot  Offline OCR   Search   Translate   Search for picture   Paste the picture on the screen   Screen recorder   Omnidirectional scrolling screenshot   Screen translator  支持Windows Linux macOS

summary.zh: eSearch 是一款跨平台截图 OCR 工具集成了离线文字识别、屏幕贴图、以图搜图、滚动截屏、录屏及屏幕翻译等功能。基于 Electron 开发，采用 PaddleOCR 实现离线 OCR，支持 Windows、Linux、macOS 三平台，可用于高效截图编辑、信息提取和多语言翻译场景。
summary.en: eSearch is a cross-platform screenshot and OCR tool featuring offline text recognition, screen image overlay, reverse image search, scrolling screenshots, screen recording, and real-time screen translation. Built with Electron and PaddleOCR, it supports Windows, Linux, and macOS for efficient screenshot editing, information extraction, and multilingual translation.

metadata.name: my-tv
metadata.description: 我的电视 电视直播软件，安装即可使用

summary.zh: Android平台电视直播应用，支持U盘、小米电视助手、ADB多种安装方式，提供电视频道直播服务。
summary.en: Android TV live streaming application supporting USB, Xiaomi TV Assistant, and ADB installation methods for TV channel broadcasting.

metadata.name: shenyu
metadata.description: Apache ShenYu is a Java native API Gateway for service proxy, protocol conversion and API governance.

summary.zh: Apache ShenYu 是 Java 原生 API 网关，支持 Dubbo、Spring Cloud、gRPC 等多协议代理与协议转换，提供 OAuth 2.0、JWT 等安全认证，集成熔断、限流、链路追踪等治理能力，支持插件热插拔与动态配置，适用微服务流量管控与 API 统一管理。
summary.en: Apache ShenYu is a Java-native API gateway supporting multi-protocol proxy including Dubbo, Spring Cloud, and gRPC with protocol conversion. It provides OAuth 2.0 and JWT security, integrates circuit breaking, rate limiting, and tracing features with hot-swappable plugins for microservices traffic control and API governance.

metadata.name: keepass2android
metadata.description: Password manager app for Android

summary.zh: Keepass2Android 是一款开源的 Android 密码管理应用，支持安全存储密码和敏感信息，采用强密钥加密保护数据库文件。应用兼容 KeePass 2.x 和 KeePassXC 格式，可通过内置云存储或第三方应用实现跨设备同步，满足移动端安全凭证管理需求。
summary.en: Keepass2Android is an open-source password manager for Android that securely stores passwords and sensitive information protected by strong encryption. Compatible with KeePass 2.x and KeePassXC databases, it enables cross-device synchronization via built-in cloud storage or third-party apps, meeting mobile credential management needs.

metadata.name: Perlite
metadata.description: A web-based markdown viewer optimized for Obsidian

summary.zh: Perlite是一款基于PHP的Web端Markdown查看器，专门优化用于展示Obsidian笔记库。无需数据库，直接读取Markdown文件结构自动构建网站，是Obsidian Publish的开源替代方案。支持主题切换、交互式图形、LaTeX数学公式、Mermaid图表及全文搜索功能。
summary.en: Perlite is a PHP-based web markdown viewer optimized for Obsidian vault publishing. No database required—it auto-builds sites from Markdown folder structures as an open-source alternative to Obsidian Publish. Features include theme support, interactive graph visualization, LaTeX, Mermaid diagrams, and full-text search.

metadata.name: tiny-rdm
metadata.description: Tiny RDM (Tiny Redis Desktop Manager) - A modern, colorful, super lightweight Redis GUI client for Mac, Windows, and Linux. It also provides a web version that can be deployed via Docker.

summary.zh: Tiny RDM是一款基于Wails框架开发的现代化轻量级Redis桌面客户端，支持Mac、Windows和Linux系统。采用Webview2渲染，无需内嵌浏览器，提供明暗主题切换、SSH隧道、SSL、Sentinel/Cluster模式支持，涵盖Redis全数据类型可视化CRUD操作，支持SCAN分段加载百万级键、实时命令监控、Monaco编辑器集成及自定义编解码器功能。
summary.en: Tiny RDM is a modern lightweight Redis desktop client built with Wails framework, supporting Mac, Windows and Linux. Built on Webview2 without embedded browsers, it offers light/dark themes, SSH tunnel, SSL, Sentinel/Cluster mode support, visual CRUD for all Redis data types, SCAN-based pagination for millions of keys, real-time command monitoring, Monaco Editor integration, and custom encoder/decoder functionality.

metadata.name: AnyText
metadata.description: Official implementation code of the paper <AnyText: Multilingual Visual Text Generation And Editing>

summary.zh: AnyText 是基于扩散模型的多语言视觉文本生成与编辑框架，通过辅助潜在模块和文本嵌入模块生成与背景自然融合的文本。模型采用文本控制扩散损失和文本感知损失训练以提高书写准确性，支持文本生成、编辑及社区模型权重合并。已被 ICLR 2024 选为 Spotlight 论文。
summary.en: AnyText is a diffusion-based multilingual visual text generation and editing framework, featuring an auxiliary latent module and text embedding module to produce text seamlessly integrated with backgrounds. It uses text-control diffusion loss and text perceptual loss to enhance writing accuracy, supporting generation, editing and community model weight merging. Accepted as ICLR 2024 Spotlight.

metadata.name: pyvideotrans
metadata.description: Translate the video from one language to another and embed dubbing & subtitles.

summary.zh: 开源视频翻译与AI配音工具，实现从视频语音识别、字幕翻译到AI配音合成的全流程自动化。支持F5-TTS、GPT-SoVITS等语音克隆技术，可为不同说话人分配专属AI音色，提供交互式校对界面和命令行模式，适用于视频本地化、内容翻译、多语言配音等场景。
summary.en: Open-source video translation and AI dubbing tool that automates the entire workflow: speech recognition, subtitle translation, and AI voice synthesis. Features voice cloning via F5-TTS and GPT-SoVITS, with per-speaker voice assignment, interactive proofreading, and CLI mode for video localization and multilingual content production.

metadata.name: Waifu2x-Extension-GUI
metadata.description: Video, Image and GIF upscale/enlarge(Super-Resolution) and Video frame interpolation. Achieved with Waifu2x,  Real-ESRGAN, Real-CUGAN, RTX Video Super Resolution VSR, SRMD, RealSR, Anime4K, RIFE, IFRNet, CAIN, DAIN,  and ACNet.

summary.zh: 基于深度卷积神经网络的图像/视频/GIF超分辨率放大与帧插值工具。支持Waifu2x、Real-ESRGAN、Real-CUGAN、RTX VSR等十余种AI算法，兼容AMD/Nvidia/Intel全平台GPU。提供一键预设和多GPU加速，专注动漫与真实照片画质提升。
summary.en: A GUI tool for image, video, and GIF super-resolution enlargement using deep CNNs. Supports 10+ AI algorithms including Waifu2x, Real-ESRGAN, Real-CUGAN, and RTX VSR with full AMD/Nvidia/Intel GPU compatibility. Features one-click presets and multi-GPU acceleration for anime and photo enhancement.

metadata.name: xp_module
metadata.description: 备份午夜神大佬分享的应用集 【下面是Gitee仓库链接】https://gitee.com/grbnb/xp_module.git

summary.zh: 备份酷安用户「午夜神」分享的Android Root与Xposed框架资源集。涵盖Magisk多版本（稳定版/金丝雀版/阿尔法版/德尔塔版/lite）、APatch新型root方案、LSPosed/EDXposed/Dreamland框架及太极等免Root方案，提供面具管理器、模块合集及隐藏工具Shamiko等。
summary.en: A collection of Android Root and Xposed framework resources shared by Coolapk user 'Midnight God'. Includes Magisk variants (Stable/Canary/Alpha/Delta/Lite), APatch root solution, LSPosed/EDXposed/Dreamland frameworks, and免Root solutions like TaiChi. Provides Magisk managers, module collections, and Shamiko hide tool.

metadata.name: pm2
metadata.description: Node.js Production Process Manager with a built-in Load Balancer.

summary.zh: PM2是Node.js/Bun生产级进程管理器，内置负载均衡器。支持进程守护、零停机重载、集群模式和容器部署。通过简单命令实现应用后台运行、监控和自动恢复，是Node.js生产环境部署的事实标准工具。
summary.en: PM2 is a production-grade process manager for Node.js/Bun with built-in load balancing. It provides daemonization, zero-downtime reload, clustering, and container support. The de facto standard for Node.js production deployments with simple commands for process management and monitoring.

metadata.name: benchbase
metadata.description: Multi-DBMS SQL Benchmarking Framework via JDBC

summary.zh: BenchBase是卡内基梅隆大学开发的SQL数据库多引擎基准测试框架，通过JDBC支持PostgreSQL、MySQL、CockroachDB等主流数据库的标准化性能评估。内置TPC-C、TPC-H、YCSB等15+种基准测试，提供多线程负载生成与细粒度性能指标采集，适用于数据库性能对比、系统调优和学术研究。
summary.en: BenchBase is a multi-DBMS SQL benchmarking framework developed by CMU's database group, supporting standardized performance evaluation across PostgreSQL, MySQL, CockroachDB via JDBC. It includes 15+ benchmarks like TPC-C, TPC-H, YCSB, with multi-threaded load generation and granular performance metrics for database comparison and optimization research.

metadata.name: rust-web-app
metadata.description: Code template for a production Web Application using Axum: The AwesomeApp Blueprint for Professional Web Development.

summary.zh: 基于Axum框架的生产级Rust Web应用代码模板，提供完整的项目架构与最佳实践。集成Sea-Query ORM与modql查询过滤，支持声明式CRUD宏减少样板代码，内置ModelManager数据库事务管理。演示AI聊天Agent/Conv及多租户Org/Space组织架构，适用于构建企业级协作平台。
summary.en: A production-ready Rust web application template built with Axum, featuring Sea-Query ORM and modql for flexible query filtering. Includes declarative CRUD macros to reduce boilerplate, ModelManager with database transaction support, and demonstrates multi-tenant architecture using Org/Space constructs for building enterprise collaboration platforms.

metadata.name: SQLPage
metadata.description: Fast SQL-only data application builder. Automatically build a UI on top of SQL queries.

summary.zh: SQLPage是一个纯SQL驱动的Web应用构建器，通过简单的.sql文件定义数据库查询即可自动生成交互式数据展示界面。支持SQLite、PostgreSQL、MySQL、SQL Server及各类ODBC数据库，涵盖列表、图表、表单、卡片等UI组件，实现无需前端代码的快速数据应用开发。
summary.en: SQLPage is an SQL-only web application builder that automatically generates interactive data interfaces from simple .sql query files. It supports SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server and various ODBC databases, providing UI components like lists, charts, forms, and cards for rapid data application development without frontend coding.

metadata.name: git-cliff
metadata.description: A highly customizable Changelog Generator that follows Conventional Commit specifications ⛰️

summary.zh: git-cliff是一款用Rust开发的高度可定制化Changelog生成工具，遵循Conventional Commits规范从Git提交历史自动提取信息生成变更日志。支持自定义正则表达式解析器和模板配置，适配多种发布工作流程，已被众多开源项目采用。
summary.en: git-cliff is a highly customizable Changelog generator written in Rust that follows Conventional Commit specifications to automatically generate changelogs from Git commit history. It supports regex-powered custom parsers and flexible templating, fitting into various release workflows and adopted by many open-source projects.

metadata.name: shardingsphere
metadata.description: Empowering Data Intelligence with Distributed SQL for Sharding, Scalability, and Security Across All Databases.

summary.zh: Apache ShardingSphere是Apache顶级的分布式数据库中间件生态，提供分布式SQL引擎、水平分片、读写分离、分布式事务及数据库治理能力。其可插拔架构支持MySQL、PostgreSQL、Oracle等多种数据库，帮助企业实现数据层弹性扩展与异构数据库统一管理。
summary.en: Apache ShardingSphere is an enterprise-grade distributed database middleware ecosystem providing distributed SQL, horizontal sharding, read-write splitting, distributed transactions, and database governance. Its pluggable architecture supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, and other databases, enabling elastic data scaling and unified heterogeneous database management.

metadata.name: gpt4all
metadata.description: GPT4All: Run Local LLMs on Any Device. Open-source and available for commercial use.

summary.zh: GPT4All是一个开源项目，允许用户在普通桌面和笔记本电脑上本地运行大型语言模型，无需API调用或GPU支持。项目基于llama.cpp实现，支持Windows、macOS和Linux多平台，提供Python客户端，可用于商业用途。新版本已支持DeepSeek R1蒸馏模型。
summary.en: GPT4All is an open-source project enabling users to run large language models locally on everyday desktops and laptops without API calls or GPUs. Built on llama.cpp, it supports Windows, macOS and Linux with Python bindings, available for commercial use. The latest version supports DeepSeek R1 distillations.

metadata.name: cheat
metadata.description: cheat allows you to create and view interactive cheatsheets on the command-line. It was designed to help remind *nix system administrators of options for commands that they use frequently, but not frequently enough to remember.

summary.zh: cheat 是一个命令行交互式速查表工具，帮助 Linux/Unix 系统管理员快速查阅常用但不常记住的命令选项。支持 YAML 前置元数据定义标签和语法高亮（基于 Chroma），提供多路径管理、标签筛选和正则表达式搜索功能。社区提供大量常用命令速查表，开箱即用。
summary.en: cheat is a CLI tool for creating and viewing interactive cheatsheets, designed to help *nix sysadmins recall command options they use frequently but can't remember. It supports YAML frontmatter for tags and syntax highlighting via Chroma, offers multiple cheatpaths, tag filtering, and regex search with community-sourced sheets available.

metadata.name: portainer
metadata.description: Making Docker and Kubernetes management easy.

summary.zh: Portainer是一个轻量级容器管理平台，支持Docker、Swarm、Kubernetes和ACI环境。通过直观的Web GUI和RESTful API，用户可统一管理容器、镜像、卷、网络等资源。部署简便，仅需单个容器即可运行于任意集群，同时支持Linux和Windows容器环境。
summary.en: Portainer is a lightweight service delivery platform for managing Docker, Swarm, Kubernetes, and ACI environments. It provides an intuitive web GUI and extensive API to manage containers, images, volumes, and networks. Deployed as a single container, it runs on any cluster across Linux and Windows.

metadata.name: cassandra
metadata.description: Open source transactional distributed database. Linear scalability and proven fault-tolerance on commodity hardware or cloud infrastructure without compromising performance.

summary.zh: Apache Cassandra是一款高度可扩展的分布式NoSQL数据库，采用分区行存储架构，支持数据在多台机器间透明分布。提供类SQL的CQL查询语言，具备高可用、无单点故障、多数据中心部署等特性，适用于需要大规模、高可用性数据存储的分布式应用场景。
summary.en: Apache Cassandra is a highly scalable distributed NoSQL database featuring partitioned row storage that transparently distributes data across multiple machines. With a SQL-like CQL query language, it offers high availability, no single point of failure, and multi-datacenter deployment support, ideal for large-scale distributed applications requiring resilient data storage.

metadata.name: it-tools
metadata.description: Collection of handy online tools for developers, with great UX.

summary.zh: 面向开发者的在线工具集合网站，提供JSON处理、编码转换、加密解密、日期计算等80+常用功能，采用Vue3 + TypeScript构建，支持Docker自托管，注重用户体验与界面设计。
summary.en: A web-based collection of 80+ developer tools including JSON formatting, encoding/decoding, encryption, date calculators, and more. Built with Vue3 and TypeScript, supports Docker self-hosting, focused on exceptional UX.

metadata.name: ZLMediaKit
metadata.description: WebRTC/RTSP/RTMP/HTTP/HLS/HTTP-FLV/WebSocket-FLV/HTTP-TS/HTTP-fMP4/WebSocket-TS/WebSocket-fMP4/GB28181/SRT/STUN/TURN server and client framework based on C++11

summary.zh: ZLMediaKit是基于C++11开发的高性能运营级流媒体服务框架，支持WebRTC/RTSP/RTMP/HLS/GB28181等十余种流媒体协议并支持协议互转。采用多线程异步IO架构，单机可支持10万级客户端连接，延迟最低可达100毫秒。提供完整MediaServer服务器及C API SDK，支持全平台部署，已在商业环境长期验证。
summary.en: ZLMediaKit is a high-performance C++11 streaming media server framework supporting WebRTC/RTSP/RTMP/HLS/GB28181 and other 10+ protocols with inter-protocol conversion. Built with multi-threaded async IO architecture, it handles 100K+ concurrent connections with ultra-low latency down to 100ms. Offers complete MediaServer and C API SDK across all platforms, proven in production environments.

metadata.name: signoz
metadata.description: SigNoz is an open-source observability platform native to OpenTelemetry with logs, traces and metrics in a single application. An open-source alternative to DataDog, NewRelic, etc. 🔥 🖥.   👉  Open source Application Performance Monitoring (APM) & Observability tool

summary.zh: SigNoz是一个开源可观测性平台，原生支持OpenTelemetry，统一集成日志、追踪和指标三大功能。采用ClickHouse存储日志数据，提供开箱即用的APM图表（p99延迟、错误率、Apdex等），支持分布式追踪的Flamegraphs和Gantt Charts可视化，是DataDog、NewRelic等商业方案的开源替代品。
summary.en: SigNoz is an open-source observability platform native to OpenTelemetry, unifying logs, traces, and metrics in a single application. It uses ClickHouse for high-performance log storage and provides out-of-box APM metrics including p99 latency, error rate, and Apdex. Distributed tracing features Flamegraphs and Gantt Charts for request flow visualization, serving as an open-source alternative to Datadog and New Relic.

metadata.name: hikvision-spring-boot-starter
metadata.description: 海康威视sdk接入
