summary.zh: 基于海康威视SDK的Spring Boot Starter封装，提供设备登录、实时预览、录像回放、抓图等核心功能。通过RTSP推流方案解决Web端播放兼容性差和延迟高的问题，支持直接输出FLV流无需Nginx转推，适用于多端视频监控场景的快速集成开发。
summary.en: A Spring Boot Starter封装 for Hikvision SDK, providing device login, real-time preview, playback and screenshot capabilities. It solves web browser compatibility and high latency issues via RTSP streaming, supporting direct FLV output without nginx. Ideal for multi-platform video surveillance integration.

metadata.name: Clash-for-Windows_Chinese
metadata.description: clash for windows汉化版. 提供clash for windows的汉化版, 汉化补丁及汉化版安装程序

summary.zh: Clash for Windows的中文本地化版本，提供汉化补丁和完整安装程序。该项目通过修改Electron应用的app.asar文件（renderer.js、main.js等）实现界面汉化，支持从0.15.3到最新兼容版本，并提供Optimize优化版。内置自动更新劫持功能，可通过应用内置方式升级。
summary.en: A Chinese localization of Clash for Windows, providing localized patches and installers. This project implements UI translation by modifying app.asar files (renderer.js, main.js, etc.) in the Electron application, supporting versions from 0.15.3 to the latest compatible release, with an Optimize version available. Features built-in update hijacking for seamless upgrades.

metadata.name: forest
metadata.description: A high-level and lightweight declarative HTTP client framework for Java. it makes sending HTTP requests in Java easier.

summary.zh: Forest是Java生态的声明式HTTP客户端框架，通过注解将HTTP请求定义为本地接口方法调用，实现业务逻辑与HTTP协议解耦。支持Httpclient/OkHttp双后端引擎，提供JSON/XML/Protobuf序列化、拦截器、OAuth2认证等企业级特性，可无缝集成Spring Boot。
summary.en: Forest is a declarative HTTP client framework for Java that transforms HTTP requests into local interface method calls via annotations, decoupling business logic from HTTP protocols. Supporting dual backend engines (HttpClient/OkHttp), it provides enterprise features including JSON/XML/Protobuf serialization, interceptors, and OAuth2 authentication with seamless Spring Boot integration.

metadata.name: sensitive
metadata.description: 🔐Sensitive log tool for java, based on java annotation. (基于注解的 java 日志脱敏工具框架，更加优雅的日志打印。支持自定义哈希、支持基于 log4j2 插件的统一脱敏、支持 logback 插件统一脱敏)

summary.zh: 基于Java注解的日志脱敏框架，优雅实现敏感信息（手机号、邮箱、银行卡、身份证、密码等）自动脱敏。内置10+种脱敏策略，支持自定义哈希和脱敏条件。采用log4j2/logback插件统一脱敏，性能远超正则匹配。专为金融交易等数据安全场景设计。
summary.en: Annotation-based Java log desensitization framework that elegantly masks sensitive information including phone numbers, emails, bank cards, IDs, and passwords. Features 10+ built-in strategies, custom hashing, and condition-based desensitization. Uses log4j2/logback plugins for unified desensitization, outperforming regex matching. Designed for financial security scenarios.

metadata.name: dante-cloud
metadata.description: 🐉 Dante Cloud 国内首个支持阻塞式和响应式服务并行的微服务云原生基座。采用领域驱动模型(DDD)设计思想，以「高质量代码、低安全漏洞」为核心，高度模块化和组件化设计，支持IoT等物联网设备认证，满足国家三级等保要求、支持接口国密数字信封加解密等系列安全体系的多租户微服务解决方案。独创的“一套代码实现微服务和单体两种架构灵活切换”的企业级微服务平台。🔝🔝 点个star 持续关注更新！

summary.zh: Dante Cloud是国内首个支持阻塞式与响应式服务并行的企业级云原生微服务基座。采用领域驱动设计(DDD)，以高质量代码和低安全漏洞为核心，支持IoT物联网设备认证，满足国家三级等保要求，支持国密数字信封加解密。独创「一套代码实现微服务与单体架构灵活切换」的多租户解决方案。
summary.en: Dante Cloud is China's first enterprise-grade cloud-native microservice base supporting both blocking and reactive services. Built with DDD design, it focuses on high-quality code and low security vulnerabilities. Supports IoT device authentication, meets China's Level-3 security protection requirements, and enables SM digital envelope encryption. Unique in allowing flexible switching between microservices and monolithic architectures with a single codebase.

metadata.name: rest-assured
metadata.description: Java DSL for easy testing of REST services

summary.zh: REST Assured 是 Java 领域的 REST API 测试框架，通过简洁的 DSL 让 Java 开发者能像动态语言一样轻松测试 REST 服务。它支持 JSON/XML 响应验证、参数 headers 和 cookies 断言、内置 JsonPath 和 XmlPath 便捷解析库，并提供 Basic、OAuth 等多种认证机制，还可与 Spring Framework 无缝集成进行 MockMvc 测试。
summary.en: REST Assured is a Java DSL that simplifies REST API testing by bringing the expressiveness of dynamic languages into the Java domain. It supports JSON/XML response validation, parameters, headers, cookies and body assertions, includes built-in JsonPath and XmlPath parsers, offers multiple authentication mechanisms like Basic and OAuth, and integrates with Spring Framework for MockMvc testing.

metadata.name: sd-webui-prompt-all-in-one
metadata.description: This is an extension based on sd-webui, aimed at improving the user experience of the prompt/negative prompt input box. It has a more intuitive and powerful input interface function, and provides automatic translation, history record, and bookmarking functions.    这是一个基于 sd-webui 的扩展，旨在提高提示词/反向提示词输入框的使用体验。它拥有更直观、强大的输入界面功能，它提供了自动翻译、历史记录和收藏等功能。

summary.zh: 基于stable-diffusion-webui的提示词输入增强扩展，提供可视化分词、语法高亮、批量操作的直观界面，支持多种翻译API自动翻译提示词，集成历史记录与收藏夹功能，显著提升AI绘画的提示词编写效率。
summary.en: A stable-diffusion-webui extension enhancing prompt input with visual tokenization, syntax highlighting, and batch operations. Features auto-translation via multiple APIs, history tracking, and bookmarking to streamline AI art generation workflows.

metadata.name: DeepSeek-Coder
metadata.description: DeepSeek Coder: Let the Code Write Itself

summary.zh: DeepSeek-Coder是由DeepSeek团队开发的专业代码大语言模型系列，在2T tokens数据上从头训练，支持1B至33B多种参数规模。该模型采用16K窗口大小和fill-in-the-blank任务，实现项目级代码补全与填充功能。在HumanEval、MBPP、DS-1000等基准测试中超越CodeLlama等开源模型，性能对标GPT-3.5。
summary.en: DeepSeek-Coder is a series of specialized code large language models developed by DeepSeek, trained from scratch on 2T tokens with sizes ranging from 1B to 33B parameters. Featuring a 16K context window and fill-in-the-blank tasks, it enables project-level code completion and infilling. It outperforms CodeLlama and other open-source models on HumanEval, MBPP, and DS-1000 benchmarks, achieving competitive performance with GPT-3.5.

metadata.name: stable-diffusion-webui-wd14-tagger
metadata.description: Labeling extension for Automatic1111's Web UI

summary.zh: 为Automatic1111的Stable Diffusion WebUI开发的图像自动标签标注扩展，支持Waifu Diffusion 1.4 Tagger和DeepDanbooru等多种模型。可对单张或多张图像进行booru风格标签识别，自动提取图像内容特征，适用于AI绘画工作流的图像预处理和内容标注。
summary.en: An automatic image tagging extension for Automatic1111's Stable Diffusion WebUI, supporting multiple models including Waifu Diffusion 1.4 Tagger and DeepDanbooru. Interrogates single or multiple images with booru-style tags, extracting visual features for AI art workflow preprocessing and content annotation.

metadata.name: localstack
metadata.description: 💻 A fully functional local AWS cloud stack. Develop and test your cloud & Serverless apps offline

summary.zh: LocalStack是本地AWS云服务模拟器，可在Docker容器中运行完整的AWS云栈。支持Lambda、S3、DynamoDB、Kinesis等数十种AWS服务，允许开发者在本地离线开发和测试云应用及serverless函数，无需真实AWS账户即可验证CDK、Terraform等基础设施代码，显著提升开发效率并降低云成本。
summary.en: LocalStack is a local AWS cloud service emulator running in Docker containers, providing a fully functional local AWS stack. It supports dozens of AWS services including Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, and Kinesis, enabling developers to build and test cloud applications and serverless functions offline without real AWS credentials, significantly improving development velocity and reducing cloud costs.

metadata.name: QLExpress
metadata.description: QLExpress is a powerful, lightweight, dynamic language for the Java platform aimed at improving developers’ productivity in different business scenes.

summary.zh: 阿里巴巴开源的嵌入式Java动态脚本引擎，源自阿里电商业务规则配置需求。基于Antlr4重写，支持自定义函数和操作符、原生JSON语法、表达式执行追踪。具备安全沙箱、函数式编程、Lambda表达式等特性，解释执行不占JVM元空间，适用于优惠券规则、流程引擎、广告计费等业务规则配置场景。
summary.en: Alibaba's open-source embedded Java dynamic scripting engine derived from e-commerce business rules. Built on Antlr4, it supports custom functions/operators, native JSON syntax, and expression execution tracing. Features secure sandbox, functional programming, and Lambda expressions with interpreted execution that doesn't occupy JVM metaspace, ideal for coupon rules, workflow engines, and advertising billing scenarios.

metadata.name: docker-graalvm-maven
metadata.description: Docker image to build native Linux binaries from Java Maven projects using GraalVM native-image feature.

summary.zh: 基于Debian stable-slim的Docker镜像，集成了GraalVM CE（支持JDK 11/17/21/25）和Maven，用于将Java Maven项目通过native-image编译为原生Linux可执行文件。镜像每周自动更新以获取最新安全修复，预装Docker客户端、Git等开发工具，支持非root用户（uid 1000）运行。
summary.en: Debian-based Docker image with GraalVM CE (JDK 11/17/21/25) and Maven for compiling Java projects into native Linux executables via native-image. Auto-updated weekly with security patches, includes Docker client, Git and other dev tools, supports non-root execution (uid 1000).

metadata.name: flink-cdc
metadata.description: Flink CDC is a streaming data integration tool

summary.zh: Flink CDC是Apache开源的分布式流式数据集成工具，通过YAML定义数据管道实现数据库变更的实时捕获与同步。支持全库同步、分库分表同步、Schema演进和数据转换，可将MySQL等源数据库实时同步至Doris等目标系统，满足实时数仓建设与数据湖仓一体化需求。
summary.en: Apache Flink CDC is a distributed streaming data integration tool that captures real-time database changes via YAML-defined pipelines. It supports full database synchronization, sharded table sync, schema evolution, and data transformation, enabling real-time data movement from sources like MySQL to targets such as Doris for real-time data warehouse and lakehouse architectures.

metadata.name: rocksdb
metadata.description: A library that provides an embeddable, persistent key-value store for fast storage.

summary.zh: RocksDB是Facebook开源的嵌入式持久化键值存储库，基于LSM树结构设计，针对Flash和RAM存储进行优化。它提供写入放大因子、读取放大因子和空间放大因子之间的灵活权衡，支持多线程压缩，可高效处理TB级数据，广泛应用于数据库引擎、缓存系统等高性能存储场景。
summary.en: RocksDB is Facebook's open-source embedded persistent key-value store built on LSM-tree architecture, optimized for Flash and RAM storage. It offers flexible tradeoffs between Write-Amplification-Factor, Read-Amplification-Factor and Space-Amplification-Factor, supporting multi-threaded compaction to efficiently handle terabyte-scale data across database engines and caching systems.

metadata.name: MooTool
metadata.description: Handy tool set for developers. 开发者常备小工具

summary.zh: MooTool是一款跨平台开发者工具箱，提供随手记(代码高亮)、JSON处理、HTTP请求、编解码、加解密、时间戳转换、二维码、计算器、网络工具、调色板等十余种开发常用功能，采用JavaFX开发，支持Windows、Linux、macOS系统运行。
summary.en: MooTool is a cross-platform developer toolkit featuring code note-taking with syntax highlighting, JSON processing, HTTP requests, encoding/decoding, encryption/decryption, timestamp conversion, QR codes, calculator, network tools, and color picker. Built with JavaFX, it runs on Windows, Linux, and macOS.

metadata.name: rocketmq-flink
metadata.description: RocketMQ integration for Apache Flink. This module includes the RocketMQ source and sink that allows a flink job to either write messages into a topic or read from topics in a flink job.

summary.zh: RocketMQ-Flink是Apache RocketMQ与Apache Flink的官方集成模块，提供Source和Sink连接器实现。该模块基于Pull Consumer模式实现Source，支持Flink Checkpoint下的Exactly-Once语义；Sink端通过批量刷新机制提供At-Least-Once可靠性保证。内置通用序列化Schema和TopicSelector接口，开发者可灵活定义消息键值对序列化及Topic/Tag路由策略，适用于实时数据管道、流式ETL及事件驱动架构等场景。
summary.en: RocketMQ-Flink is the official integration module connecting Apache RocketMQ with Apache Flink, providing source and sink connectors for bidirectional data streaming. The source implements a pull-based consumer with exactly-once semantics when Flink checkpointing is enabled, while the sink guarantees at-least-once delivery through batch flush mechanisms. It offers flexible serialization schemas and topic selectors for custom key-value serialization and message routing, ideal for real-time data pipelines, streaming ETL, and event-driven architectures.

metadata.name: tech-interview-handbook
metadata.description: Curated coding interview preparation materials for busy software engineers

summary.zh: 由 Blind 75 作者创建的技术面试prep handbook，收录超100万人使用。提供算法cheatsheet、Grind 75精选题库、简历指南、行为问题等全流程资源，涵盖从投简历到薪资谈判的每个环节，是忙碌工程师的高效面试准备指南。
summary.en: Created by the author of Blind 75, this handbook has helped 1M+ engineers ace tech interviews. It offers curated algorithm cheatsheets, Grind 75 question sets, resume guides, and behavioral questions covering the full interview journey from application to offer negotiation.

metadata.name: Stable-Diffusion-Webui-Civitai-Helper
metadata.description: Stable Diffusion Webui Extension for Civitai, to manage your model much more easily.

summary.zh: Stable Diffusion WebUI 扩展，用于简化 Civitai 模型管理。支持扫描本地模型自动获取 SHA256 哈希并从 Civitai 获取模型信息和预览图；通过 Civitai URL 直接下载模型（支持断点续传）；检测模型新版本；增强 Extra Network 卡片，添加触发词和提示词快捷按钮。
summary.en: Stable Diffusion WebUI extension for streamlined Civitai model management. Scans local models to generate SHA256 hashes and retrieve model info/previews from Civitai; downloads models directly via Civitai URL with resume support; checks for new versions; enhances Extra Network cards with trigger word and prompt shortcuts.

metadata.name: debezium
metadata.description: Change data capture for a variety of databases. Please log issues at https://github.com/debezium/dbz/issues.

summary.zh: Debezium是一个开源的变更数据捕获(CDC)平台，基于Kafka Connect构建，可实时监控数据库变更并以低延迟流式传输到Kafka。支持MySQL、PostgreSQL、MongoDB、Oracle、SQL Server等多种数据库，提供Exactly-Once或At-Least-Once语义，确保事件可靠传递且应用可随时重启消费。
summary.en: Debezium is an open-source change data capture platform built on Kafka Connect that monitors databases in real-time and streams row-level changes to Kafka with low latency. It supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Oracle, SQL Server and more, providing exactly-once or at-least-once delivery semantics for reliable event streaming with fault tolerance.

metadata.name: KeyDB
metadata.description: A Multithreaded Fork of Redis

summary.zh: KeyDB 是由 Snap Inc 开发的高性能 Redis 分支，专注于多线程、内存效率和高吞吐量。除性能提升外，还提供 Active Replication、FLASH 存储和子键过期功能。其 MVCC 架构允许执行 KEYS 和 SCAN 而不阻塞数据库，完全兼容 Redis 协议和脚本，是理想的直接替代方案。
summary.en: KeyDB is a high-performance Redis fork developed by Snap Inc, focusing on multithreading, memory efficiency, and high throughput. Beyond performance gains, it offers Active Replication, FLASH storage, and subkey expires. Its MVCC architecture enables non-blocking KEYS and SCAN operations while maintaining full Redis protocol and script compatibility as a seamless drop-in replacement.

metadata.name: rocketmq-mqtt
metadata.description: Apache rocketmq

summary.zh: RocketMQ-MQTT是Apache RocketMQ的MQTT协议扩展实现，使RocketMQ能够支持物联网设备和移动APP等终端消息的接入与收发。基于RocketMQ统一消息存储引擎构建，需配合轻量级消息队列(LMQ)使用，适用于IoT物联网、移动消息推送等场景。
summary.en: RocketMQ-MQTT extends Apache RocketMQ with MQTT protocol support, enabling message ingestion from IoT devices and mobile apps. Built on RocketMQ's unified storage engine with Light Message Queue (LMQ) integration, ideal for IoT and mobile messaging scenarios.

metadata.name: WinMemoryCleaner
metadata.description: This free RAM cleaner uses native Windows features to optimize memory areas. It's a compact, portable, and smart application.

summary.zh: WinMemoryCleaner 是一款免费 Windows 内存清理优化工具，利用原生 Windows API 释放应用程序未正确释放的内存，从而提升系统性能。该便携式应用无需安装，支持自动优化（定时/阈值触发）、全局热键、系统托盘、多语言界面等功能，兼容 Windows XP 至 11 及 Server 2003 至 2025。
summary.en: WinMemoryCleaner is a free Windows RAM cleaner that uses native Windows APIs to optimize memory areas by releasing improperly allocated memory, improving system performance. This portable application requires no installation but needs administrator privileges. It features auto-optimization, global hotkeys, system tray support, and multi-language interface, compatible with Windows XP to 11 and Server 2003 to 2025.

metadata.name: dynamic-datasource
metadata.description: dynamic datasource for springboot 多数据源 动态数据源 主从分离 读写分离 分布式事务

summary.zh: dynamic-datasource-spring-boot-starter 是由 baomidou 提供的 Spring Boot 多数据源动态切换组件。核心功能包括数据源分组（读写分离、一主多从、混合模式）、敏感配置加密、动态增减数据源、多层嵌套切换、基于 Seata 的分布式事务支持。兼容 Spring Boot 1.5.x 至 4.x 版本，集成 Druid、HikariCp、BeeCp 等主流连接池。
summary.en: dynamic-datasource-spring-boot-starter is a Spring Boot component by baomyelitis for dynamic multi-datasource management. Key features include datasource grouping (read-write separation, master-slave, hybrid mode), sensitive config encryption, dynamic add/remove datasources, nested switching, and Seata-based distributed transaction support. Compatible with Spring Boot 1.5.x to 4.x, integrated with Druid, HikariCp, BeeCp.

metadata.name: jetcache
metadata.description: JetCache is a Java cache framework.

summary.zh: JetCache是阿里巴巴开源的Java缓存抽象框架，提供统一的Cache API和比Spring Cache更强大的声明式缓存注解。支持TTL过期、双层缓存（本地+远程）、分布式自动刷新和分布式锁。可集成Redis、Caffeine等缓存实现，支持缓存统计、自定义键值序列化器及Spring Boot集成。
summary.en: JetCache is an Alibaba open-source Java cache abstraction framework providing unified Cache API and declarative caching annotations more powerful than Spring Cache. It supports TTL, two-level caching, distributed auto-refresh and distributed locking, with implementations for Redis, Caffeine, and more. Features include cache statistics, custom serialization, and Spring Boot integration.

metadata.name: influxdb
metadata.description: Scalable datastore for metrics, events, and real-time analytics

summary.zh: InfluxDB 3 Core是InfluxData推出的第三代时序数据库，专为指标、事件和实时分析场景设计。采用无磁盘架构支持对象存储，具备毫秒级查询性能（last-value查询<10ms），内置嵌入式Python VM用于插件开发，支持Parquet文件持久化。提供SQL查询引擎（FlightSQL/HTTP）与InfluxQL双查询模式，兼容InfluxDB 1.x/2.x写入API，适用于传感器监控、服务器监控、应用性能监控、金融分析及行为分析等场景。
summary.en: InfluxDB 3 Core is InfluxData's third-generation time-series database designed for metrics, events, and real-time analytics. Featuring a diskless architecture with object storage support, it delivers sub-10ms query response for last-value queries. The embedded Python VM enables plugin development, while Parquet file persistence ensures efficient data handling. Dual query engines (SQL via FlightSQL/HTTP and InfluxQL) provide full backward compatibility with InfluxDB 1.x/2.x APIs, ideal for sensor monitoring, server/APM, network monitoring, financial analytics, and behavioral analysis.

metadata.name: vector
metadata.description: A high-performance observability data pipeline.

summary.zh: Vector 是由 Datadog 维护的高性能可观测性数据管道，基于 Rust 构建。作为端到端解决方案，可同时作为 Agent 和 Aggregator 部署。支持日志、指标和追踪的统一收集、转换与路由，比同类工具快达 10 倍。被 Atlassian、T-Mobile、Comcast 等知名企业用于生产环境，每天处理海量可观测性数据。
summary.en: Vector is a high-performance observability data pipeline built in Rust, maintained by Datadog. Deployable as both agent and aggregator, it unifies collection, transformation, and routing for logs, metrics, and traces. Up to 10x faster than alternatives, used in production by companies like Atlassian, T-Mobile, and Comcast for massive-scale observability data processing.

metadata.name: openjob
metadata.description: Distributed high performance task scheduling framework

summary.zh: Openjob 是一个高性能分布式任务调度框架，采用 Master/Worker 架构和一致性分片算法实现无锁设计，支持 cron 定时任务、秒级任务、延迟任务、工作流调度及轻量级分布式计算。具备可视化 DAG 工作流、权限管理、告警监控和任务日志存储（支持 H2/MySQL/Elasticsearch），支持 Java、Go、PHP、Python 等多语言，兼容 MySQL/PostgreSQL/Oracle 数据库，可无限水平扩展。
summary.en: Openjob is a high-performance distributed task scheduling framework using Master/Worker architecture with consistent sharding algorithm for lock-free design. It supports cron jobs, second-level tasks, delay tasks, workflow scheduling, and lightweight distributed computing. Features visual DAG workflow, permission management, alarm monitoring, and task log storage (H2/MySQL/Elasticsearch). Supports Java, Go, PHP, Python with MySQL/PostgreSQL/Oracle compatibility and unlimited horizontal scaling.

metadata.name: azkaban
metadata.description: Azkaban workflow manager.

summary.zh: Azkaban是由LinkedIn开源的工作流调度管理系统，支持复杂任务依赖编排、定时调度和可视化监控。采用Java开发，提供Web UI界面，适用于大数据ETL任务调度、批量作业管理等场景。
summary.en: Azkaban is an open-source workflow scheduling system developed by LinkedIn. It manages complex job dependencies, provides scheduled execution and visual monitoring through a web-based UI. Built with Java, it's ideal for data pipeline orchestration, ETL job scheduling, and batch processing workflows.

metadata.name: iot-benchmark
metadata.description: IoT-benchmark is a tool for benchmarking TSDB in IoT scenario.

summary.zh: IoT-Benchmark是专门用于评估时序数据库在工业物联网场景下性能的开源基准测试工具。支持IoTDB、InfluxDB、TimescaleDB、TDengine等12+种主流TSDB，提供数据生成、写入、查询、正确性验证等综合测试能力，支持结果可视化和多形式报告输出。
summary.en: IoT-Benchmark is an open-source benchmarking tool designed for evaluating time series database performance in Industrial IoT scenarios. It supports 12+ mainstream TSDBs including IoTDB, InfluxDB, TimescaleDB, and TDengine, providing comprehensive testing capabilities such as data generation, write/query testing, correctness verification, and result visualization.

metadata.name: TechStack
metadata.description: The extension will display the tech stack of the Repo when the user visits a GitHub Public Repo. The user can easily get more info about the repo. 当用户访问 GitHub 公共存储库时，该扩展将显示存储库的技术栈。 用户可以更轻松地获取有关存储库的更多信息。

summary.zh: Tech Stack是一款浏览器扩展，在用户访问GitHub公共仓库时自动识别并展示该仓库使用的技术栈。通过分析代码结构、依赖配置文件等，帮助开发者快速了解项目技术组成。支持Chrome、Firefox、Edge三大主流浏览器，永久免费开源。
summary.en: Tech Stack is a browser extension that automatically identifies and displays the tech stack of GitHub repositories when users visit them. By analyzing code structure and dependency configuration files, it helps developers quickly understand project technologies. Supports Chrome, Firefox, and Edge, free and open source forever.

metadata.name: airflow
metadata.description: Apache Airflow - A platform to programmatically author, schedule, and monitor workflows

summary.zh: Apache Airflow 是一个用 Python 编写的开源工作流编排平台，支持通过代码定义 DAG（有向无环图）工作流，实现任务的调度、执行和监控。广泛应用于数据管道、ETL 任务和批处理流程编排，具备高度可扩展性和丰富的集成生态。
summary.en: Apache Airflow is an open-source workflow orchestration platform written in Python, enabling programmatic authoring, scheduling, and monitoring of workflows defined as DAGs. Widely used for data pipelines, ETL jobs, and batch processing with high extensibility and a rich ecosystem of integrations.

metadata.name: AnotherRedisDesktopManager
metadata.description: 🚀🚀🚀A faster, better and more stable Redis desktop manager [GUI client], compatible with Linux, Windows, Mac.

summary.zh: 一款更快、更好、更稳定的Redis桌面管理GUI客户端，兼容Linux、Windows和Mac三大平台。其核心优势在于加载海量keys时不崩溃，提供流畅的数据库管理体验，支持键值浏览、命令执行、日志监控等功能。
summary.en: A faster, better and more stable Redis desktop GUI client compatible with Linux, Windows, and Mac. Its core advantage is handling massive keys without crashing, offering smooth database management with key browsing, command execution, and log monitoring capabilities.

metadata.name: dolphinscheduler
metadata.description: Apache DolphinScheduler is the modern data orchestration platform. Agile to create high performance workflow with low-code

summary.zh: Apache DolphinScheduler是Apache顶级开源的现代化数据编排平台，支持低代码创建高性能工作流。采用去中心化多主多Worker架构，提供高可用和水平扩展能力。支持Web UI、Python SDK和Open API管理任务，日处理能力达数千万级。内置丰富任务类型，覆盖主流数据源，兼容Standalone、Cluster、Docker、Kubernetes四种部署模式。
summary.en: Apache DolphinScheduler is an Apache top-level open source modern data orchestration platform enabling low-code development of high-performance workflows. Built with decentralized multi-master and multi-worker architecture for high availability and horizontal scaling. Supports task management via Web UI, Python SDK and Open API, handling tens of millions of tasks daily. Features rich built-in task types covering major data sources with deployment modes including Standalone, Cluster, Docker and Kubernetes.

metadata.name: magic-api
metadata.description: magic-api 是一个接口快速开发框架，通过Web页面编写脚本以及配置，自动映射为HTTP接口，无需定义Controller、Service、Dao、Mapper、XML、VO等Java对象

summary.zh: magic-api是一款基于Java的接口快速开发框架，通过Web可视化界面编写脚本即可自动生成HTTP接口，无需定义Controller、Service等Java类。支持MySQL、PostgreSQL、Redis等多种数据库，采用magic-script脚本引擎实现动态编译、实时发布，提供代码提示、在线调试、事务支持等企业级功能，显著提升API开发效率。
summary.en: magic-api is a Java-based rapid API development framework that automatically generates HTTP interfaces through web-based script editing, eliminating the need for traditional Java classes. Supporting multiple databases like MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Redis, it uses magic-script engine for dynamic compilation and real-time publishing, offering enterprise features like code completion, online debugging, and transaction support to dramatically improve API development efficiency.

metadata.name: hcaptcha-challenger
metadata.description: 🥂 Gracefully face hCaptcha challenge with multimodal large language model.

summary.zh: 基于多模态大语言模型的hCaptcha挑战自动解题工具，不依赖第三方打码服务或浏览器脚本。通过ResNet、YOLOv8、ViT、CLIP等ONNX模型实现图像二分类、目标点检测、边界框分割、零样本多选及拖拽验证等多种挑战类型的AI自动解答，支持Agentic工作流与空间思维链推理。
summary.en: An hCaptcha challenge solver using multimodal large language models without third-party services. Leverages ONNX models including ResNet, YOLOv8, ViT, and CLIP for image classification, point/bounding box detection, zero-shot multiple-choice, and drag-drop verification. Supports agentic workflows with spatial chain-of-thought reasoning.

metadata.name: optimizer
metadata.description: The finest Windows Optimizer

summary.zh: 一款功能全面的Windows系统隐私安全配置工具，支持24种语言。可禁用Windows/Office遥测、Cortana、自动更新，清理系统及浏览器数据，管理DNS和HOSTS文件，提供硬件检测、进程管理、自动化模板等特性。适用于Windows 7至11及服务器系统，需.NET Framework 4.8.1运行。
summary.en: A comprehensive Windows privacy and security configuration utility with 24-language support. Disables Windows/Office telemetry, Cortana, and auto-updates; cleans system and browser data; manages DNS and HOSTS files; provides hardware inspection, process management, and automation templates. Compatible with Windows 7-11 and servers, requires .NET Framework 4.8.1.

metadata.name: Stirling-PDF
metadata.description: #1 PDF Application on GitHub that lets you edit PDFs on any device anywhere

summary.zh: Stirling PDF是GitHub排名第一的开源PDF处理平台，支持桌面端、浏览器和自托管服务器部署。提供50+PDF工具，包括编辑、合并、分割、签名、编辑、转换、OCR、压缩等。具备REST API、企业级SSO认证、审计日志和无代码工作流自动化，支持40+语言，本地化处理保障数据隐私。
summary.en: The #1 open-source PDF processing platform on GitHub, Stirling PDF supports desktop, browser, and self-hosted server deployment. Offers 50+ PDF tools including editing, merging, splitting, signing, redacting, converting, OCR, and compression. Features REST APIs, enterprise SSO, audit logging, and no-code workflow automation across 40+ languages with full local processing for data privacy.

metadata.name: Bangumi
metadata.description: :electron: An unofficial https://bgm.tv ui first app client for Android and iOS, built with React Native. 一个无广告、以爱好为驱动、不以盈利为目的、专门做 ACG 的类似豆瓣的追番记录，bgm.tv 第三方客户端。为移动端重新设计，内置大量加强的网页端难以实现的功能，且提供了相当的自定义选项。 目前已适配 iOS / Android。

summary.zh: 基于React Native开发的非官方Bangumi第三方移动客户端，提供番剧、游戏、音乐等ACG内容的进度管理与发现功能。内置自定义CDN加速层提升数据加载稳定性，支持iOS/Android双平台，涵盖100+页面，涵盖条目、时光机、超展开等核心社区功能，并提供照片墙、AI推荐等增强特性。
summary.en: An unofficial React Native mobile client for Bangumi (bgm.tv), providing tracking and discovery for anime, games, and music content. Features self-built CDN acceleration for stable data loading, supports iOS/Android platforms with 100+ pages, covering subjects, timeline, rakuen, and enhanced features like photo walls and AI recommendations.

metadata.name: mind-map
metadata.description: SimpleMindMap（思绪思维导图）：一个强大的思维导图。A powerful mind map.

summary.zh: 思绪思维导图是一个强大的Web思维导图库和应用，采用纯JS开发、插件化架构。支持逻辑结构图、组织结构图、时间轴等多种图表结构，节点支持富文本、图片、公式等内容。提供导出PNG/SVG/PDF等格式，配套跨平台桌面客户端及Obsidian、UTools插件。
summary.en: SimpleMindMap is a powerful web mind map library and application built with pure JavaScript. It features a plugin-based architecture, supports multiple diagram structures including logic diagrams, org charts, and timelines. Nodes support rich text, images, and formulas. Exports to PNG/SVG/PDF formats, with cross-platform desktop client and plugins for Obsidian and UTools.

metadata.name: gkd
metadata.description: 基于无障碍，高级选择器，订阅规则的自定义屏幕点击安卓应用 | An Android APP with custom screen tapping based on Accessibility, Advanced Selectors, and Subscription Rules

summary.zh: 基于Android无障碍服务API实现的自动化屏幕点击应用。通过自定义高级选择器（类CSS语法）精准定位UI节点，支持订阅远程规则实现自动化操作。适用于跳过广告、简化重复操作等场景，需自行配置规则或订阅第三方规则库。
summary.en: An Android automation app leveraging Accessibility API for custom screen tapping. Uses advanced CSS-like selectors for precise UI node targeting with subscription-based remote rule support. Ideal for ad-skipping and workflow automation, requiring user-configured or subscribed rules.

metadata.name: RedisInsight
metadata.description: Redis GUI by Redis

summary.zh: Redis官方推出的可视化数据库管理工具，基于Electron和Monaco Editor构建。支持键值数据浏览、JSON/列表/哈希等结构CRUD、实时命令分析、性能优化建议、SlowLog查询、Pub/Sub交互及Workbench智能命令补全。提供桌面端和Docker部署，内置教程帮助学习Redis模块（Search、JSON、Time-Series、向量搜索等）的高级功能。
summary.en: The official Redis visual database management tool built with Electron and Monaco Editor. It supports key-value data browsing, CRUD operations for JSON/lists/hashes, real-time command profiling, performance optimization recommendations, SlowLog analysis, Pub/Sub interaction, and Workbench with intelligent auto-completion. Available as desktop app or Docker container, featuring tutorials for Redis modules including Search, JSON, Time-Series, and vector search.

metadata.name: keyviz
metadata.description: Keyviz is a free and open-source tool to visualize your keystrokes ⌨️ and 🖱️ mouse actions in real-time.

summary.zh: Keyviz是一款免费开源的键鼠操作可视化工具，可实时显示键盘按键和鼠标点击、滚动、拖拽等动作。支持完整自定义样式、颜色、布局、过滤规则和动画效果。专为教程录制、演示展示、远程协作等场景设计，让观众清晰了解快捷键操作。采用Tauri框架开发，支持Windows、macOS和Linux系统。
summary.en: Keyviz is a free and open-source keystroke and mouse action visualizer that displays keyboard presses, mouse clicks, scrolls, and drags in real-time. It offers full customization of styling, colors, layout, filters, and animations. Designed for tutorials, presentations, and remote collaboration to help audiences clearly see shortcut operations. Built with Tauri, supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux.

metadata.name: timescaledb
metadata.description: A time-series database for high-performance real-time analytics packaged as a Postgres extension

summary.zh: TimescaleDB 是 PostgreSQL 的时序数据库扩展，专为高频写入和实时分析场景设计。它通过 hypertable（超表）实现自动分区，结合列式存储提升分析查询性能，完美兼容 PostgreSQL 生态。适用于 IoT 监控、金融行情、应用性能监测等大规模时序数据处理领域。
summary.en: TimescaleDB is a PostgreSQL extension for time-series data, engineered for high-throughput writes and real-time analytics. It uses hypertables for automatic partitioning and columnar storage for analytical query acceleration, fully compatible with the PostgreSQL ecosystem. Ideal for IoT monitoring, financial trading, and APM use cases.

metadata.name: questdb
metadata.description: QuestDB is a high performance, open-source, time-series database

summary.zh: QuestDB是高性能开源时序数据库，采用列式存储、向量化执行与SIMD加速技术。提供WAL到Parquet多层存储架构，实现低延迟SQL查询与实时数据摄取。专注金融tick数据、传感器遥测及实时监控场景，支持Postgres协议，Apache 2.0开源许可。
summary.en: QuestDB is a high-performance open-source time-series database leveraging column-oriented storage, vectorized execution, and SIMD acceleration. It features a multi-tier storage engine from WAL to Parquet, delivering low-latency SQL queries and real-time ingestion. Specialized for financial tick data, sensor telemetry, and real-time monitoring, with Postgres protocol compatibility and Apache 2.0 licensing.

metadata.name: rustdesk
metadata.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

summary.zh: Rust编写的开源远程桌面软件，可自托管作为TeamViewer替代方案。开箱即用，支持Windows、Linux、macOS、Android及iOS多平台，用户完全掌控数据安全，支持部署自有中继服务器。
summary.en: Open-source remote desktop written in Rust, self-hostable alternative to TeamViewer. Works out of the box across Windows, Linux, macOS, Android and iOS with full data control and optional self-deployed relay servers.

metadata.name: clickvisual
metadata.description: A lightweight log analytic and data visualize platform  built on clickhouse.

summary.zh: ClickVisual是一个基于ClickHouse构建的轻量级日志分析可视化平台，支持SQL日志查询、可视化仪表板、告警处理和DAG工作流，提供VSCode风格配置面板，支持GitHub/GitLab认证，可通过kubectl一键部署。
summary.en: ClickVisual is a lightweight log analytics and visualization platform built on ClickHouse, supporting SQL log queries, visual dashboards, alarm processing, and DAG workflows with VSCode-style configuration panel, GitHub/GitLab auth, and kubectl one-click deployment.

metadata.name: Jpom
metadata.description: 【dromara】🚀简而轻的低侵入式在线构建、自动部署、日常运维、项目监控软件

summary.zh: 简而轻的低侵入式在线构建、自动部署、日常运维与项目监控软件。提供CI/CD流水线、Docker容器管理、SSH终端、nginx配置管理、多用户权限控制及异常自动报警等核心功能，适用于开发团队自运维场景。
summary.en: A lightweight, low-intrusive online build, automated deployment, operations management and project monitoring tool. It provides CI/CD pipelines, Docker container management, SSH terminal, nginx config management, multi-user permission control, and automatic anomaly alerting for dev teams.

metadata.name: podman
metadata.description: Podman: A tool for managing OCI containers and pods.

summary.zh: Podman 是一个无守护进程的 OCI 容器和 Pod 管理工具，基于 libpod 库构建。支持 OCI 和 Docker 镜像格式，提供完整的容器生命周期管理、网络隔离和资源管理。可在 Linux 上无 root 权限运行，也可通过 VM 在 Mac 和 Windows 上使用，提供 Docker 兼容 CLI 和 REST API。
summary.en: Podman is a daemonless OCI container and Pod management tool built on libpod library. It supports OCI and Docker image formats, provides complete container lifecycle management, network isolation and resource management. Runs rootless on Linux and via VM on Mac/Windows, offering Docker-compatible CLI and REST API.

metadata.name: YgoMaster
metadata.description: Offline Yu-Gi-Oh! Master Duel

summary.zh: YgoMaster 是一个 Yu-Gi-Oh! Master Duel 离线模组，允许玩家在不连接官方服务器的情况下创建卡组、开包、参与单人内容、自定义CPU对战和PvP对战。支持YDK/YDKe卡组导入导出、回放功能，并附带约6000副游戏卡组数据。完全离线运行，无需Steam即可使用。
summary.en: YgoMaster is an offline mod for Yu-Gi-Oh! Master Duel enabling deck creation, pack opening, solo content, custom CPU duels and PvP without official servers. Supports YDK/YDKe imports, replay functionality and ~6000 pre-built decks. Runs fully offline without Steam dependency.

metadata.name: hello-algo
metadata.description: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

summary.zh: 《Hello 算法》是一部开源免费的数据结构与算法入门教程，采用动画图解方式讲解，代码支持Python、Java、C++、Go等13种编程语言，一键运行便于实践。提供简中、繁中、英、日四种语言版本，适合算法初学者入门学习。
summary.en: Hello Algo is an open-source, free data structures and algorithms tutorial featuring animated illustrations with runnable code in 13 programming languages including Python, Java, C++, and Go. Available in Simplified/Traditional Chinese, English, and Japanese, it's ideal for beginners.

metadata.name: SMS4J
metadata.description: 让简单的事情回归简单的本质。 SMS4J为短信聚合框架，帮您轻松集成多家短信服务，解决接入多个短信SDK的繁琐流程。 目前已接入数家常见的短信服务商，后续将会继续集成。后续的版本中我们还将推出更多的相关功能 你的 ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️Star⭐️⭐️ ⭐️，是我的动力！如果你觉得还不错，请点上一颗小星星

summary.zh: SMS4J是Dromara开源的短信聚合框架，基于Spring Boot Starter设计，通过统一API集成阿里云、腾讯云、华为云等20+家短信服务商。开发者仅需配置yml即可一键切换短信厂商，无需修改业务代码，极大降低了多短信SDK的集成成本和维护复杂度。
summary.en: SMS4J is an SMS aggregation framework developed by Dromara, built on Spring Boot Starter. It unifiedly integrates 20+ SMS providers including Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud, and Huawei Cloud through a consistent API. Developers can switch vendors by configuring YAML without code changes, significantly reducing integration costs and maintenance complexity.

metadata.name: ClickHouse
metadata.description: ClickHouse® is a real-time analytics database management system

summary.zh: ClickHouse是一个开源列式数据库管理系统，专注于实时OLAP分析场景。采用向量化执行引擎和列式存储架构，支持PB级数据秒级查询性能，广泛应用于用户行为分析、日志处理等大数据场景。
summary.en: ClickHouse is an open-source column-oriented DBMS designed for real-time OLAP analytics. It features vectorized execution engine and columnar storage architecture, delivering sub-second query performance on petabyte-scale data for analytics and logging workloads.

metadata.name: nginx_upstream_check_module
metadata.description: Health checks upstreams for nginx

summary.zh: 为Nginx upstream提供主动健康检查的模块。支持TCP、HTTP、SSL_HELLO、MySQL、AJP、FastCGI等多种协议检测，可配置检查间隔、故障次数、成功次数和超时时间。自动将故障服务器标记为down，实现后端故障自动转移，提升系统高可用性。
summary.en: An Nginx module providing active health checking for upstream servers. Supports multiple protocols including TCP, HTTP, SSL_HELLO, MySQL, AJP, and FastCGI with configurable check interval, fall/rise counts and timeout. Automatically marks failed servers as down, enabling automatic failover and improving system availability.

metadata.name: hmily
metadata.description: Distributed transaction solutions

summary.zh: Hmily是金融级分布式事务解决方案，采用TCC（Try-Confirm-Cancel）模式实现。提供零侵入式Spring-Boot/Spring-Namespace集成，支持Dubbo、SpringCloud、Motan等主流RPC框架。具备高可靠性（异常自动回滚、定时恢复防悬挂）、高性能（去中心化设计天然支持集群）、可观测性（ metrics监控+管理后台UI）。存储层支持MySQL、Oracle、MongoDB、Redis、Zookeeper等，适用于微服务架构下的跨服务事务一致性场景。
summary.en: Hmily is a financial-grade distributed transaction solution implementing TCC (Try-Confirm-Cancel) pattern. It offers zero-intrusive Spring-Boot/Spring-Namespace integration with support for mainstream RPC frameworks including Dubbo, SpringCloud, and Motan. Features high reliability (automatic rollback, timed recovery), high performance (decentralized cluster-native design), and observability (metrics monitoring + admin UI). Storage backends include MySQL, Oracle, MongoDB, Redis, and Zookeeper, ideal for cross-service transaction consistency in microservices architectures.

metadata.name: juicefs
metadata.description: JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

summary.zh: JuiceFS 是基于 Redis 和 S3 构建的高性能分布式 POSIX 文件系统，专为云原生环境设计。数据存储于对象存储，元数据支持 Redis、MySQL、TiKV 等多种引擎。具备完整 POSIX 兼容性、Hadoop 生态集成、Kubernetes CSI 驱动、强一致性及毫秒级延迟等特性，无需修改代码即可将海量云存储用作本地存储，适用于大数据、机器学习、AI 等场景。
summary.en: JuiceFS is a high-performance distributed POSIX file system built on Redis and S3, designed for cloud-native environments. It stores data in object storage with flexible metadata engines including Redis, MySQL, and TiKV. Offering full POSIX compatibility, Hadoop ecosystem integration, Kubernetes CSI driver, strong consistency, and millisecond-level latency, it enables massive cloud storage to be used as efficiently as local storage without code modification for big data, ML, and AI workloads.

metadata.name: seaweedfs
metadata.description: SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system for object storage (S3), file systems, and Iceberg tables, designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.

summary.zh: SeaweedFS 是一个高性能分布式存储系统，专为数十亿级文件的海量数据场景设计。核心实现 O(1) 磁盘查找效率，支持云分层和纠删码。提供 S3 API、S3 Gateway、Hadoop、WebDAV 等多协议接入，支持 Kubernetes 部署、FUSE 挂载和跨数据中心复制。适用于对象存储、文件系统和数据湖场景。
summary.en: SeaweedFS is a high-performance distributed storage system designed for massive-scale data with billions of files. It achieves O(1) disk seek efficiency with cloud tiering and erasure coding support. Offers multi-protocol access including S3 API, S3 Gateway, Hadoop, and WebDAV, with Kubernetes deployment, FUSE mounting, and cross-datacenter replication. Ideal for object storage, file systems, and data lakes.

metadata.name: githunt
metadata.description: Hunt the most starred projects on any date on GitHub

summary.zh: GitHunt是一个React开发的Web应用兼Chrome扩展，帮助用户发现GitHub上任意日期的热门项目。它提供周度趋势榜单，支持列表/网格两种视图展示，并允许按编程语言筛选项目，适合开发者追踪开源趋势。
summary.en: GitHunt is a React-based web application and Chrome extension that helps users discover the most starred GitHub projects on any date. It provides weekly trending rankings with list and grid view options, plus language filtering, ideal for developers to track open-source trends.

metadata.name: kuboard-press
metadata.description: Kuboard 是基于 Kubernetes 的微服务管理界面。同时提供 Kubernetes 免费中文教程，入门教程，最新版本的 Kubernetes v1.23.4 安装手册，(k8s install) 在线答疑，持续更新。

summary.zh: Kuboard是一款专为Kubernetes设计的免费管理界面，兼容1.13+版本。提供多集群管理、细粒度权限控制、微服务分层展示、图形化工作负载编辑等核心功能。内置基于Prometheus/Grafana的监控套件和Loki日志套件，支持NFS/CephFS存储，已被1000+企业应用于生产环境。
summary.en: Kuboard is a free Kubernetes management UI compatible with version 1.13+. It offers multi-cluster management, fine-grained permission control, microservices layer visualization, and graphical workload editing. Built-in monitoring suite via Prometheus/Grafana and logging via Loki support NFS/CephFS storage, serving 1000+ enterprises in production.

metadata.name: fastdfs
metadata.description: FastDFS is a high performance distributed file system (DFS). It's major functions include: file storing, file syncing and file accessing, and design for high capacity and load balance. Wechat/Weixin public account (Chinese Language): fastdfs

summary.zh: FastDFS是高性能分布式文件系统,专为高容量和负载均衡场景设计。采用Tracker调度器与Storage存储节点双角色架构,支持文件存储、同步与访问,无需传统元数据服务器。具备无单点故障、数据冗余备份、小文件合并存储、Nginx模块集成、多线程断点续传等特性,广泛用于图片视频分享平台及网站内容存储。
summary.en: FastDFS is a high-performance distributed file system designed for high capacity and load balancing. Featuring dual-role architecture with tracker and storage nodes, it enables file storage, syncing and access without traditional meta server. Key features include no single point of failure, data redundancy, merged small file storage, nginx module integration and multi-threaded resume upload/download, widely used in photo/video sharing platforms and web content storage.

metadata.name: spring-enhanced-cache
metadata.description: Project to enhance spring cache

summary.zh: Spring缓存增强框架，通过延迟缓存清除机制解决高并发下的缓存击穿和一致性问题。无需侵入业务代码，配置@CacheEvict的cacheManager即可实现延迟删缓存，提供Debug日志便于问题排查。
summary.en: A Spring cache enhancement framework that solves cache stampede and consistency issues in high concurrency scenarios via delayed cache eviction. Non-invasive to business code, simply configure cacheManager in @CacheEvict to enable delayed cache clearing with debug logging support.

metadata.name: sagacity-sqltoy
metadata.description: Java真正智慧的ORM框架，融合JPA功能和最佳的sql编写及查询模式、独创的缓存翻译、最优化的分页、并提供无限层级分组汇总、同比环比、行列转换、树形排序汇总、sql自适配不同数据库、分库分表、多租户、数据加解密、脱敏以及面向复杂业务和大规模数据分析等痛点、难点问题项目实践经验分享的一站式解决方案!

summary.zh: Sagacity-SQLToy是Java智慧型ORM框架，深度融合JPA功能与强大查询能力。独创缓存翻译替代LIKE模糊查询，支持跨数据库SQL自动适配，提供分组汇总、行列转换、同比环比、树形汇总等复杂分析功能。具备分库分表、多租户、数据脱敏、高并发updateFetch等特性，完美支持ClickHouse、Doris等OLAP场景，是复杂业务与大数据分析项目的一站式解决方案。
summary.en: Sagacity-SQLToy is an intelligent Java ORM framework that deeply integrates JPA functionality with powerful query capabilities. It features innovative cache translation to replace LIKE queries, cross-database SQL auto-adaptation, complex analytics including group summary, pivot/unpivot, YoY/MoM analysis, and tree aggregation. With sharding, multi-tenancy, data masking, and high-concurrency updateFetch, it excellently supports OLAP scenarios like ClickHouse and Doris.

metadata.name: cubefs
metadata.description: cloud-native distributed storage

summary.zh: CubeFS是CNCF毕业的开源云原生分布式文件与对象存储系统，支持POSIX、HDFS、S3等多协议访问。提供强一致性元数据服务，具备多租户隔离、混合云多级缓存加速及灵活存储策略（复制/纠删码），适用于数据湖、私有云及数据库存算分离等场景。
summary.en: CubeFS is a CNCF-graduated open-source cloud-native distributed file and object storage system supporting POSIX, HDFS, and S3 protocols. It provides strongly consistent metadata services with multi-tenancy isolation, hybrid-cloud multi-level caching, and flexible storage policies (replication/erasure coding), ideal for data lakes, private clouds, and storage-compute separation architectures.

metadata.name: ozone
metadata.description: Scalable, reliable, distributed storage system optimized for data analytics and object store workloads.

summary.zh: Apache Ozone是Apache基金会旗下的分布式对象存储系统，专为Hadoop和云原生环境设计。支持S3和Hadoop文件系统API双协议，可扩展至数百亿对象和文件。采用RAFT协议实现强一致性，支持Kubernetes和YARN容器化部署，具备高可用多副本容错能力，集成了Kerberos认证、ACLs、Ranger访问控制和传输加密等企业级安全机制。
summary.en: Apache Ozone is a scalable, redundant, distributed object store developed under Apache Software Foundation, optimized for Hadoop and cloud-native environments. It supports both S3 and Hadoop File System APIs, scales to billions of objects and files, ensures strong consistency via RAFT consensus protocol, supports containerized deployment on Kubernetes and YARN, and provides enterprise security with Kerberos authentication, native ACLs, Ranger integration, and encryption.

metadata.name: COLA
metadata.description: 🥤 COLA: Clean Object-oriented & Layered Architecture

summary.zh: COLA是阿里巴巴开源的整洁面向对象分层架构框架，提供可落地的架构工具与最佳实践。通过archetype快速创建标准应用，组件库涵盖DTO、异常处理、状态机、领域实体、扩展点等企业级功能，遵循六边形/洋葱/整洁架构思想，以业务为核心解耦技术复杂度。
summary.en: COLA is Alibaba's open-source Clean Object-Oriented and Layered Architecture framework, providing practical tools and best practices. It offers archetypes for rapid project creation and components including DTO, exception handling, state machine, domain entities, and extension points, following hexagonal/onion/clean architecture principles to decouple technical complexity from business logic.

metadata.name: yudao-cloud
metadata.description: ruoyi-vue-pro 全新 Cloud 版本，优化重构所有功能。基于 Spring Cloud Alibaba + MyBatis Plus + Vue & Element 实现的后台管理系统 + 用户小程序，支持 RBAC 动态权限、多租户、数据权限、工作流、三方登录、支付、短信、商城、CRM、ERP、MES、IM、AI 大模型、IoT 物联网等功能。你的 ⭐️ Star ⭐️，是作者生发的动力！

summary.zh: 基于 Spring Cloud Alibaba + Vue3 的企业级微服务管理平台，支持 RBAC 动态权限、多租户、数据权限、工作流、支付、短信、商城、CRM、ERP、AI 大模型、IoT 物联网等功能。集成 Nacos、Sentinel、Seata、Flowable 等基础设施，提供代码生成器和前后端完整脚手架。
summary.en: Enterprise-grade microservice management platform based on Spring Cloud Alibaba + Vue3, featuring RBAC dynamic permissions, multi-tenancy, data permissions, workflows, payments, SMS, e-commerce, CRM, ERP, AI, and IoT. Integrates Nacos, Sentinel, Seata, Flowable with code generators.

metadata.name: Unify-Sign
metadata.description: 聚合签到-薅羊毛-AutoJS

summary.zh: 基于Auto.js的自动化签到聚合平台，支持京东、支付宝、淘宝、米哈游、叮咚买菜等20+平台的每日签到任务。通过可视化配置管理、智能随机执行计划与灵活分组机制，实现全自动化薅羊毛，支持自定义扩展签到脚本。
summary.en: An Auto.js-based automation platform aggregating daily check-in tasks from 20+ platforms including JD, Alipay, Taobao, miHoYo, and Dingdong. Features visual configuration, intelligent randomized scheduling, and flexible grouping for fully automated reward collection with extensible custom script support.

metadata.name: ip2region
metadata.description: Ip2region is an offline IP-to-Region localization library and IP data management framework with both IPv4 and IPv6 supports, 10-microsecond level query efficiency, xdb search client for many programming languages

summary.zh: ip2region是一款高性能离线IP地址定位库，支持IPv4和IPv6，采用xdb格式存储数十亿级IP数据段。通过vIndex索引缓存或全文件内存缓存技术，实现微秒级查询响应（<10μs），提供城市级IP归属地查询。内置数据去重压缩机制，支持Golang、Java、PHP、Python等多语言客户端。
summary.en: ip2region is a high-performance offline IP address geolocation library supporting both IPv4 and IPv6. Using xdb format to store billions of IP segments, it achieves microsecond-level query performance (<10μs) through vIndex caching or full-file memory caching. Provides city-level IP location lookup with built-in data deduplication and compression, available in multiple language bindings including Golang, Java, PHP, and Python.

metadata.name: mybatis-plus
metadata.description: An powerful enhanced toolkit of MyBatis for simplify development

summary.zh: MyBatis-Plus 是 MyBatis 的增强工具包，通过内置代码生成器、强大条件构造器、自动分页、Lambda API 等特性，显著简化 Java 持久层开发。支持主键自动生成、SQL 注入防御、Active Record 模式，完全兼容 MyBatis，是企业级 ORM 开发的高效解决方案。
summary.en: MyBatis-Plus is a powerful enhanced toolkit of MyBatis that simplifies Java persistence layer development through code generators, conditional query builders, automatic pagination, and Lambda-style APIs. It supports auto key generation, SQL injection defense, and Active Record pattern, fully compatible with MyBatis.

metadata.name: dbeaver
metadata.description: Free universal database tool and SQL client

summary.zh: DBeaver是一款免费的多平台数据库管理工具，支持100+数据库驱动。基于Java/Eclipse RCP开发，提供SQL编辑器、数据编辑器、ER图生成、AI智能补全、GIS空间数据查看等功能。通过JDBC/ODBC连接几乎所有主流数据库，适用于开发者、DBA和数据分析师。
summary.en: DBeaver is a free multi-platform database management tool supporting 100+ database drivers. Built with Java/Eclipse RCP, it offers SQL editing, data visualization, ER diagrams, AI code completion, and GIS spatial data viewing. Connects to virtually any database via JDBC/ODBC, ideal for developers, DBAs, and analysts.

metadata.name: ceph
metadata.description: Ceph is a distributed object, block, and file storage platform

summary.zh: Ceph是业界领先的分布式统一存储平台，同时支持对象存储、块存储和文件存储三种接口。采用去中心化架构设计，提供高可扩展性、高可靠性和高性能的存储服务。广泛应用于云计算、软件定义存储和企业级数据中心场景，是开源社区最活跃的存储项目之一。
summary.en: Ceph is a unified distributed storage platform that provides object, block, and file storage through a decentralized architecture. It delivers high scalability, reliability, and performance for cloud computing, software-defined storage, and enterprise data center deployments, remaining one of the most active open-source storage projects worldwide.

metadata.name: swift
metadata.description: OpenStack Storage (Swift). Mirror of code maintained at opendev.org.

summary.zh: OpenStack Swift是分布式对象存储系统，支持从单台服务器扩展至数千台集群。针对多租户和高并发场景优化，提供完整RESTful API。适用于备份、Web/移动内容及无结构数据存储，具备高可用和自动容错机制。
summary.en: OpenStack Swift is a distributed object storage system scaling from single machine to thousands of servers. Optimized for multi-tenancy and high concurrency with a full RESTful API. Ideal for backups, web/mobile content, and unstructured data storage with high availability and automatic fault tolerance.

metadata.name: zfile
metadata.description: 在线云盘、网盘、OneDrive、云存储、私有云、对象存储、h5ai、上传、下载

summary.zh: ZFile是一款面向个人或小团队的私有云盘程序，支持统一管理S3、OneDrive、Google Drive、FTP、本地存储等多种存储源。具备响应式界面、多用户权限控制、文件在线预览（图片/音视频/Office/3D）、直链生成、Docker部署等特性，适合搭建个人文件管理系统。
summary.en: ZFile is a private cloud storage solution for individuals and small teams, supporting unified management of multiple storage backends including S3, OneDrive, Google Drive, FTP, and local storage. Features responsive UI, multi-user permission control, online file preview (images/video/Office/3D), direct link generation, and Docker deployment.

metadata.name: flink
metadata.description: Apache Flink

summary.zh: Apache Flink是一个开源分布式流处理框架，支持流式和批处理统一计算。核心优势包括事件时间语义、精确一次处理保证、高吞吐量和低延迟。提供Java fluent API，支持灵活窗口、自定义触发器、反压机制，集成YARN、HDFS等Hadoop生态组件，广泛应用于实时数据分析、事件驱动等场景。
summary.en: Apache Flink is an open source distributed stream processing framework supporting unified stream and batch computing. Core strengths include event-time semantics, exactly-once processing guarantees, high throughput and low latency. With Java fluent API, flexible windowing, custom triggers and back-pressure handling, it integrates with YARN, HDFS and other Hadoop ecosystem components, widely used for real-time analytics and event-driven applications.

metadata.name: FluentHub
metadata.description: A stylish yet powerful GitHub client for Windows

summary.zh: FluentHub 是一款专为 Windows 设计的时尚且强大的 GitHub 客户端，采用 Microsoft FluentUI 设计语言，基于 WinAppSdk/WinUI3 构建。支持多标签页多任务处理、强大的页面导航功能，可直接在应用内创建 Issue 和 Pull Request，提供完整的 GitHub 日常开发工作流体验。
summary.en: FluentHub is a stylish yet powerful GitHub client for Windows built on WinAppSdk/WinUI3 with FluentUI design language. It features multi-tab multitasking, powerful page navigation, and seamless GitHub API integration for creating issues and pull requests directly within the app.

metadata.name: s3cmd
metadata.description: Official s3cmd repo -- Command line tool for managing S3 compatible storage services (including Amazon S3 and CloudFront).

summary.zh: S3cmd 是用 Python 编写的开源命令行工具，支持管理 Amazon S3 及兼容 S3 协议的各种云存储服务（如 Google Cloud Storage）。提供 60+ 命令行选项，涵盖多部分上传、加密、增量备份、同步、ACL 和元数据管理等功能，适合高级用户进行批量脚本化和自动化备份任务。
summary.en: S3cmd is an open-source Python command-line tool for managing Amazon S3 and S3-compatible cloud storage services (e.g., Google Cloud Storage). With 60+ CLI options including multipart uploads, encryption, incremental backup, sync, ACL and metadata management, it's ideal for power users and automated backup scripts.

metadata.name: mybatis-flex
metadata.description: mybatis-flex is an elegant Mybatis Enhancement Framework

summary.zh: MyBatis-Flex是一个优雅的MyBatis增强框架，唯一依赖MyBatis无其他三方包。支持Entity类CRUD和分页查询，提供无实体类行映射操作，可灵活扩展多数据库ialect。具备联合主键、多种主键生成策略、IDE智能提示等特性，兼容JDK 8至25及SpringBoot 2.x/3.x/4.x。
summary.en: MyBatis-Flex is an elegant MyBatis enhancement framework with zero external dependencies beyond MyBatis. It supports Entity CRUD, pagination, and row mapping without entity classes. Features include multi-database dialect extension, composite keys, flexible key generation strategies, and IDE autocompletion. Compatible with JDK 8-25 and SpringBoot 2.x/3.x/4.x.

metadata.name: zino
metadata.description: Spec-driven framework for composable applications in Rust.

summary.zh: Zino是Rust语言编写的规范驱动型全栈Web框架，采用模块化可组合架构，集成ORM、定时任务、LLM统一接入、OpenAPI文档生成等核心功能，支持actix-web、axum、dioxus等主流Web框架，提供开箱即用的快速开发体验。
summary.en: Zino is a spec-driven full-stack Rust framework with modular composable architecture, featuring built-in ORM, scheduler, unified LLM access, and OpenAPI generation, supporting actix-web, axum, and dioxus for rapid application development.

metadata.name: SpringBootCodeGenerator
metadata.description: 又名大狼狗代码生成器，基于SpringBoot2+Freemarker的JAVA代码生成器，以释放双手为目的，支持mysql/oracle/pgsql三大数据库， 用DDL-SQL语句生成JPA/JdbcTemplate/Mybatis/MybatisPlus/BeetlSQL等相关代码.

summary.zh: 基于SpringBoot3和Freemarker的高效Java代码生成平台，支持MySQL/Oracle/PgSQL三大数据库，通过DDL SQL、INSERT SQL、SELECT SQL或JSON模式一键生成JPA、Mybatis、MybatisPlus、BeetlSQL等模板代码，告别繁琐重复的CRUD操作。
summary.en: A powerful code generation platform built on SpringBoot3 & Freemarker supporting MySQL, Oracle and PostgreSQL. Generate JPA, Mybatis, MybatisPlus, BeetlSQL templates from DDL/INSERT/SELECT SQL or JSON with one click, eliminating repetitive CRUD work.

metadata.name: ChatALL
metadata.description: Concurrently chat with ChatGPT, Bing Chat, Bard, Alpaca, Vicuna, Claude, ChatGLM, MOSS, 讯飞星火, 文心一言 and more, discover the best answers

summary.zh: ChatALL（齐叨）是一款桌面客户端，可同时并发对话多个主流AI聊天机器人（包括ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini、文心一言、讯飞星火、ChatGLM等），帮助用户快速比较不同AI的回答质量，找到最优答案。适用于LLM研究者、开发者进行提示词调试和模型对比评估。
summary.en: ChatALL is a desktop client that concurrently chats with multiple AI bots (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, ERNIE, iFlytek Spark, ChatGLM, etc.), helping users discover the best answers by comparing responses across different LLMs. Ideal for researchers and developers to debug prompts and evaluate model performance.

metadata.name: stable-diffusion-webui-docker
metadata.description: Easy Docker setup for Stable Diffusion with user-friendly UI

summary.zh: 该项目提供Docker容器化部署方案，简化在本地运行Stable Diffusion AI绘画模型的流程。支持AUTOMATIC1111和ComfyUI两种主流Web界面，一键配置即可通过浏览器进行文本生成图像、图像生成图像等AI创作功能。
summary.en: This project provides Docker containerization for running Stable Diffusion AI image generation locally with minimal setup. It supports both AUTOMATIC1111 and ComfyUI web interfaces, enabling text-to-image and image-to-image generation through an intuitive browser-based UI.

metadata.name: PDF-Guru
metadata.description: PDF Guru Anki是你整个知识世界的“中枢转换器”，与 Anki 的强大记忆引擎无缝融合，能将来自任何地方、任何格式的知识精华，高效、系统、可持续地转化为牢固的长期记忆资产，打造专属自己的个性化Anki知识库，助你高效学习、轻松记忆。

summary.zh: 全格式知识转Anki卡片工具，支持PDF/Word/Excel/图片/微信读书/思维导图等一键制卡。集成AI智能提取要点、视频关键帧截取、Anki局域网同步、卡片导出PDF等核心功能，跨平台支持，是构建个人长期记忆知识库的高效中枢转换器。
summary.en: Universal knowledge-to-Anki converter enabling one-click flashcard creation from PDF/Word/Excel/images/WeChat Reading/mind maps. Features AI-powered key point extraction, video frame capture, LAN sync, and PDF export. Cross-platform tool for building personal long-term memory knowledge bases.

metadata.name: l2cache
metadata.description: L2Cache 是一个基于 Caffeine + Redis 的二级缓存框架。让缓存的使用在业务开发中更加简单、高效。

summary.zh: L2Cache是基于Caffeine+Redis的分布式二级缓存框架，集成一级内存缓存与二级Redis缓存，支持混合缓存模式。提供自动热key探测、动态缓存配置、缓存击穿/穿透解决方案及批量操作能力。已在生产环境验证，支撑35W QPS高并发场景，适用于商品、用户、营销等核心服务。
summary.en: L2Cache is a distributed two-level caching framework combining Caffeine (L1) and Redis (L2) with hybrid mode support. It provides automatic hot-key detection, dynamic cache configuration, cache penetration/breakdown solutions, and batch operations. Production-validated with 35W QPS capability, ideal for core services like e-commerce, user management, and marketing platforms.

metadata.name: siyuan
metadata.description: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

summary.zh: 思源笔记是一款隐私优先、自托管的开源个人知识管理系统，采用 TypeScript + Golang 开发。支持双向链接、块级引用和 Markdown 编辑，可通过 Docker 部署实现数据完全本地存储。提供桌面端和移动端应用，适合构建个人知识库和双向笔记网络。
summary.en: SiYuan is a privacy-first, self-hosted open-source personal knowledge management system built with TypeScript and Golang. It features bidirectional linking, block-level references, and Markdown editing, with optional Docker deployment for complete local data storage. Available on desktop and mobile platforms for building personal knowledge bases.

metadata.name: AgileBoot-Back-End
metadata.description: 🔥   规范易于二开的全栈基础快速开发脚手架。🔥  采用Springboot + Vue 3 + Typescript + Mybatis Plus + Redis + 更面向对象的业务建模 + 面向生产的项目（非玩具项目）。你的 ⭐️ Star ⭐️，是作者更新的动力！ 欢迎小伙伴PR，一起构建一个规范的全栈项目~😆

summary.zh: AgileBoot是一套基于SpringBoot+Vue3前后端分离的全栈快速开发脚手架。核心特点包括采用面向对象业务建模、注解式权限控制（菜单/数据权限）、多级缓存架构（Redis+Guava），以及完善的测试覆盖体系。相比Ruoyi等传统项目进行了大量代码规范重构，提供注解式主从数据库切换、请求限流、重复拦截等生产级功能，是非玩具类的真实项目。
summary.en: AgileBoot is a full-stack rapid development scaffold based on SpringBoot+Vue3. It features object-oriented business modeling, annotation-based permission control (menu/data permissions), multi-level caching (Redis+Guava), and comprehensive test coverage. Underwent extensive code specification refactoring compared to traditional projects like Ruoyi, providing production-level features like annotation-based master-slave DB switching, rate limiting, and duplicate request interception.

metadata.name: iotdb
metadata.description: Apache IoTDB

summary.zh: Apache IoTDB是专为物联网场景设计的时序数据管理系统，支持数据采集、存储与分析一体化服务。采用轻量级架构实现高效压缩存储，支持百万级设备高吞吐读写，可与Hadoop、Spark生态无缝集成，满足工业物联网海量时序数据存储与分析需求。
summary.en: Apache IoTDB is a time-series data management system designed for IoT scenarios, supporting integrated data collection, storage, and analysis. With lightweight architecture, it achieves high compression ratios and high-throughput read/write for millions of devices, seamlessly integrating with Hadoop and Spark ecosystem for industrial IoT data analytics.

metadata.name: crane4j
metadata.description: 一个简单易用的关联字段填充框架，通过简单的注解配置快速根据外键/编码值填充相关字段，支持字典，枚举，方法等多种数据源。   A simple and easy-to-use data mapping framework, quickly populate relevant fields according to foreign keys/encoded values through simple annotation configuration, supports dictionaries, enumerations, methods and other data sources.

summary.zh: crane4j是一款注解驱动的数据填充框架，通过简单注解配置即可根据外键或编码值自动填充关联字段。支持枚举、键值对缓存、方法调用等多种数据源，提供模板映射、嵌套对象填充、排序分组等高级功能。与Spring Boot深度集成，可轻松实现一对一到多对多的复杂字段映射，有效消除数据组装中的重复样板代码。
summary.en: crane4j is an annotation-driven data filling framework that automatically populates associated fields based on foreign keys or encoded values through simple annotation configuration. It supports multiple data sources including enumerations, key-value caches, and method calls, providing advanced features like template mapping, nested object filling, and sorting/grouping. Deeply integrated with Spring Boot, it enables effortless one-to-one to many-to-many complex field mapping, effectively eliminating repetitive boilerplate code in data assembly.

metadata.name: freegpt-webui
metadata.description: GPT 3.5/4 with a Chat Web UI. No API key required.

summary.zh: 基于gpt4free (G4F) API构建的ChatGPT Web界面，无需API key即可免费使用GPT-3.5/4模型。支持Docker部署，提供友好的聊天界面，已在Replit和Hugging Face等平台托管演示。项目已存档但仍可作为G4F与Web界面集成的参考。
summary.en: A ChatGPT-style Web UI powered by gpt4free (G4F) API, enabling free access to GPT-3.5/4 without requiring an API key. Features a user-friendly interface, Docker deployment support, and demo hosting on Replit and Hugging Face. The archived project remains as a reference for G4F web integration.

metadata.name: localGPT
metadata.description: Chat with your documents on your local device using GPT models. No data leaves your device and 100% private.

summary.zh: 本地文档智能平台，支持离线运行的大语言模型交互。采用混合搜索融合语义相似度、关键词匹配与延迟分块技术，配合智能路由自动选择RAG或直接问答模式。纯Python架构依赖极少，支持GPU/CPU/HPU/MPS多平台，文档处理覆盖PDF、DOCX等格式，实现100%数据隐私保护。
summary.en: A fully private, on-premise document intelligence platform enabling chat with local GPT models. Features a hybrid search engine combining semantic similarity, keyword matching, and Late Chunking, with a smart router for automatic RAG vs direct LLM answering. Built with pure Python core, supports GPU/CPU/HPU/MPS platforms, handles PDF/DOCX formats, ensuring 100% data privacy.

metadata.name: spring-cloud-alibaba
metadata.description: Spring Cloud Alibaba provides a one-stop solution for application development for the distributed solutions of Alibaba middleware.

summary.zh: Spring Cloud Alibaba是阿里巴巴开源的分布式应用开发一站式解决方案，深度集成Spring Cloud生态。核心组件包括Sentinel（流量控制与熔断降级）和Nacos（服务注册发现与配置管理），支持分布式事务、事件驱动、配置动态刷新等特性，可快速构建基于阿里中间件的微服务架构。
summary.en: Spring Cloud Alibaba is an open-source one-stop solution for distributed application development by Alibaba, deeply integrated with the Spring Cloud ecosystem. Core components include Sentinel (flow control and circuit breaking) and Nacos (service discovery and configuration management), supporting distributed transactions, event-driven architecture, and dynamic configuration refresh for building microservices with Alibaba middleware.

metadata.name: modbus
metadata.description: Modbus TCP,  Modbus TCP Security, Modbus RTU on Serial, and Modbus RTU on TCP for Java 17+.

summary.zh: 基于Java 17的现代化Modbus协议实现，支持Modbus TCP、Modbus TCP Security（TLS加密）、Modbus RTU串口及Modbus RTU over TCP四种通信模式。集成Netty框架实现高性能异步通信，提供完整的客户端和服务器功能，涵盖全部11种Modbus功能码，支持自定义PDU和可插拔编解码器。
summary.en: A modern Java 17+ implementation of Modbus protocol supporting Modbus TCP, Modbus TCP Security (TLS), Modbus RTU Serial, and Modbus RTU over TCP. Built on Netty for high-performance async communication with full client/server capabilities, covering all 11 Modbus function codes with support for custom PDUs and pluggable codecs.

metadata.name: SmsForwarder
metadata.description: 短信转发器——监控Android手机短信、来电、APP通知，并根据指定规则转发到其他手机：钉钉群自定义机器人、钉钉企业内机器人、企业微信群机器人、飞书机器人、企业微信应用消息、邮箱、bark、webhook、Telegram机器人、Server酱、PushPlus、手机短信等。包括主动控制服务端与客户端，让你轻松远程发短信、查短信、查通话、查话簿、查电量等。（V3.0 新增）PS.这个APK主要是学习与自用，如有BUG请提ISSUE，同时欢迎大家提PR指正

summary.zh: Android短信转发器，监控短信、来电及APP通知，支持转发至钉钉、企业微信、飞书、邮箱、Bark、Telegram等10+渠道。V3.0新增远程控制服务端，可远程发短信、查通话、查电量等。适配Android 4.4-13.0，隐私零收集，备用机必备工具。
summary.en: Android SMS forwarder monitoring SMS, calls, and app notifications, forwarding to 10+ channels including DingTalk, WeChat Work, Feishu, Email, Bark, Telegram. V3.0 adds remote control server for sending SMS, checking calls and battery. Supports Android 4.4-13.0 with zero privacy data collection.

metadata.name: sonar-l10n-zh
metadata.description: Chinese Pack for SonarQube

summary.zh: SonarQube代码质量管理平台的官方中文语言包，提供完整的界面中文化支持。项目长期维护，覆盖SonarQube从3.x到26.x的广泛版本兼容，安装插件后即可将菜单、报表、规则描述等界面元素全面中文化，显著提升中文用户的使用体验。
summary.en: The official Chinese localization pack for SonarQube code quality management platform, providing complete interface translation. Maintained long-term with broad version compatibility from SonarQube 3.x to 26.x, enabling seamless Chinese localization for menus, reports, and rule descriptions to enhance user experience.

metadata.name: xJavaFxTool
metadata.description: 基于JavaFx搭建的实用小工具集合，方便开发过程中的代码编写与调试，想学习javaFx的同学可以参考参考。其中包括文件复制、Cron表达式生成器、编码转换、加密解密、Time转换、路径转换、二维码生成工具、身份证生成器、正则表达式生成工具、网址缩短、转义字符、字符串转换、Mq调试工具、Http调试工具、json格式化编辑工具、图标生成工具、Redis连接工具、网页源码下载工具、切换Hosts工具、Ftp服务器、Cmd调试工具、Ftp/Ftps/Sftp客户端调试工具、Pdf转换工具、文件列表生成器、图片压缩工具、图片转码工具、Kafka调试工具、Email群发工具、颜色代码转换工具、短信群发工具、脚本引擎调试、文件重命名、Json转换、语音转换、Socket调试、图片解析、微信小程序反编译、Zookeeper操作、Excel拆分合并、文件夹监控、文件编码检测、传输、端口扫描、久坐提醒、随机数生成、剪贴板历史、文件搜索、mp3转换、印章生成等工具

summary.zh: 基于JavaFx开发的跨平台桌面工具集，集成了40+种开发调试与日常实用工具，包括Http/Socket调试、Json格式化、编码转换、加密解密、Cron生成器、Redis/Kafka/Zookeeper连接工具、图片处理、Excel操作等。支持插件扩展机制，JDK17+基于Gradle构建，UI采用Controlsfx和JFoenix组件库，是开发者效率提升的利器。
summary.en: A cross-platform desktop toolkit built with JavaFx, featuring 40+ practical tools for developers including Http/Socket debugging, JSON formatting, encoding conversion, encryption/decryption, Cron generator, Redis/Kafka/Zookeeper clients, image processing, and Excel operations. Supports plugin extension, built with JDK17+/Gradle, UI uses Controlsfx and JFoenix libraries.

metadata.name: legado
metadata.description: Legado 3.0 Book Reader with powerful controls & full functions❤️阅读3.0, 阅读是一款可以自定义来源阅读网络内容的工具，为广大网络文学爱好者提供一种方便、快捷舒适的试读体验。

summary.zh: Legado是一款开源Android小说阅读器，支持自定义书源规则抓取网络内容，同时兼容本地TXT/EPUB文件阅读。提供高度自定义阅读界面（含字体、颜色、背景、翻页模式等），具备书源搜索、订阅、替换净化等功能，全程无广告开源。
summary.en: Legado is an open-source Android novel reader supporting custom book source rules for web content scraping, plus local TXT/EPUB reading. Features highly customizable reading interface with fonts, colors, backgrounds, page-flip modes, book source search, subscriptions, and ad-free open-source experience.

metadata.name: TDengineGUI
metadata.description: A simple TDengine DeskTop Manager

summary.zh: TDengineGUI 是一款简洁的 TDengine 时序数据库桌面管理工具，支持 Linux、Windows、macOS 三平台。提供数据库连接管理、表和超级表浏览查看、SQL 语句执行、数据筛选查询等核心功能，帮助开发者更直观地观察和操作 TDengine 数据。
summary.en: TDengineGUI is a lightweight cross-platform desktop manager for TDengine time-series database, supporting Linux, Windows, and macOS. It provides database connection management, table/supertable browsing, SQL execution, and data filtering, enabling developers to observe and manipulate TDengine data more intuitively.

metadata.name: testcontainers-java
metadata.description: Testcontainers is a Java library that supports JUnit tests, providing lightweight, throwaway instances of common databases, Selenium web browsers, or anything else that can run in a Docker container.

summary.zh: Testcontainers是一个Java测试库，为JUnit测试提供轻量级、可丢弃的Docker容器实例。它支持MySQL、PostgreSQL、MongoDB等常见数据库以及Selenium浏览器，可快速搭建隔离的集成测试环境，极大简化测试基础设施配置，是Java生态中广泛使用的测试容器化工具。
summary.en: Testcontainers is a Java library providing lightweight, throwaway Docker container instances for JUnit tests. It supports common databases like MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Selenium browsers, enabling rapid setup of isolated integration test environments. It is a widely-adopted testing tool in the Java ecosystem for containerized test infrastructure.

metadata.name: intellij-mybaitslog
metadata.description: 用于在IDEA将Mybatis的SQL日志还原为可执行的SQL，Used to restore Mybatis SQL logs to executable SQL in IDEA,

summary.zh: 这是一款IntelliJ IDEA插件，用于将Mybatis的SQL日志自动还原为可执行的完整SQL语句。支持Mybatis 3.2.0+及MybatisPlus，自动解析参数并格式化输出，兼容所有主流数据库。需IDEA 2020.1以上版本和JDK 8+环境。
summary.en: This IntelliJ IDEA plugin restores Mybatis SQL logs to executable SQL statements. Supports Mybatis 3.2.0+, MybatisPlus, auto-parses parameters and formats output, compatible with all major databases. Requires IDEA 2020.1+ and JDK 8+.

metadata.name: winsw
metadata.description: A wrapper executable that can run any executable as a Windows service, in a permissive license.

summary.zh: WinSW是Windows服务封装工具，可将任意可执行程序安装为Windows服务并进行管理。支持.NET Framework 4.6.1+和.NET 7，提供原生64/32位可执行文件。通过XML配置文件定义服务，支持安装、启动、停止、重启、日志等完整服务管理功能，采用宽松许可证。
summary.en: WinSW wraps any executable as a Windows service with full lifecycle management. Supports .NET Framework 4.6.1+ and .NET 7, offering native 64/32-bit binaries. Uses XML configuration for service definition, enabling install, start, stop, restart and logging. Released under permissive license.

metadata.name: BilibiliDown
metadata.description: (GUI-多平台支持) B站 哔哩哔哩 视频下载器。支持稍后再看、收藏夹、UP主视频批量下载|Bilibili Video Downloader 😳

summary.zh: 基于Java开发的B站视频下载器，支持Windows、Linux、Mac三平台。提供GUI界面，可批量下载UP主视频、收藏夹及稍后再看列表中的视频。采用ffmpeg进行视频转码，支持FLV合并与M4S转MP4格式，需登录B站账号获取下载权限。
summary.en: A cross-platform Bilibili video downloader built with Java, supporting Windows, Linux, and Mac. Features GUI for batch downloading videos from creator pages, favorites, and watch-later lists. Uses FFmpeg for video transcoding (FLV merging and M4S to MP4), requiring logged-in Bilibili account.

metadata.name: KCloud-Platform-IoT
metadata.description: KCloud-Platform-IoT（老寇IoT云平台）是一个企业级单体架构和微服务架构的IoT云平台。采用DDD(领域驱动设计)思想，基于Spring Boot 4.0.6、Spring Cloud 2025.1.0、Spring Cloud Alibaba 2025.1.0.0 最新版本开发的云服务多租户IoT平台，家人们，点个star！拜托啦~

summary.zh: 企业级多租户IoT云平台，基于Spring Boot 4.0.3、Spring Cloud 2025.1.0、Spring Cloud Alibaba 2025.1.0.0构建。采用DDD领域驱动设计思想，整合阿里COLA框架，提供服务注册发现、配置中心、灰度路由、限流熔断、分布式事务、缓存、锁等企业级特性。支持Shell/Docker/K8s多方式部署，集成RBAC权限管理，涵盖系统管理、物联管理、监控分析等模块。
summary.en: Enterprise-grade multi-tenant IoT cloud platform built on Spring Boot 4.0.3, Spring Cloud 2025.1.0, and Spring Cloud Alibaba 2025.1.0.0. Implements DDD architecture with Alibaba COLA framework, offering service discovery, config center, gray routing, circuit breaking, distributed transactions, caching, and locking. Supports Shell/Docker/K8s deployment with RBAC, covering system management, IoT management, and monitoring modules.

metadata.name: cnosdb
metadata.description: A cloud-native open source distributed time series database with high performance, high compression ratio and high availability.

summary.zh: CnosDB是一款云原生开源分布式时序数据库，采用Rust语言开发，专为IoT、工业互联网、车联网等场景设计。具备存储计算分离、水平扩展、多租户权限控制等特性，支持SQL查询和无模式写入，实现高性能与高压缩比。
summary.en: CnosDB is a cloud-native open-source distributed time-series database built with Rust, designed for IoT, industrial internet, and connected vehicles. It features storage-computing separation, horizontal scaling, multi-tenancy with role-based access control, and supports SQL queries with schema-less writing for high performance and compression.

metadata.name: horaedb
metadata.description: Apache HoraeDB (incubating) is a high-performance, distributed, cloud native time-series database.

summary.zh: Apache HoraeDB是Apache软件基金会孵化的云原生时序数据库，采用分布式架构实现高性能数据存储与查询。支持时间序列数据的高效写入、压缩和聚合，兼容Prometheus等监控系统。提供Docker镜像部署，适合物联网、监控告警等场景。
summary.en: Apache HoraeDB is a high-performance, distributed, cloud-native time-series database under Apache incubation. It offers efficient write, compression and aggregation for time-series data with Prometheus compatibility. Docker images available for IoT, monitoring and alerting scenarios.

metadata.name: hippo4j
metadata.description: 📌 异步线程池框架，支持线程池动态变更&监控&报警，无需修改代码轻松引入。Asynchronous thread pool framework, support Thread Pool Dynamic Change & monitoring & Alarm, no need to modify the code easily introduced.

summary.zh: Hippo4j 是一个面向高并发场景的动态可观测线程池框架，解决了线程池参数难评估、任务堆积无感知、无监控无报警等痛点。核心提供运行时动态修改线程池参数、实时监控数据采集、四种告警策略、任务上下文传递及优雅关闭等能力，支持无配置中心依赖和配置中心两种部署模式，开箱即用。
summary.en: Hippo4j is a dynamic observable thread pool framework for high-concurrency scenarios, addressing pain points like difficult parameter evaluation, unaware task accumulation, and lack of monitoring. It provides runtime thread pool parameter modification, real-time monitoring, four alarm strategies, task context transfer, and graceful shutdown, supporting both configuration center and standalone deployment modes.

metadata.name: quarkus
metadata.description: Quarkus: Supersonic Subatomic Java.

summary.zh: Quarkus 是 Red Hat 推出的云原生 Java 框架，主打「容器优先」设计理念。通过在编译时完成大量计算，实现超快启动速度；同时支持 JVM 和 GraalVM 原生编译，完美适配 Kubernetes 环境。统一了响应式与命令式编程模型，深度集成 RESTEasy、Hibernate、Vert.x、MicroProfile 等主流标准，为微服务开发提供极速体验。
summary.en: Quarkus is Red Hat's cloud-native Java framework designed with a container-first philosophy. It achieves lightning-fast startup by moving computation to compile time, supporting both JVM and GraalVM native compilation for optimal Kubernetes deployment. The framework unifies reactive and imperative programming models while deeply integrating standards like RESTEasy, Hibernate, Vert.x, and MicroProfile, delivering an exceptional development experience for microservices.

metadata.name: wrk
metadata.description: Modern HTTP benchmarking tool

summary.zh: wrk是一款现代HTTP基准测试工具，采用多线程架构结合epoll/kqueue等可扩展事件通知系统，能在单核多CPU上生成高并发负载。支持LuaJIT脚本自定义请求生成、响应处理和报告输出，是Web服务器性能评估和负载压力测试的利器。
summary.en: wrk is a modern HTTP benchmarking tool featuring a multithreaded architecture with scalable event notification systems (epoll/kqueue), capable of generating substantial load on single multi-core CPUs. It supports LuaJIT scripting for custom request generation, response processing, and reporting, making it ideal for web server performance evaluation.

metadata.name: rust-course
metadata.description: 什么？你敢放心的把后背交给 AI? 我赌你不敢，那就来学学 AI 时代最安全的语言吧(Python无法战胜！)。本书拥有全面且深入的讲解、生动贴切的示例、德芙般丝滑的内容，这可能是目前最用心的 Rust 中文学习教程 / Book

summary.zh: 全面且深入的 Rust 中文教程，涵盖从入门到精通的完整知识体系，包括所有权系统、生命周期、并发编程、异步async等核心内容。提供配套实战练习和 Cookbook 代码片段，帮助开发者高效掌握这门无GC、高性能、高安全的系统编程语言。开源持续更新。
summary.en: A comprehensive Chinese Rust tutorial covering complete knowledge from beginner to advanced, including ownership, lifetimes, concurrency, and async programming. Features practical exercises and cookbook code snippets, helping developers efficiently master this GC-free, high-performance, secure systems programming language. Open-source with continuous updates.

metadata.name: rust
metadata.description: Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

summary.zh: Rust 是 Mozilla 开发的系统编程语言，通过所有权模型和类型系统实现内存与线程安全，编译期即消除空指针和数据竞争。配备 Cargo 包管理器、rustfmt、Clippy 等完善工具链，广泛应用于 WebAssembly、嵌入式开发和高性能服务领域。
summary.en: Rust is a systems programming language developed by Mozilla that guarantees memory and thread safety through its ownership model and type system, eliminating null pointers and data races at compile time. Features Cargo, rustfmt, and Clippy tooling, widely used for WebAssembly, embedded development, and high-performance services.

metadata.name: 7-Zip-zstd
metadata.description: 7-Zip with support for Brotli, Fast-LZMA2, Lizard, LZ4, LZ5 and Zstandard

summary.zh: 7-Zip ZS是7-Zip的增强版本，在原版基础上添加了对6种现代压缩算法的原生支持：Zstandard、Brotli、LZ4、LZ5、Lizard和Fast-LZMA2。这些算法提供从极快到高压缩比的广泛选择，满足不同场景需求。项目提供完整安装包（含GUI和资源管理器集成）和独立编解码器插件两种分发形式。
summary.en: 7-Zip ZS is an enhanced version of 7-Zip with native support for six modern compression algorithms: Zstandard, Brotli, LZ4, LZ5, Lizard, and Fast-LZMA2. These algorithms offer a wide range from ultra-fast to high-compression options for various use cases. The project provides both full installer (with GUI and Explorer integration) and standalone codec plugin.

metadata.name: WSA-Windows-10
metadata.description: This is a backport of Windows Subsystem for Android to Windows 10.

summary.zh: 这是一个将Windows 11的Android子系统(WSA)反向移植到Windows 10的开源项目。通过修改和适配WSAClient.exe及WSApatch.dll等核心组件，让用户在Windows 10系统上也能运行Android应用。项目已归档，但提供了完整的安装脚本和详细配置教程。
summary.en: This is an open-source backport project that enables Windows Subsystem for Android (WSA) from Windows 11 to run on Windows 10. By modifying WSAClient.exe and WSApatch.dll components, users can run Android applications on Windows 10. The project is archived but provides complete installation scripts and detailed setup guides.

metadata.name: WSA-Script
metadata.description: Integrate Magisk root and Google Apps into WSA (Windows Subsystem for Android) with GitHub Actions

summary.zh: 为Windows Subsystem for Android (WSA)集成Magisk root和Google Play服务的自动化构建项目。通过Web界面配置选项，使用GitHub Issues触发构建流程，生成预置Magisk和GApps的定制WSA安装包，支持Windows 10/11系统，提供Stable和Insider双版本通道。
summary.en: Automated build project integrating Magisk root and Google Play services into Windows Subsystem for Android (WSA). Users configure options via web interface, trigger builds through GitHub Issues, and receive customized WSA packages with Magisk and GApps pre-installed, supporting Windows 10/11 with Stable and Insider channels.

metadata.name: hsweb-easy-orm
metadata.description: 简单的orm工具,为动态表单而生

summary.zh: 轻量级Java ORM框架，专为动态表单场景设计。支持动态表结构维护和增删改查，前端可透传动态查询条件，内置SQL注入防护。提供可扩展的通用条件查询，不局限于传统运算符。原生支持响应式编程，封装R2DBC完美集成Reactor，实现真正的非阻塞数据访问。
summary.en: A lightweight Java ORM framework designed for dynamic form scenarios. Supports dynamic table structure maintenance and CRUD operations with frontend-passable dynamic query conditions and built-in SQL injection prevention. Offers extensible generic condition queries beyond traditional operators. Native reactive programming support via R2DBC wrapper, seamlessly integrated with Reactor for true non-blocking data access.

metadata.name: JavaSpringBootSamples
metadata.description: SpringBoot、Dubbo、SpringCloud的各种集成例子：Atomikos、gRPC、Thrift、Seata、ShardingSphere、Dubbo、Hmily、Nacos、Consul、Ribbon、Jedis、Lettuce、Redisson等框架

summary.zh: Java SpringBoot技术栈集成示例仓库，涵盖分布式事务（Atomikos、Seata TCC/AT）、RPC框架（gRPC、Thrift、Dubbo）、数据库中间件（ShardingSphere）、服务注册发现（Nacos、Consul）、Redis客户端（Jedis、Lettuce、Redisson）及SpringCloud全家桶的完整实践案例，是Java开发者学习微服务架构与中间件集成的优质资源。
summary.en: A comprehensive Java SpringBoot integration repository featuring distributed transaction solutions (Atomikos, Seata TCC/AT), RPC frameworks (gRPC, Thrift, Dubbo), database middleware (ShardingSphere), service discovery (Nacos, Consul), Redis clients (Jedis, Lettuce, Redisson), and SpringCloud ecosystem examples—an essential resource for developers mastering microservices architecture and middleware integration.

metadata.name: reloadium
metadata.description: Hot Reloading and Profiling for Python

summary.zh: Reloadium是一款Python热重载与分析工具，支持保存即生效的即时代码更新。它集成PyCharm插件，提供帧级重载、多文件依赖追踪和数据库回滚功能，同时整合ChatGPT实现AI辅助开发，显著提升Python开发效率。
summary.en: Reloadium is a Python hot reloading and profiling tool enabling instant code updates on save. It provides frame-level reloading, multi-file dependency tracking, and database rollback, with ChatGPT integration for AI-assisted development, significantly improving Python development workflow.

metadata.name: shifu
metadata.description: Kubernetes-native IoT gateway

summary.zh: Shifu是一个生产级Kubernetes原生物联网网关，支持HTTP、MQTT、RTSP、Siemens S7、TCP、OPC UA等主流协议。它通过DeviceShifu将物联网设备抽象为Kubernetes CRD资源，实现设备的数字孪生管理，践行"开发应用而非基础设施"理念，支持从树莓派到边缘集群的多层级部署。
summary.en: Shifu is a production-grade, Kubernetes-native IoT gateway supporting protocols including HTTP, MQTT, RTSP, Siemens S7, TCP, and OPC UA. It abstracts IoT devices as Kubernetes CRD resources via DeviceShifu (digital twin), enabling the "develop apps, not infra" philosophy with deployment from RaspberryPi to edge clusters.

metadata.name: lsd
metadata.description: The next gen ls command

summary.zh: LSDeluxe是Rust编写的现代化ls命令替代品，提供彩色输出、文件图标、树形视图等增强功能。支持多平台安装（MacOS/Linux/Windows），可通过Nerd Font显示图标，显著提升终端文件浏览体验。
summary.en: LSDeluxe is a modern Rust-based replacement for the classic ls command, featuring colored output, file icons, and tree-view functionality. Available on MacOS, Linux, and Windows with Nerd Font support for enhanced terminal file browsing.

metadata.name: immersive-translate
metadata.description: 沉浸式双语网页翻译扩展 , 支持输入框翻译， 鼠标悬停翻译， PDF, Epub, 字幕文件, TXT 文件翻译 - Immersive Dual Web Page Translation Extension

summary.zh: 沉浸式双语网页翻译浏览器扩展，支持网页全文双语对照阅读。可选输入框翻译、鼠标悬停段落即时翻译，另有PDF、Epub、字幕文件、TXT文档翻译功能。提供多种翻译引擎接入，采用沉浸式界面设计提升跨语言阅读体验。注意：本仓库为闭源软件发布页，不含源代码。
summary.en: A bilingual web page translation browser extension enabling immersive dual-language reading. Supports input box translation, hover-to-translate for paragraphs, plus document translation for PDF, Epub, subtitles, and TXT files. Integrates multiple translation services with a clean, immersive interface. Note: This repository is for release distribution only; source code is not included as the software is closed-source.

metadata.name: qinglong
metadata.description: 支持 Python3、JavaScript、Shell、Typescript 的定时任务管理平台（Timed task management platform supporting Python3, JavaScript, Shell, Typescript）

summary.zh: 青龙是一款功能强大的定时任务管理平台，支持Python3、JavaScript、Shell、TypeScript四种脚本语言，提供Web界面进行脚本、环境变量和配置文件管理，具备秒级定时任务、日志实时查看、系统通知、暗黑模式及手机端访问能力，支持Docker和npm多种部署方式。
summary.en: QingLong is a powerful timed task management platform supporting Python3, JavaScript, Shell, and TypeScript. It provides a web interface for script, environment variable and configuration file management, featuring second-level cron jobs, real-time log viewing, system notifications, dark mode, mobile access, with Docker and npm deployment options.

metadata.name: gsudo
metadata.description: Sudo for Windows

summary.zh: gsudo是Windows平台的sudo实现，允许用户以管理员权限运行命令。支持Cmd、PowerShell、WSL、Git-Bash、MinGW、Cygwin等多种Shell，自动检测当前环境并以原生方式提升权限。提供凭证缓存功能，多次调用仅需一次UAC确认，支持输出管道和退出码。
summary.en: gsudo is a sudo equivalent for Windows that enables running commands with elevated admin privileges. It auto-detects and integrates with multiple shells (Cmd, PowerShell, WSL, Git-Bash, MinGW, Cygwin). Features credentials cache to reduce UAC prompts across invocations, while supporting output piping and exit codes.

metadata.name: dragonfly
metadata.description: A modern replacement for Redis and Memcached

summary.zh: Dragonfly是高性能内存数据库，完全兼容Redis和Memcached协议。采用多线程架构实现垂直扩展，吞吐量比Redis提升25倍，尾延迟更低，资源消耗减少80%。无需修改代码即可作为替代方案，适合高并发缓存和会话存储场景。
summary.en: Dragonfly is a high-performance in-memory data store fully compatible with Redis and Memcached APIs.
