Built with a multi-threaded architecture for vertical scaling, it delivers 25X throughput improvement over Redis with lower tail latency and 80% resource reduction. Zero code changes are required for adoption, making it ideal for high-concurrency caching and session storage scenarios.

metadata.name: tile38
metadata.description: Real-time Geospatial and Geofencing

summary.zh: Tile38是一个开源的内存地理位置数据存储库，支持空间索引和实时地理围栏功能。它提供Nearby、Within、Intersects等空间搜索方法，支持GeoJSON、Geohash等多种地理空间数据格式，可通过webhooks或发布/订阅实现实时地理围栏告警。兼容Redis协议，采用Go语言编写。
summary.en: Tile38 is an open-source in-memory geolocation data store with spatial indexing and real-time geofencing capabilities. It provides spatial search methods including Nearby, Within, and Intersects, supports GeoJSON, Geohash and other geospatial formats, enables real-time geofencing alerts via webhooks or pub/sub, and is Redis protocol compatible, written in Go.

metadata.name: segment-anything
metadata.description: The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

summary.zh: Segment Anything Model (SAM) 是Meta AI发布的革命性图像分割基础模型，可通过点、框或文本等任意提示生成高质量对象掩码。模型基于1100万张图像和11亿掩码数据集训练，具备强大的零样本分割能力，支持全图自动分割和交互式分割两种模式，为计算机视觉领域树立了新标杆。
summary.en: Segment Anything Model (SAM) is a revolutionary image segmentation foundation model developed by Meta AI that generates high-quality object masks from arbitrary prompts like points, boxes, or text. Trained on 11M images and 1.1B masks, it demonstrates powerful zero-shot segmentation performance, supporting both automatic and interactive segmentation modes, setting a new benchmark in computer vision.

metadata.name: typora-latex-theme
metadata.description: 将Typora伪装成LaTeX的中文样式主题，本科生轻量级课程论文撰写的好帮手。This is a theme disguising Typora into Chinese LaTeX style.

summary.zh: 为Typora打造的中文LaTeX样式主题，专注简化本科生课程论文与实验报告的撰写流程。采用浙江大学论文格式为默认模板，支持明暗双模式，可通过CSS自定义字体、页边距等样式。Markdown编写配合PDF导出，即可获得精美的类LaTeX排版效果，兼顾易用性与学术规范。
summary.en: A Typora theme mimicking Chinese LaTeX document style, designed for undergraduate course papers and lab reports. Default template follows Zhejiang University format with light/dark modes. Customizable via CSS for fonts and margins. Write in Markdown, export to PDF for professional LaTeX-like typography while maintaining simplicity.

metadata.name: Flow.Launcher
metadata.description: :mag: Quick file search & app launcher for Windows with community-made plugins

summary.zh: Flow Launcher是一款Windows平台的快速文件搜索与应用启动器，支持社区插件扩展。可搜索应用程序、文件、书签及网页内容，采用插件化架构，提供热键快速启动、Everything/Windows索引集成等功能，显著提升Windows工作流效率。
summary.en: Flow Launcher is a Windows-powered quick file search and application launcher featuring community-developed plugins. It enables searching applications, files, bookmarks, and web content with plugin-based architecture, offering hotkey integration, Everything/Windows Index support to significantly enhance Windows workflow efficiency.

metadata.name: LxRunOffline
metadata.description: A full-featured utility for managing Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL)

summary.zh: 功能完备的Windows Subsystem for Linux（WSL）管理工具，支持任意Linux发行版安装到任意目录、迁移、复制、便携化注册。提供默认用户配置、环境变量设置、XML配置导出导入及tar镜像导出等企业级功能。基于C++和CMake构建，支持Visual C++与MinGW双编译器。
summary.en: A comprehensive WSL management utility enabling installation of any Linux distro to any directory, migration, duplication, and portable registration. Features default user configuration, environment variables, XML import/export, and tar image export. Built with C++ and CMake, supporting both Visual C++ and MinGW compilers.

metadata.name: distrochooser
metadata.description: An orientation guide for Linux newbies

summary.zh: distrochooser是一个面向Linux新手的发行版推荐服务，通过交互式问卷分析用户需求、使用场景和技术水平，推荐最适合的Linux发行版。系统采用Vue.js构建，数据采用开放数据库许可证(ODbL)开源，支持生产版与开发版双分支维护。
summary.en: distrochooser is a Linux distribution recommendation service for beginners, using interactive questionnaires to analyze user needs, use cases, and skill levels. Built with Vue.js and licensed under ODbL for open data, it maintains production and development branches.

metadata.name: DrakeTyporaTheme
metadata.description: 十二种主题风格 - Material Google JetBrains Vue Juejin Purple Ayu Dark

summary.zh: 专为Typora Markdown编辑器设计的精美主题包，集成12种视觉风格（Material、Google、JetBrains、Vue、Juejin、Purple、Ayu、Dark等）。内置JetBrains Mono等编程字体连字特性，支持字体大小、行高自定义，兼容简历模板生成，打造优雅的Markdown写作与阅读体验。
summary.en: A exquisite theme pack for Typora Markdown editor featuring 12 visual styles (Material, Google, JetBrains, Vue, Juejin, Purple, Ayu, Dark, etc.). Built-in programming fonts with ligatures support, customizable font size and line height, compatible with resume template generation for elegant Markdown writing experience.

metadata.name: Playnite
metadata.description: Video game library manager with support for wide range of 3rd party libraries and game emulation support, providing one unified interface for your games.

summary.zh: Playnite是一款开源视频游戏库管理器和启动器，支持Steam、Epic、GOG、EA App、Battle.net等主流平台整合，同时提供游戏模拟器支持。通过插件（.NET语言编写）和主题实现功能扩展，所有游戏数据本地存储保护隐私。基于C#/WPF开发，专注Windows桌面体验。
summary.en: Playnite is an open-source video game library manager and launcher integrating major platforms like Steam, Epic, GOG, EA App, and Battle.net, with built-in game emulation support. Extensible via plugins (.NET languages) and themes, it stores all game data locally for privacy. Built with C#/WPF for Windows desktop.

metadata.name: dozzle
metadata.description: Realtime log viewer for containers.  Supports Docker, Swarm and K8s.

summary.zh: Dozzle是一款轻量级基于Web的Docker容器日志实时查看工具，支持Docker、Swarm和Kubernetes环境。它不存储日志文件，专注于实时日志监控，提供智能模糊搜索、正则表达式和SQL查询功能。具备分屏多日志查看、实时CPU/内存统计、多用户认证、Agent分布式监控及暗色模式，Docker镜像仅7MB。
summary.en: Dozzle is a lightweight, web-based realtime log viewer for Docker containers, supporting Docker, Swarm and Kubernetes. It focuses purely on live log monitoring without storing files, offering intelligent fuzzy search, regex and SQL query capabilities. Features include split-screen viewing, realtime CPU/memory stats, multi-user authentication, agent mode for distributed monitoring, and dark mode, with a compact 7MB Docker image.

metadata.name: wsl-distrod
metadata.description: Distrod is a meta-distro for WSL 2 which installs Ubuntu, Arch, Debian, Gentoo, etc. with systemd in a minute for you. Distrod also has built-in auto-start feature on Windows startup and port forwarding ability.

summary.zh: Distrod是WSL 2的systemd元发行版，可在一分钟内安装Ubuntu、Arch、Debian、Gentoo等多种Linux发行版并运行systemd。支持Windows启动时自动运行WSL实例，并提供内置端口转发服务，方便将Linux服务暴露到Windows外部网络。
summary.en: Distrod is a systemd-based meta-distro for WSL 2 that enables installing Ubuntu, Arch, Debian, Gentoo and more with systemd in under a minute. It provides auto-start on Windows boot and built-in port forwarding to expose Linux services outside Windows.

metadata.name: hsweb-framework
metadata.description: hsweb (haʊs wɛb) 是一个基于spring-boot 2.x开发 ,首个使用全响应式编程的企业级后台管理系统基础项目。

summary.zh: hsweb是一个基于Spring Boot 2.x的全响应式企业级后台管理框架。首发全面采用Spring WebFlux和R2DBC实现端到端响应式编程，支持MySQL、PostgreSQL等主流数据库。提供DSL风格通用CRUD、类JPA增删改查、RBAC权限控制和数据权限管理等企业级功能，模块化设计便于按需集成。
summary.en: hsweb is an enterprise-grade admin framework built on Spring Boot 2.x featuring full reactive programming throughout. It leverages Spring WebFlux and R2DBC for end-to-end reactivity, supporting MySQL, PostgreSQL and other major databases. Offers DSL-style CRUD, JPA-like operations, RBAC and data permission management with modular architecture for flexible integration.

metadata.name: mqtt
metadata.description: MQTT协议3.1.1中文翻译版，IoT，物联网

summary.zh: MQTT协议3.1.1中文翻译版本，完全覆盖协议规范的全部章节，包括14种控制报文格式（CONNECT、PUBLISH、SUBSCRIBE等）、QoS服务质量等级、安全机制、WebSocket传输等核心内容。为中文开发者学习物联网消息传输协议提供权威参考文档。
summary.en: Complete Chinese translation of MQTT 3.1.1 protocol specification, covering all 14 control packets (CONNECT, PUBLISH, SUBSCRIBE, etc.), QoS levels, security mechanisms, and WebSocket transport. Provides authoritative reference for Chinese developers learning IoT message transmission protocols.

metadata.name: qBittorrent
metadata.description: qBittorrent BitTorrent client

summary.zh: 基于C++/Qt开发的开源BitTorrent客户端，集成libtorrent核心引擎，提供跨平台支持、高速稳定下载及Unicode编码支持。内置搜索、RSS订阅、带宽控制等功能，是μTorrent的优质开源替代方案。
summary.en: An open-source BitTorrent client built with C++/Qt, powered by the libtorrent engine. Cross-platform, fast and stable with Unicode support, featuring integrated search, RSS subscription, and bandwidth control. A solid open-source alternative to μTorrent.

metadata.name: TrackersListCollection
metadata.description: 🎈 Updated daily! A list of popular BitTorrent Trackers! / 每天更新！全网热门 BT Tracker 列表！

summary.zh: 每日更新的热门BT Tracker列表项目，汇集148个可用 trackers，精选72个最佳 trackers。支持 HTTP/UDP 多协议，提供 best/all/http/nohttp 等多种分类列表，可有效提升 BitTorrent 下载速度，兼容 qBittorrent、Aria2、BitComet 等主流客户端。
summary.en: A daily-updated collection of 148 popular BitTorrent trackers with 72 best ones curated. Offers multiple categories (best/all/http/nohttp) and protocols (HTTP/UDP) to effectively improve BT download speed, compatible with qBittorrent, Aria2, BitComet and other major clients.

metadata.name: diboot
metadata.description: 写的更少, 性能更好 -> 为开发人员打造的低代码开发框架，基础框架可免写90%的SQL，同时具备极强的零代码模型表单页面流程的设计能力和代码生成能力，可在pro-code、low-code、no-code之间自由选择灵活切换，全方位赋能开发。

summary.zh: Diboot是面向开发人员的低代码开发框架，通过基础组件和代码生成器可免写90%SQL。支持零代码表单/流程设计和全栈代码生成，兼备高性能内核。在pro-code、low-code、no-code模式间灵活切换，全面提升开发效率。
summary.en: Diboot is a low-code development framework for developers that eliminates 90% SQL writing through core components and code generators. It offers zero-code form/workflow design and full-stack code generation with a high-performance kernel, enabling flexible switching between pro-code, low-code, and no-code modes to boost development efficiency.

metadata.name: HowToCook
metadata.description: 程序员在家做饭方法指南。Programmer's guide about how to cook at home (Simplified Chinese only).

summary.zh: 面向程序员的家庭烹饪指南，采用结构化、精确的步骤描述替代传统模糊菜谱。涵盖素菜、荤菜等常见菜系，按1-5星难度分级，提供厨房设备使用技巧与烹饪基础技能教程。社区驱动开源，支持Docker本地部署与PDF下载。
summary.en: A structured cooking guide designed for programmers, replacing traditional vague recipes with precise step-by-step instructions. Covers vegetable and meat dishes, difficulty-rated 1-5 stars, includes kitchen equipment tutorials and cooking fundamentals. Community-driven open-source project with Docker deployment and PDF download support.

metadata.name: kubesphere
metadata.description: The container platform tailored for Kubernetes multi-cloud, datacenter, and edge management ⎈ 🖥 ☁️

summary.zh: KubeSphere是基于Kubernetes构建的分布式云原生应用管理平台，提供多云、数据中心和边缘统一的容器管理能力。平台采用即插即用的可扩展架构，内置多租户管理、DevOps流水线、应用商店及集群运维功能，通过可视化Web界面帮助企业快速构建和运营Kubernetes集群。
summary.en: KubeSphere is a distributed operating system for cloud-native application management built on Kubernetes, providing unified container management across multi-cloud, data centers, and edge environments. With a plug-and-play extensible architecture, it offers multi-tenant management, DevOps pipelines, application store, and cluster operations through an intuitive web UI.

metadata.name: SpringBlade
metadata.description: SpringBlade 是一个由商业级项目升级优化而来的SpringCloud分布式微服务架构、SpringBoot单体式微服务架构并存的综合型项目，采用Java17 API重构了业务代码，完全遵循阿里巴巴编码规范。采用Spring Boot 3.5 、Spring Cloud 2025 、Mybatis 等核心技术，同时提供基于React和Vue的两个前端框架用于快速搭建企业级的SaaS多租户微服务平台。

summary.zh: SpringBlade是由商业级项目升级的微服务架构平台，支持SpringCloud分布式与SpringBoot单体式并存。采用Java17重构，基于Spring Boot 3.5、Spring Cloud 2025、Mybatis Plus等核心技术，提供SaaS多租户、多终端认证、JWT安全认证解决方案。集成Nacos、Sentinel，前端支持React与Vue双框架。已在生产环境稳定运行六年，版本更新至V4.8.0。
summary.en: SpringBlade is a commercial-grade microservice architecture platform supporting both SpringCloud distributed and SpringBoot monolithic deployment. Built with Java17, Spring Boot 3.5, Spring Cloud 2025, it provides SaaS multi-tenant capabilities, multi-terminal authentication, and JWT security. Integrated with Nacos and Sentinel, featuring dual frontend frameworks (React/Vue). Stable in production for 6 years, now at V4.8.0.

metadata.name: Typora_Free_Download
metadata.description: Typora _v0.11.18 最新免费版安装包（后面的v1.0就开始收费了）

summary.zh: Typora v0.11.18 安装包资源仓库。Typora 是一款跨平台的 Markdown 编辑器，v0.11.18 是该软件开始收费前的最后一个免费版本。该仓库提供该版本的安装包下载。
summary.en: Repository hosting Typora v0.11.18 installer. Typora is a cross-platform Markdown editor, and v0.11.18 was the last free version before the software transitioned to a paid model.

metadata.name: Ant-Forest
metadata.description: 基于AutoJS的蚂蚁森林收能量脚本

summary.zh: 基于AutoJS开发的蚂蚁森林自动化脚本，实现自动收取好友能量、智能识别倒计时、多账号切换、自动解锁屏幕等功能。支持计时/循环/全天候等多种运行模式，提供可视化配置和能量统计，无需ROOT即可在安卓7.0+系统运行。
summary.en: An AutoJS-based automation script for Alipay's Ant Forest that automatically collects energy from friends. Features smart countdown detection, multi-account switching, automatic screen unlock, and visual configuration. Runs on Android 7.0+ without ROOT support.

metadata.name: Airtest
metadata.description: UI Automation Framework for Games and Apps

summary.zh: Airtest是网易开源的跨平台UI自动化测试框架，支持Android、iOS和Windows应用。提供图像识别技术定位UI元素，无需代码注入即可自动化游戏和App测试。配套AirtestIDE图形工具，支持大规模设备农场运行，生成HTML测试报告和录屏。集成Poco可访问UI对象层级结构。
summary.en: Airtest is a NetEase open-source cross-platform UI automation framework for games and apps on Android, iOS and Windows. It uses image recognition to locate UI elements without code injection. Features AirtestIDE GUI tool, supports large-scale device farm testing with HTML reports and screen recording, integrates with Poco for UI object hierarchy access.

metadata.name: AutoJs6
metadata.description: 安卓平台 JavaScript 自动化工具 (Auto.js 二次开发项目)

summary.zh: AutoJs6 是 Auto.js 的开源分支项目，一款基于 Android 无障碍服务的 JavaScript 自动化工具。采用 Rhino 引擎执行脚本，支持屏幕截图、控件操作、文件处理等丰富 API。可用于手机自动化测试、批量操作、效率提升等场景。项目于 2021 年 12 月启动维护，持续更新至今。
summary.en: AutoJs6 is an open-source fork of Auto.js, a JavaScript automation tool for Android leveraging accessibility services. Powered by Rhino JavaScript engine, it provides rich APIs for screen capture, UI element manipulation, and file operations. Ideal for automated testing, batch processing, and productivity enhancement on Android devices. Development started in December 2021 with ongoing updates.

metadata.name: AutoGPT
metadata.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

summary.zh: AutoGPT是一个AI代理构建与部署平台，支持通过低代码可视化界面创建自动化工作流。用户可自定义AI代理或使用预置模板，完成复杂任务自动化。提供自托管与云托管两种部署方式，基于Docker容器化运行。
summary.en: AutoGPT is an AI agent building and deployment platform enabling low-code workflow automation. Users can create custom agents or use pre-built templates to automate complex tasks. Supports self-hosted and cloud deployment via Docker containerization.

metadata.name: qBittorrent-Enhanced-Edition
metadata.description: [Unofficial] qBittorrent Enhanced, based on qBittorrent

summary.zh: 基于qBittorrent的非官方增强版BitTorrent客户端，专为大陆用户优化。核心功能包括自动封禁Xunlei、QQ、Baidu等国内客户端，以及可选的封禁中国未知peer和BitTorrent媒体播放器peer。采用C++/Qt + libtorrent架构，集成DB-IP的IP地理位置数据库实现国家识别，支持Windows、Linux、macOS多平台。
summary.en: Unofficial enhanced qBittorrent client optimized for mainland China users. Features auto-banning of domestic clients like Xunlei, QQ, Baidu, plus optional blocking of unknown Chinese peers and BitTorrent media players. Built with C++/Qt and libtorrent, integrates DB-IP geo-location database for country identification, supporting Windows, Linux, and macOS.

metadata.name: QQScreenShot
metadata.description: 电脑QQ截图工具提取版,支持文字提取、图片识别、截长图、qq录屏。默认截图文件名为ScreenShot日期

summary.zh: 从QQ中逆向提取的Windows截图工具，支持Ctrl+Alt+A快捷键截图、OCR文字识别（集成QQ原生OCR，支持PaddleOCR/百度OCR/OCRSpace）、截长图与录屏功能，并提供滚轮音量控制、贴图等增强特性。
summary.en: A Windows screenshot tool extracted from QQ via reverse engineering, featuring Ctrl+Alt+A hotkey capture, OCR text recognition (integrating native QQ OCR with PaddleOCR/BaiduOCR/OCRSpace support), long screenshot and screen recording, plus wheel volume control and image pinning utilities.

metadata.name: gradio
metadata.description: Build and share delightful machine learning apps, all in Python. 🌟 Star to support our work!

summary.zh: Gradio是一个开源Python库，可快速构建和分享机器学习Web应用。仅需少量Python代码即可为模型、API或任意函数创建交互式演示，并支持一键生成公开链接进行分享。无需任何前端开发经验，显著降低机器学习应用部署门槛。
summary.en: Gradio is an open-source Python library for rapidly building and sharing machine learning web apps. With just a few lines of Python code, you can create interactive demos for models, APIs, or any functions, then generate public sharing links instantly. No frontend experience required, dramatically lowering the barrier to ML application deployment.

metadata.name: AutoScriptBase
metadata.description: AutoJS项目框架，用于快速构建自动化项目

summary.zh: 基于AutoJS的安卓自动化脚本开发框架，提供可视化配置界面、多脚本调度器、控件查找工具、日志系统、SQLite数据库、本地OCR识别（PaddleOCR/MlKitOCR）、YOLO目标检测、自动解锁/锁屏、GitHub自动更新等功能，用于快速构建安卓自动化项目。
summary.en: AutoJS-based Android automation script framework featuring visual configuration UI, multi-script dispatcher, widget lookup tools, logging system, SQLite database, local OCR (PaddleOCR/MlKitOCR), YOLO object detection, auto unlock/lock screen, and GitHub auto-update for rapid Android automation project development.

metadata.name: sdnext
metadata.description: SD.Next: All-in-one WebUI for AI generative image and video creation, captioning and processing

summary.zh: SD.Next是一款基于WebUI的AI图像与视频生成平台，支持Stable Diffusion等多种扩散模型。核心亮点包括跨平台支持（CUDA/ROCm/DirectML/OpenVINO/MPS等）、先进优化技术（Triton/量化/模型编译）以及150+OpenCLiP模型的图像标注功能。提供桌面与移动端界面，支持10种语言本地化。
summary.en: SD.Next is an all-in-one WebUI for AI image and video generation based on Stable Diffusion models. It features cross-platform support (CUDA/ROCm/DirectML/OpenVINO/MPS), advanced optimization (Triton/quantization/compilation), and image captioning via 150+ OpenCLiP models. Includes desktop/mobile UI with 10-language localization.

metadata.name: ChatGPT-ToolBox
metadata.description: 由ChatGPT自己编写的ChatGPT工具箱。 当前功能: 1. 绕过高负载禁止登录 2.关闭数据监管 3.链路维持(减少网络错误) 4.API混合接入  5.会话导入导出  6.聊天记录下载 7.解锁GPT4-Mobile

summary.zh: 一款由AI编写ChatGPT增强工具箱，以浏览器小书签形式运行。提供绕过高负载登录限制、关闭数据监管、链路维持、API混合接入、会话导入导出、聊天记录下载及GPT4-Mobile解锁等功能。无需安装插件，复制JS代码至书签即可使用，适合需要深度定制ChatGPT体验的用户。
summary.en: An AI-written ChatGPT enhancement toolkit running as a browser bookmarklet. Features include bypassing high-load login restrictions, disabling data monitoring, connection maintenance, mixed API access, session import/export, chat history download, and GPT4-Mobile unlocking. No plugin installation required—just add the JS code to bookmarks for immediate use.

metadata.name: dopamine-windows
metadata.description: Audio player which tries to make organizing and listening to music as simple and pretty as possible.

summary.zh: Dopamine 是一款 Windows 平台的简洁美观音频播放器，由 C# 开发并基于 CSCore 音频库驱动。致力于简化音乐组织和播放体验，支持多种音频格式（通过 FFmpeg）。兼容 Windows 7 至 10 系统，提供直观易用的界面，适合追求简约音乐管理能力的用户。
summary.en: Dopamine is a Windows audio player written in C# and powered by the CSCore sound library, designed to make organizing and listening to music simple and visually appealing. It supports multiple audio formats via FFmpeg and is compatible with Windows 7-10, offering an intuitive interface for users seeking minimalist music management.

summary.zh: 基于Auto.js开发的《战双帕弥什》游戏助手脚本，支持自动化操作、OCR文字识别、图像识别与坐标管理，提供多语言UI界面、悬浮窗及运行日志功能，需在Auto.js Pro或Autox.js环境下运行。
summary.en: An Auto.js-based game assistant script for "Punishing: Gray Raven" providing automation, OCR text recognition, image recognition, and coordinate management with multilingual UI, floaty window, and runtime logs, requiring Auto.js Pro or Autox.js environment.

metadata.name: notepad--
metadata.description: 一个支持windows/linux/mac的文本编辑器，目标是做中国人自己的编辑器，来自中国。

summary.zh: Notepad--是一款轻量级跨平台文本编辑器，支持Windows/Linux/Mac三大操作系统，重点适配国产UOS系统，目标是实现文本编辑软件的国产化替代。
summary.en: Notepad-- is a lightweight cross-platform text editor supporting Windows/Linux/Mac, with focus on domestic UOS system, aiming to provide a Chinese-made alternative for text editing software.

metadata.name: DataX
metadata.description: DataX是阿里云DataWorks数据集成的开源版本。

summary.zh: DataX是阿里巴巴开源的离线数据同步框架，作为阿里云DataWorks数据集成的核心引擎，在阿里内部广泛使用。框架采用插件化架构，通过Reader和Writer插件实现MySQL、Oracle、HDFS、Hive、MaxCompute等50+种异构数据源之间的高效数据传输，支持整库迁移、增量同步、分库分表等复杂场景。
summary.en: DataX is Alibaba's open-source offline data synchronization framework, serving as the core engine for阿里云DataWorks data integration and widely used within Alibaba. It adopts a plugin-based architecture, enabling efficient data transfer between 50+ heterogeneous data sources including MySQL, Oracle, HDFS, Hive, and MaxCompute through Reader/Writer plugins, supporting full library migration, incremental sync, and sharding scenarios.

metadata.name: stolon
metadata.description: PostgreSQL cloud native High Availability and more.

summary.zh: Stolon是云原生PostgreSQL高可用管理器，利用流复制实现数据库自动故障转移。包含Keeper（实例管理）、Sentinel（集群视图计算）、Proxy（客户端接入）三个核心组件，支持Kubernetes、etcd、consul等存储后端，提供自动服务发现、动态重配置、点时间恢复及待机集群等企业级功能。
summary.en: Stolon is a cloud native PostgreSQL HA manager using streaming replication for automatic failover. Its architecture comprises Keeper for instance management, Sentinel for cluster view computation, and Proxy for client access, supporting Kubernetes, etcd, and consul backends with features including service discovery, dynamic reconfiguration, PITR, and standby clusters.

metadata.name: PowerJob
metadata.description: Enterprise job scheduling middleware with distributed computing ability.

summary.zh: PowerJob是一款企业级分布式任务调度中间件，支持CRON、固定频率、延迟等多种定时策略，提供单机、广播、Map、MapReduce四种执行模式，内置工作流DAG支持和多语言处理器（Java/Shell/Python）。具备水平扩展能力和容错机制，广泛应用于定时任务、批量数据处理、延迟订单等企业场景。
summary.en: PowerJob is an enterprise-grade distributed job scheduling middleware featuring multiple timing strategies (CRON, fixed-rate, delay), four execution modes (standalone, broadcast, Map, MapReduce), DAG workflow support, and multilingual processors. With horizontal scaling and fault tolerance, it excels in scheduled tasks, batch processing, and delayed job scenarios.

metadata.name: MusicPlayer2
metadata.description: MusicPlayer2是一款功能强大的本地音乐播放软件，旨在为用户提供最佳的本地音乐播放体验。它支持歌词显示、歌词卡拉OK样式显示、歌词在线下载、歌词编辑、歌曲标签识别、专辑封面显示、专辑封面在线下载、频谱分析、音效设置、任务栏缩略图按钮、主题颜色、格式转换等功能，支持高度自定义的界面布局，支持多种播放内核（BASS和FFMpeg）。播放器支持大部分常见的音频格式。

summary.zh: MusicPlayer2是一款功能强大的Windows本地音乐播放器，采用C++/MFC开发。支持歌词显示、卡拉OK样式、在线下载歌词和专辑封面、频谱分析、音效均衡器、桌面歌词、任务栏歌词显示。提供多套界面主题，支持BASS和FFMpeg双内核，兼容主流音频格式，适合追求高可玩性的音乐爱好者。
summary.en: MusicPlayer2 is a powerful Windows local music player built with C++/MFC. It features lyrics display with karaoke effects, online lyrics and album art downloading, spectrum analysis, equalizer, desktop lyrics, and taskbar lyric display. Supports dual playback engines (BASS/FFMpeg) with multiple interface themes, catering to music enthusiasts seeking highly customizable playback experience.

metadata.name: fastjson2
metadata.description: 🚄 FASTJSON2 is a Java JSON  library with excellent performance.

summary.zh: 阿里巴巴开源的高性能Java JSON处理库，是fastjson的下一代升级版本。支持JSON和JSONB两种协议，提供完整解析和部分解析能力，支持Java服务端、Android客户端及Kotlin。性能相比v1大幅提升，内置JSON Schema验证，兼容fastjson 1.x API。Apache License 2.0开源。
summary.en: Alibaba's high-performance Java JSON library, serving as the next-generation upgrade of fastjson. Supports both JSON and JSONB protocols with full and partial parsing capabilities. Runs on Java servers, Android clients, and Kotlin. Features significantly improved performance over v1 and built-in JSON Schema validation. Apache 2.0 licensed.

metadata.name: NotepadNext
metadata.description: A cross-platform, reimplementation of Notepad++

summary.zh: 基于 Qt 6.5 开发的跨平台文本编辑器，作为 Notepad++ 的独立重新实现。支持 Windows、Linux、macOS 三大平台，采用 GPL v3 开源协议。当前版本处于开发阶段，存在已知 bug，不建议用于关键工作场景。
summary.en: A cross-platform text editor built with Qt 6.5, serving as an independent reimplementation of Notepad++. Supports Windows, Linux, and macOS under GPL v3 license. Currently in development with known bugs; not recommended for critical tasks.

metadata.name: dolby_beta
metadata.description: 杜比大喇叭的β版迎来了重大的革新，合并了UnblockMusic Pro的所有功能且更加强大，同时UnblockMusicPro_Xposed项目将会停止维护，让我们欢送这位老朋友！

summary.zh: 杜比大喇叭β版是一款网易云音乐音源代理Xposed模块，通过音源替换绕过地区版权限制。用户可免费畅听无版权及付费歌曲，并获得更高音质体验（最高320K）。模块以嵌入式方式集成到网易云音乐设置中，采用AndroidX API开发，兼容最新版本网易云。
summary.en: Dolby Beta is an Xposed module for NetEase Cloud Music that bypasses regional copyright restrictions via source proxy. It enables users to access unavailable tracks and enjoy higher audio quality (up to 320K). Embedded into NetEase Music settings with AndroidX API, it supports the latest app versions.

metadata.name: arthas
metadata.description: Alibaba Java Diagnostic Tool Arthas/Alibaba Java诊断利器Arthas

summary.zh: Arthas是阿里巴巴开源的Java诊断工具，可在不修改代码、不重启JVM的情况下实时排查生产环境问题。支持类加载检查、反编译、方法调用追踪、性能分析、监控系统指标等功能，通过命令行交互界面提供便捷的在线诊断体验。
summary.en: Arthas is an open-source Java diagnostic tool by Alibaba that enables real-time production troubleshooting without code modification or JVM restart. It supports class loading inspection, decompilation, method call tracing, performance profiling, and system metrics monitoring via an interactive CLI.

metadata.name: ControlNet
metadata.description: Let us control diffusion models!

summary.zh: ControlNet是文本到图像扩散模型的条件控制框架，通过复制网络块为「锁定」和「可训练」双副本实现精细控制。其核心创新「零卷积」技术使权重和偏置初始化为零，训练前不产生任何干扰，支持在小数据集甚至个人设备上微调。该架构可复用Stable Diffusion编码器作为强大骨干网络，实现边缘、姿态、深度等多种条件的图像生成控制，且显存需求与原SD相当。
summary.en: ControlNet is a conditional control framework for text-to-image diffusion models, implementing fine-grained control by duplicating network blocks into 'locked' and 'trainable' copies. Its core innovation 'zero convolution' initializes weights and biases to zero, causing no interference before training and enabling fine-tuning on small datasets or personal devices. This architecture reuses Stable Diffusion encoder as a robust backbone for multi-condition control including edge, pose, and depth, with memory usage comparable to original SD.

metadata.name: concept
metadata.description: 封装了一些常用组件，走过路过不要错过哦

summary.zh: Java实用工具组件库，基于Spring生态构建。核心模块包括：插件化动态加载外部jar类、注解驱动下载接口、WebSocket集群方案（支持Redis/RabbitMQ/Kafka转发）、异步转同步、事件驱动模型、MapQueue及属性继承等。旨在将复杂逻辑封装为简洁API，提升开发效率。
summary.en: A comprehensive Java utility library built on Spring ecosystem. Core modules include: dynamic plugin jar loading, annotation-based download handler, WebSocket clustering (Redis/RabbitMQ/Kafka), async-to-sync conversion, event-driven model, MapQueue, and property inheritance. Designed to simplify complex logic into elegant APIs for enhanced productivity.

metadata.name: winotify
metadata.description: A pure python module to create Windows 10 Notification

summary.zh: winotify是一个纯Python编写的Windows 10通知库，无需任何外部依赖，仅需系统自带的PowerShell即可运行。支持Toast通知显示、保留在操作中心、可点击通知带5个动作按钮、自定义图标和声音，适用于Windows桌面应用的消息推送需求。
summary.en: winotify is a pure Python library for creating Windows 10 toast notifications without external dependencies, using only the built-in PowerShell. It supports stay-in-action-center notifications, clickable notifications with up to 5 action buttons, custom icons and audio, ideal for Windows desktop application notifications.

metadata.name: win10toast-click
metadata.description: An easy-to-use Python library for displaying Windows 10 Toast Notifications. Improved version of win10toast and win10toast-persist to include `callback_on_click` to run a function on notification click, for example to open a URL.

summary.zh: 一款简洁易用的Python库，用于在Windows 10/11系统中显示Toast通知。该库是win10toast的增强版，创新性地支持callback_on_click功能，用户点击通知时可触发自定义函数执行，例如自动打开指定URL。提供线程化模式，可并行运行其他代码。
summary.en: A lightweight Python library for displaying Windows 10/11 Toast notifications. This enhanced fork of win10toast introduces callback_on_click functionality, enabling users to trigger custom functions—such as opening a URL—when clicking notifications. Supports threaded mode for parallel execution.

metadata.name: mapstruct
metadata.description: An annotation processor for generating type-safe bean mappers

summary.zh: MapStruct是Java注解处理器，在编译时自动生成类型安全的bean映射代码。通过声明映射接口配合注解，生成器自动创建实现类，相比运行时反射框架具有显著的性能优势和编译时类型检查能力。支持Java 8+及Java 16+ records，提供自定义映射配置，适用于DTO转换、对象拷贝等企业应用场景。
summary.en: MapStruct is a Java annotation processor that generates type-safe bean mappers at compile time. By declaring mapping interfaces with annotations, the generator automatically creates implementation classes, offering significant performance advantages and compile-time type checking compared to runtime reflection frameworks. Supports Java 8+ and Java 16+ records with customizable mapping configurations, ideal for DTO conversion and object copying in enterprise applications.

metadata.name: Sa-Token
metadata.description: ✨ 开源、免费、一站式 Java 权限认证框架，让鉴权变得简单、优雅！—— 登录认证、权限认证、分布式 Session 会话、微服务网关鉴权、SSO 单点登录、OAuth2.0 统一认证、jwt 集成、API Key 秘钥授权、API 参数签名

summary.zh: Sa-Token是dromara开源的轻量级Java权限认证框架，提供登录认证、权限认证、SSO单点登录、OAuth2.0、微服务鉴权五大核心模块。通过简洁的API实现一行代码完成会话登录、权限校验、踢人下线等操作，支持SpringBoot、Solon等主流框架及Redis分布式存储，显著简化权限开发流程。
summary.en: Sa-Token is an open-source lightweight Java authentication framework by dromara, featuring five core modules: login auth, permission auth, SSO, OAuth2.0, and microservice auth. It enables one-line code authentication, supports mainstream frameworks like SpringBoot and Solon with Redis storage, dramatically simplifying permission development.

metadata.name: incubator-seata
metadata.description: :fire: Seata is an easy-to-use, high-performance, open source distributed transaction solution.

summary.zh: Apache Seata 是 Apache 软件基金会的分布式事务解决方案，专为微服务架构设计。支持 AT、TCC、Saga、XA 四种事务模式，提供高性能和易用的全局事务协调机制。核心组件包括事务协调器(TC)、事务管理器(TM)和资源管理器(RM)，通过一阶段解析执行+二阶段提交回滚的实现模式，有效解决跨服务数据一致性问题。
summary.en: Apache Seata is a distributed transaction solution from Apache Software Foundation, designed for microservices architecture. It supports AT, TCC, Saga, and XA transaction modes with high performance and ease of use. Core components include Transaction Coordinator, Transaction Manager, and Resource Manager, implementing parse-execute in phase one and commit/rollback in phase two to solve cross-service data consistency issues.

metadata.name: a1111-sd-webui-tagcomplete
metadata.description: Booru style tag autocompletion for AUTOMATIC1111's Stable Diffusion web UI

summary.zh: 为AUTOMATIC1111的Stable Diffusion WebUI设计的Booru风格标签自动补全扩展。支持Danbooru和e621标签（前10万热标签），提供即时补全提示、键盘导航、暗色/亮色模式。支持Wildcards、Extra Networks（Embedding、Hypernetwork、LoRA、LyCORIS）、Chants自定义预设格式及多语言翻译功能。
summary.en: A Booru-style tag autocompletion extension for AUTOMATIC1111's Stable Diffusion WebUI. Supports Danbooru and e621 tags (top 100k), instant completion hints, keyboard navigation, dark/light mode. Also supports Wildcards, Extra Networks (Embeddings, Hypernets, LoRA, LyCORIS), Chants custom presets, and multilingual translations.

metadata.name: stable-diffusion-webui
metadata.description: Stable Diffusion web UI

summary.zh: 基于Gradio构建的Stable Diffusion网页UI，提供txt2img、img2img、inpainting、outpainting等完整AI绘画功能。集成GFPGAN人脸修复、RealESRGAN超分辨率、Textual Inversion等高级特性，支持自定义脚本扩展与Checkpoint合并，是目前最流行的开源AI图像生成工具。
summary.en: A Gradio-based web UI for Stable Diffusion, providing complete AI painting capabilities including txt2img, img2img, inpainting, and outpainting. Integrates GFPGAN face restoration, RealESRGAN upscaling, Textual Inversion, with support for custom scripts and checkpoint merging. The most popular open-source AI image generation tool.

metadata.name: Bilibili-Evolved
metadata.description: 强大的哔哩哔哩增强脚本

summary.zh: 基于Tampermonkey/Violentmonkey的哔哩哔哩网站增强用户脚本，采用模块化组件架构提供弹幕控制、视频下载、界面定制等扩展功能。内置设置面板支持组件热插拔，需手动添加功能模块，对性能有一定要求。
summary.en: A modular userscript enhancing Bilibili with features like danmaku control, video download, and UI customization. Runs on Tampermonkey/Violentmonkey with a settings panel for component management. Requires manual module installation and has moderate hardware demands.

metadata.name: geohash-java
metadata.description: Implementation of GeoHashes in java. We try to be/stay compliant to the spec, as far as possible.

summary.zh: 纯Java实现的Geohash算法库，支持1-12位字符编码（5-60bits）和64位长整型完整精度。与geohash.org参考实现兼容（字符模式），提供WGS84坐标编码、边界框计算、跨180度经线边界框及邻近哈希查询等功能，适用于地理位置编码存储与邻近点搜索场景。
summary.en: Pure Java implementation of the Geohash algorithm supporting 1-12 character encoding (5-60 bits) and full 64-bit long precision. Compatible with geohash.org reference implementation in character mode, providing WGS84 coordinate encoding, bounding box calculations, cross-180° meridian support, and nearest-neighbor hash queries for location-based storage and proximity search.

metadata.name: TDengine
metadata.description: High-performance, scalable time-series database designed for Industrial IoT (IIoT) scenarios

summary.zh: TDengine是由涛思数据开发的高性能时序数据库，专为工业物联网场景设计。支持高速写入与查询、水平扩展、集群部署，提供标准SQL接口和多语言SDK，已通过CII最佳实践认证，全球开源社区活跃。
summary.en: TDengine is a high-performance, scalable time-series database developed by TAOS Data, specifically designed for Industrial IoT scenarios. It supports high-speed writes and queries, horizontal scaling, cluster deployment, and provides standard SQL interfaces with multi-language SDKs.

metadata.name: jpa-sample-tmall
metadata.description: DDD persistence with JPA sample

summary.zh: 这是一个展示领域驱动设计（DDD）架构下JPA持久化实践的示例项目。以天猫电商业务为场景，演示了实体(Entity)、值对象(Value Object)、聚合根(Aggregate Root)等DDD核心概念在JPA中的实现方式，包含订单、商品、用户等电商核心领域的建模与数据持久化代码。
summary.en: A practical sample demonstrating DDD (Domain-Driven Design) persistence with JPA, using a Tmall-like e-commerce business scenario. It showcases core DDD concepts including Entities, Value Objects, and Aggregate Roots implemented with JPA, covering e-commerce domains like orders, products, and users.

metadata.name: marktext
metadata.description: 📝A simple and elegant markdown editor, available for Linux, macOS and Windows.

summary.zh: 一款简洁优雅的开源Markdown编辑器，专注于速度与可用性。支持Linux、macOS和Windows三大平台，提供实时预览、语法高亮、多种编辑模式等功能。采用Electron框架构建，为追求高效写作体验的用户提供流畅的编辑体验。
summary.en: A simple and elegant open-source markdown editor focused on speed and usability. Available for Linux, macOS and Windows, it offers real-time preview, syntax highlighting, and multiple editing modes. Built with Electron, it delivers a seamless writing experience for users seeking efficiency.

summary.zh: Fluent-Mybatis 是 MyBatis 增强框架，通过代码生成器和流式 API 简化数据库操作。支持多数据库（MySQL、Oracle、PostgreSQL等），内置丰富 CRUD 方法和条件构造器，无需编写 XML 文件，直接生成 Entity 实体类、Mapper 接口和 Service 层代码，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: Fluent-Mybatis enhances MyBatis with code generation and fluent API, streamlining database operations across multiple databases (MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, etc.). It generates Entity classes, Mapper interfaces and Service layers automatically, providing rich built-in CRUD methods and condition builders without XML configuration.

metadata.name: migration
metadata.description: 《系统重构与迁移指南》手把手教你分析、评估现有系统、制定重构策略、探索可行重构方案、搭建测试防护网、进行系统架构重构、服务架构重构、模块重构、代码重构、数据库重构、重构后的架构守护

summary.zh: 系统重构与迁移领域权威实践指南，涵盖遗留系统分析、重构策略制定、四级重构模式（架构/服务/模块/代码）、数据库重构及架构守护全流程。EPDCA循环与DDD方法论双轨指导，配套技术债务评估、自动化测试防护网建设方案，为开发者提供从方案设计到落地的系统性方法论。
summary.en: Comprehensive guide for system refactoring and migration, covering legacy system analysis, refactoring strategy development, four-level refactoring patterns (architecture/service/module/code), database refactoring, and architecture governance. Uses EPDCA cycle and DDD methodology with technical debt assessment and automated testing protection plans.

metadata.name: x-file-storage
metadata.description: 一行代码将文件存储到 本地、FTP、SFTP、WebDAV、谷歌云存储、阿里云OSS、华为云OBS、七牛云Kodo、腾讯云COS、百度云 BOS、又拍云USS、MinIO、 AWS S3、FastDFS、 Azure Blob Storage、金山云 KS3、美团云 MSS、京东云 OSS、天翼云 OOS、移动云 EOS、沃云 OSS、 网易数帆 NOS、Ucloud US3、青云 QingStor、平安云 OBS、首云 OSS、IBM COS、其它兼容 S3 协议的平台。后续即将支持 Samba、NFS

summary.zh: 一行代码实现文件存储到30+云存储平台，包括阿里云OSS、腾讯云COS、AWS S3、MinIO、FastDFS等。提供统一API接口，支持文件上传、下载、迁移、断点续传和预签名URL，适用于Java/Spring Boot项目。
summary.en: One-line code to store files across 30+ cloud storage platforms including Aliyun OSS, Tencent Cloud COS, AWS S3, MinIO, and FastDFS. Provides unified API for file upload, download, migration, resumable upload and pre-signed URLs, designed for Java/Spring Boot applications.

metadata.name: jpa-spec
metadata.description: A JPA Query By Specification framework.

summary.zh: 基于Spring Data JPA的动态查询框架，灵感源自Hibernate Criteria API。提供Builder风格链式API，支持Equal/NotEqual/Like/In/NotIn等条件判断，可动态构建复杂查询语句。支持左连接、分页、排序及自定义Specification，适用于需要灵活动态查询的Java企业级应用。
summary.en: A dynamic query framework built on Spring Data JPA, inspired by Hibernate Criteria API. Provides builder-style chain APIs for constructing complex queries with conditions like Equal, NotEqual, Like, In, and NotIn. Supports left joins, pagination, sorting, and custom specifications, ideal for Java enterprise applications requiring flexible dynamic queries.

metadata.name: Live3D-v2
metadata.description: Neural Rendering with Attention: An Incremental Improvement for Anime Character Animation

summary.zh: Live3D v2是一款基于神经渲染与注意力机制的动漫角色动画生成系统。该项目采用增强型U-Net架构，引入自注意力模块替代传统ResNet50编码器，实现从2D图像或绘画到动态动漫角色的转换。支持视频生成、角色上色及3D点云重建，提供Windows懒人包一键部署。
summary.en: Live3D v2 is a neural rendering system for anime character animation using attention mechanisms. It employs an enhanced U-Net architecture with self-attention modules, replacing the traditional ResNet50 encoder to enable conversion from 2D images or drawings to dynamic anime characters. Supports video generation, character colorization, and 3D point cloud reconstruction with Windows one-click deployment.

metadata.name: hutool
metadata.description: 🍬A set of tools that keep Java sweet.

summary.zh: Hutool是一个功能丰富的Java工具库，通过封装字符串、数字、集合、编码、日期、文件、IO、加密解密、数据库JDBC、JSON、HTTP客户端等常用操作，帮助开发者快速便捷地完成开发任务。提供核心库、缓存、定时任务、加密解密、数据库操作等模块，代码简洁易懂，文档健全。
summary.en: Hutool is a comprehensive Java utility library that streamlines common development tasks by providing well-encapsulated tools for string manipulation, numeric processing, collection handling, encoding, date formatting, file operations, IO streaming, encryption, database JDBC, JSON, and HTTP client operations. It offers modular components including core utilities, caching, cron scheduling, cryptography, and database operations with thorough Chinese documentation.

metadata.name: spring-data-jpa-entity-graph
metadata.description: Spring Data JPA extension allowing full dynamic usage of EntityGraph on repositories

summary.zh: Spring Data JPA 官方仅支持通过注解静态定义 EntityGraph，无法在运行时动态选择。该库扩展了 Spring Data JPA，允许将 EntityGraph 作为方法参数传递，在运行时动态决定加载哪些关联实体，优化查询性能并适配不同业务场景。
summary.en: This library extends Spring Data JPA to enable dynamic EntityGraph usage at runtime. Unlike Spring Data JPA's static annotation-based EntityGraph, it allows passing EntityGraph as a method parameter, letting developers choose which related entities to load dynamically per request, optimizing queries for different use cases.

metadata.name: jetlinks-community
metadata.description: JetLinks  基于Java,Spring Boot ,WebFlux,Netty,Vert.x,Reactor等开发, 是一个全响应式的企业级物联网平台。支持统一物模型管理,多种设备,多种厂家,统一管理。统一设备连接管理,多协议适配(TCP,MQTT,UDP,CoAP,HTTP等),屏蔽网络编程复杂性,灵活接入不同厂家不同协议等设备。实时数据处理,设备告警,消息通知,数据转发。地理位置,数据可视化等。能帮助你快速建立物联网相关业务系统。

summary.zh: JetLinks是基于Java 17、Spring Boot 3、Spring WebFlux、Netty、Vert.x构建的企业级物联网平台。采用全响应式架构，支持TCP/UDP/MQTT/HTTP/CoAP等多协议设备统一接入，实现统一物模型管理、实时数据处理、设备告警、规则引擎等功能，最小化部署仅需Java 17、Redis和TimescaleDB。
summary.en: JetLinks is an enterprise-grade IoT platform built on Java 17, Spring Boot 3, WebFlux, Netty, and Vert.x. It features a fully reactive architecture supporting unified device access via TCP/UDP/MQTT/HTTP/CoAP protocols, with unified thing model management, real-time data processing, device alerting, and a flexible rule engine. Minimal deployment requires only Java 17, Redis, and TimescaleDB.

summary.zh: KCNamer是一款随机中文姓名生成工具，支持从内置百家姓和近千个现代常用名中组合生成符合中国人命名习惯的姓名，也可使用完全随机汉字生成。提供男女风格、姓名长度、姓氏指定等定制功能，支持DIY名称库导入，既可作为独立JAR运行，也可嵌入Java项目使用。
summary.en: KCNamer is a random Chinese name generator that creates names by combining surnames from a built-in database with ~1000 modern Chinese given names, or using completely random characters. It offers gender, length, and surname customization plus DIY name library support, available as standalone JAR or Java library.

metadata.name: microservices-platform
metadata.description: 基于SpringBoot2.x、SpringCloud和SpringCloudAlibaba并采用前后端分离的企业级微服务多租户系统架构。并引入组件化的思想实现高内聚低耦合，项目代码简洁注释丰富上手容易，适合学习和企业中使用。真正实现了基于RBAC、jwt和oauth2的无状态统一权限认证的解决方案，面向互联网设计同时适合B端和C端用户，支持CI/CD多环境部署，并提供应用管理方便第三方系统接入；同时还集合各种微服务治理功能和监控功能。模块包括:企业级的认证系统、开发平台、应用监控、慢sql监控、统一日志、单点登录、Redis分布式高速缓存、配置中心、分布式任务调度、接口文档、代码生成等等。

summary.zh: 基于Spring Boot 3.x、Spring Cloud 2022及Spring Cloud Alibaba构建的企业级微服务多租户架构。采用前后端分离设计，深度定制Spring Authorization Server实现RBAC+JWT+OAuth2无状态统一认证。支持应用级多租户隔离，集成应用监控、链路追踪、统一日志、慢SQL监控、分布式任务调度等企业级治理功能，提供代码生成器和完整CI/CD部署方案，适合学习及企业生产环境使用。
summary.en: Enterprise-grade microservices multi-tenant architecture built on Spring Boot 3.x, Spring Cloud 2022, and Spring Cloud Alibaba. Features front-end separation with deeply customized Spring Authorization Server implementing RBAC+JWT+OAuth2 stateless authentication. Supports application-level multi-tenant isolation, integrated with application monitoring,链路追踪, unified logging, slow SQL monitoring, distributed task scheduling, and code generation. Provides complete CI/CD deployment, ideal for learning and production use.

metadata.name: downkyi
metadata.description: 哔哩下载姬downkyi，哔哩哔哩网站视频下载工具，支持批量下载，支持8K、HDR、杜比视界，提供工具箱（音视频提取、去水印等）。

summary.zh: 哔哩下载姬是一款专业的哔哩哔哩视频下载工具，支持8K、HDR、杜比视界等高清格式批量下载。内置多功能工具箱，支持音视频提取、去水印等实用功能，采用WPF开发，界面简洁高效。
summary.en: Downkyi is a professional Bilibili video downloader supporting 8K, HDR, and Dolby Vision formats with batch downloading. Features a built-in toolkit for audio/video extraction and watermark removal, developed with WPF for a clean and efficient interface.

metadata.name: Spring-MultiRequestBody
metadata.description: Spring多@RequestBody支持

summary.zh: Spring框架扩展库，解决Spring MVC中@RequestBody注解的多项限制。支持在同一请求中解析多个实体对象、注入基本类型包装类；提供注解value指定key、参数名匹配、属性自动映射等多种解析策略；兼容GET/POST等请求方式，允许多余属性存在。该库通过自定义参数解析器实现灵活的JSON到参数的映射。
summary.en: A Spring framework extension addressing @RequestBody annotation limitations in Spring MVC. Enables parsing multiple entity objects and primitive wrapper types in a single request. Provides flexible parsing strategies via annotation value, parameter name matching, and property auto-mapping. Supports various HTTP methods and allows extra JSON properties without errors through custom parameter resolvers.

metadata.name: PixivBiu
metadata.description: Pixiv 辅助工具

summary.zh: 基于Python的Pixiv辅助工具，提供Web界面实现作品搜索、收藏排序、原始图片下载（支持单/多线程及aria2），可获取用户作品、关注列表、推荐内容，并支持宽高、类型、标签等筛选功能。
summary.en: Python-based Pixiv assistant with web UI, enabling artwork search with favorites/popularity sorting, original image downloads via single/multithread/aria2, fetching user works/followings/recommendations, and filtering by dimensions, type, and tags.

metadata.name: MockingBird
metadata.description: 🚀Clone a voice in 5 seconds to generate arbitrary speech in real-time

summary.zh: MockingBird是一个基于深度学习的实时语音克隆工具，只需5秒音频即可克隆任意声音并生成新语音。项目采用PyTorch框架实现，支持中文普通话及多种数据集，提供Web服务接口，可跨Windows、Linux及M1 Mac平台运行。核心技术源自Real-Time Voice Cloning。
summary.en: MockingBird is a deep learning-based real-time voice cloning tool that can clone any voice from just 5 seconds of audio and generate new speech. Built with PyTorch, it supports Mandarin Chinese and multiple datasets, provides web server interface, and runs across Windows, Linux and M1 Mac platforms. Core technology derives from Real-Time Voice Cloning.

metadata.name: parkinglot
metadata.description: 基于vue、vant的一个智慧停车、充电一体化的移动端项目

summary.zh: 基于Vue3和Vant UI组件库开发的智慧停车与充电一体化移动端应用。主要提供停车场导航、车位预约、在线支付充电费用等功能，集成停车与充电两大核心场景，为用户打造便捷的一站式出行服务体验。
summary.en: A smart parking and EV charging integrated mobile application built with Vue3 and Vant UI component library. It provides parking navigation, space reservation, and online charging payment, combining parking and charging scenarios for a seamless user experience.

metadata.name: TrafficMonitor
metadata.description: 这是一个用于显示当前网速、CPU及内存利用率的桌面悬浮窗软件，并支持任务栏显示，支持更换皮肤。

summary.zh: TrafficMonitor是一款Windows平台网速监控悬浮窗软件，实时显示网络传输速率、CPU及内存占用率，支持嵌入任务栏、换肤、历史流量统计和硬件监控（温度/显卡/硬盘）。提供标准版与Lite版，标准版需管理员权限，Lite版无需权限即可使用。
summary.en: TrafficMonitor is a Windows desktop network speed monitoring floating widget that displays real-time network transfer rates, CPU and memory usage. It supports taskbar embedding, skin customization, historical traffic statistics, and hardware monitoring (temperature/GPU/disk). Offers Standard and Lite versions with different permission requirements.

metadata.name: vue-manage-system
metadata.description: Vue3、Element Plus、typescript后台管理系统

summary.zh: 基于Vue3 + Pinia + Element Plus + TypeScript构建的后台管理系统模板，采用Vite 3作为构建工具。提供登录注册、Dashboard数据看板、表格表单、图表可视化、富文本/Markdown编辑器、图片拖拽上传、完整权限管理、三级菜单导航、自定义图标及主题切换等完整功能模块。代码结构清晰，逻辑简洁，适合快速开发外包项目或企业内部管理系统。
summary.en: A comprehensive backend admin system template built with Vue3, Pinia, Element Plus, and TypeScript, powered by Vite 3. Features include authentication, dashboard, data tables/forms, charts, rich text/Markdown editor, image upload, permission management, three-level menus, custom icons, and theme switching. With clean code structure, ideal for rapid development of outsourcing projects or enterprise internal management systems.

metadata.name: bdex-rs
metadata.description: Tool to download bdex:// files. Written in pure Rust.

summary.zh: 纯Rust编写的命令行工具，用于通过bdex://协议下载分块文件。支持多线程并行下载、可配置重试次数、跳过哈希验证等功能。工作时先并行下载各区块到临时目录，然后合并为完整文件并自动清理。适用于需要高速下载大文件的场景。
summary.en: A pure Rust CLI tool for downloading files via bdex:// protocol. Supports multi-threaded parallel downloads, configurable retry attempts, and hash verification skipping. It downloads blocks to a temporary directory in parallel, merges them into a complete file, then automatically cleans up. Ideal for high-speed large file downloads.

metadata.name: vue-admin-template
metadata.description: a vue2.0 minimal admin template

summary.zh: 基于Vue 2.0和Element UI构建的极简管理后台模板，集成axios网络请求、iconfont图标库与完整权限控制机制。支持基于用户角色的动态路由与菜单生成，提供lint代码规范检查，采用vue-cli 4.0+构建，适用于快速搭建中后台管理应用。
summary.en: A minimal Vue 2.0 admin template built with Element UI, featuring axios for HTTP requests, iconfont icons, and comprehensive permission control. Supports dynamic routing and menu generation based on user roles, includes lint code checking, and is constructed with vue-cli 4.0+ for rapid development of management applications.

metadata.name: termux-install-linux
metadata.description: Termux一键安装Linux脚本

summary.zh: 在Termux终端模拟器上一键安装Linux发行版的脚本工具，支持Ubuntu、Kali、Debian。采用国内码云镜像加速下载，预配置国内软件源，解决国外资源访问缓慢和手动配置源的痛点。通过PRoot技术无需Root即可在Android设备上运行完整Linux环境。
summary.en: A one-click script for installing Linux distributions (Ubuntu, Kali, Debian) on Termux terminal emulator. Uses domestic Gitee mirrors for faster downloads and pre-configures Chinese software repositories, addressing slow foreign resource access. Runs full Linux on Android via PRoot without root required.

metadata.name: EShareTool
metadata.description: EShareTool is an application running on Windows platform which can bypass ESurfingClient's sharing limited.

summary.zh: EShareTool是一款Windows平台桌面应用，主要用于绕过中国电信天翼校园客户端(ESurfingClient)的网络共享限制，实现多设备同时上网。该工具通过突破客户端的网络封锁机制，支持Windows 7及以上系统，无需安装VC++运行库即可运行。
summary.en: EShareTool is a Windows desktop application designed to bypass network sharing restrictions imposed by ESurfingClient (China Telecom's campus network client). It enables multiple devices to connect simultaneously by circumventing client-side network blocks, supporting Windows 7 and above with no VC++ runtime required.

metadata.name: notes
metadata.description: 学习代码的一些笔记

summary.zh: 基于Vuepress搭建的Java学习技术笔记博客，自动部署于GitHub Pages。内容涵盖尚硅谷、狂神等主流Java学习路线，包含详细的代码学习记录与项目部署指南。
summary.en: A Vuepress-powered Java learning technical notes blog deployed on GitHub Pages. Covering mainstream Java learning paths like Atguigu and Kuangshen, with detailed code learning records and deployment guides.

metadata.name: UmaUmaCruise-db-urarawin
metadata.description: A config builder for the UmaCruise-U based on Python3

summary.zh: 基于Python3的赛马娘游戏模拟器配置构建工具，从UraraWin数据源生成UmaCruise-U所需的数据库配置，帮助玩家快速搭建游戏环境。
summary.en: A Python3-based config builder for the UmaCruise-U racing game simulator, generating database configurations from the UraraWin data source to help players quickly set up the game environment.

metadata.name: UmaUmaCruise
metadata.description: このソフトは、自動でDMM版ウマ娘のウィンドウから、イベント選択肢の効果を知るために作られました

summary.zh: 针对DMM版赛马娘开发的自动化辅助工具，通过OpenCV图像识别和Tesseract OCR技术自动捕获游戏窗口、识别事件选项并显示效果影响。提供URA联赛预测和比赛预约功能，帮助玩家优化育成决策。
summary.en: Automation tool for DMM Uma Musume using OpenCV and Tesseract OCR to detect game windows, recognize event choices, and display their effects. Features URA race prediction and race reservation to optimize training strategies.

metadata.name: GM_script
metadata.description: 我就是来分享脚本玩玩的

summary.zh: 一款开源的TamperMonkey浏览器脚本，移除百度、搜狗、谷歌等搜索引擎的结果重定向，直接显示原始网址，同时屏蔽搜索广告和百家号内容。支持Favicon图标、单双列布局、护眼模式及自定义CSS样式。自2015年持续维护至今，已迭代至V27版本。
summary.en: An open-source TamperMonkey userscript that removes search result redirects on Baidu, Sogou, and Google, displaying original URLs directly while blocking ads and Baidu author content. Supports Favicon icons, single/double-column layouts, eye-protection mode, and custom CSS styling. Continuously maintained since 2015, now at V27.

metadata.name: qaac
metadata.description: CLI QuickTime AAC/ALAC encoder

summary.zh: qaac 是一个基于 Apple CoreAudioToolbox 的命令行音频编码工具，支持 AAC 和 ALAC 格式转换。该工具利用 QuickTime 底层编码器，需配合 iTunes 安装包使用。注意：7.9.8.x 至 7.10.9.0 版本的 CoreAudioToolbox 在 AAC CBR 模式下存在爆音问题。
summary.en: qaac is a CLI audio encoder leveraging Apple CoreAudioToolbox to encode AAC and ALAC formats. It requires iTunes installation for CoreAudioToolbox DLLs. Note: CoreAudioToolbox versions 7.9.8.x through 7.10.9.0 have glitch issues in AAC CBR mode.

metadata.name: uperf
metadata.description: Userspace performance controller for android

summary.zh: Uperf是一款Android用户态性能控制器，通过sysfs节点实现动态性能调度。支持UI线程绑核、触摸升频、负载采样、场景识别等高级功能，可在不修改内核和框架的情况下实现类似内核态的升频效果。兼容Android 6.0-12和arm64-v8a架构，提供Magisk或手动安装方式。
summary.en: Uperf is an Android userspace performance controller enabling dynamic performance tuning via sysfs nodes. It supports UI thread binding, touch boost, load sampling, and scene recognition, delivering kernel-level boost capabilities without modifying kernel or framework. Compatible with Android 6.0-12 and arm64-v8a, installable via Magisk or manually.

metadata.name: auto-submit
metadata.description: 今日校园自动提交疫情上报，通用

summary.zh: Python实现的今日校园疫情上报自动提交脚本，支持邮件推送提交结果。通过模拟登录智慧校园云端系统或通用API两种方式实现，兼容绝大多数高校。可部署于腾讯云函数或自有服务器实现定时自动执行，适用于高校学生每日疫情打卡场景。
summary.en: Python script for automatic daily epidemic report submission on 今日校园 (Campus Cloud). Supports email notifications and works via cloud system login or universal API. Compatible with most universities and deployable on Tencent Cloud Function or self-hosted servers for scheduled execution.

metadata.name: netch
metadata.description: A simple proxy client

summary.zh: Netch 是一款基于 .NET 6.0 的 Windows 代理客户端，支持进程流量拦截、局域网共享、TUN 虚拟网卡、Web 代理等多种模式，兼容 Socks5、Shadowsocks、ShadowsocksR、WireGuard、Trojan、VMess、VLESS 等主流协议，采用 Netfilter/WinTUN 内核驱动实现 UDP FullCone NAT，适用于游戏加速和网络代理场景。
summary.en: Netch is a Windows proxy client built on .NET 6.0, supporting ProcessMode, ShareMode, TunMode, and WebMode with kernel-level drivers (Netfilter/WinTUN). It supports Socks5, Shadowsocks, ShadowsocksR, WireGuard, Trojan, VMess, and VLESS protocols, featuring UDP FullCone NAT for gaming acceleration and network proxy scenarios.

metadata.name: dbg-macro
metadata.description: A dbg(…) macro for C++

summary.zh: 一个C++单头文件调试宏库，提供dbg(...)宏替代printf进行快速调试。特性包括：彩色终端输出、打印文件名/行号/函数名、显示类型信息、支持容器和智能指针等复杂类型的美观打印、可在表达式中使用、包含时发出警告提醒移除。兼容C++11/14/17。
summary.en: A single-header C++ debugging macro library providing dbg(...) as a printf replacement. Features colorized terminal output, prints file/line/function names with type info, pretty-prints containers/smart pointers, works in expressions, and warns on inclusion. Compatible with C++11/14/17.

metadata.name: eladmin
metadata.description: eladmin jpa 版本：项目基于 Spring Boot 2.7.18、 Jpa、 Spring Security、Redis、Vue的前后端分离的后台管理系统，项目采用分模块开发方式， 权限控制采用 RBAC，支持数据字典与数据权限管理，支持一键生成前后端代码，支持动态路由

summary.zh: 基于Spring Boot 2.7.18与Jpa构建的前后端分离后台管理系统，采用分模块架构设计。集成Spring Security与Redis实现RBAC权限控制，支持数据字典、数据权限、动态路由及一键代码生成。包含日志监控、定时任务、运维部署等企业级功能，前端采用Vue技术栈。
summary.en: A Spring Boot 2.7.18 and Jpa-based full-stack admin system with modular architecture. Features RBAC permission control via Spring Security and Redis, supporting data dictionaries, data permissions, dynamic routing, and one-click code generation. Includes enterprise features like logging, scheduled tasks, and DevOps deployment with Vue frontend.

metadata.name: golutra
metadata.description: Multi-agent AI orchestration platform for automation, workflows, and developer tools. Golutra transforms Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw into a unified agent system with parallel execution, task orchestration, long-running workflows, and AI productivity workspace.

summary.zh: golutra 是一个多智能体协作桌面应用，将现有 AI CLI（Claude、Codex、Qwen 等）整合为统一工作流。支持多智能体并行执行、自动编排、实时日志监控，无需迁移项目即可升级单兵开发为团队协作。使用 Vue 3 + Rust (Tauri) 构建，兼容 Windows 与 macOS。
summary.en: golutra is a multi-agent collaboration desktop app that unifies existing AI CLIs (Claude, Codex, Qwen, etc.) into a single workflow. It enables parallel execution, automated orchestration, and real-time log monitoring without project migration, upgrading single-person development to team collaboration. Built with Vue 3 + Rust (Tauri) for Windows and macOS.

metadata.name: openfr
metadata.description: OpenFR：A lightweight agent for financial research

summary.zh: OpenFR 是基于大语言模型的轻量级金融研究 Agent，集成 AKShare 数据接口实现股票、基金、期货等金融数据的自动化查询与分析。采用 Plan-Execute 架构先规划研究步骤再执行，支持 15+ 主流 LLM 提供商，具备多数据源自动切换、并行工具调用、智能缓存等性能优化特性，提供美观的 Rich 终端交互界面。
summary.en: OpenFR is a lightweight AI-powered financial research agent built on LLMs, integrating AKShare for automated stock, fund, futures, and macro data analysis. It uses a Plan-Execute architecture to first plan research steps then execute tools, supporting 15+ LLM providers with multi-source failover, parallel execution, intelligent caching, and a Rich CLI interface.

summary.zh: OpenClaw项目专用容器化无头Chromium浏览器沙箱，通过Chrome DevTools Protocol（CDP）实现远程控制。支持无头与可视化两种运行模式，集成Xvfb虚拟帧缓冲、x11vnc和noVNC提供可视化调试能力。基于debian:bookworm-slim精简镜像，包含CJK字体支持，适用于浏览器自动化、网页抓取及OpenClaw自动化任务场景。
summary.en: Containerized headless Chromium browser sandbox for OpenClaw, controllable via Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP). Supports both headless and visual modes with integrated Xvfb, x11vnc, and noVNC for visual debugging. Built on debian:bookworm-slim with CJK font support, ideal for browser automation, web scraping, and OpenClaw automation tasks.

metadata.name: openhare
metadata.description: AI-powered desktop SQL client. Cross-platform. Built with Flutter.

summary.zh: 开源跨平台桌面SQL客户端，集成AI能力辅助SQL编写、优化和理解。支持MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQL Server、SQLite、Oracle等主流数据库，采用Flutter + Rust技术栈构建，提供现代化直观的用户界面，适用于开发者和DBA日常数据库管理工作。
summary.en: An AI-powered, cross-platform desktop SQL client built with Flutter and Rust. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, SQLite, and Oracle databases. Features AI assistance for SQL writing, optimization, and understanding, with a modern intuitive UI for developers and DBAs.

metadata.name: EnsoAI
metadata.description: Multiple Agents, Parallel Flow

summary.zh: EnsoAI 是一款基于 Git Worktree 的多 AI 代理并行协作工具，突破性地支持 Claude、Codex、Gemini、Cursor 等多个 AI 同时在不同工作区运行，告别传统开发的分支切换与上下文中断问题。内置可视化 Git 界面，提供键盘驱动的代码审查与提交体验。
summary.en: EnsoAI is a parallel AI agent orchestration tool built on Git Worktrees, enabling Claude, Codex, Gemini, Cursor and other AI models to work simultaneously across different workspaces without context switching. Features a visual, keyboard-driven Git interface for code review and commit management.

metadata.name: GitNexus
metadata.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

summary.zh: GitNexus是零服务器代码智能引擎，可在浏览器中直接将代码库转换为交互式知识图谱。内置Graph RAG Agent，支持依赖关系追踪和调用链分析。提供CLI+MCP和Web UI两种模式，完全本地运行保护隐私，适合AI代理上下文增强和代码架构理解。
summary.en: GitNexus is a zero-server code intelligence engine that transforms codebases into interactive knowledge graphs entirely in the browser. Features built-in Graph RAG Agent for dependency tracking and call chain analysis. Offers CLI+MCP and Web UI modes with fully local execution for privacy, ideal for AI agent context augmentation and code architecture understanding.

metadata.name: leetcode-mcp-server
metadata.description: An MCP server enabling automated access to LeetCode's problems, solutions, and public data with optional authentication for user-specific features, supporting leetcode.com & leetcode.cn sites.

summary.zh: 基于 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 的 LeetCode 集成服务器，支持 leetcode.com 与 leetcode.cn 双平台。可获取题目描述、官方解答、用户提交、提交历史及竞赛数据，通过认证还可访问私人笔记和进度跟踪。为 AI 助手和自动化工作流提供编程题库接口。
summary.en: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server integrating LeetCode APIs for both leetcode.com and leetcode.cn platforms. Provides access to problem descriptions, editorial solutions, user submissions, contest data, and with authentication, private notes and progress tracking. Enables AI assistants to interact with programming challenges programmatically.

metadata.name: pagescms
metadata.description: The simplest CMS you'll ever need. Manage content and media right in your GitHub repository.

summary.zh: Pages CMS 是一个开源的 GitHub 仓库内容管理系统，专为静态站点和内容驱动型应用设计。支持 Jekyll、Hugo、Next.js、Astro、VuePress 等主流静态站点生成器，可通过托管版本或本地部署使用，采用 PostgreSQL 存储，提供完整的 GitHub App 集成能力。
summary.en: Pages CMS is an open-source content management system for GitHub repositories, designed for static sites and content-driven applications. It supports popular static site generators like Jekyll, Hugo, Next.js, Astro, and VuePress, available as hosted service or self-hosted with PostgreSQL and full GitHub App integration.

metadata.name: cc-connect
metadata.description: Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

summary.zh: cc-connect 将本地 AI 编码代理无缝桥接到飞书、Slack、Telegram 等主流 IM，零公网 IP 即可远程对话，支持 Claude Code、Cursor、Gemini CLI 等多模型，一键部署，让 AI 助手随身而行。
summary.en: cc-connect bridges local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms like Slack, Telegram, Feishu, etc. Chat with your dev AI anywhere—no public IP needed for most channels. One-command setup, multi-model ready.

metadata.name: arnis
metadata.description: Generate any location from the real world in Minecraft with a high level of detail.

summary.zh: Arnis 利用 OpenStreetMap 与地形高程数据，将任意真实地点一键转换为 Minecraft Java/Bedrock 高精度世界，支持 GUI 与 CLI，跨平台开源，可自定义比例、建筑内饰与出生点。
summary.en: Arnis turns any real-world location into high-fidelity Minecraft Java/Bedrock worlds using OpenStreetMap & elevation data. GUI/CLI, open-source, cross-platform, with customizable scale, interiors and spawn.

metadata.name: cobe
metadata.description: 5KB WebGL globe lib.

summary.zh: 5KB 零依赖 WebGL 地球组件，支持任意 DOM 标记绑定与 CSS 动画，高性能渲染弧线和点标记，轻松打造互动数据地球。
summary.en: A 5 KB zero-dependency WebGL globe that binds any DOM element as markers, animates with CSS, and renders high-perf arcs & points for interactive data globes.

metadata.name: rtk
metadata.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies

summary.zh: RTK 是一款零依赖的 Rust CLI 代理，可在常见开发指令中把 LLM token 消耗压缩 60-90%，单二进制 <10 ms 延迟，支持 100+ 命令，即装即用。
summary.en: RTK is a zero-dependency Rust CLI proxy that cuts LLM token usage by 60-90% on everyday dev commands; single binary, <10 ms overhead, 100+ supported commands.

metadata.name: editor
metadata.description: Create and share 3D architectural projects.

summary.zh: 基于 React Three Fiber + WebGPU 的 3D 建筑编辑器，采用 Turborepo 三模块架构：core 管理节点与场景状态，viewer 负责 WebGPU 渲染，editor 提供交互工具。支持节点层级、撤销/重做、IndexedDB 持久化，可一键分享建筑方案。
summary.en: Web-first 3D building editor powered by React Three Fiber & WebGPU. Turborepo splits logic into @pascal-app/core (scene state, node schemas), viewer (WebGPU rendering), and editor (interactive tools). Features node hierarchy, undo/redo, IndexedDB persistence, and one-click sharing of architectural projects.

metadata.name: printf-tac-toe
metadata.description: tic-tac-toe in a single call to printf

summary.zh: 仅用一次 printf 调用实现完整井字棋：利用格式化字符串副作用读写内存、分支与循环，scanf 交互输入，IOCCC 2020 获奖作品，展示 printf 的图灵完备性。
summary.en: Complete tic-tac-toe in a single printf call: exploits format-string side effects for memory read/write, branching and looping; scanf handles user input. Winner of IOCCC 2020, showcasing printf's Turing-completeness.

metadata.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
metadata.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

summary.zh: 提炼自 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码缺陷的洞见，仅用一份 CLAUDE.md 文件，以“先思考再编码、极简优先、精准改动、目标驱动”四大原则，显著降低 Claude Code 的过度工程与误改风险，让 AI 编程更可靠、简洁、可验证。
summary.en: A distilled CLAUDE.md file that embeds Andrej Karpathy’s insights on LLM coding pitfalls. It enforces four principles—think first, simplicity, surgical edits, goal-driven verification—to make Claude Code less over-engineered, more reliable and verifiable.

metadata.name: local-discovery
metadata.description: 零侵入的本地微服务注册发现工具，一行 JVM 参数实现本地服务互调，自动穿透远端注册中心

summary.zh: 零侵入本地微服务注册发现工具，一行 JVM 参数即可让本地服务互相发现，未启动服务自动穿透远端注册中心，支持 Nacos/Eureka/Consul，兼容 Feign、RestTemplate、Gateway、WebClient，无需改代码、配置或 POM，调试链路完整、环境无抢占、热生效。
summary.en: Zero-intrusion local microservice discovery agent: one JVM flag lets local services find each other instantly while transparently falling back to remote registries (Nacos/Eureka/Consul). Supports Feign, RestTemplate, Gateway, WebClient without code, config or POM changes—restoring full debug chains and eliminating environment contention.

metadata.name: gitlogue
metadata.description: A cinematic Git commit replay tool for the terminal, turning your Git history into a living, animated story.

summary.zh: gitlogue 将 Git 提交历史变成终端里的电影：逐字符动画、语法高亮、文件树过渡，一键回放任意区间，支持主题、速度、过滤，可作屏保、教学、演示或内容创作。
summary.en: gitlogue turns Git history into a cinematic terminal experience: animated typing, syntax highlighting and file-tree transitions let you replay any commit range with themes, speed control and filters—perfect for screensavers, teaching, demos or content creation.

metadata.name: vscode-git-graph
metadata.description: Fork of Michael Hutchisons repository with some updates.

summary.zh: 在 VS Code 内以图形化面板深度浏览 Git 仓库，支持多选分支/作者过滤、合并无关历史、代码评审持久化、一键跳 HEAD 等 20+ 增强功能，提升大型仓库协作效率。
summary.en: Enhanced VS Code extension that renders Git history as an interactive graph panel, adding multi-select filtering, unrelated-history merge, persistent code reviews, jump-to-HEAD and 20+ refinements for large-repo collaboration.

metadata.name: oxideterm
metadata.description: Local-first SSH workspace for local shells and remote machines — SSH, SFTP, trzsz, port forwarding, lightweight remote editing, file management, and BYOK AI in one native binary. Built with Tauri 2 and pure Rust SSH. Zero Electron, zero OpenSSL, zero telemetry, and no app subscription for core SSH workflows.

summary.zh: OxideTerm 用 Tauri2+Rust 打造零依赖原生终端，集成 SSH、SFTP、远程 IDE、AI 代理与文件管理，支持智能重连、MCP、RAG、插件、30+主题、11 语言，无需 OpenSSL 与 Electron。
summary.en: OxideTerm is a zero-dependency native terminal built with Tauri2+Rust, bundling SSH, SFTP, remote IDE, AI agent and file manager. Features smart reconnect, MCP, RAG, plugins, 30+ themes and 11 languages—no OpenSSL or Electron.
tags_zh: 纯 Rust SSH 无 OpenSSL

metadata.name: openilink-hub
metadata.description: 开源微信 Bot 管理平台 + App 应用市场 | Self-hosted WeChat Bot Platform with App Marketplace | Lark · Slack · Discord · DingTalk · GitHub · Notion · 20+ Apps | AI Tools | 7 Language SDKs

summary.zh: OpeniLink Hub 是首个围绕微信 ClawBot iLink 协议打造的开源自托管 Bot 管理平台，支持扫码绑定多微信号，内置 20+ 一键安装的跨平台应用，实现飞书、Slack、Discord、GitHub、Notion 等消息互通与 AI 能力扩展，并提供 7 种语言 SDK、WebSocket/Webhook/AI 三通道转发、24h 会话续期与链路追踪，零配置即可运行。
summary.en: OpeniLink Hub is the first open-source, self-hosted Bot management platform built on WeChat ClawBot’s iLink protocol. Bind multiple WeChat accounts via QR scan, install 20+ cross-platform apps in one click to bridge Lark, Slack, Discord, GitHub, Notion, etc., and extend AI capabilities. Features 7-language SDKs, WebSocket/Webhook/AI triple routing, 24 h session renewal, and full traceability—runs out of the box.

metadata.name: wxWebHook
metadata.description: 本项目是一个轻量级的消息通知服务。通过封装微信官方接口，帮助开发者将关键信息快速推送至微信端。用户只需通过简单的 HTTP 请求或命令行调用即可将内容实时推送到自己的微信上，实现随时随地接收提醒。

summary.zh: 基于微信官方接口的轻量级消息推送网关，通过 HTTP Webhook 一键把服务器告警、脚本结果等关键信息实时送达微信，支持 Docker 一键部署与面板管理。
summary.en: A lightweight notification gateway that leverages WeChat’s official APIs to deliver server alerts or script results to your WeChat instantly via simple HTTP webhooks, with Docker deployment and a management panel.

metadata.name: wincron
metadata.description: Cron job scheduler for windows

summary.zh: 单文件可执行、低占用的 Windows 任务调度器，用类 Unix cron 语法配置定时任务，支持并发策略、失败禁用、日志、托盘静默运行及 IPC 命令行远程管理，替代臃肿系统计划任务。
summary.en: Single-binary, low-overhead Windows task scheduler driven by Unix-like cron expressions. Offers concurrency control, failure auto-disable, logs, tray mode and IPC CLI, replacing the bulky built-in Task Scheduler.

metadata.name: Mouser
metadata.description: A lightweight, open-source, fully local alternative to Logitech Options+ for remapping Logitech HID++ mice.

summary.zh: Mouser 是零依赖、零遥测的本地 Logitech 鼠标重映射工具，完整替代 Options+。支持 HID++ 全协议、跨平台原生钩子、应用级配置、实时 DPI 与 Smart-Shift 控制，MX Master 系列体验最佳。
summary.en: Mouser is a zero-dependency, zero-telemetry local remapper for Logitech HID++ mice, drop-in replacement for Options+. Offers full HID++ protocol, cross-platform native hooks, per-app profiles, real-time DPI & Smart-Shift control, with MX Master family as first-class citizen.

metadata.name: page-agent
metadata.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

summary.zh: 阿里巴巴开源的轻量级页面智能体，仅用一行脚本即可在网页内注入自然语言GUI操控能力，无需扩展、后端或视觉模型，可秒变SaaS AI Copilot、智能表单或无障碍助手。
summary.en: Alibaba’s ultra-light in-page GUI agent; one-line script embeds natural-language web control without extensions, backends or vision models, turning any site into an AI copilot, smart form filler or accessibility assistant.

metadata.name: xianyu-auto-reply
metadata.description: 闲鱼自动回复管理系统是一个基于 Python + FastAPI 开发的自动化客服系统，专为闲鱼平台设计。系统通过 WebSocket 连接闲鱼服务器，实时接收和处理消息，提供智能化的自动回复服务。

summary.zh: 基于 FastAPI 的闲鱼实时客服机器人，通过 WebSocket 监听消息并自动回复，但代码含大量硬编码密钥、后门与数据外泄通道，可窃取 Cookie、聊天记录与邮箱验证码，使用风险极高。
summary.en: A FastAPI-based real-time customer-service bot for Xianyu that listens via WebSocket and auto-replies, yet embeds hard-coded keys, backdoors and data-exfil channels able to steal cookies, chat logs and email verification codes—high-risk usage.

metadata.name: mcp-toolbox
metadata.description: MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open source MCP server for databases.

summary.zh: MCP Toolbox for Databases 是 Google 开源的 MCP 服务器，兼具“开箱即用”与“深度定制”双重能力：预置通用工具让 AI 代理、IDE 秒连企业数据库，零代码即可探索数据与生成 SQL；同时提供安全框架，可构建带语义搜索、NL2SQL 的生产级专用工具，支持 Go/Python/JS/Java 多语言 SDK。
summary.en: MCP Toolbox for Databases is Google’s open-source MCP server that gives AI agents and IDEs instant, secure access to enterprise databases. Use prebuilt tools for zero-code data exploration or its framework to craft production-grade, NL2SQL-enabled custom tools, with SDKs in Go, Python, JS and Java.

metadata.name: gridea-pro
metadata.description: Gridea Pro - 下一代桌面静态博客写作客户端 —— 像用 Notion 一样写博客。

summary.zh: Gridea Pro 是新一代桌面静态博客客户端，基于 Go+Wails+Vue3 重写，零门槛开箱即用，内置 Monaco 编辑器、AI 辅助、9 套主题与一键部署 GitHub Pages/Vercel 等 6 大平台，让写作回归专注。
summary.en: Gridea Pro is a next-gen desktop static blog client rebuilt with Go+Wails+Vue3. It offers zero-config setup, Monaco editor, AI assistance, 9 built-in themes and one-click deploy to 6 platforms including GitHub Pages & Vercel, letting writers focus on content.

metadata.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
metadata.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

summary.zh: 基于 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码缺陷的洞察，提炼出“先思考、简优先、精准改、目标驱动”四大原则，浓缩为单文件 CLAUDE.md，可一键安装到 Claude Code，显著减少幻觉式假设与过度工程。
summary.en: A distilled CLAUDE.md that turns Andrej Karpathy’s insights on LLM coding pitfalls into four actionable rules—Think First, Simplicity, Surgical Edits, Goal-Driven—installable as a Claude Code plugin to curb hallucinations and bloat.

metadata.name: auth
metadata.description: Boring user authentication code for golang

summary.zh: Go 语言的一站式自托管用户认证库，开箱即支持邮箱密码、OAuth（Google、Facebook、Twitter）及企业 SAML SSO，可插拔接口轻松扩展任意 OAuth2 提供商，内建限速、安全会话与密码哈希，支持 SQLite/PostgreSQL，几行代码即可嵌入现有 Web 项目。
summary.en: A drop-in, self-hosted user authentication library for Go that bundles email/password, OAuth (Google, Facebook, Twitter) and enterprise SAML SSO. Pluggable OAuth2 interface lets you add any provider in minutes; built-in rate limiting, secure sessions, and password hashing included. Works with SQLite or PostgreSQL.

metadata.name: tunnl.gg
metadata.description: Expose localhost to the internet

summary.zh: Tunnl.gg 是一个极简 SSH 隧道服务，用一条命令即可把本地 8080 端口暴露到公网，自动生成易记子域名与 Let's Encrypt 证书，内置多维度限流、反滥用与钓鱼拦截，支持 WebSocket，零配置、无需登录即可使用。
summary.en: Tunnl.gg is a minimal SSH tunneling service that exposes your localhost:8080 to the internet with one command, auto-provisioning memorable subdomains and Let's Encrypt certificates. It ships with multi-layer rate-limiting, anti-abuse, phishing interstitial, WebSocket support, and requires zero client configuration or authentication.

metadata.name: opencode
metadata.description: The open source coding agent.

summary.zh: OpenCode 是首个全开源 AI 编程代理，提供 CLI、桌面端与多语言 SDK，支持 npm/brew/scoop 等一键安装，可本地运行并深度集成 IDE，实现代码生成、重构与调试全流程自动化。
summary.en: OpenCode is the first fully open-source AI coding agent, shipping CLI, desktop and SDKs. One-line install via npm/brew/scoop, runs locally and embeds into any IDE to automate generation, refactoring and debugging end-to-end.

metadata.name: papermark
metadata.description: Papermark is the open-source DocSend alternative with built-in analytics and custom domains.

summary.zh: Papermark 是开源的 DocSend 替代方案，支持自定义域名、实时文档访问分析，可自托管，基于 Next.js+TypeScript 构建，适合安全分享 Pitch Deck 与报告。
summary.en: Papermark is an open-source DocSend alternative for secure document sharing with custom domains and real-time analytics. Built on Next.js & TypeScript, it can be self-hosted for pitch decks and reports.

metadata.name: caveman
metadata.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

summary.zh: Claude Code 插件 caveman 通过“穴居人”式极简输出，将 LLM 响应 token 数砍掉 75%，同时保持技术准确性；支持文言文、压缩输入、单行评审等多级强度，一键安装即可提速降本。
summary.en: Claude Code plugin caveman compresses LLM responses to caveman-style minimalism, slashing tokens by ~75% while retaining full technical fidelity. Features Wenyan mode, input compression, one-line reviews, and one-command install for faster, cheaper coding.

metadata.name: obsidian-skills
metadata.description: Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and use the CLI.

summary.zh: 为 Obsidian 打造的 Agent Skills 集合，遵循 Agent Skills 规范，支持 Markdown、Bases、JSON Canvas 及 CLI 操作，兼容 Claude Code、Codex CLI 等主流 AI 代理，实现知识库自动化编辑与开发。
summary.en: A set of Agent Skills for Obsidian that conform to the Agent Skills spec, enabling AI agents like Claude Code and Codex CLI to create/edit Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas and control the Obsidian CLI for automated vault management and plugin development.

metadata.name: higress
metadata.description: 🤖 AI Gateway | AI Native API Gateway

summary.zh: Higress 是基于 Istio+Envoy 的云原生 AI 网关，通过 Wasm 插件扩展，统一托管 LLM API 与 MCP Server，支持主流模型与 OpenAPI 一键转 MCP，已在阿里通义千问、PAI 等核心 AI 平台落地，提供 99.99% 高可用。
summary.en: Higress is a cloud-native AI gateway built on Istio & Envoy, extended via Wasm plugins. It unifies LLM APIs and MCP servers, supports all major model providers, and converts OpenAPI to MCP instantly. Powers Alibaba’s Tongyi & PAI with 99.99% SLA.

metadata.name: githunt
metadata.description: Hunt the most starred projects on any date on GitHub

summary.zh: React 构建的 GitHub 星标项目探索器，支持按日期回溯、语言过滤与双视图切换，同时提供在线站点与 Chrome 扩展，一键发现每周最火开源项目。
summary.en: A React-based explorer for GitHub’s most-starred projects, letting you travel back in time, filter by language, and toggle list/grid views—available as both a web app and Chrome extension.

metadata.name: Kimi-Search-MCP
metadata.description: Kimi Code搜索服务只提供于Kimi Cli使用，故提取Kimi搜索服务为通用MCP服务，可以用在包括ClaudeCode、OpenCode等CLI工具

summary.zh: 将原本仅限Kimi CLI的搜索能力封装为通用MCP服务，支持单/批量关键词搜索与网页抓取，已验证兼容Claude Code，可无缝接入任意MCP客户端。
summary.en: Turns the previously Kimi-CLI-only search engine into a universal MCP server, offering single & batch keyword search plus page fetch, already verified with Claude Code and ready for any MCP client.

metadata.name: OfficeCLI
metadata.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

summary.zh: OfficeCLI 是全球首个专为 AI Agent 设计的 Office 套件 CLI，单二进制零依赖即可读写自动化 Word/Excel/PPT，无需安装 Office，一行命令即可让 AI 接管文档全流程。
summary.en: OfficeCLI is the world’s first CLI Office suite purpose-built for AI agents—single binary, zero dependencies, no Office install—giving agents full read/write/automation control over Word, Excel, and PowerPoint in one line.

metadata.name: KillerPDF
metadata.description: PDF editor for Windows. Install or run portable. GPLv3. No account, no subscription, no telemetry.

summary.zh: 轻量级Windows PDF编辑器，6 MB单文件即可运行，支持合并、拆分、文本编辑、手写批注、数字签名、密码保护等全功能，零安装、零账号、零遥测，GPLv3开源，彻底摆脱Adobe订阅束缚。
summary.en: Ultra-light Windows PDF editor in a 6 MB portable EXE; merge, split, inline text edit, annotate, sign, password unlock—no install, no account, no telemetry. GPLv3, Adobe-free freedom.

metadata.name: paseo
metadata.description: Orchestrate coding agents remotely from your phone, desktop and CLI

summary.zh: Paseo 是一个自托管的跨设备编码代理编排平台，统一调度 Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode 等模型，支持手机、桌面、CLI 多端协同，零遥测隐私优先，语音控制并行任务。
summary.en: Paseo is a self-hosted, cross-device orchestration platform that unifies Claude Code, Codex and OpenCode agents. Run parallel tasks on your own machines, control them via voice or CLI, and switch seamlessly between phone, desktop and web with zero telemetry.

metadata.name: huashu-design
metadata.description: Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic

summary.zh: 一句话即可在 Claude Code 内生成高保真原型、PPT、动画与信息图，内置 20 种设计哲学与 5 维评审，直接导出 MP4/PPTX/PDF，无需 Figma 或 AE。
summary.en: One prompt in Claude Code yields hi-fi prototypes, slides, motion graphics & infographics; 20 design philosophies + 5D review built-in, MP4/PPTX/PDF export—no Figma or AE needed.

metadata.name: abtop
metadata.description: Like htop, but for AI coding agents. Monitor Claude    Code & Codex CLI sessions, tokens, context window,    rate limits, and ports in real-time.

summary.zh: abtop 是面向 AI 编程代理的实时系统监视器，像 htop 一样在终端里展示 Claude Code / Codex CLI 会话的 token 用量、上下文窗口占比、速率限制、子进程与端口占用，零配置、无需 API Key，支持 tmux 跳转与 12 种主题。
summary.en: abtop is a real-time TUI monitor for AI coding agents—like htop for Claude Code & Codex CLI. Track token burn, context-window %, rate limits, child processes and open ports across sessions without API keys; tmux-aware pane jumping and 12 themes included.
